authors_text: Shengqin Wang,Yongji Zhang,Hong Qi,Minghao Zhao,Yu Jiang
title: Dynamic Spatial-temporal Hypergraph Convolutional Network for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的动态时空超图卷积网络
abstract: Skeleton-based action recognition relies on the extraction of spatial-temporal topological information. Hypergraphs can establish prior unnatural dependencies for the skeleton. However, the existing methods only focus on the construction of spatial topology and ignore the time-point dependence. This paper proposes a dynamic spatial-temporal hypergraph convolutional network (DST-HCN) to capture spatial-temporal information for skeleton-based action recognition. DST-HCN introduces a time-point hypergraph (TPH) to learn relationships at time points. With multiple spatial static hypergraphs and dynamic TPH, our network can learn more complete spatial-temporal features. In addition, we use the high-order information fusion module (HIF) to fuse spatial-temporal information synchronously. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and NW-UCLA datasets show that our model achieves state-of-the-art, especially compared with hypergraph methods.
summary: Skeleton-based action recognition relies on the extraction of spatial-temporal topological information. Hypergraphs can establish prior unnatural dependencies for the skeleton. However, the existing methods only focus on the construction of spatial topology and ignore the time-point dependence. This paper proposes a dynamic spatial-temporal hypergraph convolutional network (DST-HCN) to capture spatial-temporal information for skeleton-based action recognition. DST-HCN introduces a time-point hypergraph (TPH) to learn relationships at time points. With multiple spatial static hypergraphs and dynamic TPH, our network can learn more complete spatial-temporal features. In addition, we use the high-order information fusion module (HIF) to fuse spatial-temporal information synchronously. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and NW-UCLA datasets show that our model achieves state-of-the-art, especially compared with hypergraph methods.
abstract_zh: 基于骨架的动作识别依赖于时空拓扑信息的提取。超图可以为骨架建立先验的非自然依赖性。然而，现有方法仅关注空间拓扑的构建，而忽略了时间点依赖性。本文提出了一种动态时空超图卷积网络（DST-HCN）来捕获时空信息以进行基于骨架的动作识别。 DST-HCN 引入了时间点超图（TPH）来学习时间点上的关系。通过多个空间静态超图和动态TPH，我们的网络可以学习更完整的时空特征。此外，我们使用高阶信息融合模块（HIF）来同步融合时空信息。在 NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 NW-UCLA 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的模型达到了最先进的水平，特别是与超图方法相比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态时空超图卷积网络（DST-HCN），用于基于骨架的动作识别，通过融合时空信息提升识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注骨架的空间拓扑结构，忽略了时间点间的依赖关系，导致时空信息提取不完整。
AI.method: 引入时间点超图（TPH）捕捉时间依赖性，并结合多静态空间超图与高阶信息融合模块（HIF）同步融合时空特征。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和NW-UCLA数据集上达到最先进的性能，尤其优于其他超图方法。
AI.conclusion: DST-HCN通过建模时空依赖关系，有效提升了基于骨架的动作识别准确率。

authors_text: Geonhwa Jeong,Sana Damani,Abhimanyu Rajeshkumar Bambhaniya,Eric Qin,Christopher J. Hughes,Sreenivas Subramoney,Hyesoon Kim,Tushar Krishna
title: VEGETA: Vertically-Integrated Extensions for Sparse/Dense GEMM Tile Acceleration on CPUs
title_zh: VEGETA：CPU 上稀疏/密集 GEMM Tile 加速的垂直集成扩展
comment: This paper is accepted to HPCA 2023
comments: This paper is accepted to HPCA 2023
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) acceleration support in CPUs has recently gained a lot of traction, with several companies (Arm, Intel, IBM) announcing products with specialized matrix engines accessible via GEMM instructions. CPUs are pervasive and need to handle diverse requirements across DL workloads running in edge/HPC/cloud platforms. Therefore, as DL workloads embrace sparsity to reduce the computations and memory size of models, it is also imperative for CPUs to add support for sparsity to avoid under-utilization of the dense matrix engine and inefficient usage of the caches and registers. This work presents VEGETA, a set of ISA and microarchitecture extensions over dense matrix engines to support flexible structured sparsity for CPUs, enabling programmable support for diverse DL models with varying degrees of sparsity. Compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) dense matrix engine in CPUs, a VEGETA engine provides 1.09x, 2.20x, 3.74x, and 3.28x speed-ups when running 4:4 (dense), 2:4, 1:4, and unstructured (95%) sparse DNN layers.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) acceleration support in CPUs has recently gained a lot of traction, with several companies (Arm, Intel, IBM) announcing products with specialized matrix engines accessible via GEMM instructions. CPUs are pervasive and need to handle diverse requirements across DL workloads running in edge/HPC/cloud platforms. Therefore, as DL workloads embrace sparsity to reduce the computations and memory size of models, it is also imperative for CPUs to add support for sparsity to avoid under-utilization of the dense matrix engine and inefficient usage of the caches and registers. This work presents VEGETA, a set of ISA and microarchitecture extensions over dense matrix engines to support flexible structured sparsity for CPUs, enabling programmable support for diverse DL models with varying degrees of sparsity. Compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) dense matrix engine in CPUs, a VEGETA engine provides 1.09x, 2.20x, 3.74x, and 3.28x speed-ups when running 4:4 (dense), 2:4, 1:4, and unstructured (95%) sparse DNN layers.
abstract_zh: CPU 中的深度学习 (DL) 加速支持最近获得了广泛关注，多家公司（Arm、Intel、IBM）宣布推出具有可通过 GEMM 指令访问的专用矩阵引擎的产品。 CPU 很普遍，需要处理在边缘/HPC/云平台上运行的深度学习工作负载的不同需求。因此，随着深度学习工作负载采用稀疏性来减少模型的计算量和内存大小，CPU 也必须增加对稀疏性的支持，以避免密集矩阵引擎的利用不足以及缓存和寄存器的低效使用。这项工作提出了 VEGETA，这是一组基于密集矩阵引擎的 ISA 和微架构扩展，用于支持 CPU 的灵活结构化稀疏性，从而为具有不同稀疏程度的各种深度学习模型提供可编程支持。与 CPU 中最先进的 (SOTA) 密集矩阵引擎相比，VEGETA 引擎在运行 4:4（密集）、2:4、1:4 和非结构化 (95%) 稀疏 DNN 层时可提供 1.09 倍、2.20 倍、3.74 倍和 3.28 倍的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VEGETA，一种针对CPU的稀疏/密集GEMM矩阵运算加速的指令集和微架构扩展方案。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模型日益依赖稀疏性降低计算量，现有CPU密集矩阵引擎在处理稀疏数据时存在资源利用率低、缓存效率差的问题。
AI.method: 通过扩展ISA指令集和微架构设计，支持结构化稀疏性加速，实现对不同稀疏度DNN层的可编程优化。
AI.result: 在4:4（密集）、2:4、1:4和95%非结构化稀疏场景下，相比最新密集矩阵引擎分别实现1.09x至3.74x的加速。
AI.conclusion: VEGETA有效解决了CPU处理稀疏DL工作负载的性能瓶颈，为多样化稀疏模型提供了高效加速方案。

authors_text: Nan Yang,Laicheng Zhong,Fan Huang,Dong Yuan,Wei Bao
title: Random Padding Data Augmentation
title_zh: 随机填充数据增强
abstract: The convolutional neural network (CNN) learns the same object in different positions in images, which can improve the recognition accuracy of the model. An implication of this is that CNN may know where the object is. The usefulness of the features' spatial information in CNNs has not been well investigated. In this paper, we found that the model's learning of features' position information hindered the learning of the features' relationship. Therefore, we introduced Random Padding, a new type of padding method for training CNNs that impairs the architecture's capacity to learn position information by adding zero-padding randomly to half of the border of feature maps. Random Padding is parameter-free, simple to construct, and compatible with the majority of CNN-based recognition models. This technique is also complementary to data augmentations such as random cropping, rotation, flipping and erasing, and consistently improves the performance of image classification over strong baselines.
summary: The convolutional neural network (CNN) learns the same object in different positions in images, which can improve the recognition accuracy of the model. An implication of this is that CNN may know where the object is. The usefulness of the features' spatial information in CNNs has not been well investigated. In this paper, we found that the model's learning of features' position information hindered the learning of the features' relationship. Therefore, we introduced Random Padding, a new type of padding method for training CNNs that impairs the architecture's capacity to learn position information by adding zero-padding randomly to half of the border of feature maps. Random Padding is parameter-free, simple to construct, and compatible with the majority of CNN-based recognition models. This technique is also complementary to data augmentations such as random cropping, rotation, flipping and erasing, and consistently improves the performance of image classification over strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）学习图像中不同位置的同一物体，可以提高模型的识别精度。这意味着 CNN 可能知道物体在哪里。 CNN 中特征空间信息的有用性尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们发现模型对特征位置信息的学习阻碍了对特征关系的学习。因此，我们引入了随机填充（Random Padding），这是一种用于训练 CNN 的新型填充方法，它通过向特征图的一半边界随机添加零填充来削弱架构学习位置信息的能力。 Random Padding 是无参数的，构造简单，并且与大多数基于 CNN 的识别模型兼容。该技术也是对随机裁剪、旋转、翻转和擦除等数据增强的补充，并在强基线上持续提高图像分类的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Random Padding的数据增强方法，通过随机填充特征图边界来削弱CNN对位置信息的学习，从而提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: CNN过度学习位置信息会阻碍特征关系的学习，而现有方法未充分探索空间信息的影响，需寻找新方法改善特征关系建模。
AI.method: 在训练时随机对特征图半边边界进行零填充，参数免费且兼容主流CNN模型，可与随机裁剪、旋转等增强技术结合使用。
AI.result: 该方法在多个图像分类基准上持续超越强基线，验证了其有效性，并证明了与现有增强技术的互补性。
AI.conclusion: Random Padding通过削弱位置信息学习，有效提升了CNN对特征关系的建模能力，是一种简单通用的数据增强策略。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为Random Padding的数据增强方法，通过随机填充特征图边界来削弱CNN对位置信息的学习，从而提升模型性能。
motivation: CNN过度学习位置信息会阻碍特征关系的学习，而现有方法未充分探索空间信息的影响，需寻找新方法改善特征关系建模。
method: 在训练时随机对特征图半边边界进行零填充，参数免费且兼容主流CNN模型，可与随机裁剪、旋转等增强技术结合使用。
result: 该方法在多个图像分类基准上持续超越强基线，验证了其有效性，并证明了与现有增强技术的互补性。
conclusion: Random Padding通过削弱位置信息学习，有效提升了CNN对特征关系的建模能力，是一种简单通用的数据增强策略。
search_text: Random Padding Data Augmentation 随机填充数据增强 The convolutional neural network (CNN) learns the same object in different positions in images, which can improve the recognition accuracy of the model. An implication of this is that CNN may know where the object is. The usefulness of the features' spatial information in CNNs has not been well investigated. In this paper, we found that the model's learning of features' position information hindered the learning of the features' relationship. Therefore, we introduced Random Padding, a new type of padding method for training CNNs that impairs the architecture's capacity to learn position information by adding zero-padding randomly to half of the border of feature maps. Random Padding is parameter-free, simple to construct, and compatible with the majority of CNN-based recognition models. This technique is also complementary to data augmentations such as random cropping, rotation, flipping and erasing, and consistently improves the performance of image classification over strong baselines. 卷积神经网络（CNN）学习图像中不同位置的同一物体，可以提高模型的识别精度。这意味着 CNN 可能知道物体在哪里。 CNN 中特征空间信息的有用性尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们发现模型对特征位置信息的学习阻碍了对特征关系的学习。因此，我们引入了随机填充（Random Padding），这是一种用于训练 CNN 的新型填充方法，它通过向特征图的一半边界随机添加零填充来削弱架构学习位置信息的能力。 Random Padding 是无参数的，构造简单，并且与大多数基于 CNN 的识别模型兼容。该技术也是对随机裁剪、旋转、翻转和擦除等数据增强的补充，并在强基线上持续提高图像分类的性能。 本文提出一种名为Random Padding的数据增强方法，通过随机填充特征图边界来削弱CNN对位置信息的学习，从而提升模型性能。 Nan Yang,Laicheng Zhong,Fan Huang,Dong Yuan,Wei Bao cs.CV

authors_text: Tianyi Zheng
title: EnfoMax: Domain Entropy and Mutual Information Maximization for Domain Generalized Face Anti-spoofing
title_zh: EnfoMax：域广义人脸反欺骗的域熵和互信息最大化
abstract: The face anti-spoofing (FAS) method performs well under intra-domain setups. However, its cross-domain performance is unsatisfactory. As a result, the domain generalization (DG) method has gained more attention in FAS. Existing methods treat FAS as a simple binary classification task and propose a heuristic training objective to learn domain-invariant features. However, there is no theoretical explanation of what a domain-invariant feature is. Additionally, the lack of theoretical support makes domain generalization techniques such as adversarial training lack training stability. To address these issues, this paper proposes the EnfoMax framework, which uses information theory to analyze cross-domain FAS tasks. This framework provides theoretical guarantees and optimization objectives for domain-generalized FAS tasks. EnfoMax maximizes the domain entropy and mutual information of live samples in source domains without using adversarial learning. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach performs well on extensive public datasets and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The face anti-spoofing (FAS) method performs well under intra-domain setups. However, its cross-domain performance is unsatisfactory. As a result, the domain generalization (DG) method has gained more attention in FAS. Existing methods treat FAS as a simple binary classification task and propose a heuristic training objective to learn domain-invariant features. However, there is no theoretical explanation of what a domain-invariant feature is. Additionally, the lack of theoretical support makes domain generalization techniques such as adversarial training lack training stability. To address these issues, this paper proposes the EnfoMax framework, which uses information theory to analyze cross-domain FAS tasks. This framework provides theoretical guarantees and optimization objectives for domain-generalized FAS tasks. EnfoMax maximizes the domain entropy and mutual information of live samples in source domains without using adversarial learning. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach performs well on extensive public datasets and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗（FAS）方法在域内设置下表现良好。但其跨域性能却不尽如人意。因此，域泛化（DG）方法在 FAS 中获得了更多关注。现有方法将 FAS 视为简单的二元分类任务，并提出启发式训练目标来学习域不变特征。然而，对于什么是域不变特征还没有理论解释。此外，缺乏理论支持使得对抗训练等领域泛化技术缺乏训练稳定性。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了EnfoMax框架，该框架利用信息论来分析跨域FAS任务。该框架为领域通用FAS任务提供了理论保证和优化目标。 EnfoMax 在不使用对抗性学习的情况下最大化源域中活样本的域熵和互信息。实验结果表明，我们的方法在广泛的公共数据集上表现良好，并且优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出EnfoMax框架，通过最大化域熵和互信息，提升跨域人脸识别反欺骗的域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将FAS视为简单二分类任务，缺乏理论解释，导致域泛化技术如对抗训练稳定性不足。
AI.method: 基于信息论，提出EnfoMax框架，通过最大化源域活体样本的域熵和互信息，无需对抗学习实现域泛化。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上实验验证，效果优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: EnfoMax为域泛化FAS任务提供理论支持和优化目标，有效提升跨域性能。

authors_text: Hengyu Liu,Tiancheng Zhang,Fan Li,Minghe Yu,Ge Yu
title: A Probabilistic Generative Model for Tracking Multi-Knowledge Concept Mastery Probability
title_zh: 用于跟踪多知识概念掌握概率的概率生成模型
abstract: Knowledge tracing aims to track students' knowledge status over time to predict students' future performance accurately. Markov chain-based knowledge tracking (MCKT) models can track knowledge concept mastery probability over time. However, as the number of tracked knowledge concepts increases, the time complexity of MCKT predicting student performance increases exponentially (also called explaining away problem. In addition, the existing MCKT models only consider the relationship between students' knowledge status and problems when modeling students' responses but ignore the relationship between knowledge concepts in the same problem. To address these challenges, we propose an inTerpretable pRobAbilistiC gEnerative moDel (TRACED), which can track students' numerous knowledge concepts mastery probabilities over time. To solve \emph{explain away problem}, we design Long and Short-Term Memory (LSTM)-based networks to approximate the posterior distribution, predict students' future performance, and propose a heuristic algorithm to train LSTMs and probabilistic graphical model jointly. To better model students' exercise responses, we proposed a logarithmic linear model with three interactive strategies, which models students' exercise responses by considering the relationship among students' knowledge status, knowledge concept, and problems. We conduct experiments with four real-world datasets in three knowledge-driven tasks. The experimental results show that TRACED outperforms existing knowledge tracing methods in predicting students' future performance and can learn the relationship among students, knowledge concepts, and problems from students' exercise sequences. We also conduct several case studies. The case studies show that TRACED exhibits excellent interpretability and thus has the potential for personalized automatic feedback in the real-world educational environment.
summary: Knowledge tracing aims to track students' knowledge status over time to predict students' future performance accurately. Markov chain-based knowledge tracking (MCKT) models can track knowledge concept mastery probability over time. However, as the number of tracked knowledge concepts increases, the time complexity of MCKT predicting student performance increases exponentially (also called explaining away problem. In addition, the existing MCKT models only consider the relationship between students' knowledge status and problems when modeling students' responses but ignore the relationship between knowledge concepts in the same problem. To address these challenges, we propose an inTerpretable pRobAbilistiC gEnerative moDel (TRACED), which can track students' numerous knowledge concepts mastery probabilities over time. To solve \emph{explain away problem}, we design Long and Short-Term Memory (LSTM)-based networks to approximate the posterior distribution, predict students' future performance, and propose a heuristic algorithm to train LSTMs and probabilistic graphical model jointly. To better model students' exercise responses, we proposed a logarithmic linear model with three interactive strategies, which models students' exercise responses by considering the relationship among students' knowledge status, knowledge concept, and problems. We conduct experiments with four real-world datasets in three knowledge-driven tasks. The experimental results show that TRACED outperforms existing knowledge tracing methods in predicting students' future performance and can learn the relationship among students, knowledge concepts, and problems from students' exercise sequences. We also conduct several case studies. The case studies show that TRACED exhibits excellent interpretability and thus has the potential for personalized automatic feedback in the real-world educational environment.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪旨在跟踪学生一段时间内的知识状况，以准确预测学生未来的表现。基于马尔可夫链的知识跟踪（MCKT）模型可以随着时间的推移跟踪知识概念的掌握概率。然而，随着跟踪的知识概念数量的增加，MCKT预测学生表现的时间复杂度呈指数级增加（也称为解释问题）。此外，现有的MCKT模型在对学生的反应进行建模时仅考虑学生的知识状态与问题之间的关系，而忽略了同一问题中知识概念之间的关系。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种可解释的概率生成模型（TRACED），它可以跟踪学生对众多知识概念的掌握概率为了解决\emph{解释问题}，我们设计了基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的网络来近似后验分布，预测学生的未来表现，并提出了一种启发式算法来联合训练 LSTM 和概率图形模型。为了更好地建模学生的练习反应，我们提出了一个具有三种交互策略的对数线性模型，该模型通过考虑学生的知识状态、知识概念和问题之间的关系来建模学生的练习反应。实验结果表明，TRACED 在预测学生未来表现方面优于现有的知识追踪方法，并且可以从学生的练习序列中学习学生、知识概念和问题之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的概率生成模型TRACED，用于跟踪学生对多个知识点的掌握概率，解决现有知识追踪模型的复杂度和可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于马尔可夫链的知识追踪模型（MCKT）在知识点数量增加时面临指数级时间复杂度（解释掉问题），且未考虑同一问题中知识点间的关联关系，限制了模型性能和可解释性。
AI.method: 设计基于LSTM的网络近似后验分布并预测学生表现，提出联合训练LSTM与概率图模型的启发式算法；引入考虑学生知识状态、知识点与问题关系的对数线性模型，包含三种交互策略。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集的实验中，TRACED在预测学生表现和学习关系建模上优于现有方法，案例研究验证了其优异的可解释性，适用于个性化教育反馈。
AI.conclusion: TRACED有效解决了知识追踪中的复杂度和可解释性难题，为教育场景下的自适应反馈系统提供了可靠的技术支持。

The case studies show that TRACED exhibits excellent interpretability and thus has the potential for personalized automatic feedback in the real-world educational environment. 知识追踪旨在跟踪学生一段时间内的知识状况，以准确预测学生未来的表现。基于马尔可夫链的知识跟踪（MCKT）模型可以随着时间的推移跟踪知识概念的掌握概率。然而，随着跟踪的知识概念数量的增加，MCKT预测学生表现的时间复杂度呈指数级增加（也称为解释问题）。此外，现有的MCKT模型在对学生的反应进行建模时仅考虑学生的知识状态与问题之间的关系，而忽略了同一问题中知识概念之间的关系。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种可解释的概率生成模型（TRACED），它可以跟踪学生对众多知识概念的掌握概率为了解决\emph{解释问题}，我们设计了基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的网络来近似后验分布，预测学生的未来表现，并提出了一种启发式算法来联合训练 LSTM 和概率图形模型。为了更好地建模学生的练习反应，我们提出了一个具有三种交互策略的对数线性模型，该模型通过考虑学生的知识状态、知识概念和问题之间的关系来建模学生的练习反应。实验结果表明，TRACED 在预测学生未来表现方面优于现有的知识追踪方法，并且可以从学生的练习序列中学习学生、知识概念和问题之间的关系。 本文提出一种可解释的概率生成模型TRACED，用于跟踪学生对多个知识点的掌握概率，解决现有知识追踪模型的复杂度和可解释性问题。 Hengyu Liu,Tiancheng Zhang,Fan Li,Minghe Yu,Ge Yu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunseok Jang,Sungryull Sohn,Lajanugen Logeswaran,Tiange Luo,Moontae Lee,Honglak Lee
title: Multimodal Subtask Graph Generation from Instructional Videos
title_zh: 从教学视频生成多模态子任务图
abstract: Real-world tasks consist of multiple inter-dependent subtasks (e.g., a dirty pan needs to be washed before it can be used for cooking). In this work, we aim to model the causal dependencies between such subtasks from instructional videos describing the task. This is a challenging problem since complete information about the world is often inaccessible from videos, which demands robust learning mechanisms to understand the causal structure of events. We present Multimodal Subtask Graph Generation (MSG2), an approach that constructs a Subtask Graph defining the dependency between a task's subtasks relevant to a task from noisy web videos. Graphs generated by our multimodal approach are closer to human-annotated graphs compared to prior approaches. MSG2 further performs the downstream task of next subtask prediction 85% and 30% more accurately than recent video transformer models in the ProceL and CrossTask datasets, respectively.
summary: Real-world tasks consist of multiple inter-dependent subtasks (e.g., a dirty pan needs to be washed before it can be used for cooking). In this work, we aim to model the causal dependencies between such subtasks from instructional videos describing the task. This is a challenging problem since complete information about the world is often inaccessible from videos, which demands robust learning mechanisms to understand the causal structure of events. We present Multimodal Subtask Graph Generation (MSG2), an approach that constructs a Subtask Graph defining the dependency between a task's subtasks relevant to a task from noisy web videos. Graphs generated by our multimodal approach are closer to human-annotated graphs compared to prior approaches. MSG2 further performs the downstream task of next subtask prediction 85% and 30% more accurately than recent video transformer models in the ProceL and CrossTask datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的任务由多个相互依赖的子任务组成（例如，脏锅需要先清洗才能用于烹饪）。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过描述任务的教学视频对此类子任务之间的因果关系进行建模。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为通常无法从视频中获取有关世界的完整信息，这需要强大的学习机制来理解事件的因果结构。我们提出了多模态子任务图生成（MSG2），一种构建子任务图的方法，定义与噪声网络视频中的任务相关的任务子任务之间的依赖关系。与之前的方法相比，我们的多模式方法生成的图更接近人工注释的图。 MSG2 进一步执行下一个子任务预测的下游任务，准确度分别比 ProceL 和 CrossTask 数据集中最新的视频 Transformer 模型高 85% 和 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从教学视频中生成多模态子任务图的方法，以建模现实任务中子任务间的因果依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 现实任务中的子任务存在复杂的依赖关系，但视频数据通常信息不完整，需要鲁棒的方法来理解事件的因果结构。
AI.method: 提出MSG2方法，通过融合多模态信息从网络视频中构建子任务图，相比传统方法更接近人工标注结果。
AI.result: 在ProceL和CrossTask数据集上，MSG2在下一子任务预测任务中分别比最新视频Transformer模型准确率提升85%和30%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态子任务图生成方法能有效捕捉任务依赖关系，为视频理解中的因果推理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yang Yang,Kaixiong Xu,Kaizheng Wang
title: Cascaded information enhancement and cross-modal attention feature fusion for multispectral pedestrian detection
title_zh: 用于多光谱行人检测的级联信息增强和跨模式注意特征融合
abstract: Multispectral pedestrian detection is a technology designed to detect and locate pedestrians in Color and Thermal images, which has been widely used in automatic driving, video surveillance, etc. So far most available multispectral pedestrian detection algorithms only achieved limited success in pedestrian detection because of the lacking take into account the confusion of pedestrian information and background noise in Color and Thermal images. Here we propose a multispectral pedestrian detection algorithm, which mainly consists of a cascaded information enhancement module and a cross-modal attention feature fusion module. On the one hand, the cascaded information enhancement module adopts the channel and spatial attention mechanism to perform attention weighting on the features fused by the cascaded feature fusion block. Moreover, it multiplies the single-modal features with the attention weight element by element to enhance the pedestrian features in the single-modal and thus suppress the interference from the background. On the other hand, the cross-modal attention feature fusion module mines the features of both Color and Thermal modalities to complement each other, then the global features are constructed by adding the cross-modal complemented features element by element, which are attentionally weighted to achieve the effective fusion of the two modal features. Finally, the fused features are input into the detection head to detect and locate pedestrians. Extensive experiments have been performed on two improved versions of annotations (sanitized annotations and paired annotations) of the public dataset KAIST. The experimental results show that our method demonstrates a lower pedestrian miss rate and more accurate pedestrian detection boxes compared to the comparison method. Additionally, the ablation experiment also proved the effectiveness of each module designed in this paper.
summary: Multispectral pedestrian detection is a technology designed to detect and locate pedestrians in Color and Thermal images, which has been widely used in automatic driving, video surveillance, etc. So far most available multispectral pedestrian detection algorithms only achieved limited success in pedestrian detection because of the lacking take into account the confusion of pedestrian information and background noise in Color and Thermal images. Here we propose a multispectral pedestrian detection algorithm, which mainly consists of a cascaded information enhancement module and a cross-modal attention feature fusion module. On the one hand, the cascaded information enhancement module adopts the channel and spatial attention mechanism to perform attention weighting on the features fused by the cascaded feature fusion block. Moreover, it multiplies the single-modal features with the attention weight element by element to enhance the pedestrian features in the single-modal and thus suppress the interference from the background. On the other hand, the cross-modal attention feature fusion module mines the features of both Color and Thermal modalities to complement each other, then the global features are constructed by adding the cross-modal complemented features element by element, which are attentionally weighted to achieve the effective fusion of the two modal features. Finally, the fused features are input into the detection head to detect and locate pedestrians. Extensive experiments have been performed on two improved versions of annotations (sanitized annotations and paired annotations) of the public dataset KAIST. The experimental results show that our method demonstrates a lower pedestrian miss rate and more accurate pedestrian detection boxes compared to the comparison method. Additionally, the ablation experiment also proved the effectiveness of each module designed in this paper.
abstract_zh: 多光谱行人检测是一种在彩色和热图像中检测和定位行人的技术，已广泛应用于自动驾驶、视频监控等领域。迄今为止，大多数可用的多光谱行人检测算法由于缺乏考虑彩色和热图像中行人信息的混乱和背景噪声，在行人检测方面只取得了有限的成功。在这里，我们提出了一种多光谱行人检测算法，该算法主要由级联信息增强模块和跨模态注意特征融合模块组成。一方面，级联信息增强模块采用通道和空间注意力机制对级联特征融合块融合的特征进行注意力加权。此外，它将单模态特征与注意力权重逐个相乘，以增强单模态中的行人特征，从而抑制来自背景的干扰。另一方面，跨模态注意力特征融合模块挖掘Color和Thermal模态的特征进行互补，然后通过逐个元素添加跨模态互补的特征来构造全局特征，并对其进行注意力加权，以实现两种模态特征的有效融合。最后，将融合后的特征输入到检测头中，实现行人的检测和定位。对公共数据集 KAIST 的两个改进版本的注释（清理注释和配对注释）进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，与比较方法相比，我们的方法表现出更低的行人错过率和更准确的行人检测框。此外，消融实验也证明了本文设计的各模块的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多光谱行人检测算法，通过级联信息增强模块和跨模态注意力特征融合模块，提升彩色和热成像图像中行人的检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有算法因未充分考虑彩色和热图像中行人信息与背景噪声的混淆，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计级联信息增强模块（通过通道与空间注意力机制强化单模态特征）和跨模态注意力特征融合模块（挖掘双模态特征互补性并加权融合），最终输入检测头完成定位。
AI.result: 在KAIST数据集的两种标注版本上实验表明，该方法行人漏检率更低且检测框更准确，消融实验证实模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过增强单模态特征与跨模态融合，有效解决了多光谱行人检测中的信息混淆问题，优于对比方法。

authors_text: Aastha Acharya,Rebecca Russell,Nisar R. Ahmed
title: Learning to Forecast Aleatoric and Epistemic Uncertainties over Long Horizon Trajectories
title_zh: 学习预测长视野轨迹上的任意和认知不确定性
abstract: Giving autonomous agents the ability to forecast their own outcomes and uncertainty will allow them to communicate their competencies and be used more safely. We accomplish this by using a learned world model of the agent system to forecast full agent trajectories over long time horizons. Real world systems involve significant sources of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty that compound and interact over time in the trajectory forecasts. We develop a deep generative world model that quantifies aleatoric uncertainty while incorporating the effects of epistemic uncertainty during the learning process. We show on two reinforcement learning problems that our uncertainty model produces calibrated outcome uncertainty estimates over the full trajectory horizon.
summary: Giving autonomous agents the ability to forecast their own outcomes and uncertainty will allow them to communicate their competencies and be used more safely. We accomplish this by using a learned world model of the agent system to forecast full agent trajectories over long time horizons. Real world systems involve significant sources of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty that compound and interact over time in the trajectory forecasts. We develop a deep generative world model that quantifies aleatoric uncertainty while incorporating the effects of epistemic uncertainty during the learning process. We show on two reinforcement learning problems that our uncertainty model produces calibrated outcome uncertainty estimates over the full trajectory horizon.
abstract_zh: 赋予自主代理预测自己结果和不确定性的能力将使他们能够交流自己的能力并更安全地使用。我们通过使用智能体系统的学习世界模型来预测长期的完整智能体轨迹来实现这一目标。现实世界系统涉及任意和认知不确定性的重要来源，这些不确定性随着时间的推移在轨迹预测中复合和相互作用。我们开发了一个深度生成世界模型，该模型可以量化任意不确定性，同时纳入学习过程中认知不确定性的影响。我们在两个强化学习问题上表明，我们的不确定性模型在整个轨迹范围内产生校准的结果不确定性估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度生成模型，用于预测长期轨迹中的偶然不确定性和认识不确定性。
AI.motivation: 自主系统需要准确预测自身行为的不确定性以提高安全性，而现实环境中的不确定性随时间累积且相互作用，传统方法难以有效建模。
AI.method: 构建深度生成世界模型，通过量化偶然不确定性并整合认识不确定性学习过程，实现对长期轨迹的不确定性联合建模。
AI.result: 在两个强化学习任务中验证了该模型能生成校准良好的全轨迹不确定性估计，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效分离并量化两种不确定性，为长期轨迹预测提供了更可靠的风险评估框架。

search_text: Learning to Forecast Aleatoric and Epistemic Uncertainties over Long Horizon Trajectories 学习预测长视野轨迹上的任意和认知不确定性 Giving autonomous agents the ability to forecast their own outcomes and uncertainty will allow them to communicate their competencies and be used more safely. We accomplish this by using a learned world model of the agent system to forecast full agent trajectories over long time horizons. Real world systems involve significant sources of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty that compound and interact over time in the trajectory forecasts. We develop a deep generative world model that quantifies aleatoric uncertainty while incorporating the effects of epistemic uncertainty during the learning process. We show on two reinforcement learning problems that our uncertainty model produces calibrated outcome uncertainty estimates over the full trajectory horizon. 赋予自主代理预测自己结果和不确定性的能力将使他们能够交流自己的能力并更安全地使用。我们通过使用智能体系统的学习世界模型来预测长期的完整智能体轨迹来实现这一目标。现实世界系统涉及任意和认知不确定性的重要来源，这些不确定性随着时间的推移在轨迹预测中复合和相互作用。我们开发了一个深度生成世界模型，该模型可以量化任意不确定性，同时纳入学习过程中认知不确定性的影响。我们在两个强化学习问题上表明，我们的不确定性模型在整个轨迹范围内产生校准的结果不确定性估计。 本文提出一种深度生成模型，用于预测长期轨迹中的偶然不确定性和认识不确定性。 Aastha Acharya,Rebecca Russell,Nisar R. authors_text: Francisco Zanartu,Christoph Treude,Markus Wagner
title: Socialz: Multi-Feature Social Fuzz Testing
title_zh: Socialz：多功能社交模糊测试
comment: to be published in GECCO 2024, July 14-18, 2024, Melbourne, VIC, Australia
comments: to be published in GECCO 2024, July 14-18, 2024, Melbourne, VIC, Australia
abstract: Online social networks have become an integral aspect of our daily lives and play a crucial role in shaping our relationships with others. However, bugs and glitches, even minor ones, can cause anything from frustrating problems to serious data leaks that can have farreaching impacts on millions of users. To mitigate these risks, fuzz testing, a method of testing with randomised inputs, can provide increased confidence in the correct functioning of a social network. However, implementing traditional fuzz testing methods can be prohibitively difficult or impractical for programmers outside of the social network's development team. To tackle this challenge, we present Socialz, a novel approach to social fuzz testing that (1) characterises real users of a social network, (2) diversifies their interaction using evolutionary computation across multiple, non-trivial features, and (3) collects performance data as these interactions are executed. With Socialz, we aim to put social testing tools in everybody's hands, thereby improving the reliability and security of social networks used worldwide. In our study, we came across (1) one known limitation of the current GitLab CE and (2) 6,907 errors, of which 40.16% are beyond our debugging skills.

However, bugs and glitches, even minor ones, can cause anything from frustrating problems to serious data leaks that can have farreaching impacts on millions of users. To mitigate these risks, fuzz testing, a method of testing with randomised inputs, can provide increased confidence in the correct functioning of a social network. However, implementing traditional fuzz testing methods can be prohibitively difficult or impractical for programmers outside of the social network's development team. To tackle this challenge, we present Socialz, a novel approach to social fuzz testing that (1) characterises real users of a social network, (2) diversifies their interaction using evolutionary computation across multiple, non-trivial features, and (3) collects performance data as these interactions are executed. With Socialz, we aim to put social testing tools in everybody's hands, thereby improving the reliability and security of social networks used worldwide. In our study, we came across (1) one known limitation of the current GitLab CE and (2) 6,907 errors, of which 40.16% are beyond our debugging skills.
abstract_zh: 在线社交网络已成为我们日常生活不可或缺的一部分，并在塑造我们与他人的关系方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，错误和故障，即使是很小的问题，也可能导致各种问题，从令人沮丧的问题到严重的数据泄露，可能对数百万用户产生深远的影响。为了减轻这些风险，模糊测试（一种使用随机输入进行测试的方法）可以增强对社交网络正确运行的信心。然而，对于社交网络开发团队之外的程序员来说，实施传统的模糊测试方法可能非常困难或不切实际。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 Socialz，这是一种新颖的社交模糊测试方法，它 (1) 描述社交网络的真实用户特征，(2) 使用跨多个重要特征的进化计算使他们的交互多样化，(3) 在执行这些交互时收集性能数据。通过 Socialz，我们的目标是将社交测试工具交到每个人的手中，从而提高全球使用的社交网络的可靠性和安全性。在我们的研究中，我们遇到了 (1) 当前 GitLab CE 的一个已知限制和 (2) 6,907 个错误，其中 40.16% 超出了我们的调试能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Socialz工具，通过多特征交互和进化计算实现社交网络的模糊测试，提升其可靠性和安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统模糊测试方法对非开发人员实施困难，而社交网络中的小错误可能导致严重数据泄露，需更易用的测试工具。
AI.method: 通过分析真实用户特征，利用进化计算多样化交互行为，并收集执行过程中的性能数据进行测试。
AI.result: 发现GitLab CE的一个已知限制及6907个错误，其中40.16%超出研究者调试能力。
AI.conclusion: Socialz有效识别了社交网络潜在问题，但部分复杂错误仍需进一步研究解决。

authors_text: Zhiyu Pan,Yinpeng Chen,Jiale Zhang,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong
title: Find Beauty in the Rare: Contrastive Composition Feature Clustering for Nontrivial Cropping Box Regression
title_zh: 在稀有中发现美：非平凡裁剪框回归的对比构图特征聚类
abstract: Automatic image cropping algorithms aim to recompose images like human-being photographers by generating the cropping boxes with improved composition quality. Cropping box regression approaches learn the beauty of composition from annotated cropping boxes. However, the bias of annotations leads to quasi-trivial recomposing results, which has an obvious tendency to the average location of training samples. The crux of this predicament is that the task is naively treated as a box regression problem, where rare samples might be dominated by normal samples, and the composition patterns of rare samples are not well exploited. Observing that similar composition patterns tend to be shared by the cropping boundaries annotated nearly, we argue to find the beauty of composition from the rare samples by clustering the samples with similar cropping boundary annotations, ie, similar composition patterns. We propose a novel Contrastive Composition Clustering (C2C) to regularize the composition features by contrasting dynamically established similar and dissimilar pairs. In this way, common composition patterns of multiple images can be better summarized, which especially benefits the rare samples and endows our model with better generalizability to render nontrivial results. Extensive experimental results show the superiority of our model compared with prior arts. We also illustrate the philosophy of our design with an interesting analytical visualization.
summary: Automatic image cropping algorithms aim to recompose images like human-being photographers by generating the cropping boxes with improved composition quality. Cropping box regression approaches learn the beauty of composition from annotated cropping boxes. However, the bias of annotations leads to quasi-trivial recomposing results, which has an obvious tendency to the average location of training samples. The crux of this predicament is that the task is naively treated as a box regression problem, where rare samples might be dominated by normal samples, and the composition patterns of rare samples are not well exploited. Observing that similar composition patterns tend to be shared by the cropping boundaries annotated nearly, we argue to find the beauty of composition from the rare samples by clustering the samples with similar cropping boundary annotations, ie, similar composition patterns. We propose a novel Contrastive Composition Clustering (C2C) to regularize the composition features by contrasting dynamically established similar and dissimilar pairs. In this way, common composition patterns of multiple images can be better summarized, which especially benefits the rare samples and endows our model with better generalizability to render nontrivial results. Extensive experimental results show the superiority of our model compared with prior arts. We also illustrate the philosophy of our design with an interesting analytical visualization.
abstract_zh: 自动图像裁剪算法旨在通过生成具有改进的构图质量的裁剪框来像人类摄影师一样重新组合图像。裁剪框回归方法从带注释的裁剪框中学习构图之美。然而，注释的偏差导致了准平凡的重组结果，这对训练样本的平均位置有明显的倾向。这种困境的关键在于，该任务被天真地视为盒回归问题，其中稀有样本可能以正常样本为主，并且稀有样本的组成模式没有得到很好的利用。观察到相似的构图模式往往由几乎注释的裁剪边界共享，我们认为通过对具有相似裁剪边界注释的样本（即相似的构图模式）进行聚类，从稀有样本中发现构图之美。我们提出了一种新颖的对比构图聚类（C2C），通过对比动态建立的相似和不相似对来规范构图特征。通过这种方式，可以更好地总结多个图像的常见组成模式，这尤其有利于稀有样本，并使我们的模型具有更好的泛化性以呈现重要的结果。大量的实验结果表明，与现有技术相比，我们的模型具有优越性。我们还通过有趣的分析可视化来说明我们的设计理念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比组成聚类（C2C）的非平凡裁剪框回归方法，旨在通过挖掘罕见样本的组成模式提升自动图像裁剪质量。
AI.motivation: 现有裁剪算法因依赖标注框导致结果偏向常见模式，忽视罕见样本的美学特征，无法生成具有创造性的裁剪结果。
AI.method: 通过聚类相似裁剪边界注释的样本，建立动态对比对进行对比学习，强化罕见样本的组成特征表示。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上优于现有方法，可视化分析验证了设计哲学的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦罕见样本的组成模式挖掘能显著提升模型泛化能力，为生成非平凡裁剪结果提供新思路。

However, the bias of annotations leads to quasi-trivial recomposing results, which has an obvious tendency to the average location of training samples. The crux of this predicament is that the task is naively treated as a box regression problem, where rare samples might be dominated by normal samples, and the composition patterns of rare samples are not well exploited. Observing that similar composition patterns tend to be shared by the cropping boundaries annotated nearly, we argue to find the beauty of composition from the rare samples by clustering the samples with similar cropping boundary annotations, ie, similar composition patterns. We propose a novel Contrastive Composition Clustering (C2C) to regularize the composition features by contrasting dynamically established similar and dissimilar pairs. In this way, common composition patterns of multiple images can be better summarized, which especially benefits the rare samples and endows our model with better generalizability to render nontrivial results. Extensive experimental results show the superiority of our model compared with prior arts. We also illustrate the philosophy of our design with an interesting analytical visualization. 自动图像裁剪算法旨在通过生成具有改进的构图质量的裁剪框来像人类摄影师一样重新组合图像。裁剪框回归方法从带注释的裁剪框中学习构图之美。然而，注释的偏差导致了准平凡的重组结果，这对训练样本的平均位置有明显的倾向。这种困境的关键在于，该任务被天真地视为盒回归问题，其中稀有样本可能以正常样本为主，并且稀有样本的组成模式没有得到很好的利用。观察到相似的构图模式往往由几乎注释的裁剪边界共享，我们认为通过对具有相似裁剪边界注释的样本（即相似的构图模式）进行聚类，从稀有样本中发现构图之美。我们提出了一种新颖的对比构图聚类（C2C），通过对比动态建立的相似和不相似对来规范构图特征。通过这种方式，可以更好地总结多个图像的常见组成模式，这尤其有利于稀有样本，并使我们的模型具有更好的泛化性以呈现重要的结果。大量的实验结果表明，与现有技术相比，我们的模型具有优越性。我们还通过有趣的分析可视化来说明我们的设计理念。 本文提出一种基于对比组成聚类（C2C）的非平凡裁剪框回归方法，旨在通过挖掘罕见样本的组成模式提升自动图像裁剪质量。 Zhiyu Pan,Yinpeng Chen,Jiale Zhang,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong cs.CV

authors_text: Guy Blanc
title: Subsampling Suffices for Adaptive Data Analysis
title_zh: 子采样足以进行自适应数据分析
abstract: Ensuring that analyses performed on a dataset are representative of the entire population is one of the central problems in statistics. Most classical techniques assume that the dataset is independent of the analyst's query and break down in the common setting where a dataset is reused for multiple, adaptively chosen, queries. This problem of \emph{adaptive data analysis} was formalized in the seminal works of Dwork et al. (STOC, 2015) and Hardt and Ullman (FOCS, 2014). We identify a remarkably simple set of assumptions under which the queries will continue to be representative even when chosen adaptively: The only requirements are that each query takes as input a random subsample and outputs few bits. This result shows that the noise inherent in subsampling is sufficient to guarantee that query responses generalize. The simplicity of this subsampling-based framework allows it to model a variety of real-world scenarios not covered by prior work. In addition to its simplicity, we demonstrate the utility of this framework by designing mechanisms for two foundational tasks, statistical queries and median finding. In particular, our mechanism for answering the broadly applicable class of statistical queries is both extremely simple and state of the art in many parameter regimes.
summary: Ensuring that analyses performed on a dataset are representative of the entire population is one of the central problems in statistics. Most classical techniques assume that the dataset is independent of the analyst's query and break down in the common setting where a dataset is reused for multiple, adaptively chosen, queries. This problem of \emph{adaptive data analysis} was formalized in the seminal works of Dwork et al. (STOC, 2015) and Hardt and Ullman (FOCS, 2014). We identify a remarkably simple set of assumptions under which the queries will continue to be representative even when chosen adaptively: The only requirements are that each query takes as input a random subsample and outputs few bits. This result shows that the noise inherent in subsampling is sufficient to guarantee that query responses generalize. The simplicity of this subsampling-based framework allows it to model a variety of real-world scenarios not covered by prior work. In addition to its simplicity, we demonstrate the utility of this framework by designing mechanisms for two foundational tasks, statistical queries and median finding. In particular, our mechanism for answering the broadly applicable class of statistical queries is both extremely simple and state of the art in many parameter regimes.
abstract_zh: 确保对数据集进行的分析能够代表整个人群是统计学的核心问题之一。大多数经典技术都假设数据集独立于分析师的查询，并且在数据集被重复用于多个自适应选择的查询的常见设置中会被分解。 \emph{自适应数据分析}这个问题在 Dwork 等人的开创性著作中得到了形式化。 （STOC，2015）以及 Hardt 和 Ullman（FOC​​S，2014）。我们确定了一组非常简单的假设，在这些假设下，即使自适应选择，查询也将继续具有代表性：唯一的要求是每个查询采用随机子样本作为输入并输出几个位。该结果表明子采样中固有的噪声足以保证查询响应泛化。这种基于子采样的框架的简单性使其能够对先前工作未涵盖的各种现实场景进行建模。除了简单性之外，我们还通过设计统计查询和中值查找这两个基本任务的机制来展示该框架的实用性。特别是，我们用于回答广泛适用的统计查询类别的机制在许多参数体系中都非常简单且最先进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子采样的方法，用于解决自适应数据分析中的代表性问题，确保即使查询是自适应选择的，也能保持对整体人口的代表性。
AI.motivation: 传统统计方法在数据集被多次自适应查询时失效，而自适应数据分析面临查询结果过拟合的风险，需寻找简单且普适的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过假设每个查询仅输入随机子样本并输出少量比特，利用子采样噪声保证泛化能力，设计了统计查询和中位数查找的机制。
AI.result: 证明了子采样框架在简单假设下有效，适用于多种现实场景，并提出了简单且在多个参数范围内最先进的统计查询机制。
AI.conclusion: 子采样噪声足以保证自适应查询的泛化性，该框架简单实用，为解决自适应数据分析问题提供了新思路和工具。

authors_text: Xuefeng Liang,Hexin Jiang,Wenxin Xu,Ying Zhou
title: Gaussian-smoothed Imbalance Data Improves Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 高斯平滑的不平衡数据提高了语音情感识别
abstract: In speech emotion recognition tasks, models learn emotional representations from datasets. We find the data distribution in the IEMOCAP dataset is very imbalanced, which may harm models to learn a better representation. To address this issue, we propose a novel Pairwise-emotion Data Distribution Smoothing (PDDS) method. PDDS considers that the distribution of emotional data should be smooth in reality, then applies Gaussian smoothing to emotion-pairs for constructing a new training set with a smoother distribution. The required new data are complemented using the mixup augmentation. As PDDS is model and modality agnostic, it is evaluated with three SOTA models on the IEMOCAP dataset. The experimental results show that these models are improved by 0.2\% - 4.8\% and 1.5\% - 5.9\% in terms of WA and UA. In addition, an ablation study demonstrates that the key advantage of PDDS is the reasonable data distribution rather than a simple data augmentation.
summary: In speech emotion recognition tasks, models learn emotional representations from datasets. We find the data distribution in the IEMOCAP dataset is very imbalanced, which may harm models to learn a better representation. To address this issue, we propose a novel Pairwise-emotion Data Distribution Smoothing (PDDS) method. PDDS considers that the distribution of emotional data should be smooth in reality, then applies Gaussian smoothing to emotion-pairs for constructing a new training set with a smoother distribution. The required new data are complemented using the mixup augmentation. As PDDS is model and modality agnostic, it is evaluated with three SOTA models on the IEMOCAP dataset. The experimental results show that these models are improved by 0.2\% - 4.8\% and 1.5\% - 5.9\% in terms of WA and UA. In addition, an ablation study demonstrates that the key advantage of PDDS is the reasonable data distribution rather than a simple data augmentation.
abstract_zh: 在语音情感识别任务中，模型从数据集中学习情感表征。我们发现 IEMOCAP 数据集中的数据分布非常不平衡，这可能会损害模型学习更好的表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的成对情感数据分布平滑（PDDS）方法。 PDDS认为现实中情感数据的分布应该是平滑的，然后对情感对应用高斯平滑来构造分布更平滑的新训练集。使用混合增强来补充所需的新数据。由于 PDDS 与模型和模态无关，因此使用 IEMOCAP 数据集上的三个 SOTA 模型对其进行评估。实验结果表明，这些模型在WA和UA方面分别提高了0.2% - 4.8%和1.5% - 5.9%。此外，消融研究表明，PDDS 的关键优势在于合理的数据分布，而不是简单的数据增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过高斯平滑处理不平衡数据的方法（PDDS），以提升语音情感识别模型的性能。
AI.motivation: IEMOCAP数据集中情感类别分布严重不平衡，导致模型难以学习有效的特征表示，影响识别效果。
AI.method: 设计Pairwise-emotion数据分布平滑（PDDS）方法，对情感对应用高斯平滑生成新样本，并结合mixup增强技术构建平衡训练集。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，三种SOTA模型的WA指标提升0.2%-4.8%，UA指标提升1.5%-5.9%。
AI.conclusion: 数据分布的合理性是PDDS提升性能的关键，而非单纯的数据增强技术。

authors_text: Tianyue Zheng,Ang Li,Zhe Chen,Hongbo Wang,Jun Luo
title: AutoFed: Heterogeneity-Aware Federated Multimodal Learning for Robust Autonomous Driving
title_zh: AutoFed：异构感知联合多模态学习，实现稳健的自动驾驶
abstract: Object detection with on-board sensors (e.g., lidar, radar, and camera) play a crucial role in autonomous driving (AD), and these sensors complement each other in modalities. While crowdsensing may potentially exploit these sensors (of huge quantity) to derive more comprehensive knowledge, \textit{federated learning} (FL) appears to be the necessary tool to reach this potential: it enables autonomous vehicles (AVs) to train machine learning models without explicitly sharing raw sensory data. However, the multimodal sensors introduce various data heterogeneity across distributed AVs (e.g., label quantity skews and varied modalities), posing critical challenges to effective FL. To this end, we present AutoFed as a heterogeneity-aware FL framework to fully exploit multimodal sensory data on AVs and thus enable robust AD. Specifically, we first propose a novel model leveraging pseudo-labeling to avoid mistakenly treating unlabeled objects as the background. We also propose an autoencoder-based data imputation method to fill missing data modality (of certain AVs) with the available ones. To further reconcile the heterogeneity, we finally present a client selection mechanism exploiting the similarities among client models to improve both training stability and convergence rate. Our experiments on benchmark dataset confirm that AutoFed substantially improves over status quo approaches in both precision and recall, while demonstrating strong robustness to adverse weather conditions.
summary: Object detection with on-board sensors (e.g., lidar, radar, and camera) play a crucial role in autonomous driving (AD), and these sensors complement each other in modalities. While crowdsensing may potentially exploit these sensors (of huge quantity) to derive more comprehensive knowledge, \textit{federated learning} (FL) appears to be the necessary tool to reach this potential: it enables autonomous vehicles (AVs) to train machine learning models without explicitly sharing raw sensory data. However, the multimodal sensors introduce various data heterogeneity across distributed AVs (e.g., label quantity skews and varied modalities), posing critical challenges to effective FL. To this end, we present AutoFed as a heterogeneity-aware FL framework to fully exploit multimodal sensory data on AVs and thus enable robust AD. Specifically, we first propose a novel model leveraging pseudo-labeling to avoid mistakenly treating unlabeled objects as the background. We also propose an autoencoder-based data imputation method to fill missing data modality (of certain AVs) with the available ones. To further reconcile the heterogeneity, we finally present a client selection mechanism exploiting the similarities among client models to improve both training stability and convergence rate. Our experiments on benchmark dataset confirm that AutoFed substantially improves over status quo approaches in both precision and recall, while demonstrating strong robustness to adverse weather conditions.
abstract_zh: 使用车载传感器（例如激光雷达、雷达和摄像头）进行物体检测在自动驾驶 (AD) 中发挥着至关重要的作用，并且这些传感器在模式上相互补充。虽然众感可能会利用这些（数量巨大）传感器来获取更全面的知识，但联邦学习（FL）似乎是实现这一潜力的必要工具：它使自动驾驶车辆（AV）能够训练机器学习模型，而无需显式共享原始感官数据。然而，多模态传感器在分布式 AV 中引入了各种数据异质性（例如，标签数量偏差和不同的模态），这对有效的 FL 提出了严峻的挑战。为此，我们将 AutoFed 作为一种异质性感知 FL 框架，以充分利用 AV 上的多模态感官数据，从而实现强大的 AD。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种利用伪标记的新颖模型，以避免错误地将未标记的对象视为背景。我们还提出了一种基于自动编码器的数据插补方法，用可用的数据模态来填充（某些自动驾驶汽车的）缺失的数据模态。为了进一步协调异质性，我们最终提出了一种利用客户端模型之间的相似性来提高训练稳定性和收敛速度的客户端选择机制。我们在基准数据集上的实验证实，AutoFed 在精确度和召回率方面都比现状方法有了显着提高，同时表现出对恶劣天气条件的强大鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种异构性感知的联邦多模态学习框架AutoFed，以提升自动驾驶中物体检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法难以处理自动驾驶中多模态传感器数据的异构性（如标签数量不均衡、模态差异），导致模型训练不稳定且效果受限，需设计异构性感知的框架以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出伪标签模型避免误判、自编码器填补缺失模态数据、基于模型相似性的客户端选择机制，以应对异构性挑战。
AI.result: 实验表明，AutoFed在基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，在精确率和召回率上表现更优，且对恶劣天气具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AutoFed通过有效应对多模态数据异构性，显著提升自动驾驶模型的性能与鲁棒性，验证了异构性感知联邦学习在自动驾驶中的可行性。

search_text: AutoFed: Heterogeneity-Aware Federated Multimodal Learning for Robust Autonomous Driving AutoFed：异构感知联合多模态学习，实现稳健的自动驾驶 Object detection with on-board sensors (e.g., lidar, radar, and camera) play a crucial role in autonomous driving (AD), and these sensors complement each other in modalities. While crowdsensing may potentially exploit these sensors (of huge quantity) to derive more comprehensive knowledge, \textit{federated learning} (FL) appears to be the necessary tool to reach this potential: it enables autonomous vehicles (AVs) to train machine learning models without explicitly sharing raw sensory data. However, the multimodal sensors introduce various data heterogeneity across distributed AVs (e.g., label quantity skews and varied modalities), posing critical challenges to effective FL. To this end, we present AutoFed as a heterogeneity-aware FL framework to fully exploit multimodal sensory data on AVs and thus enable robust AD. Specifically, we first propose a novel model leveraging pseudo-labeling to avoid mistakenly treating unlabeled objects as the background. We also propose an autoencoder-based data imputation method to fill missing data modality (of certain AVs) with the available ones. To further reconcile the heterogeneity, we finally present a client selection mechanism exploiting the similarities among client models to improve both training stability and convergence rate. Our experiments on benchmark dataset confirm that AutoFed substantially improves over status quo approaches in both precision and recall, while demonstrating strong robustness to adverse weather conditions. 使用车载传感器（例如激光雷达、雷达和摄像头）进行物体检测在自动驾驶 (AD) 中发挥着至关重要的作用，并且这些传感器在模式上相互补充。虽然众感可能会利用这些（数量巨大）传感器来获取更全面的知识，但联邦学习（FL）似乎是实现这一潜力的必要工具：它使自动驾驶车辆（AV）能够训练机器学习模型，而无需显式共享原始感官数据。然而，多模态传感器在分布式 AV 中引入了各种数据异质性（例如，标签数量偏差和不同的模态），这对有效的 FL 提出了严峻的挑战。为此，我们将 AutoFed 作为一种异质性感知 FL 框架，以充分利用 AV 上的多模态感官数据，从而实现强大的 AD。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种利用伪标记的新颖模型，以避免错误地将未标记的对象视为背景。我们还提出了一种基于自动编码器的数据插补方法，用可用的数据模态来填充（某些自动驾驶汽车的）缺失的数据模态。为了进一步协调异质性，我们最终提出了一种利用客户端模型之间的相似性来提高训练稳定性和收敛速度的客户端选择机制。我们在基准数据集上的实验证实，AutoFed 在精确度和召回率方面都比现状方法有了显着提高，同时表现出对恶劣天气条件的强大鲁棒性。 提出一种异构性感知的联邦多模态学习框架AutoFed，以提升自动驾驶中物体检测的鲁棒性。 Tianyue Zheng,Ang Li,Zhe Chen,Hongbo Wang,Jun Luo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Hailong Liu,Shota Inoue,Takahiro Wada
title: Subjective Vertical Conflict Model with Visual Vertical: Predicting Motion Sickness on Autonomous Personal Mobility Vehicles
title_zh: 主观垂直冲突模型与视觉垂直：预测自主个人移动车辆的晕动病
abstract: Passengers of level 3-5 autonomous personal mobility vehicles (APMV) can perform non-driving tasks, such as reading books and smartphones, while driving. It has been pointed out that such activities may increase motion sickness, especially when frequently avoiding pedestrians or obstacles in shared spaces. Many studies have been conducted to build countermeasures, of which various computational motion sickness models have been developed. Among them, models based on subjective vertical conflict (SVC) theory, which describes vertical changes in direction sensed by human sensory organs v.s. those expected by the central nervous system, have been actively developed. However, no current computational model can integrate visual vertical information with vestibular sensations. We proposed a 6 DoF SVC-VV model which added a visually perceived vertical block into a conventional 6 DoF SVC model to predict visual vertical directions from image data simulating the visual input of a human. In a driving experiment, 27 participants experienced an APMV with two visual conditions: looking ahead (LAD) and working with a tablet device (WAD). We verified that passengers got motion sickness while riding the APMV, and the symptom were severer when especially working on it, by simulating the frequent pedestrian avoidance scenarios of the APMV in the experiment. In addition, the results of the experiment demonstrated that the proposed 6 DoF SVC-VV model could describe the increased motion sickness experienced when the visual vertical and gravitational acceleration directions were different.
summary: Passengers of level 3-5 autonomous personal mobility vehicles (APMV) can perform non-driving tasks, such as reading books and smartphones, while driving. It has been pointed out that such activities may increase motion sickness, especially when frequently avoiding pedestrians or obstacles in shared spaces. Many studies have been conducted to build countermeasures, of which various computational motion sickness models have been developed. Among them, models based on subjective vertical conflict (SVC) theory, which describes vertical changes in direction sensed by human sensory organs v.s. those expected by the central nervous system, have been actively developed. However, no current computational model can integrate visual vertical information with vestibular sensations. We proposed a 6 DoF SVC-VV model which added a visually perceived vertical block into a conventional 6 DoF SVC model to predict visual vertical directions from image data simulating the visual input of a human. In a driving experiment, 27 participants experienced an APMV with two visual conditions: looking ahead (LAD) and working with a tablet device (WAD). We verified that passengers got motion sickness while riding the APMV, and the symptom were severer when especially working on it, by simulating the frequent pedestrian avoidance scenarios of the APMV in the experiment. In addition, the results of the experiment demonstrated that the proposed 6 DoF SVC-VV model could describe the increased motion sickness experienced when the visual vertical and gravitational acceleration directions were different.
abstract_zh: 3-5级自动个人移动车辆（APMV）的乘客可以在驾驶时执行非驾驶任务，例如读书和智能手机。有人指出，此类活动可能会加剧晕动病，尤其是在共用空间频繁躲避行人或障碍物时。已经进行了许多研究来建立对策，其中已经开发了各种计算晕动病模型。其中，基于主观垂直冲突（SVC）理论的模型，该理论描述了人类感觉器官感知到的方向的垂直变化。中枢神经系统所期望的那些，已经被积极开发。然而，当前的计算模型无法将视觉垂直信息与前庭感觉整合起来。我们提出了一种 6 DoF SVC-VV 模型，它将视觉感知的垂直块添加到传统的 6 DoF SVC 模型中，以根据模拟人类视觉输入的图像数据来预测视觉垂直方向。在一项驾驶实验中，27 名参与者在两种视觉条件下体验了 APMV：向前看 (LAD) 和使用平板设备 (WAD)。我们通过模拟APMV在实验中频繁躲避行人的场景，验证了乘客在乘坐APMV时会出现晕车现象，尤其是在工作时晕车现象更为严重。此外，实验结果表明，所提出的6 DoF SVC-VV模型可以描述当视觉垂直和重力加速度方向不同时所经历的增加的晕动病。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉垂直信息的6自由度主观垂直冲突模型（SVC-VV），用于预测自动驾驶个人移动载具（APMV）乘客的晕动症。
AI.motivation: 现有计算模型无法整合视觉垂直信息与前庭感觉，而APMV乘客在执行非驾驶任务（如使用平板）时，因视觉与运动感知冲突易引发晕动症，需改进预测模型。
AI.method: 在传统6自由度SVC模型中新增视觉垂直模块，通过图像数据模拟人类视觉输入，设计驾驶实验（27名参与者，两种视觉条件：注视前方与使用平板）验证模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，乘客在使用平板时晕动症症状更严重；SVC-VV模型能有效描述视觉垂直与重力加速度方向差异导致的晕动症加剧现象。
AI.conclusion: SVC-VV模型通过整合视觉垂直与前庭信息，可更准确预测APMV场景下的晕动症，为设计缓解措施提供理论支持。

authors_text: Shiv Ram Dubey,Satish Kumar Singh
title: Transformer-based Generative Adversarial Networks in Computer Vision: A Comprehensive Survey
title_zh: 计算机视觉中基于 Transformer 的生成对抗网络：综合调查
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been very successful for synthesizing the images in a given dataset. The artificially generated images by GANs are very realistic. The GANs have shown potential usability in several computer vision applications, including image generation, image-to-image translation, video synthesis, and others. Conventionally, the generator network is the backbone of GANs, which generates the samples and the discriminator network is used to facilitate the training of the generator network. The discriminator network is usually a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Whereas, the generator network is usually either an Up-CNN for image generation or an Encoder-Decoder network for image-to-image translation. The convolution-based networks exploit the local relationship in a layer, which requires the deep networks to extract the abstract features. Hence, CNNs suffer to exploit the global relationship in the feature space. However, recently developed Transformer networks are able to exploit the global relationship at every layer. The Transformer networks have shown tremendous performance improvement for several problems in computer vision. Motivated from the success of Transformer networks and GANs, recent works have tried to exploit the Transformers in GAN framework for the image/video synthesis. This paper presents a comprehensive survey on the developments and advancements in GANs utilizing the Transformer networks for computer vision applications. The performance comparison for several applications on benchmark datasets is also performed and analyzed. The conducted survey will be very useful to deep learning and computer vision community to understand the research trends \& gaps related with Transformer-based GANs and to develop the advanced GAN architectures by exploiting the global and local relationships for different applications.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been very successful for synthesizing the images in a given dataset. The artificially generated images by GANs are very realistic. The GANs have shown potential usability in several computer vision applications, including image generation, image-to-image translation, video synthesis, and others. Conventionally, the generator network is the backbone of GANs, which generates the samples and the discriminator network is used to facilitate the training of the generator network. The discriminator network is usually a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Whereas, the generator network is usually either an Up-CNN for image generation or an Encoder-Decoder network for image-to-image translation. The convolution-based networks exploit the local relationship in a layer, which requires the deep networks to extract the abstract features. Hence, CNNs suffer to exploit the global relationship in the feature space. However, recently developed Transformer networks are able to exploit the global relationship at every layer. The Transformer networks have shown tremendous performance improvement for several problems in computer vision. Motivated from the success of Transformer networks and GANs, recent works have tried to exploit the Transformers in GAN framework for the image/video synthesis. This paper presents a comprehensive survey on the developments and advancements in GANs utilizing the Transformer networks for computer vision applications. The performance comparison for several applications on benchmark datasets is also performed and analyzed. The conducted survey will be very useful to deep learning and computer vision community to understand the research trends \& gaps related with Transformer-based GANs and to develop the advanced GAN architectures by exploiting the global and local relationships for different applications.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）在合成给定数据集中的图像方面非常成功。 GAN 人工生成的图像非常逼真。 GAN 在多种计算机视觉应用中显示出潜在的可用性，包括图像生成、图像到图像转换、视频合成等。传统上，生成器网络是 GAN 的骨干，它生成样本，鉴别器网络用于促进生成器网络的训练。鉴别器网络通常是卷积神经网络（CNN）。而生成器网络通常是用于图像生成的 Up-CNN 或用于图像到图像转换的编码器-解码器网络。基于卷积的网络利用层中的局部关系，这需要深层网络来提取抽象特征。因此，CNN 难以利用特征空间中的全局关系。然而，最近开发的 Transformer 网络能够利用每一层的全局关系。 Transformer 网络在解决计算机视觉中的几个问题方面表现出了巨大的性能改进。受 Transformer 网络和 GAN 成功的启发，最近的工作尝试利用 GAN 框架中的 Transformer 进行图像/视频合成。本文对利用 Transformer 网络进行计算机视觉应用的 GAN 的发展和进步进行了全面的调查。还对基准数据集上的多个应用程序进行了性能比较。这项调查对于深度学习和计算机视觉社区非常有用，有助于了解与基于 Transformer 的 GAN 相关的研究趋势和差距，并通过利用不同应用的全局和局部关系来开发先进的 GAN 架构。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于Transformer网络的生成对抗网络（GAN）在计算机视觉领域的研究进展，分析了其在图像/视频合成等应用中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN中卷积神经网络（CNN）难以捕捉全局特征关系，而Transformer网络在全局建模能力上的优势促使研究者将其引入GAN框架以提升生成效果。
AI.method: 系统梳理Transformer与GAN结合的最新研究，对比分析不同方法在基准数据集上的性能表现，并总结技术演进与研究空白。
AI.result: 揭示了Transformer-GAN在图像生成、翻译等任务中的优势，明确了当前研究的技术路线图及尚未解决的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为深度学习社区提供了Transformer-GAN的研究现状全景，为未来融合全局-局部特征关系的先进GAN架构设计提供了方向指引。

The artificially generated images by GANs are very realistic. The GANs have shown potential usability in several computer vision applications, including image generation, image-to-image translation, video synthesis, and others. Conventionally, the generator network is the backbone of GANs, which generates the samples and the discriminator network is used to facilitate the training of the generator network. The discriminator network is usually a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Whereas, the generator network is usually either an Up-CNN for image generation or an Encoder-Decoder network for image-to-image translation. The convolution-based networks exploit the local relationship in a layer, which requires the deep networks to extract the abstract features. Hence, CNNs suffer to exploit the global relationship in the feature space. However, recently developed Transformer networks are able to exploit the global relationship at every layer. The Transformer networks have shown tremendous performance improvement for several problems in computer vision. Motivated from the success of Transformer networks and GANs, recent works have tried to exploit the Transformers in GAN framework for the image/video synthesis. This paper presents a comprehensive survey on the developments and advancements in GANs utilizing the Transformer networks for computer vision applications. The performance comparison for several applications on benchmark datasets is also performed and analyzed. The conducted survey will be very useful to deep learning and computer vision community to understand the research trends \& gaps related with Transformer-based GANs and to develop the advanced GAN architectures by exploiting the global and local relationships for different applications. 生成对抗网络（GAN）在合成给定数据集中的图像方面非常成功。 GAN 人工生成的图像非常逼真。 GAN 在多种计算机视觉应用中显示出潜在的可用性，包括图像生成、图像到图像转换、视频合成等。传统上，生成器网络是 GAN 的骨干，它生成样本，鉴别器网络用于促进生成器网络的训练。鉴别器网络通常是卷积神经网络（CNN）。而生成器网络通常是用于图像生成的 Up-CNN 或用于图像到图像转换的编码器-解码器网络。基于卷积的网络利用层中的局部关系，这需要深层网络来提取抽象特征。因此，CNN 难以利用特征空间中的全局关系。然而，最近开发的 Transformer 网络能够利用每一层的全局关系。 Transformer 网络在解决计算机视觉中的几个问题方面表现出了巨大的性能改进。受 Transformer 网络和 GAN 成功的启发，最近的工作尝试利用 GAN 框架中的 Transformer 进行图像/视频合成。本文对利用 Transformer 网络进行计算机视觉应用的 GAN 的发展和进步进行了全面的调查。还对基准数据集上的多个应用程序进行了性能比较。这项调查对于深度学习和计算机视觉社区非常有用，有助于了解与基于 Transformer 的 GAN 相关的研究趋势和差距，并通过利用不同应用的全局和局部关系来开发先进的 GAN 架构。 本文综述了基于Transformer网络的生成对抗网络（GAN）在计算机视觉领域的研究进展，分析了其在图像/视频合成等应用中的性能。 Shiv Ram Dubey,Satish Kumar Singh cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Mufan Sang,Yong Zhao,Gang Liu,John H. L. Hansen,Jian Wu
title: Improving Transformer-based Networks With Locality For Automatic Speaker Verification
title_zh: 改进基于变压器的网络，实现自动说话人验证的局部性
abstract: Recently, Transformer-based architectures have been explored for speaker embedding extraction. Although the Transformer employs the self-attention mechanism to efficiently model the global interaction between token embeddings, it is inadequate for capturing short-range local context, which is essential for the accurate extraction of speaker information. In this study, we enhance the Transformer with the enhanced locality modeling in two directions. First, we propose the Locality-Enhanced Conformer (LE-Confomer) by introducing depth-wise convolution and channel-wise attention into the Conformer blocks. Second, we present the Speaker Swin Transformer (SST) by adapting the Swin Transformer, originally proposed for vision tasks, into speaker embedding network. We evaluate the proposed approaches on the VoxCeleb datasets and a large-scale Microsoft internal multilingual (MS-internal) dataset. The proposed models achieve 0.75% EER on VoxCeleb 1 test set, outperforming the previously proposed Transformer-based models and CNN-based models, such as ResNet34 and ECAPA-TDNN. When trained on the MS-internal dataset, the proposed models achieve promising results with 14.6% relative reduction in EER over the Res2Net50 model.
summary: Recently, Transformer-based architectures have been explored for speaker embedding extraction. Although the Transformer employs the self-attention mechanism to efficiently model the global interaction between token embeddings, it is inadequate for capturing short-range local context, which is essential for the accurate extraction of speaker information. In this study, we enhance the Transformer with the enhanced locality modeling in two directions. First, we propose the Locality-Enhanced Conformer (LE-Confomer) by introducing depth-wise convolution and channel-wise attention into the Conformer blocks. Second, we present the Speaker Swin Transformer (SST) by adapting the Swin Transformer, originally proposed for vision tasks, into speaker embedding network. We evaluate the proposed approaches on the VoxCeleb datasets and a large-scale Microsoft internal multilingual (MS-internal) dataset. The proposed models achieve 0.75% EER on VoxCeleb 1 test set, outperforming the previously proposed Transformer-based models and CNN-based models, such as ResNet34 and ECAPA-TDNN. When trained on the MS-internal dataset, the proposed models achieve promising results with 14.6% relative reduction in EER over the Res2Net50 model.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 Transformer 的架构已被探索用于说话人嵌入提取。尽管 Transformer 采用自注意力机制来有效地建模 token 嵌入之间的全局交互，但它不足以捕获短程局部上下文，而这对于准确提取说话人信息至关重要。在本研究中，我们通过两个方向的增强局部建模来增强 Transformer。首先，我们通过在 Conformer 块中引入深度卷积和通道注意力来提出局部增强 Conformer（LE-Confomer）。其次，我们通过将最初为视觉任务提出的 Swin Transformer 应用于扬声器嵌入网络来提出扬声器 Swin Transformer (SST)。我们在 VoxCeleb 数据集和大规模 Microsoft 内部多语言（MS-internal）数据集上评估了所提出的方法。所提出的模型在 VoxCeleb 1 测试集上实现了 0.75% EER，优于之前提出的基于 Transformer 的模型和基于 CNN 的模型，例如 ResNet34 和 ECAPA-TDNN。当在 MS 内部数据集上进行训练时，所提出的模型取得了可喜的结果，与 Res2Net50 模型相比，EER 相对降低了 14.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过增强局部性建模改进基于Transformer的网络，以提升自动说话人验证的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer能够建模全局交互，但其在捕捉短距离局部上下文方面存在不足，而局部信息对说话人信息的准确提取至关重要。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1) 引入深度可分离卷积和通道注意力机制的Locality-Enhanced Conformer (LE-Confomer)；2) 将视觉任务中的Swin Transformer适配为说话人嵌入网络（Speaker Swin Transformer, SST）。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1测试集上达到0.75% EER，优于ResNet34和ECAPA-TDNN等模型；在MS-internal数据集上相较Res2Net50模型实现14.6%的EER相对降低。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合全局自注意力与局部卷积特性，所提方法有效提升了说话人验证性能，验证了局部性建模对语音任务的重要性。

authors_text: Altanai Bisht,Ana Carolina de Souza Mendes,Justin David Thoreson II,Shadrokh Samavi
title: Low Latency Video Denoising for Online Conferencing Using CNN Architectures
title_zh: 使用 CNN 架构进行在线会议的低延迟视频去噪
abstract: In this paper, we propose a pipeline for real-time video denoising with low runtime cost and high perceptual quality. The vast majority of denoising studies focus on image denoising. However, a minority of research works focusing on video denoising do so with higher performance costs to obtain higher quality while maintaining temporal coherence. The approach we introduce in this paper leverages the advantages of both image and video-denoising architectures. Our pipeline first denoises the keyframes or one-fifth of the frames using HI-GAN blind image denoising architecture. Then, the remaining four-fifths of the noisy frames and the denoised keyframe data are fed into the FastDVDnet video denoising model. The final output is rendered in the user's display in real-time. The combination of these low-latency neural network architectures produces real-time denoising with high perceptual quality with applications in video conferencing and other real-time media streaming systems. A custom noise detector analyzer provides real-time feedback to adapt the weights and improve the models' output.
summary: In this paper, we propose a pipeline for real-time video denoising with low runtime cost and high perceptual quality. The vast majority of denoising studies focus on image denoising. However, a minority of research works focusing on video denoising do so with higher performance costs to obtain higher quality while maintaining temporal coherence. The approach we introduce in this paper leverages the advantages of both image and video-denoising architectures. Our pipeline first denoises the keyframes or one-fifth of the frames using HI-GAN blind image denoising architecture. Then, the remaining four-fifths of the noisy frames and the denoised keyframe data are fed into the FastDVDnet video denoising model. The final output is rendered in the user's display in real-time. The combination of these low-latency neural network architectures produces real-time denoising with high perceptual quality with applications in video conferencing and other real-time media streaming systems. A custom noise detector analyzer provides real-time feedback to adapt the weights and improve the models' output.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种具有低运行成本和高感知质量的实时视频去噪管道。绝大多数去噪研究都集中在图像去噪。然而，少数专注于视频去噪的研究工作以更高的性能成本来获得更高的质量，同时保持时间一致性。我们在本文中介绍的方法利用了图像和视频去噪架构的优点。我们的流程首先使用 HI-GAN 盲图像去噪架构对关键帧或五分之一的帧进行去噪。然后，剩余五分之四的噪声帧和去噪后的关键帧数据被输入到 FastDVDnet 视频去噪模型中。最终输出实时呈现在用户的显示器上。这些低延迟神经网络架构的组合可产生具有高感知质量的实时去噪，并应用于视频会议和其他实时媒体流系统。定制的噪声检测分析仪提供实时反馈以调整权重并改进模型的输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN架构的低延迟视频去噪方法，用于实时视频会议场景。
AI.motivation: 现有视频去噪研究要么侧重图像去噪，要么以高计算成本换取质量；而实际在线会议需要兼顾实时性与视觉感知质量。
AI.method: 采用分阶段混合架构：先用HI-GAN处理关键帧，再用FastDVDnet处理其余帧，并通过自定义噪声检测器实时调整模型权重。
AI.result: 实现端到端实时视频去噪，在保持高感知质量的同时满足视频会议等实时媒体传输系统的低延迟需求。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合图像与视频去噪优势，该方法在计算效率与视觉效果间取得平衡，为实时视频处理提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Low Latency Video Denoising for Online Conferencing Using CNN Architectures 使用 CNN 架构进行在线会议的低延迟视频去噪 In this paper, we propose a pipeline for real-time video denoising with low runtime cost and high perceptual quality. The vast majority of denoising studies focus on image denoising. However, a minority of research works focusing on video denoising do so with higher performance costs to obtain higher quality while maintaining temporal coherence. The approach we introduce in this paper leverages the advantages of both image and video-denoising architectures. Our pipeline first denoises the keyframes or one-fifth of the frames using HI-GAN blind image denoising architecture. Then, the remaining four-fifths of the noisy frames and the denoised keyframe data are fed into the FastDVDnet video denoising model. The final output is rendered in the user's display in real-time. The combination of these low-latency neural network architectures produces real-time denoising with high perceptual quality with applications in video conferencing and other real-time media streaming systems. A custom noise detector analyzer provides real-time feedback to adapt the weights and improve the models' output. 在本文中，我们提出了一种具有低运行成本和高感知质量的实时视频去噪管道。绝大多数去噪研究都集中在图像去噪。然而，少数专注于视频去噪的研究工作以更高的性能成本来获得更高的质量，同时保持时间一致性。我们在本文中介绍的方法利用了图像和视频去噪架构的优点。我们的流程首先使用 HI-GAN 盲图像去噪架构对关键帧或五分之一的帧进行去噪。然后，剩余五分之四的噪声帧和去噪后的关键帧数据被输入到 FastDVDnet 视频去噪模型中。最终输出实时呈现在用户的显示器上。这些低延迟神经网络架构的组合可产生具有高感知质量的实时去噪，并应用于视频会议和其他实时媒体流系统。定制的噪声检测分析仪提供实时反馈以调整权重并改进模型的输出。 本文提出一种基于CNN架构的低延迟视频去噪方法，用于实时视频会议场景。 Altanai Bisht,Ana Carolina de Souza Mendes,Justin David Thoreson II,Shadrokh Samavi eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Tosiron Adegbija
title: jazznet: A Dataset of Fundamental Piano Patterns for Music Audio Machine Learning Research
title_zh: jazznet：用于音乐音频机器学习研究的基本钢琴模式数据集
comment: To Appear at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
comments: To Appear at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
abstract: This paper introduces the jazznet Dataset, a dataset of fundamental jazz piano music patterns for developing machine learning (ML) algorithms in music information retrieval (MIR). The dataset contains 162520 labeled piano patterns, including chords, arpeggios, scales, and chord progressions with their inversions, resulting in more than 26k hours of audio and a total size of 95GB. The paper explains the dataset's composition, creation, and generation, and presents an open-source Pattern Generator using a method called Distance-Based Pattern Structures (DBPS), which allows researchers to easily generate new piano patterns simply by defining the distances between pitches within the musical patterns. We demonstrate that the dataset can help researchers benchmark new models for challenging MIR tasks, using a convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) and a deep convolutional neural network. The dataset and code are available via: https://github.com/tosiron/jazznet.
summary: This paper introduces the jazznet Dataset, a dataset of fundamental jazz piano music patterns for developing machine learning (ML) algorithms in music information retrieval (MIR). The dataset contains 162520 labeled piano patterns, including chords, arpeggios, scales, and chord progressions with their inversions, resulting in more than 26k hours of audio and a total size of 95GB. The paper explains the dataset's composition, creation, and generation, and presents an open-source Pattern Generator using a method called Distance-Based Pattern Structures (DBPS), which allows researchers to easily generate new piano patterns simply by defining the distances between pitches within the musical patterns. We demonstrate that the dataset can help researchers benchmark new models for challenging MIR tasks, using a convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) and a deep convolutional neural network. The dataset and code are available via: https://github.com/tosiron/jazznet.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 jazznet 数据集，这是一个基本爵士钢琴音乐模式的数据集，用于开发音乐信息检索 (MIR) 中的机器学习 (ML) 算法。该数据集包含 162520 个标记的钢琴模式，包括和弦、琶音、音阶以及和弦进行及其转位，产生超过 26000 小时的音频，总大小为 95GB。该论文解释了数据集的组成、创建和生成，并提出了一个使用称为基于距离的模式结构（DBPS）的方法的开源模式生成器，该方法使研究人员只需定义音乐模式中音高之间的距离即可轻松生成新的钢琴模式。我们证明，该数据集可以帮助研究人员使用卷积循环神经网络 (CRNN) 和深度卷积神经网络对具有挑战性的 MIR 任务的新模型进行基准测试。数据集和代码可通过以下网址获取：https://github.com/tosiron/jazznet。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了jazznet数据集，包含用于音乐信息检索（MIR）的爵士钢琴基础模式，旨在推动机器学习算法的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐数据集缺乏针对爵士钢琴基础模式（如和弦、琶音等）的标注数据，限制了MIR领域模型的开发与评估。
AI.method: 通过Distance-Based Pattern Structures（DBPS）方法生成钢琴模式，并构建包含162,520个标注模式的数据集，提供开源生成工具。
AI.result: 数据集支持使用卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）和深度卷积神经网络进行模型基准测试，总音频时长超26,000小时。
AI.conclusion: jazznet为MIR领域提供了高质量的基准数据集，有助于推动复杂音乐任务的算法研究与创新。

authors_text: Mahdi Namazifar,Devamanyu Hazarika,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: Role of Bias Terms in Dot-Product Attention
title_zh: 偏差项在点积注意力中的作用
abstract: Dot-product attention is a core module in the present generation of neural network models, particularly transformers, and is being leveraged across numerous areas such as natural language processing and computer vision. This attention module is comprised of three linear transformations, namely query, key, and value linear transformations, each of which has a bias term. In this work, we study the role of these bias terms, and mathematically show that the bias term of the key linear transformation is redundant and could be omitted without any impact on the attention module. Moreover, we argue that the bias term of the value linear transformation has a more prominent role than that of the bias term of the query linear transformation. We empirically verify these findings through multiple experiments on language modeling, natural language understanding, and natural language generation tasks.
summary: Dot-product attention is a core module in the present generation of neural network models, particularly transformers, and is being leveraged across numerous areas such as natural language processing and computer vision. This attention module is comprised of three linear transformations, namely query, key, and value linear transformations, each of which has a bias term. In this work, we study the role of these bias terms, and mathematically show that the bias term of the key linear transformation is redundant and could be omitted without any impact on the attention module. Moreover, we argue that the bias term of the value linear transformation has a more prominent role than that of the bias term of the query linear transformation. We empirically verify these findings through multiple experiments on language modeling, natural language understanding, and natural language generation tasks.
abstract_zh: 点积注意力是当前一代神经网络模型（尤其是 Transformer）的核心模块，并且正在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等众多领域得到利用。该注意力模块由三个线性变换组成，即查询、键和值线性变换，每个线性变换都有一个偏差项。在这项工作中，我们研究了这些偏差项的作用，并从数学上证明了关键线性变换的偏差项是多余的，可以省略，而不会对注意力模块产生任何影响。此外，我们认为值线性变换的偏差项比查询线性变换的偏差项具有更突出的作用。我们通过语言建模、自然语言理解和自然语言生成任务的多个实验来实证验证这些发现。

AI.tldr: 研究点积注意力机制中查询、键、值线性变换的偏置项作用，分析其冗余性及重要性差异。
AI.motivation: 偏置项在神经网络中广泛存在，但其在注意力机制中的具体作用及必要性尚未明确，可能影响模型效率与性能。
AI.method: 通过数学推导证明键的偏置项冗余，结合语言建模、自然语言理解等任务的实验验证值与查询偏置项的重要性差异。
AI.result: 数学证明键的偏置可省略，实验表明值的偏置对模型性能影响大于查询的偏置。
AI.conclusion: 键的偏置项冗余可移除，值的偏置项比查询的更关键，为注意力模块优化提供理论依据。
