In this work, we study the role of these bias terms, and mathematically show that the bias term of the key linear transformation is redundant and could be omitted without any impact on the attention module. Moreover, we argue that the bias term of the value linear transformation has a more prominent role than that of the bias term of the query linear transformation. We empirically verify these findings through multiple experiments on language modeling, natural language understanding, and natural language generation tasks. 点积注意力是当前一代神经网络模型（尤其是 Transformer）的核心模块，并且正在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等众多领域得到利用。该注意力模块由三个线性变换组成，即查询、键和值线性变换，每个线性变换都有一个偏差项。在这项工作中，我们研究了这些偏差项的作用，并从数学上证明了关键线性变换的偏差项是多余的，可以省略，而不会对注意力模块产生任何影响。此外，我们认为值线性变换的偏差项比查询线性变换的偏差项具有更突出的作用。我们通过语言建模、自然语言理解和自然语言生成任务的多个实验来实证验证这些发现。 研究点积注意力机制中查询、键、值线性变换的偏置项作用，分析其冗余性及重要性差异。 Mahdi Namazifar,Devamanyu Hazarika,Dilek Hakkani-Tur cs.NE

authors_text: Sayed Pedram Haeri Boroujeni,Elnaz Pashaei
title: A Hybrid Chimp Optimization Algorithm and Generalized Normal Distribution Algorithm with Opposition-Based Learning Strategy for Solving Data Clustering Problems
title_zh: 一种混合黑猩猩优化算法和广义正态分布算法，具有基于反对的学习策略来解决数据聚类问题
abstract: This paper is concerned with data clustering to separate clusters based on the connectivity principle for categorizing similar and dissimilar data into different groups. Although classical clustering algorithms such as K-means are efficient techniques, they often trap in local optima and have a slow convergence rate in solving high-dimensional problems. To address these issues, many successful meta-heuristic optimization algorithms and intelligence-based methods have been introduced to attain the optimal solution in a reasonable time. They are designed to escape from a local optimum problem by allowing flexible movements or random behaviors. In this study, we attempt to conceptualize a powerful approach using the three main components: Chimp Optimization Algorithm (ChOA), Generalized Normal Distribution Algorithm (GNDA), and Opposition-Based Learning (OBL) method. Firstly, two versions of ChOA with two different independent groups' strategies and seven chaotic maps, entitled ChOA(I) and ChOA(II), are presented to achieve the best possible result for data clustering purposes. Secondly, a novel combination of ChOA and GNDA algorithms with the OBL strategy is devised to solve the major shortcomings of the original algorithms. Lastly, the proposed ChOAGNDA method is a Selective Opposition (SO) algorithm based on ChOA and GNDA, which can be used to tackle large and complex real-world optimization problems, particularly data clustering applications. The results are evaluated against seven popular meta-heuristic optimization algorithms and eight recent state-of-the-art clustering techniques. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed work significantly outperforms other existing methods in terms of the achievement in minimizing the Sum of Intra-Cluster Distances (SICD), obtaining the lowest Error Rate (ER), accelerating the convergence speed, and finding the optimal cluster centers.
summary: This paper is concerned with data clustering to separate clusters based on the connectivity principle for categorizing similar and dissimilar data into different groups. Although classical clustering algorithms such as K-means are efficient techniques, they often trap in local optima and have a slow convergence rate in solving high-dimensional problems. To address these issues, many successful meta-heuristic optimization algorithms and intelligence-based methods have been introduced to attain the optimal solution in a reasonable time. They are designed to escape from a local optimum problem by allowing flexible movements or random behaviors. In this study, we attempt to conceptualize a powerful approach using the three main components: Chimp Optimization Algorithm (ChOA), Generalized Normal Distribution Algorithm (GNDA), and Opposition-Based Learning (OBL) method. Firstly, two versions of ChOA with two different independent groups' strategies and seven chaotic maps, entitled ChOA(I) and ChOA(II), are presented to achieve the best possible result for data clustering purposes. Secondly, a novel combination of ChOA and GNDA algorithms with the OBL strategy is devised to solve the major shortcomings of the original algorithms. Lastly, the proposed ChOAGNDA method is a Selective Opposition (SO) algorithm based on ChOA and GNDA, which can be used to tackle large and complex real-world optimization problems, particularly data clustering applications. The results are evaluated against seven popular meta-heuristic optimization algorithms and eight recent state-of-the-art clustering techniques. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed work significantly outperforms other existing methods in terms of the achievement in minimizing the Sum of Intra-Cluster Distances (SICD), obtaining the lowest Error Rate (ER), accelerating the convergence speed, and finding the optimal cluster centers.
abstract_zh: 本文关注基于连通性原理的数据聚类，以将相似和不相似的数据分类为不同的组。尽管K-means等经典聚类算法是有效的技术，但它们经常陷入局部最优并且在解决高维问题时收敛速度较慢。为了解决这些问题，许多成功的元启发式优化算法和基于智能的方法被引入，以在合理的时间内获得最优解决方案。它们的设计目的是通过允许灵活的运动或随机行为来摆脱局部最优问题。在本研究中，我们尝试使用三个主要组成部分来概念化一种强大的方法：黑猩猩优化算法（ChOA）、广义正态分布算法（GNDA）和基于反对的学习（OBL）方法。首先，提出了两个版本的 ChOA，具有两个不同的独立组策略和七个混沌图，名为 ChOA(I) 和 ChOA(II)，以实现数据聚类目的的最佳结果。其次，设计了ChOA和GNDA算法与OBL策略的新颖组合，以解决原始算法的主要缺点。最后，所提出的 ChOAGNDA 方法是一种基于 ChOA 和 GNDA 的选择性反对（SO）算法，可用于解决大型且复杂的现实世界优化问题，特别是数据聚类应用。结果根据七种流行的元启发式优化算法和八种最新的聚类技术进行评估。实验结果表明，所提出的工作在最小化簇内距离和（SICD）、获得最低错误率（ER）、加快收敛速度​​和寻找最佳聚类中心等方面显着优于其他现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合黑猩猩优化算法、广义正态分布算法和反向学习策略的混合算法，用于解决数据聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法如K-means易陷入局部最优且收敛速度慢，尤其在处理高维数据时效果不佳，需更高效的优化方法。
AI.method: 设计两种改进的ChOA版本（ChOA(I)和ChOA(II)），结合GNDA算法与反向学习策略，提出混合算法ChOAGNDA以提升聚类性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在最小化簇内距离和误差率、加速收敛速度及寻找最优聚类中心方面显著优于七种元启发式算法和八种最新聚类技术。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在数据聚类任务中表现出优越性，适用于复杂现实优化问题。

authors_text: Bhargav Ganguly,Yulian Wu,Di Wang,Vaneet Aggarwal
title: Quantum Computing Provides Exponential Regret Improvement in Episodic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 量子计算为情景强化学习提供了指数级的遗憾改进
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of \textit{episodic reinforcement learning} with quantum oracles for state evolution. To this end, we propose an \textit{Upper Confidence Bound} (UCB) based quantum algorithmic framework to facilitate learning of a finite-horizon MDP. Our quantum algorithm achieves an exponential improvement in regret as compared to the classical counterparts, achieving a regret of $\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1)$ as compared to $\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ \footnote{$\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ hides logarithmic terms.}, $K$ being the number of training episodes. In order to achieve this advantage, we exploit efficient quantum mean estimation technique that provides quadratic improvement in the number of i.i.d. samples needed to estimate the mean of sub-Gaussian random variables as compared to classical mean estimation. This improvement is a key to the significant regret improvement in quantum reinforcement learning. We provide proof-of-concept experiments on various RL environments that in turn demonstrate performance gains of the proposed algorithmic framework.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of \textit{episodic reinforcement learning} with quantum oracles for state evolution. To this end, we propose an \textit{Upper Confidence Bound} (UCB) based quantum algorithmic framework to facilitate learning of a finite-horizon MDP. Our quantum algorithm achieves an exponential improvement in regret as compared to the classical counterparts, achieving a regret of $\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1)$ as compared to $\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ \footnote{$\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ hides logarithmic terms.}, $K$ being the number of training episodes. In order to achieve this advantage, we exploit efficient quantum mean estimation technique that provides quadratic improvement in the number of i.i.d. samples needed to estimate the mean of sub-Gaussian random variables as compared to classical mean estimation. This improvement is a key to the significant regret improvement in quantum reinforcement learning. We provide proof-of-concept experiments on various RL environments that in turn demonstrate performance gains of the proposed algorithmic framework.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了使用量子预言机进行状态演化的 \textit{情景强化学习} 问题。为此，我们提出了一种基于 \textit{Upper Confidence Bound} (UCB) 的量子算法框架，以促进有限视野 MDP 的学习。与经典算法相比，我们的量子算法在后悔方面实现了指数级改进，与 $\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ \footnote{$\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\cdot)$ 隐藏对数项}相比，实现了 $\Tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1)$ 的后悔。}，$K$ 是训练集的数量。为了实现这一优势，我们利用高效的量子均值估计技术，该技术可在 i.i.d 的数量上提供二次改进。与经典均值估计相比，估计亚高斯随机变量均值所需的样本。这一改进是量子强化学习显着改善遗憾的关键。我们在各种 RL 环境中提供概念验证实验，从而证明所提出的算法框架的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子预言机的回合制强化学习算法框架，实现了与经典算法相比的指数级遗憾改进。
AI.motivation: 经典强化学习算法的遗憾随训练次数增加而增长，而量子计算技术可能提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于上置信界（UCB）的量子算法框架，结合量子均值估计技术提升样本效率。
AI.result: 算法在回合制MDP中实现O~(1)的遗憾，较经典算法O~(√K)有指数级提升，并通过实验验证性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算能显著提升强化学习效率，为未来量子机器学习应用提供新方向。

authors_text: Zhijie Qiao,Helen Loeb,Venkata Gurrla,Matt Lebermann,Johannes Betz,Rahul Mangharam
title: Drive Right: Promoting Autonomous Vehicle Education Through an Integrated Simulation Platform
title_zh: Drive Right：通过集成仿真平台促进自动驾驶汽车教育
abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are being rapidly introduced into our lives. However, public misunderstanding and mistrust have become prominent issues hindering the acceptance of these driverless technologies. The primary objective of this study is to evaluate the effectiveness of a driving simulator to help the public gain an understanding of AVs and build trust in them. To achieve this aim, we built an integrated simulation platform, designed various driving scenarios, and recruited 28 participants for the experiment. The study results indicate that a driving simulator effectively decreases the participants' perceived risk of AVs and increases perceived usefulness. The proposed methodologies and findings of this study can be further explored by auto manufacturers and policymakers to provide user-friendly AV design.
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are being rapidly introduced into our lives. However, public misunderstanding and mistrust have become prominent issues hindering the acceptance of these driverless technologies. The primary objective of this study is to evaluate the effectiveness of a driving simulator to help the public gain an understanding of AVs and build trust in them. To achieve this aim, we built an integrated simulation platform, designed various driving scenarios, and recruited 28 participants for the experiment. The study results indicate that a driving simulator effectively decreases the participants' perceived risk of AVs and increases perceived usefulness. The proposed methodologies and findings of this study can be further explored by auto manufacturers and policymakers to provide user-friendly AV design.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车（AV）正在迅速进入我们的生活。然而，公众的误解和不信任已成为阻碍这些无人驾驶技术被接受的突出问题。本研究的主要目的是评估驾驶模拟器帮助公众了解自动驾驶汽车并建立信任的有效性。为了实现这一目标，我们搭建了综合仿真平台，设计了各种驾驶场景，并招募了 28 名参与者进行实验。研究结果表明，驾驶模拟器有效降低了参与者对自动驾驶汽车的感知风险并增加了感知有用性。汽车制造商和政策制定者可以进一步探索本研究提出的方法和结果，以提供用户友好的自动驾驶汽车设计。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过构建集成模拟平台，评估驾驶模拟器在帮助公众理解自动驾驶汽车（AVs）并建立信任方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术的快速普及面临公众误解和不信任的阻碍，亟需通过教育手段提升公众认知与接受度。
AI.method: 开发集成模拟平台，设计多种驾驶场景，招募28名参与者进行实验，评估模拟器对风险感知和实用性的影响力。
AI.result: 实验表明，驾驶模拟器显著降低了参与者对自动驾驶汽车的感知风险，并增强了其感知实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究方法及发现可为汽车制造商和政策制定者优化用户友好的自动驾驶设计提供参考依据。

search_text: Drive Right: Promoting Autonomous Vehicle Education Through an Integrated Simulation Platform Drive Right：通过集成仿真平台促进自动驾驶汽车教育 Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are being rapidly introduced into our lives. However, public misunderstanding and mistrust have become prominent issues hindering the acceptance of these driverless technologies. The primary objective of this study is to evaluate the effectiveness of a driving simulator to help the public gain an understanding of AVs and build trust in them. To achieve this aim, we built an integrated simulation platform, designed various driving scenarios, and recruited 28 participants for the experiment. The study results indicate that a driving simulator effectively decreases the participants' perceived risk of AVs and increases perceived usefulness. The proposed methodologies and findings of this study can be further explored by auto manufacturers and policymakers to provide user-friendly AV design. 自动驾驶汽车（AV）正在迅速进入我们的生活。然而，公众的误解和不信任已成为阻碍这些无人驾驶技术被接受的突出问题。本研究的主要目的是评估驾驶模拟器帮助公众了解自动驾驶汽车并建立信任的有效性。为了实现这一目标，我们搭建了综合仿真平台，设计了各种驾驶场景，并招募了 28 名参与者进行实验。研究结果表明，驾驶模拟器有效降低了参与者对自动驾驶汽车的感知风险并增加了感知有用性。汽车制造商和政策制定者可以进一步探索本研究提出的方法和结果，以提供用户友好的自动驾驶汽车设计。 本研究通过构建集成模拟平台，评估驾驶模拟器在帮助公众理解自动驾驶汽车（AVs）并建立信任方面的有效性。 Zhijie Qiao,Helen Loeb,Venkata Gurrla,Matt Lebermann,Johannes Betz,Rahul Mangharam cs.HC

authors_text: Pengfei Sun,Ehsan Eqlimi,Yansong Chua,Paul Devos,Dick Botteldooren
title: Adaptive Axonal Delays in feedforward spiking neural networks for accurate spoken word recognition
title_zh: 前馈尖峰神经网络中的自适应轴突延迟可实现准确的口语单词识别
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNN) are a promising research avenue for building accurate and efficient automatic speech recognition systems. Recent advances in audio-to-spike encoding and training algorithms enable SNN to be applied in practical tasks. Biologically-inspired SNN communicates using sparse asynchronous events. Therefore, spike-timing is critical to SNN performance. In this aspect, most works focus on training synaptic weights and few have considered delays in event transmission, namely axonal delay. In this work, we consider a learnable axonal delay capped at a maximum value, which can be adapted according to the axonal delay distribution in each network layer. We show that our proposed method achieves the best classification results reported on the SHD dataset (92.45%) and NTIDIGITS dataset (95.09%). Our work illustrates the potential of training axonal delays for tasks with complex temporal structures.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNN) are a promising research avenue for building accurate and efficient automatic speech recognition systems. Recent advances in audio-to-spike encoding and training algorithms enable SNN to be applied in practical tasks. Biologically-inspired SNN communicates using sparse asynchronous events. Therefore, spike-timing is critical to SNN performance. In this aspect, most works focus on training synaptic weights and few have considered delays in event transmission, namely axonal delay. In this work, we consider a learnable axonal delay capped at a maximum value, which can be adapted according to the axonal delay distribution in each network layer. We show that our proposed method achieves the best classification results reported on the SHD dataset (92.45%) and NTIDIGITS dataset (95.09%). Our work illustrates the potential of training axonal delays for tasks with complex temporal structures.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是构建准确、高效的自动语音识别系统的一个有前途的研究途径。音频到尖峰编码和训练算法的最新进展使 SNN 能够应用于实际任务。受生物学启发的 SNN 使用稀疏异步事件进行通信。因此，尖峰时序对于 SNN 性能至关重要。在这方面，大多数工作集中在训练突触权重，很少考虑事件传输的延迟，即轴突延迟。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一个上限为最大值的可学习轴突延迟，它可以根据每个网络层的轴突延迟分布进行调整。我们表明，我们提出的方法在 SHD 数据集 (92.45%) 和 NTIDIGITS 数据集 (95.09%) 上实现了最佳分类结果。我们的工作说明了针对具有复杂时间结构的任务训练轴突延迟的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的轴突延迟方法，用于改进前馈脉冲神经网络在语音识别任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注突触权重训练而忽略轴突延迟对脉冲时序的影响，而脉冲时序对SNN性能至关重要。
AI.method: 设计可学习的轴突延迟参数，根据网络各层延迟分布进行自适应调整，并设置最大延迟上限。
AI.result: 在SHD数据集上达到92.45%、NTIDIGITS数据集上达到95.09%的分类准确率，均为当前最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 训练轴突延迟参数能有效提升具有复杂时间结构任务的SNN性能，为生物启发式神经网络设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Li Shi,Redoan Rahman,Esther Melamed,Jacek Gwizdka,Justin F. Rousseau,Ying Ding
title: Using Explainable AI to Cross-Validate Socio-economic Disparities Among Covid-19 Patient Mortality
title_zh: 使用可解释的人工智能交叉验证 Covid-19 患者死亡率之间的社会经济差异
comment: AMIA 2023 Informatics Summit, March 13-16, Seattle, WA, USA. 10 pages
comments: AMIA 2023 Informatics Summit, March 13-16, Seattle, WA, USA. 10 pages
abstract: This paper applies eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods to investigate the socioeconomic disparities in COVID patient mortality. An Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) prediction model is built based on a de-identified Austin area hospital dataset to predict the mortality of COVID-19 patients. We apply two XAI methods, Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Locally Interpretable Model Agnostic Explanations (LIME), to compare the global and local interpretation of feature importance. This paper demonstrates the advantages of using XAI which shows the feature importance and decisive capability. Furthermore, we use the XAI methods to cross-validate their interpretations for individual patients. The XAI models reveal that Medicare financial class, older age, and gender have high impact on the mortality prediction. We find that LIME local interpretation does not show significant differences in feature importance comparing to SHAP, which suggests pattern confirmation. This paper demonstrates the importance of XAI methods in cross-validation of feature attributions.
summary: This paper applies eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods to investigate the socioeconomic disparities in COVID patient mortality. An Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) prediction model is built based on a de-identified Austin area hospital dataset to predict the mortality of COVID-19 patients. We apply two XAI methods, Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Locally Interpretable Model Agnostic Explanations (LIME), to compare the global and local interpretation of feature importance. This paper demonstrates the advantages of using XAI which shows the feature importance and decisive capability. Furthermore, we use the XAI methods to cross-validate their interpretations for individual patients. The XAI models reveal that Medicare financial class, older age, and gender have high impact on the mortality prediction. We find that LIME local interpretation does not show significant differences in feature importance comparing to SHAP, which suggests pattern confirmation. This paper demonstrates the importance of XAI methods in cross-validation of feature attributions.
abstract_zh: 本文应用可解释人工智能 (XAI) 方法来调查新冠患者死亡率的社会经济差异。基于去识别化的奥斯汀地区医院数据集构建了极限梯度提升 (XGBoost) 预测模型，用于预测 COVID-19 患者的死亡率。我们应用两种 XAI 方法：Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 和 Locally Interpretable Model Agnostic Explanations (LIME)，来比较特征重要性的全局和局部解释。本文展示了使用 XAI 的优势，显示了特征的重要性和决定性能力。此外，我们使用 XAI 方法交叉验证其对个体患者的解释。 XAI 模型显示，医疗保险财务阶层、年龄和性别对死亡率预测有很大影响。我们发现，与 SHAP 相比，LIME 局部解释在特征重要性方面没有显示出显着差异，这表明模式得到确认。本文论证了 XAI 方法在特征归因交叉验证中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文应用可解释人工智能（XAI）方法，研究新冠患者死亡率中的社会经济差异。
AI.motivation: 通过XAI方法验证社会经济因素对新冠患者死亡率的影响，揭示潜在的不平等现象。
AI.method: 基于去标识化的奥斯汀医院数据构建XGBoost预测模型，并采用SHAP和LIME两种XAI方法分析特征重要性。
AI.result: 发现医疗保险类别、年龄和性别对死亡率预测影响显著，且LIME与SHAP的局部解释结果具有一致性。
AI.conclusion: XAI方法能有效验证特征属性，为分析新冠死亡率的社会经济差异提供可靠工具。

This paper demonstrates the importance of XAI methods in cross-validation of feature attributions. 本文应用可解释人工智能 (XAI) 方法来调查新冠患者死亡率的社会经济差异。基于去识别化的奥斯汀地区医院数据集构建了极限梯度提升 (XGBoost) 预测模型，用于预测 COVID-19 患者的死亡率。我们应用两种 XAI 方法：Shapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 和 Locally Interpretable Model Agnostic Explanations (LIME)，来比较特征重要性的全局和局部解释。本文展示了使用 XAI 的优势，显示了特征的重要性和决定性能力。此外，我们使用 XAI 方法交叉验证其对个体患者的解释。 XAI 模型显示，医疗保险财务阶层、年龄和性别对死亡率预测有很大影响。我们发现，与 SHAP 相比，LIME 局部解释在特征重要性方面没有显示出显着差异，这表明模式得到确认。本文论证了 XAI 方法在特征归因交叉验证中的重要性。 本文应用可解释人工智能（XAI）方法，研究新冠患者死亡率中的社会经济差异。 Li Shi,Redoan Rahman,Esther Melamed,Jacek Gwizdka,Justin F. Rousseau,Ying Ding cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Luca Becchetti,Andrea Clementi,Amos Korman,Francesco Pasquale,Luca Trevisan,Robin Vacus
title: On the Role of Memory in Robust Opinion Dynamics
title_zh: 论记忆在鲁棒意见动态中的作用
abstract: We investigate opinion dynamics in a fully-connected system, consisting of $n$ identical and anonymous agents, where one of the opinions (which is called correct) represents a piece of information to disseminate. In more detail, one source agent initially holds the correct opinion and remains with this opinion throughout the execution. The goal for non-source agents is to quickly agree on this correct opinion, and do that robustly, i.e., from any initial configuration. The system evolves in rounds. In each round, one agent chosen uniformly at random is activated: unless it is the source, the agent pulls the opinions of $\ell$ random agents and then updates its opinion according to some rule. We consider a restricted setting, in which agents have no memory and they only revise their opinions on the basis of those of the agents they currently sample. As restricted as it is, this setting encompasses very popular opinion dynamics, such as the voter model and best-of-$k$ majority rules. Qualitatively speaking, we show that lack of memory prevents efficient convergence. Specifically, we prove that no dynamics can achieve correct convergence in an expected number of steps that is sub-quadratic in $n$, even under a strong version of the model in which activated agents have complete access to the current configuration of the entire system, i.e., the case $\ell=n$. Conversely, we prove that the simple voter model (in which $\ell=1$) correctly solves the problem, while almost matching the aforementioned lower bound. These results suggest that, in contrast to symmetric consensus problems (that do not involve a notion of correct opinion), fast convergence on the correct opinion using stochastic opinion dynamics may indeed require the use of memory. This insight may reflect on natural information dissemination processes that rely on a few knowledgeable individuals.

In more detail, one source agent initially holds the correct opinion and remains with this opinion throughout the execution. The goal for non-source agents is to quickly agree on this correct opinion, and do that robustly, i.e., from any initial configuration. The system evolves in rounds. In each round, one agent chosen uniformly at random is activated: unless it is the source, the agent pulls the opinions of $\ell$ random agents and then updates its opinion according to some rule. We consider a restricted setting, in which agents have no memory and they only revise their opinions on the basis of those of the agents they currently sample. As restricted as it is, this setting encompasses very popular opinion dynamics, such as the voter model and best-of-$k$ majority rules. Qualitatively speaking, we show that lack of memory prevents efficient convergence. Specifically, we prove that no dynamics can achieve correct convergence in an expected number of steps that is sub-quadratic in $n$, even under a strong version of the model in which activated agents have complete access to the current configuration of the entire system, i.e., the case $\ell=n$. Conversely, we prove that the simple voter model (in which $\ell=1$) correctly solves the problem, while almost matching the aforementioned lower bound. These results suggest that, in contrast to symmetric consensus problems (that do not involve a notion of correct opinion), fast convergence on the correct opinion using stochastic opinion dynamics may indeed require the use of memory. This insight may reflect on natural information dissemination processes that rely on a few knowledgeable individuals.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一个完全连接的系统中的意见动态，该系统由 $n$ 个相同的匿名代理组成，其中一个意见（称为正确的）代表一条要传播的信息。更详细地说，一个源代理最初持有正确的意见，并在整个执行过程中保持该意见。非源代理的目标是快速就正确的意见达成一致，并稳健地做到这一点，即从任何初始配置。该系统是循环发展的。在每一轮中，都会激活一个均匀随机选择的智能体：除非它是源，否则该智能体会拉动 $\ell$ 随机智能体的意见，然后根据某种规则更新其意见。我们考虑一个受限的环境，其中代理人没有记忆，他们只能根据他们当前抽样的代理人的意见来修改他们的意见。尽管受到限制，但此设置包含非常流行的意见动态，例如选民模型和 best-of-k$ 多数规则。定性地说，我们表明内存不足会阻碍有效收敛。具体来说，我们证明，即使在模型的强版本（其中激活的代理可以完全访问整个系统的当前配置，即 $\ell=n$ 的情况）下，也没有动态可以在 $n$ 的次二次方的预期步数中实现正确的收敛。相反，我们证明简单的选民模型（其中$\ell=1$）正确地解决了问题，同时几乎匹配上述下限。这些结果表明，与对称共识问题（不涉及正确观点的概念）相比，使用随机观点动态快速收敛正确观点可能确实需要使用内存。这种见解可能反映了依赖于少数知识渊博的个人的自然信息传播过程。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无记忆限制的完全连接系统中，意见动态演化如何影响对正确意见的鲁棒收敛。
AI.motivation: 探讨在分布式系统中，缺乏记忆机制是否会导致无法高效达成正确共识，并分析记忆在信息传播中的必要性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，构建了一个包含n个无记忆智能体的模型，研究其在随机激活和采样机制下的意见更新规则，对比不同动态模型的收敛性能。
AI.result: 证明无记忆系统无法在亚二次时间内实现正确收敛，而简单投票模型（ℓ=1）虽接近下界，但需依赖记忆机制才能实现快速收敛。
AI.conclusion: 与对称共识问题不同，快速收敛到正确意见可能需要依赖记忆机制，这对依赖少量知情个体的信息传播过程具有启示意义。

authors_text: Li Shi,Nilavra Bhattacharya,Anubrata Das,Jacek Gwizdka
title: True or false? Cognitive load when reading COVID-19 news headlines: an eye-tracking study
title_zh: 是真是假？阅读 COVID-19 新闻标题时的认知负荷：一项眼动追踪研究
comment: In ACM SIGIR Conference on Human Information Interaction and Retrieval (CHIIR 23), March 19-23, 2023, Austin, TX, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 10 pages
comments: In ACM SIGIR Conference on Human Information Interaction and Retrieval (CHIIR 23), March 19-23, 2023, Austin, TX, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 10 pages
abstract: Misinformation is an important topic in the Information Retrieval (IR) context and has implications for both system-centered and user-centered IR. While it has been established that the performance in discerning misinformation is affected by a person's cognitive load, the variation in cognitive load in judging the veracity of news is less understood. To understand the variation in cognitive load imposed by reading news headlines related to COVID-19 claims, within the context of a fact-checking system, we conducted a within-subject, lab-based, quasi-experiment (N=40) with eye-tracking. Our results suggest that examining true claims imposed a higher cognitive load on participants when news headlines provided incorrect evidence for a claim and were inconsistent with the person's prior beliefs. In contrast, checking false claims imposed a higher cognitive load when the news headlines provided correct evidence for a claim and were consistent with the participants' prior beliefs. However, changing beliefs after examining a claim did not have a significant relationship with cognitive load while reading the news headlines. The results illustrate that reading news headlines related to true and false claims in the fact-checking context impose different levels of cognitive load. Our findings suggest that user engagement with tools for discerning misinformation needs to account for the possible variation in the mental effort involved in different information contexts.
summary: Misinformation is an important topic in the Information Retrieval (IR) context and has implications for both system-centered and user-centered IR. While it has been established that the performance in discerning misinformation is affected by a person's cognitive load, the variation in cognitive load in judging the veracity of news is less understood. To understand the variation in cognitive load imposed by reading news headlines related to COVID-19 claims, within the context of a fact-checking system, we conducted a within-subject, lab-based, quasi-experiment (N=40) with eye-tracking. Our results suggest that examining true claims imposed a higher cognitive load on participants when news headlines provided incorrect evidence for a claim and were inconsistent with the person's prior beliefs. In contrast, checking false claims imposed a higher cognitive load when the news headlines provided correct evidence for a claim and were consistent with the participants' prior beliefs. However, changing beliefs after examining a claim did not have a significant relationship with cognitive load while reading the news headlines. The results illustrate that reading news headlines related to true and false claims in the fact-checking context impose different levels of cognitive load. Our findings suggest that user engagement with tools for discerning misinformation needs to account for the possible variation in the mental effort involved in different information contexts.
abstract_zh: 错误信息是信息检索 (IR) 环境中的一个重要主题，并且对以系统为中心和以用户为中心的 IR 都有影响。虽然已经确定识别错误信息的表现受到一个人的认知负荷的影响，但判断新闻真实性时认知负荷的变化却鲜为人知。为了了解阅读与 COVID-19 声明相关的新闻标题所带来的认知负荷变化，在事实核查系统的背景下，我们进行了一项基于实验室的受试者内眼动追踪准实验 (N=40)。我们的结果表明，当新闻标题为某个主张提供了不正确的证据并且与该人先前的信念不一致时，检查真实的主张会给参与者带来更高的认知负担。相比之下，当新闻标题为某个主张提供了正确的证据并且与参与者先前的信念一致时，检查虚假主张会带来更高的认知负担。然而，在检查某个说法后改变信念与阅读新闻标题时的认知负荷没有显着关系。结果表明，在事实核查背景下阅读与真假主张相关的新闻标题会带来不同程度的认知负荷。我们的研究结果表明，用户使用识别错误信息的工具时需要考虑到不同信息背景下脑力劳动可能存在的差异。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过眼动追踪实验，探讨在事实核查系统中阅读与新冠疫情相关的新闻标题时，认知负荷在判断真假新闻时的差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明认知负荷影响虚假信息识别能力，但不同信息情境下认知负荷的差异尚不明确。研究旨在填补这一空白，为事实核查工具设计提供依据。
AI.method: 采用40名受试者的实验室准实验，通过眼动追踪技术记录参与者阅读包含矛盾证据或符合先验信念的新冠相关新闻标题时的认知负荷变化。
AI.result: 验证真新闻时，矛盾证据与先验信念冲突会增加认知负荷；核查假新闻时，正确证据与先验信念一致也会增加负荷。但阅读过程中的认知负荷与信念改变无显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 事实核查场景中，真假新闻的认知负荷差异取决于证据与先验信念的匹配度，提示信息工具需考虑不同情境下的认知负担差异以优化用户参与度。

result: 验证真新闻时，矛盾证据与先验信念冲突会增加认知负荷；核查假新闻时，正确证据与先验信念一致也会增加负荷。但阅读过程中的认知负荷与信念改变无显著关联。
conclusion: 事实核查场景中，真假新闻的认知负荷差异取决于证据与先验信念的匹配度，提示信息工具需考虑不同情境下的认知负担差异以优化用户参与度。
search_text: True or false? Cognitive load when reading COVID-19 news headlines: an eye-tracking study 是真是假？阅读 COVID-19 新闻标题时的认知负荷：一项眼动追踪研究 Misinformation is an important topic in the Information Retrieval (IR) context and has implications for both system-centered and user-centered IR. While it has been established that the performance in discerning misinformation is affected by a person's cognitive load, the variation in cognitive load in judging the veracity of news is less understood. To understand the variation in cognitive load imposed by reading news headlines related to COVID-19 claims, within the context of a fact-checking system, we conducted a within-subject, lab-based, quasi-experiment (N=40) with eye-tracking. Our results suggest that examining true claims imposed a higher cognitive load on participants when news headlines provided incorrect evidence for a claim and were inconsistent with the person's prior beliefs. In contrast, checking false claims imposed a higher cognitive load when the news headlines provided correct evidence for a claim and were consistent with the participants' prior beliefs. However, changing beliefs after examining a claim did not have a significant relationship with cognitive load while reading the news headlines. The results illustrate that reading news headlines related to true and false claims in the fact-checking context impose different levels of cognitive load. Our findings suggest that user engagement with tools for discerning misinformation needs to account for the possible variation in the mental effort involved in different information contexts. 错误信息是信息检索 (IR) 环境中的一个重要主题，并且对以系统为中心和以用户为中心的 IR 都有影响。虽然已经确定识别错误信息的表现受到一个人的认知负荷的影响，但判断新闻真实性时认知负荷的变化却鲜为人知。为了了解阅读与 COVID-19 声明相关的新闻标题所带来的认知负荷变化，在事实核查系统的背景下，我们进行了一项基于实验室的受试者内眼动追踪准实验 (N=40)。我们的结果表明，当新闻标题为某个主张提供了不正确的证据并且与该人先前的信念不一致时，检查真实的主张会给参与者带来更高的认知负担。相比之下，当新闻标题为某个主张提供了正确的证据并且与参与者先前的信念一致时，检查虚假主张会带来更高的认知负担。然而，在检查某个说法后改变信念与阅读新闻标题时的认知负荷没有显着关系。结果表明，在事实核查背景下阅读与真假主张相关的新闻标题会带来不同程度的认知负荷。我们的研究结果表明，用户使用识别错误信息的工具时需要考虑到不同信息背景下脑力劳动可能存在的差异。 本研究通过眼动追踪实验，探讨在事实核查系统中阅读与新冠疫情相关的新闻标题时，认知负荷在判断真假新闻时的差异。 Li Shi,Nilavra Bhattacharya,Anubrata Das,Jacek Gwizdka cs.HC

authors_text: Zifan Yu,Suya You,Fengbo Ren
title: Frequency-domain Learning for Volumetric-based 3D Data Perception
title_zh: 基于体积的 3D 数据感知的频域学习
abstract: Frequency-domain learning draws attention due to its superior tradeoff between inference accuracy and input data size. Frequency-domain learning in 2D computer vision tasks has shown that 2D convolutional neural networks (CNN) have a stationary spectral bias towards low-frequency channels so that high-frequency channels can be pruned with no or little accuracy degradation. However, frequency-domain learning has not been studied in the context of 3D CNNs with 3D volumetric data. In this paper, we study frequency-domain learning for volumetric-based 3D data perception to reveal the spectral bias and the accuracy-input-data-size tradeoff of 3D CNNs. Our study finds that 3D CNNs are sensitive to a limited number of critical frequency channels, especially low-frequency channels. Experiment results show that frequency-domain learning can significantly reduce the size of volumetric-based 3D inputs (based on spectral bias) while achieving comparable accuracy with conventional spatial-domain learning approaches. Specifically, frequency-domain learning is able to reduce the input data size by 98% in 3D shape classification while limiting the average accuracy drop within 2%, and by 98% in the 3D point cloud semantic segmentation with a 1.48% mean-class accuracy improvement while limiting the mean-class IoU loss within 1.55%. Moreover, by learning from higher-resolution 3D data (i.e., 2x of the original image in the spatial domain), frequency-domain learning improves the mean-class accuracy and mean-class IoU by 3.04% and 0.63%, respectively, while achieving an 87.5% input data size reduction in 3D point cloud semantic segmentation.

However, frequency-domain learning has not been studied in the context of 3D CNNs with 3D volumetric data. In this paper, we study frequency-domain learning for volumetric-based 3D data perception to reveal the spectral bias and the accuracy-input-data-size tradeoff of 3D CNNs. Our study finds that 3D CNNs are sensitive to a limited number of critical frequency channels, especially low-frequency channels. Experiment results show that frequency-domain learning can significantly reduce the size of volumetric-based 3D inputs (based on spectral bias) while achieving comparable accuracy with conventional spatial-domain learning approaches. Specifically, frequency-domain learning is able to reduce the input data size by 98% in 3D shape classification while limiting the average accuracy drop within 2%, and by 98% in the 3D point cloud semantic segmentation with a 1.48% mean-class accuracy improvement while limiting the mean-class IoU loss within 1.55%. Moreover, by learning from higher-resolution 3D data (i.e., 2x of the original image in the spatial domain), frequency-domain learning improves the mean-class accuracy and mean-class IoU by 3.04% and 0.63%, respectively, while achieving an 87.5% input data size reduction in 3D point cloud semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 频域学习因其在推理精度和输入数据大小之间的出色权衡而引起人们的关注。 2D 计算机视觉任务中的频域学习表明，2D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对低频通道具有固定谱偏差，因此可以修剪高频通道，而不会或几乎不会降低精度。然而，频域学习尚未在具有 3D 体积数据的 3D CNN 背景下进行研究。在本文中，我们研究基于体积的 3D 数据感知的频域学习，以揭示 3D CNN 的谱偏差和精度-输入-数据大小权衡。我们的研究发现，3D CNN 对有限数量的关键频道敏感，尤其是低频频道。实验结果表明，频域学习可以显着减小基于体积的 3D 输入（基于频谱偏差）的大小，同时实现与传统空间域学习方法相当的精度。具体来说，频域学习能够在 3D 形状分类中将输入数据大小减少 98%，同时将平均精度下降限制在 2% 以内；在 3D 点云语义分割中，频域学习能够将输入数据大小减少 98%，平均类精度提高 1.48%，同时将平均类 IoU 损失限制在 1.55% 以内。此外，通过学习更高分辨率的3D数据（即空间域中原始图像的2倍），频域学习将平均类精度和平均类IoU分别提高了3.04%和0.63%，同时在3D点云语义分割中实现了87.5%的输入数据大小减少。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了频率域学习在基于体素的3D数据感知中的应用，揭示了3D卷积神经网络的频谱偏差及精度与输入数据大小的权衡。
AI.motivation: 2D卷积神经网络在频率域学习中表现出对低频通道的静态频谱偏差，可通过剪枝减少数据量而几乎不损失精度。然而，3D卷积神经网络在频率域学习方面的研究尚未展开，亟需探索其频谱特性及优化潜力。
AI.method: 通过分析3D卷积神经网络对关键频率通道（尤其是低频通道）的敏感性，基于频谱偏差对3D体素数据进行频率域学习，结合剪枝策略减少输入数据量，并在3D形状分类和点云语义分割任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 频率域学习在3D形状分类中将输入数据量减少98%且平均精度下降不超过2%；在点云语义分割中减少98%数据量的同时，平均类准确率提升1.48%且平均类IoU损失控制在1.55%以内。使用更高分辨率数据时，精度和IoU分别提升3.04%和0.63%，同时减少87.5%的数据量。
AI.conclusion: 频率域学习能有效减少3D数据输入规模并保持甚至提升精度，揭示了3D卷积神经网络的频谱偏差特性，为高效3D数据感知提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zifan Yu,Meida Chen,Zhikang Zhang,Suya You,Raghuveer Rao,Sanjeev Agarwal,Fengbo Ren
title: TransUPR: A Transformer-based Uncertain Point Refiner for LiDAR Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: TransUPR：基于 Transformer 的 LiDAR 点云语义分割不确定点细化器
abstract: Common image-based LiDAR point cloud semantic segmentation (LiDAR PCSS) approaches have bottlenecks resulting from the boundary-blurring problem of convolution neural networks (CNNs) and quantitation loss of spherical projection. In this work, we propose a transformer-based plug-and-play uncertain point refiner, i.e., TransUPR, to refine selected uncertain points in a learnable manner, which leads to an improved segmentation performance. Uncertain points are sampled from coarse semantic segmentation results of 2D image segmentation where uncertain points are located close to the object boundaries in the 2D range image representation and 3D spherical projection background points. Following that, the geometry and coarse semantic features of uncertain points are aggregated by neighbor points in 3D space without adding expensive computation and memory footprint. Finally, the transformer-based refiner, which contains four stacked self-attention layers, along with an MLP module, is utilized for uncertain point classification on the concatenated features of self-attention layers. As the proposed refiner is independent of 2D CNNs, our TransUPR can be easily integrated into any existing image-based LiDAR PCSS approaches, e.g., CENet. Our TransUPR with the CENet achieves state-of-the-art performance, i.e., 68.2% mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) on the Semantic KITTI benchmark, which provides a performance improvement of 0.6% on the mIoU compared to the original CENet.
summary: Common image-based LiDAR point cloud semantic segmentation (LiDAR PCSS) approaches have bottlenecks resulting from the boundary-blurring problem of convolution neural networks (CNNs) and quantitation loss of spherical projection. In this work, we propose a transformer-based plug-and-play uncertain point refiner, i.e., TransUPR, to refine selected uncertain points in a learnable manner, which leads to an improved segmentation performance. Uncertain points are sampled from coarse semantic segmentation results of 2D image segmentation where uncertain points are located close to the object boundaries in the 2D range image representation and 3D spherical projection background points. Following that, the geometry and coarse semantic features of uncertain points are aggregated by neighbor points in 3D space without adding expensive computation and memory footprint. Finally, the transformer-based refiner, which contains four stacked self-attention layers, along with an MLP module, is utilized for uncertain point classification on the concatenated features of self-attention layers. As the proposed refiner is independent of 2D CNNs, our TransUPR can be easily integrated into any existing image-based LiDAR PCSS approaches, e.g., CENet. Our TransUPR with the CENet achieves state-of-the-art performance, i.e., 68.2% mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) on the Semantic KITTI benchmark, which provides a performance improvement of 0.6% on the mIoU compared to the original CENet.
abstract_zh: 常见的基于图像的激光雷达点云语义分割（LiDAR PCSS）方法存在因卷积神经网络（CNN）的边界模糊问题和球面投影的量化损失而产生的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于变压器的即插即用不确定点细化器，即 TransUPR，以可学习的方式细化选定的不确定点，从而提高分割性能。不确定点是从 2D 图像分割的粗略语义分割结果中采样的，其中不确定点位于 2D 范围图像表示和 3D 球形投影背景点中靠近对象边界的位置。接下来，不确定点的几何和粗略语义特征由 3D 空间中的相邻点聚合，而无需增加昂贵的计算和内存占用。最后，基于 Transformer 的细化器包含四个堆叠的自注意力层以及 MLP 模块，用于对自注意力层的级联特征进行不确定点分类。由于所提出的精炼器独立于 2D CNN，因此我们的 TransUPR 可以轻松集成到任何现有的基于图像的 LiDAR PCSS 方法中，例如 CENet。我们的 TransUPR 与 CENet 实现了最先进的性能，即语义 KITTI 基准上的平均交集 (mIoU) 为 68.2%，与原始 CENet 相比，mIoU 的性能提高了 0.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的不确定点优化器TransUPR，用于改进LiDAR点云语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法在LiDAR点云语义分割中存在边界模糊和球面投影量化损失问题，需通过优化不确定点提升分割精度。
AI.method: 从2D图像和3D球面投影的边界区域采样不确定点，利用3D邻域特征聚合，结合四层Transformer自注意力机制与MLP进行分类优化。
AI.result: 在Semantic KITTI基准测试中，TransUPR与CENet结合后达到68.2% mIoU，较原方法提升0.6%。
AI.conclusion: TransUPR作为独立模块可集成至现有图像化LiDAR分割框架，有效提升分割性能且不增加计算负担。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的不确定点优化器TransUPR，用于改进LiDAR点云语义分割性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN方法在LiDAR点云语义分割中存在边界模糊和球面投影量化损失问题，需通过优化不确定点提升分割精度。
ai_content.method: 从2D图像和3D球面投影的边界区域采样不确定点，利用3D邻域特征聚合，结合四层Transformer自注意力机制与MLP进行分类优化。
ai_content.result: 在Semantic KITTI基准测试中，TransUPR与CENet结合后达到68.2% mIoU，较原方法提升0.6%。
ai_content.conclusion: TransUPR作为独立模块可集成至现有图像化LiDAR分割框架，有效提升分割性能且不增加计算负担。

search_text: TransUPR: A Transformer-based Uncertain Point Refiner for LiDAR Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation TransUPR：基于 Transformer 的 LiDAR 点云语义分割不确定点细化器 Common image-based LiDAR point cloud semantic segmentation (LiDAR PCSS) approaches have bottlenecks resulting from the boundary-blurring problem of convolution neural networks (CNNs) and quantitation loss of spherical projection. In this work, we propose a transformer-based plug-and-play uncertain point refiner, i.e., TransUPR, to refine selected uncertain points in a learnable manner, which leads to an improved segmentation performance. Uncertain points are sampled from coarse semantic segmentation results of 2D image segmentation where uncertain points are located close to the object boundaries in the 2D range image representation and 3D spherical projection background points. Following that, the geometry and coarse semantic features of uncertain points are aggregated by neighbor points in 3D space without adding expensive computation and memory footprint. Finally, the transformer-based refiner, which contains four stacked self-attention layers, along with an MLP module, is utilized for uncertain point classification on the concatenated features of self-attention layers. As the proposed refiner is independent of 2D CNNs, our TransUPR can be easily integrated into any existing image-based LiDAR PCSS approaches, e.g., CENet. Our TransUPR with the CENet achieves state-of-the-art performance, i.e., 68.2% mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) on the Semantic KITTI benchmark, which provides a performance improvement of 0.6% on the mIoU compared to the original CENet. 常见的基于图像的激光雷达点云语义分割（LiDAR PCSS）方法存在因卷积神经网络（CNN）的边界模糊问题和球面投影的量化损失而产生的瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于变压器的即插即用不确定点细化器，即 TransUPR，以可学习的方式细化选定的不确定点，从而提高分割性能。不确定点是从 2D 图像分割的粗略语义分割结果中采样的，其中不确定点位于 2D 范围图像表示和 3D 球形投影背景点中靠近对象边界的位置。接下来，不确定点的几何和粗略语义特征由 3D 空间中的相邻点聚合，而无需增加昂贵的计算和内存占用。最后，基于 Transformer 的细化器包含四个堆叠的自注意力层以及 MLP 模块，用于对自注意力层的级联特征进行不确定点分类。由于所提出的精炼器独立于 2D CNN，因此我们的 TransUPR 可以轻松集成到任何现有的基于图像的 LiDAR PCSS 方法中，例如 CENet。我们的 TransUPR 与 CENet 实现了最先进的性能，即语义 KITTI 基准上的平均交集 (mIoU) 为 68.2%，与原始 CENet 相比，mIoU 的性能提高了 0.6%。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的不确定点优化器TransUPR，用于改进LiDAR点云语义分割性能。 Zifan Yu,Meida Chen,Zhikang Zhang,Suya You,Raghuveer Rao,Sanjeev Agarwal,Fengbo Ren cs.CV

authors_text: Karim Assi,Lakmal Meegahapola,William Droz,Peter Kun,Amalia de Gotzen,Miriam Bidoglia,Sally Stares,George Gaskell,Altangerel Chagnaa,Amarsanaa Ganbold,Tsolmon Zundui,Carlo Caprini,Daniele Miorandi,Alethia Hume,Jose Luis Zarza,Luca Cernuzzi,Ivano Bison,Marcelo Dario Rodas Britez,Matteo Busso,Ronald Chenu-Abente,Fausto Giunchiglia,Daniel Gatica-Perez
title: Complex Daily Activities, Country-Level Diversity, and Smartphone Sensing: A Study in Denmark, Italy, Mongolia, Paraguay, and UK
title_zh: 复杂的日常活动、国家层面的多样性和智能手机感知：丹麦、意大利、蒙古、巴拉圭和英国的一项研究
abstract: Smartphones enable understanding human behavior with activity recognition to support people's daily lives. Prior studies focused on using inertial sensors to detect simple activities (sitting, walking, running, etc.) and were mostly conducted in homogeneous populations within a country. However, people are more sedentary in the post-pandemic world with the prevalence of remote/hybrid work/study settings, making detecting simple activities less meaningful for context-aware applications. Hence, the understanding of (i) how multimodal smartphone sensors and machine learning models could be used to detect complex daily activities that can better inform about people's daily lives and (ii) how models generalize to unseen countries, is limited. We analyzed in-the-wild smartphone data and over 216K self-reports from 637 college students in five countries (Italy, Mongolia, UK, Denmark, Paraguay). Then, we defined a 12-class complex daily activity recognition task and evaluated the performance with different approaches. We found that even though the generic multi-country approach provided an AUROC of 0.70, the country-specific approach performed better with AUROC scores in [0.79-0.89]. We believe that research along the lines of diversity awareness is fundamental for advancing human behavior understanding through smartphones and machine learning, for more real-world utility across countries.

abstract_zh: 智能手机可以通过活动识别来了解人类行为，以支持人们的日常生活。之前的研究主要集中在使用惯性传感器来检测简单的活动（坐、行走、跑步等），并且大多是在一个国家内的同质人群中进行的。然而，在大流行后的世界中，随着远程/混合工作/学习环境的盛行，人们更加久坐，这使得检测简单的活动对于上下文感知应用程序来说意义不大。因此，对（i）如何使用多模式智能手机传感器和机器学习模型来检测复杂的日常活动以更好地了解人们的日常生活以及（ii）模型如何推广到未知的国家的理解是有限的。我们分析了来自五个国家（意大利、蒙古、英国、丹麦、巴拉圭）的 637 名大学生的野外智能手机数据和超过 21.6 万份自我报告。然后，我们定义了 12 类复杂的日常活动识别任务，并用不同的方法评估了性能。我们发现，尽管通用多国方法提供的 AUROC 为 0.70，但特定国家方法的 AUROC 分数在 [0.79-0.89] 之间表现更好。我们相信，沿着多样性意识进行的研究对于通过智能手机和机器学习促进人类行为理解以及在各国的现实世界中发挥更多作用至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨如何利用多模态智能手机传感器和机器学习模型检测复杂日常活动，并分析模型在不同国家的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注简单活动识别且局限于单一国家的同质化群体，而疫情后远程工作普及使简单活动检测意义降低，需更贴近现实的复杂活动识别及跨国家模型适应性研究。
AI.method: 收集五国637名大学生的智能手机传感器数据及21.6万条自我报告，定义12类复杂日常活动任务，对比通用多国模型与国家特定模型的性能。
AI.result: 通用多国模型AUROC为0.70，国家特定模型表现更优（AUROC 0.79-0.89）。
AI.conclusion: 跨国家活动识别需关注多样性差异，未来研究应加强多模态传感器与机器学习的多样性适应性设计以提升实际应用价值。

authors_text: Bharath Keshavamurthy,Yaguang Zhang,Christopher R. Anderson,Nicolo Michelusi,James V. Krogmeier,David J. Love
title: Propagation Measurements and Analyses at 28 GHz via an Autonomous Beam-Steering Platform
title_zh: 通过自主波束控制平台在 28 GHz 下进行传播测量和分析
comment: 6 pages, 18 figures, 2 tables; Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2023: Paper #1570867736
comments: 6 pages, 18 figures, 2 tables; Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2023: Paper #1570867736
abstract: This paper details the design of an autonomous alignment and tracking platform to mechanically steer directional horn antennas in a sliding correlator channel sounder setup for 28 GHz V2X propagation modeling. A pan-and-tilt subsystem facilitates uninhibited rotational mobility along the yaw and pitch axes, driven by open-loop servo units and orchestrated via inertial motion controllers. A geo-positioning subsystem augmented in accuracy by real-time kinematics enables navigation events to be shared between a transmitter and receiver over an Apache Kafka messaging middleware framework with fault tolerance. Herein, our system demonstrates a 3D geo-positioning accuracy of 17 cm, an average principal axes positioning accuracy of 1.1 degrees, and an average tracking response time of 27.8 ms. Crucially, fully autonomous antenna alignment and tracking facilitates continuous series of measurements, a unique yet critical necessity for millimeter wave channel modeling in vehicular networks. The power-delay profiles, collected along routes spanning urban and suburban neighborhoods on the NSF POWDER testbed, are used in pathloss evaluations involving the 3GPP TR38.901 and ITU-R M.2135 standards. Empirically, we demonstrate that these models fail to accurately capture the 28 GHz pathloss behavior in urban foliage and suburban radio environments. In addition to RMS direction-spread analyses for angles-of-arrival via the SAGE algorithm, we perform signal decoherence studies wherein we derive exponential models for the spatial/angular autocorrelation coefficient under distance and alignment effects.
summary: This paper details the design of an autonomous alignment and tracking platform to mechanically steer directional horn antennas in a sliding correlator channel sounder setup for 28 GHz V2X propagation modeling. A pan-and-tilt subsystem facilitates uninhibited rotational mobility along the yaw and pitch axes, driven by open-loop servo units and orchestrated via inertial motion controllers. A geo-positioning subsystem augmented in accuracy by real-time kinematics enables navigation events to be shared between a transmitter and receiver over an Apache Kafka messaging middleware framework with fault tolerance. Herein, our system demonstrates a 3D geo-positioning accuracy of 17 cm, an average principal axes positioning accuracy of 1.1 degrees, and an average tracking response time of 27.8 ms. Crucially, fully autonomous antenna alignment and tracking facilitates continuous series of measurements, a unique yet critical necessity for millimeter wave channel modeling in vehicular networks. The power-delay profiles, collected along routes spanning urban and suburban neighborhoods on the NSF POWDER testbed, are used in pathloss evaluations involving the 3GPP TR38.901 and ITU-R M.2135 standards. Empirically, we demonstrate that these models fail to accurately capture the 28 GHz pathloss behavior in urban foliage and suburban radio environments. In addition to RMS direction-spread analyses for angles-of-arrival via the SAGE algorithm, we perform signal decoherence studies wherein we derive exponential models for the spatial/angular autocorrelation coefficient under distance and alignment effects.
abstract_zh: 本文详细介绍了自主对准和跟踪平台的设计，该平台可在滑动相关器通道探测仪设置中机械操纵定向喇叭天线，以进行 28 GHz V2X 传播建模。云台子系统可实现沿偏航轴和俯仰轴不受限制的旋转移动性，由开环伺服单元驱动并通过惯性运动控制器协调。通过实时运动学提高了精确度的地理定位子系统使导航事件能够通过具有容错功能的 Apache Kafka 消息传递中间件框架在发送器和接收器之间共享。在此，我们的系统展示了 17 厘米的 3D 地理定位精度、1.1 度的平均主轴定位精度和 27.8 毫秒的平均跟踪响应时间。至关重要的是，完全自主的天线对准和跟踪有助于连续的一系列测量，这是车辆网络中毫米波信道建模的独特但关键的必要条件。 NSF POWDER 测试台上沿跨越城市和郊区的路线收集的功率延迟曲线用于涉及 3GPP TR38.901 和 ITU-R M.2135 标准的路径损耗评估。根据经验，我们证明这些模型无法准确捕获城市植被和郊区无线电环境中的 28 GHz 路径损耗行为。除了通过 SAGE 算法对到达角度进行 RMS 方向扩展分析外，我们还进行信号退相干研究，其中我们推导出距离和对准效应下空间/角度自相关系数的指数模型。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种自主对齐和跟踪平台，用于28 GHz车对一切(V2X)传播建模的机械定向喇叭天线滑动相关信道声纳设置。
AI.motivation: 现有3GPP和ITU-R标准模型无法准确捕捉28 GHz频段在城市植被和郊区环境中的路径损耗行为，需开发自主系统进行精确测量。
AI.method: 采用陀螺仪运动控制器驱动的俯仰/偏航轴旋转子系统，结合实时动态定位(RTK)和Apache Kafka消息中间件，实现厘米级定位和毫秒级响应的自主天线对准与跟踪。
AI.result: 系统在城市和郊区路线测量中显示现有模型失效，通过SAGE算法和指数模型分析得出空间/角度自相关系数的衰减特性。
AI.conclusion: 自主平台为车载网络毫米波信道建模提供了关键连续测量能力，揭示了现有标准在复杂环境下的局限性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计了一种自主对齐和跟踪平台，用于28 GHz车对一切(V2X)传播建模的机械定向喇叭天线滑动相关信道声纳设置。
ai_content.motivation: 现有3GPP和ITU-R标准模型无法准确捕捉28 GHz频段在城市植被和郊区环境中的路径损耗行为，需开发自主系统进行精确测量。
ai_content.method: 采用陀螺仪运动控制器驱动的俯仰/偏航轴旋转子系统，结合实时动态定位(RTK)和Apache Kafka消息中间件，实现厘米级定位和毫秒级响应的自主天线对准与跟踪。
ai_content.result: 系统在城市和郊区路线测量中显示现有模型失效，通过SAGE算法和指数模型分析得出空间/角度自相关系数的衰减特性。
ai_content.conclusion: 自主平台为车载网络毫米波信道建模提供了关键连续测量能力，揭示了现有标准在复杂环境下的局限性。

search_text: Propagation Measurements and Analyses at 28 GHz via an Autonomous Beam-Steering Platform 通过自主波束控制平台在 28 GHz 下进行传播测量和分析 This paper details the design of an autonomous alignment and tracking platform to mechanically steer directional horn antennas in a sliding correlator channel sounder setup for 28 GHz V2X propagation modeling. A pan-and-tilt subsystem facilitates uninhibited rotational mobility along the yaw and pitch axes, driven by open-loop servo units and orchestrated via inertial motion controllers. A geo-positioning subsystem augmented in accuracy by real-time kinematics enables navigation events to be shared between a transmitter and receiver over an Apache Kafka messaging middleware framework with fault tolerance. Herein, our system demonstrates a 3D geo-positioning accuracy of 17 cm, an average principal axes positioning accuracy of 1.1 degrees, and an average tracking response time of 27.8 ms. Crucially, fully autonomous antenna alignment and tracking facilitates continuous series of measurements, a unique yet critical necessity for millimeter wave channel modeling in vehicular networks. The power-delay profiles, collected along routes spanning urban and suburban neighborhoods on the NSF POWDER testbed, are used in pathloss evaluations involving the 3GPP TR38.901 and ITU-R M.2135 standards. Empirically, we demonstrate that these models fail to accurately capture the 28 GHz pathloss behavior in urban foliage and suburban radio environments. In addition to RMS direction-spread analyses for angles-of-arrival via the SAGE algorithm, we perform signal decoherence studies wherein we derive exponential models for the spatial/angular autocorrelation coefficient under distance and alignment effects. 本文详细介绍了自主对准和跟踪平台的设计，该平台可在滑动相关器通道探测仪设置中机械操纵定向喇叭天线，以进行 28 GHz V2X 传播建模。云台子系统可实现沿偏航轴和俯仰轴不受限制的旋转移动性，由开环伺服单元驱动并通过惯性运动控制器协调。通过实时运动学提高了精确度的地理定位子系统使导航事件能够通过具有容错功能的 Apache Kafka 消息传递中间件框架在发送器和接收器之间共享。在此，我们的系统展示了 17 厘米的 3D 地理定位精度、1.1 度的平均主轴定位精度和 27.8 毫秒的平均跟踪响应时间。至关重要的是，完全自主的天线对准和跟踪有助于连续的一系列测量，这是车辆网络中毫米波信道建模的独特但关键的必要条件。 NSF POWDER 测试台上沿跨越城市和郊区的路线收集的功率延迟曲线用于涉及 3GPP TR38.901 和 ITU-R M.2135 标准的路径损耗评估。根据经验，我们证明这些模型无法准确捕获城市植被和郊区无线电环境中的 28 GHz 路径损耗行为。除了通过 SAGE 算法对到达角度进行 RMS 方向扩展分析外，我们还进行信号退相干研究，其中我们推导出距离和对准效应下空间/角度自相关系数的指数模型。 本文设计了一种自主对齐和跟踪平台，用于28 GHz车对一切(V2X)传播建模的机械定向喇叭天线滑动相关信道声纳设置。 Bharath Keshavamurthy,Yaguang Zhang,Christopher R. Anderson,Nicolo Michelusi,James V. Krogmeier,David J. Love eess.SP,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zhong Meng,Weiran Wang,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Tara N. Sainath,Tongzhou Chen,Ehsan Variani,Yu Zhang,Bo Li,Andrew Rosenberg,Bhuvana Ramabhadran
title: JEIT: Joint End-to-End Model and Internal Language Model Training for Speech Recognition
title_zh: JEIT：语音识别的联合端到端模型和内部语言模型训练
abstract: We propose JEIT, a joint end-to-end (E2E) model and internal language model (ILM) training method to inject large-scale unpaired text into ILM during E2E training which improves rare-word speech recognition. With JEIT, the E2E model computes an E2E loss on audio-transcript pairs while its ILM estimates a cross-entropy loss on unpaired text. The E2E model is trained to minimize a weighted sum of E2E and ILM losses. During JEIT, ILM absorbs knowledge from unpaired text while the E2E training serves as regularization. Unlike ILM adaptation methods, JEIT does not require a separate adaptation step and avoids the need for Kullback-Leibler divergence regularization of ILM. We also show that modular hybrid autoregressive transducer (MHAT) performs better than HAT in the JEIT framework, and is much more robust than HAT during ILM adaptation. To push the limit of unpaired text injection, we further propose a combined JEIT and JOIST training (CJJT) that benefits from modality matching, encoder text injection and ILM training. Both JEIT and CJJT can foster a more effective LM fusion. With 100B unpaired sentences, JEIT/CJJT improves rare-word recognition accuracy by up to 16.4% over a model trained without unpaired text.
summary: We propose JEIT, a joint end-to-end (E2E) model and internal language model (ILM) training method to inject large-scale unpaired text into ILM during E2E training which improves rare-word speech recognition. With JEIT, the E2E model computes an E2E loss on audio-transcript pairs while its ILM estimates a cross-entropy loss on unpaired text. The E2E model is trained to minimize a weighted sum of E2E and ILM losses. During JEIT, ILM absorbs knowledge from unpaired text while the E2E training serves as regularization. Unlike ILM adaptation methods, JEIT does not require a separate adaptation step and avoids the need for Kullback-Leibler divergence regularization of ILM. We also show that modular hybrid autoregressive transducer (MHAT) performs better than HAT in the JEIT framework, and is much more robust than HAT during ILM adaptation. To push the limit of unpaired text injection, we further propose a combined JEIT and JOIST training (CJJT) that benefits from modality matching, encoder text injection and ILM training. Both JEIT and CJJT can foster a more effective LM fusion. With 100B unpaired sentences, JEIT/CJJT improves rare-word recognition accuracy by up to 16.4% over a model trained without unpaired text.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 JEIT，这是一种联合端到端（E2E）模型和内部语言模型（ILM）训练方法，可在 E2E 训练期间将大规模不配对文本注入 ILM，从而提高罕见词语音识别能力。借助 JEIT，E2E 模型计算音频转录对上的 E2E 损失，而 ILM 则估计未配对文本上的交叉熵损失。 E2E 模型经过训练，可以最小化 E2E 和 ILM 损失的加权和。在JEIT期间，ILM从不成对的文本中吸收知识，而E2E培训则作为正则化。与 ILM 适应方法不同，JEIT 不需要单独的适应步骤，并且避免了 ILM 的 Kullback-Leibler 散度正则化的需要。我们还表明，模块化混合自回归传感器 (MHAT) 在 JEIT 框架中比 HAT 表现更好，并且在 ILM 适应过程中比 HAT 更稳健。为了突破不成对文本注入的限制，我们进一步提出了一种组合的 JEIT 和 JOIST 训练（CJJT），该训练受益于模态匹配、编码器文本注入和 ILM 训练。 JEIT 和 CJJT 都可以促进更有效的 LM 融合。对于 100B 个不配对的句子，JEIT/CJJT 比没有不配对文本训练的模型将稀有词识别准确率提高了 16.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JEIT方法，通过在端到端语音识别模型中结合内部语言模型（ILM）并利用大规模未配对文本，提升罕见词识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统语音识别模型在处理罕见词时表现不佳，且现有ILM适配方法需额外步骤或正则化，限制了效率。
AI.method: JEIT联合训练端到端模型与ILM，通过音频-文本对计算端到端损失，同时利用未配对文本计算交叉熵损失；提出CJJT框架结合模态匹配与文本注入进一步优化。
AI.result: 使用100B未配对文本时，JEIT/CJJT使罕见词识别准确率提升16.4%，且MHAT结构在ILM适配中表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: JEIT无需额外适配步骤即可有效融合语言模型，CJJT通过多模态技术进一步提升性能，为语音识别中未配对文本利用提供新思路。

search_text: JEIT: Joint End-to-End Model and Internal Language Model Training for Speech Recognition JEIT：语音识别的联合端到端模型和内部语言模型训练 We propose JEIT, a joint end-to-end (E2E) model and internal language model (ILM) training method to inject large-scale unpaired text into ILM during E2E training which improves rare-word speech recognition. With JEIT, the E2E model computes an E2E loss on audio-transcript pairs while its ILM estimates a cross-entropy loss on unpaired text. The E2E model is trained to minimize a weighted sum of E2E and ILM losses. During JEIT, ILM absorbs knowledge from unpaired text while the E2E training serves as regularization. Unlike ILM adaptation methods, JEIT does not require a separate adaptation step and avoids the need for Kullback-Leibler divergence regularization of ILM. We also show that modular hybrid autoregressive transducer (MHAT) performs better than HAT in the JEIT framework, and is much more robust than HAT during ILM adaptation. To push the limit of unpaired text injection, we further propose a combined JEIT and JOIST training (CJJT) that benefits from modality matching, encoder text injection and ILM training. Both JEIT and CJJT can foster a more effective LM fusion. With 100B unpaired sentences, JEIT/CJJT improves rare-word recognition accuracy by up to 16.4% over a model trained without unpaired text. 我们提出了 JEIT，这是一种联合端到端（E2E）模型和内部语言模型（ILM）训练方法，可在 E2E 训练期间将大规模不配对文本注入 ILM，从而提高罕见词语音识别能力。借助 JEIT，E2E 模型计算音频转录对上的 E2E 损失，而 ILM 则估计未配对文本上的交叉熵损失。 E2E 模型经过训练，可以最小化 E2E 和 ILM 损失的加权和。在JEIT期间，ILM从不成对的文本中吸收知识，而E2E培训则作为正则化。与 ILM 适应方法不同，JEIT 不需要单独的适应步骤，并且避免了 ILM 的 Kullback-Leibler 散度正则化的需要。我们还表明，模块化混合自回归传感器 (MHAT) 在 JEIT 框架中比 HAT 表现更好，并且在 ILM 适应过程中比 HAT 更稳健。为了突破不成对文本注入的限制，我们进一步提出了一种组合的 JEIT 和 JOIST 训练（CJJT），该训练受益于模态匹配、编码器文本注入和 ILM 训练。 JEIT 和 CJJT 都可以促进更有效的 LM 融合。对于 100B 个不配对的句子，JEIT/CJJT 比没有不配对文本训练的模型将稀有词识别准确率提高了 16.4%。 本文提出JEIT方法，通过在端到端语音识别模型中结合内部语言模型（ILM）并利用大规模未配对文本，提升罕见词识别准确率。 Zhong Meng,Weiran Wang,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Tara N. authors_text: Keqi Deng,Philip C. Woodland
title: Adaptable End-to-End ASR Models using Replaceable Internal LMs and Residual Softmax
title_zh: 使用可替换内部 LM 和残差 Softmax 的自适应端到端 ASR 模型
abstract: End-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR) implicitly learns the token sequence distribution of paired audio-transcript training data. However, it still suffers from domain shifts from training to testing, and domain adaptation is still challenging. To alleviate this problem, this paper designs a replaceable internal language model (RILM) method, which makes it feasible to directly replace the internal language model (LM) of E2E ASR models with a target-domain LM in the decoding stage when a domain shift is encountered. Furthermore, this paper proposes a residual softmax (R-softmax) that is designed for CTC-based E2E ASR models to adapt to the target domain without re-training during inference. For E2E ASR models trained on the LibriSpeech corpus, experiments showed that the proposed methods gave a 2.6% absolute WER reduction on the Switchboard data and a 1.0% WER reduction on the AESRC2020 corpus while maintaining intra-domain ASR results.
summary: End-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR) implicitly learns the token sequence distribution of paired audio-transcript training data. However, it still suffers from domain shifts from training to testing, and domain adaptation is still challenging. To alleviate this problem, this paper designs a replaceable internal language model (RILM) method, which makes it feasible to directly replace the internal language model (LM) of E2E ASR models with a target-domain LM in the decoding stage when a domain shift is encountered. Furthermore, this paper proposes a residual softmax (R-softmax) that is designed for CTC-based E2E ASR models to adapt to the target domain without re-training during inference. For E2E ASR models trained on the LibriSpeech corpus, experiments showed that the proposed methods gave a 2.6% absolute WER reduction on the Switchboard data and a 1.0% WER reduction on the AESRC2020 corpus while maintaining intra-domain ASR results.
abstract_zh: 端到端 (E2E) 自动语音识别 (ASR) 隐式学习配对音频转录训练数据的标记序列分布。然而，它仍然面临着从训练到测试的领域转变，领域适应仍然具有挑战性。为了缓解这一问题，本文设计了一种可替换内部语言模型（RILM）方法，使得在遇到域移位时在解码阶段可以直接用目标域LM替换E2E ASR模型的内部语言模型（LM）。此外，本文提出了一种残差softmax（R-softmax），专为基于CTC的E2E ASR模型设计，以适应目标域，而无需在推理过程中重新训练。对于在 LibriSpeech 语料库上训练的 E2E ASR 模型，实验表明，所提出的方法在 Switchboard 数据上绝对 WER 减少了 2.6%，在 AESRC2020 语料库上减少了 1.0% WER，同时保持了域内 ASR 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可适应的端到端语音识别模型，通过可替换的内部语言模型（RILM）和残差softmax（R-softmax）方法，解决领域迁移导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端自动语音识别（E2E ASR）在训练与测试领域不匹配时表现不佳，传统领域适应方法需要重新训练模型，存在效率低下问题。
AI.method: 设计可替换内部语言模型（RILM）在解码阶段直接替换目标领域语言模型，并提出针对CTC模型的残差softmax（R-softmax）实现无需再训练的领域适应。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech训练的模型上，Switchboard数据集词错率（WER）降低2.6%，AESRC2020数据集降低1.0%，且保持原领域识别效果。
AI.conclusion: RILM与R-softmax方法有效提升了E2E ASR模型的领域适应能力，在无需再训练情况下实现跨领域性能优化。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种可适应的端到端语音识别模型，通过可替换的内部语言模型（RILM）和残差softmax（R-softmax）方法，解决领域迁移导致的性能下降问题。
ai_content.motivation: 端到端自动语音识别（E2E ASR）在训练与测试领域不匹配时表现不佳，传统领域适应方法需要重新训练模型，存在效率低下问题。
ai_content.method: 设计可替换内部语言模型（RILM）在解码阶段直接替换目标领域语言模型，并提出针对CTC模型的残差softmax（R-softmax）实现无需再训练的领域适应。

search_text: Adaptable End-to-End ASR Models using Replaceable Internal LMs and Residual Softmax 使用可替换内部 LM 和残差 Softmax 的自适应端到端 ASR 模型 End-to-end (E2E) automatic speech recognition (ASR) implicitly learns the token sequence distribution of paired audio-transcript training data. However, it still suffers from domain shifts from training to testing, and domain adaptation is still challenging. To alleviate this problem, this paper designs a replaceable internal language model (RILM) method, which makes it feasible to directly replace the internal language model (LM) of E2E ASR models with a target-domain LM in the decoding stage when a domain shift is encountered. Furthermore, this paper proposes a residual softmax (R-softmax) that is designed for CTC-based E2E ASR models to adapt to the target domain without re-training during inference. For E2E ASR models trained on the LibriSpeech corpus, experiments showed that the proposed methods gave a 2.6% absolute WER reduction on the Switchboard data and a 1.0% WER reduction on the AESRC2020 corpus while maintaining intra-domain ASR results. 端到端 (E2E) 自动语音识别 (ASR) 隐式学习配对音频转录训练数据的标记序列分布。然而，它仍然面临着从训练到测试的领域转变，领域适应仍然具有挑战性。为了缓解这一问题，本文设计了一种可替换内部语言模型（RILM）方法，使得在遇到域移位时在解码阶段可以直接用目标域LM替换E2E ASR模型的内部语言模型（LM）。此外，本文提出了一种残差softmax（R-softmax），专为基于CTC的E2E ASR模型设计，以适应目标域，而无需在推理过程中重新训练。对于在 LibriSpeech 语料库上训练的 E2E ASR 模型，实验表明，所提出的方法在 Switchboard 数据上绝对 WER 减少了 2.6%，在 AESRC2020 语料库上减少了 1.0% WER，同时保持了域内 ASR 结果。 本文提出了一种可适应的端到端语音识别模型，通过可替换的内部语言模型（RILM）和残差softmax（R-softmax）方法，解决领域迁移导致的性能下降问题。 Keqi Deng,Philip C. Woodland eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Gerhard Paaß,Sven Giesselbach
title: Foundation Models for Natural Language Processing -- Pre-trained Language Models Integrating Media
title_zh: 自然语言处理基础模型——预训练媒体集成语言模型
comment: This book has been accepted by Springer Nature and will be published as an open access monograph. https://link.springer.com/book/9783031231896. It is licensed under the CC BY-NC-SA license (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/), except for the material included from other authors, which may have different licenses
comments: This book has been accepted by Springer Nature and will be published as an open access monograph. https://link.springer.com/book/9783031231896. It is licensed under the CC BY-NC-SA license (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/), except for the material included from other authors, which may have different licenses
abstract: This open access book provides a comprehensive overview of the state of the art in research and applications of Foundation Models and is intended for readers familiar with basic Natural Language Processing (NLP) concepts. Over the recent years, a revolutionary new paradigm has been developed for training models for NLP. These models are first pre-trained on large collections of text documents to acquire general syntactic knowledge and semantic information. Then, they are fine-tuned for specific tasks, which they can often solve with superhuman accuracy. When the models are large enough, they can be instructed by prompts to solve new tasks without any fine-tuning. Moreover, they can be applied to a wide range of different media and problem domains, ranging from image and video processing to robot control learning. Because they provide a blueprint for solving many tasks in artificial intelligence, they have been called Foundation Models. After a brief introduction to basic NLP models the main pre-trained language models BERT, GPT and sequence-to-sequence transformer are described, as well as the concepts of self-attention and context-sensitive embedding. Then, different approaches to improving these models are discussed, such as expanding the pre-training criteria, increasing the length of input texts, or including extra knowledge. An overview of the best-performing models for about twenty application areas is then presented, e.g., question answering, translation, story generation, dialog systems, generating images from text, etc. For each application area, the strengths and weaknesses of current models are discussed, and an outlook on further developments is given. In addition, links are provided to freely available program code. A concluding chapter summarizes the economic opportunities, mitigation of risks, and potential developments of AI.

abstract_zh: 这本开放获取的书籍全面概述了基础模型研究和应用的最新技术，面向熟悉基本自然语言处理 (NLP) 概念的读者。近年来，NLP 训练模型出现了革命性的新范式。这些模型首先在大量文本文档上进行预训练，以获取一般句法知识和语义信息。然后，它们针对特定任务进行微调，通常可以以超人的精度解决这些任务。当模型足够大时，可以根据提示指示它们解决新任务，而无需任何微调。此外，它们可以应用于广泛的不同媒体和问题领域，从图像和视频处理到机器人控制学习。因为它们提供了解决人工智能中许多任务的蓝图，所以它们被称为基础模型。在简要介绍基本 NLP 模型之后，描述了主要的预训练语言模型 BERT、GPT 和序列到序列转换器，以及自注意力和上下文敏感嵌入的概念。然后，讨论了改进这些模型的不同方法，例如扩展预训练标准、增加输入文本的长度或包含额外的知识。然后概述了大约二十个应用领域的最佳表现模型，例如问答、翻译、故事生成、对话系统、从文本生成图像等。对于每个应用领域，讨论了当前模型的优点和缺点，并给出了进一步发展的前景。此外，还提供了免费程序代码的链接。最后一章总结了人工智能的经济机遇、风险缓解和潜在发展。

AI.tldr: 综述基础模型在NLP中的发展，涵盖预训练方法、改进策略及多领域应用。
AI.motivation: 阐述基础模型通过预训练和微调提升NLP任务性能，并拓展至多模态和跨领域应用的重要性。
AI.method: 介绍主流预训练模型（如BERT、GPT）及改进技术，分析自注意力和上下文嵌入机制。
AI.result: 概述二十个应用领域的最佳模型，分析其优缺点并展望未来技术发展。
AI.conclusion: 总结基础模型带来的经济机遇，提出风险应对策略，并预测AI未来发展方向。

authors_text: Lauren Baron,Vuthea Chheang,Amit Chaudhari,Arooj Liaqat,Aishwarya Chandrasekaran,Yufan Wang,Joshua Cashaback,Erik Thostenson,Roghayeh Leila Barmaki
title: Virtual Therapy Exergame for Upper Extremity Rehabilitation Using Smart Wearable Sensors
title_zh: 使用智能可穿戴传感器进行上肢康复的虚拟治疗运动游戏
comment: IEEE/ACM international conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems and Engineering Technologies (CHASE) 2023
comments: IEEE/ACM international conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems and Engineering Technologies (CHASE) 2023
abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) has been utilized for several applications and has shown great potential for rehabilitation, especially for home therapy. However, these systems solely rely on information from VR hand controllers, which do not fully capture the individual movement of the joints. In this paper, we propose a creative VR therapy exergame for upper extremity rehabilitation using multi-dimensional reaching tasks while simultaneously capturing hand movement from the VR controllers and elbow joint movement from a flexible carbon nanotube sleeve. We conducted a preliminary study with non-clinical participants (n = 12, 7 F). In a 2x2 within-subjects study (orientation (vertical, horizontal) x configuration (flat, curved)), we evaluated the effectiveness and enjoyment of the exergame in different study conditions. The results show that there was a statistically significant difference in terms of task completion time between the two orientations. However, no significant differences were found in the number of mistakes in both orientation and configuration of the virtual exergame. This can lead to customizing therapy while maintaining the same level of intensity. That is, if a patient has restricted lower limb mobility and requires to be seated, they can use the orientations interchangeably. The results of resistance change generated from the carbon nanotube sleeve revealed that the flat configuration in the vertical orientation induced more elbow stretches than the other conditions. Finally, we reported the subjective measures based on questionnaires for usability and user experience in different study conditions. In conclusion, the proposed VR exergame has the potential as a multimodal sensory tool for personalized upper extremity home-based therapy and telerehabilitation.

abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）已被用于多种应用，并显示出康复的巨大潜力，尤其是家庭治疗。然而，这些系统仅依赖于 VR 手控制器的信息，无法完全捕捉关节的单独运动。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于上肢康复的创意 VR 治疗运动游戏，使用多维到达任务，同时从 VR 控制器捕获手部运动，从柔性碳纳米管套管捕获肘关节运动。我们对非临床参与者（n = 12, 7 F）进行了初步研究。在一项 2x2 受试者内研究（方向（垂直、水平）x 配置（平面、弯曲））中，我们评估了不同研究条件下运动游戏的有效性和乐趣。结果表明，两种方向的任务完成时间存在统计学上的显着差异。然而，虚拟运动游戏的方向和配置的错误数量没有发现显着差异。这可以导致定制治疗，同时保持相同的强度水平。也就是说，如果患者下肢活动受限并需要坐着，他们可以互换使用这些方向。碳纳米管套管产生的电阻变化的结果表明，垂直方向的扁平结构比其他条件引起更多的肘部拉伸。最后，我们报告了基于不同研究条件下的可用性和用户体验问卷的主观测量。总之，所提出的 VR 运动游戏有潜力作为一种多模式感觉工具，用于个性化上肢家庭治疗和远程康复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合虚拟现实（VR）和智能可穿戴传感器的虚拟康复游戏，用于上肢康复训练。
AI.motivation: 现有VR康复系统仅依赖手部控制器，无法全面捕捉关节运动，因此需要结合可穿戴传感器以提高康复效果。
AI.method: 通过2x2组内实验（垂直/水平方向与平直/弯曲配置），结合VR控制器和碳纳米管袖套采集手部及肘部运动数据，评估任务完成时间、错误率及用户主观体验。
AI.result: 垂直方向任务完成时间显著差异，但错误率无显著变化；平直配置垂直方向诱导更多肘部伸展，用户主观体验良好。
AI.conclusion: 该VR康复游戏可作为个性化居家康复和远程康复的多模态感官工具，具有临床应用潜力。

ai_content_json.result: 垂直方向任务完成时间显著差异，但错误率无显著变化；平直配置垂直方向诱导更多肘部伸展，用户主观体验良好。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该VR康复游戏可作为个性化居家康复和远程康复的多模态感官工具，具有临床应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合虚拟现实（VR）和智能可穿戴传感器的虚拟康复游戏，用于上肢康复训练。
motivation: 现有VR康复系统仅依赖手部控制器，无法全面捕捉关节运动，因此需要结合可穿戴传感器以提高康复效果。
method: 通过2x2组内实验（垂直/水平方向与平直/弯曲配置），结合VR控制器和碳纳米管袖套采集手部及肘部运动数据，评估任务完成时间、错误率及用户主观体验。
result: 垂直方向任务完成时间显著差异，但错误率无显著变化；平直配置垂直方向诱导更多肘部伸展，用户主观体验良好。
conclusion: 该VR康复游戏可作为个性化居家康复和远程康复的多模态感官工具，具有临床应用潜力。
search_text: Virtual Therapy Exergame for Upper Extremity Rehabilitation Using Smart Wearable Sensors 使用智能可穿戴传感器进行上肢康复的虚拟治疗运动游戏 Virtual Reality (VR) has been utilized for several applications and has shown great potential for rehabilitation, especially for home therapy. However, these systems solely rely on information from VR hand controllers, which do not fully capture the individual movement of the joints. In this paper, we propose a creative VR therapy exergame for upper extremity rehabilitation using multi-dimensional reaching tasks while simultaneously capturing hand movement from the VR controllers and elbow joint movement from a flexible carbon nanotube sleeve. We conducted a preliminary study with non-clinical participants (n = 12, 7 F). In a 2x2 within-subjects study (orientation (vertical, horizontal) x configuration (flat, curved)), we evaluated the effectiveness and enjoyment of the exergame in different study conditions. The results show that there was a statistically significant difference in terms of task completion time between the two orientations. However, no significant differences were found in the number of mistakes in both orientation and configuration of the virtual exergame. This can lead to customizing therapy while maintaining the same level of intensity. That is, if a patient has restricted lower limb mobility and requires to be seated, they can use the orientations interchangeably. The results of resistance change generated from the carbon nanotube sleeve revealed that the flat configuration in the vertical orientation induced more elbow stretches than the other conditions. Finally, we reported the subjective measures based on questionnaires for usability and user experience in different study conditions. In conclusion, the proposed VR exergame has the potential as a multimodal sensory tool for personalized upper extremity home-based therapy and telerehabilitation. 虚拟现实（VR）已被用于多种应用，并显示出康复的巨大潜力，尤其是家庭治疗。然而，这些系统仅依赖于 VR 手控制器的信息，无法完全捕捉关节的单独运动。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于上肢康复的创意 VR 治疗运动游戏，使用多维到达任务，同时从 VR 控制器捕获手部运动，从柔性碳纳米管套管捕获肘关节运动。我们对非临床参与者（n = 12, 7 F）进行了初步研究。在一项 2x2 受试者内研究（方向（垂直、水平）x 配置（平面、弯曲））中，我们评估了不同研究条件下运动游戏的有效性和乐趣。结果表明，两种方向的任务完成时间存在统计学上的显着差异。然而，虚拟运动游戏的方向和配置的错误数量没有发现显着差异。这可以导致定制治疗，同时保持相同的强度水平。也就是说，如果患者下肢活动受限并需要坐着，他们可以互换使用这些方向。碳纳米管套管产生的电阻变化的结果表明，垂直方向的扁平结构比其他条件引起更多的肘部拉伸。最后，我们报告了基于不同研究条件下的可用性和用户体验问卷的主观测量。总之，所提出的 VR 运动游戏有潜力作为一种多模式感觉工具，用于个性化上肢家庭治疗和远程康复。 本文提出了一种结合虚拟现实（VR）和智能可穿戴传感器的虚拟康复游戏，用于上肢康复训练。 Lauren Baron,Vuthea Chheang,Amit Chaudhari,Arooj Liaqat,Aishwarya Chandrasekaran,Yufan Wang,Joshua Cashaback,Erik Thostenson,Roghayeh Leila Barmaki cs.HC

authors_text: Melissa Hall,Bobbie Chern,Laura Gustafson,Denisse Ventura,Harshad Kulkarni,Candace Ross,Nicolas Usunier
title: Towards Reliable Assessments of Demographic Disparities in Multi-Label Image Classifiers
title_zh: 在多标签图像分类器中实现人口统计差异的可靠评估
abstract: Disaggregated performance metrics across demographic groups are a hallmark of fairness assessments in computer vision. These metrics successfully incentivized performance improvements on person-centric tasks such as face analysis and are used to understand risks of modern models. However, there is a lack of discussion on the vulnerabilities of these measurements for more complex computer vision tasks. In this paper, we consider multi-label image classification and, specifically, object categorization tasks. First, we highlight design choices and trade-offs for measurement that involve more nuance than discussed in prior computer vision literature. These challenges are related to the necessary scale of data, definition of groups for images, choice of metric, and dataset imbalances. Next, through two case studies using modern vision models, we demonstrate that naive implementations of these assessments are brittle. We identify several design choices that look merely like implementation details but significantly impact the conclusions of assessments, both in terms of magnitude and direction (on which group the classifiers work best) of disparities. Based on ablation studies, we propose some recommendations to increase the reliability of these assessments. Finally, through a qualitative analysis we find that concepts with large disparities tend to have varying definitions and representations between groups, with inconsistencies across datasets and annotators. While this result suggests avenues for mitigation through more consistent data collection, it also highlights that ambiguous label definitions remain a challenge when performing model assessments. Vision models are expanding and becoming more ubiquitous; it is even more important that our disparity assessments accurately reflect the true performance of models.
summary: Disaggregated performance metrics across demographic groups are a hallmark of fairness assessments in computer vision. These metrics successfully incentivized performance improvements on person-centric tasks such as face analysis and are used to understand risks of modern models. However, there is a lack of discussion on the vulnerabilities of these measurements for more complex computer vision tasks. In this paper, we consider multi-label image classification and, specifically, object categorization tasks. First, we highlight design choices and trade-offs for measurement that involve more nuance than discussed in prior computer vision literature. These challenges are related to the necessary scale of data, definition of groups for images, choice of metric, and dataset imbalances. Next, through two case studies using modern vision models, we demonstrate that naive implementations of these assessments are brittle. We identify several design choices that look merely like implementation details but significantly impact the conclusions of assessments, both in terms of magnitude and direction (on which group the classifiers work best) of disparities. Based on ablation studies, we propose some recommendations to increase the reliability of these assessments. Finally, through a qualitative analysis we find that concepts with large disparities tend to have varying definitions and representations between groups, with inconsistencies across datasets and annotators. While this result suggests avenues for mitigation through more consistent data collection, it also highlights that ambiguous label definitions remain a challenge when performing model assessments. Vision models are expanding and becoming more ubiquitous; it is even more important that our disparity assessments accurately reflect the true performance of models.
abstract_zh: 跨人口群体的分类性能指标是计算机视觉公平评估的标志。这些指标成功地激励了以人为中心的任务（例如面部分析）的性能改进，并用于了解现代模型的风险。然而，缺乏对这些测量对于更复杂的计算机视觉任务的漏洞的讨论。在本文中，我们考虑多标签图像分类，特别是对象分类任务。首先，我们重点介绍测量的设计选择和权衡，其中涉及的细微差别比之前的计算机视觉文献中讨论的要多。这些挑战与必要的数据规模、图像组的定义、指标的选择和数据集不平衡有关。接下来，通过使用现代视觉模型的两个案例研究，我们证明了这些评估的简单实施是脆弱的。我们确定了几种设计选择，这些设计选择看起来仅仅像实现细节，但在差异的大小和方向（分类器在哪一组上效果最好）方面都显着影响评估的结论。基于消融研究，我们提出了一些建议来提高这些评估的可靠性。最后，通过定性分析，我们发现差异较大的概念往往在不同组之间具有不同的定义和表示，并且数据集和注释者之间存在不一致。虽然这一结果表明了通过更一致的数据收集来缓解的途径，但它也强调了在执行模型评估时模糊的标签定义仍然是一个挑战。视觉模型正在扩展并变得更加普遍；更重要的是，我们的差异评估准确反映模型的真实性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨多标签图像分类器在不同人口群体中的性能差异评估问题，并提出改进评估可靠性的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前在计算机视觉领域，对不同人口群体的性能差异评估主要集中在人脸识别等任务上，但对更复杂的任务如多标签图像分类的评估存在不足，缺乏对评估方法脆弱性的讨论。
AI.method: 本文通过两个案例研究，分析了现有评估方法的脆弱性，并通过消融实验提出了一些改进评估可靠性的建议。同时，通过定性分析探讨了标签定义和表示的不一致性问题。
AI.result: 研究发现，现有的评估方法在实现细节上存在显著影响，可能导致评估结果的偏差；标签定义和表示的不一致性也是模型评估中的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 为了确保模型评估的准确性，需要改进评估方法，提高数据的一致性，并进一步研究标签定义和表示的标准化问题。
