authors_text: Wenbin Li,Hakim Hacid,Ebtesam Almazrouei,Merouane Debbah
title: A Comprehensive Review and a Taxonomy of Edge Machine Learning: Requirements, Paradigms, and Techniques
title_zh: 边缘机器学习的全面回顾和分类：要求、范式和技术
abstract: The union of Edge Computing (EC) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) has brought forward the Edge AI concept to provide intelligent solutions close to the end-user environment, for privacy preservation, low latency to real-time performance, and resource optimization. Machine Learning (ML), as the most advanced branch of AI in the past few years, has shown encouraging results and applications in the edge environment. Nevertheless, edge-powered ML solutions are more complex to realize due to the joint constraints from both edge computing and AI domains, and the corresponding solutions are expected to be efficient and adapted in technologies such as data processing, model compression, distributed inference, and advanced learning paradigms for Edge ML requirements. Despite the fact that a great deal of the attention garnered by Edge ML is gained in both the academic and industrial communities, we noticed the lack of a complete survey on existing Edge ML technologies to provide a common understanding of this concept. To tackle this, this paper aims at providing a comprehensive taxonomy and a systematic review of Edge ML techniques, focusing on the soft computing aspects of existing paradigms and techniques. We start by identifying the Edge ML requirements driven by the joint constraints. We then extensively survey more than twenty paradigms and techniques along with their representative work, covering two main parts: edge inference, and edge learning. In particular, we analyze how each technique fits into Edge ML by meeting a subset of the identified requirements. We also summarize Edge ML frameworks and open issues to shed light on future directions for Edge ML.
summary: The union of Edge Computing (EC) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) has brought forward the Edge AI concept to provide intelligent solutions close to the end-user environment, for privacy preservation, low latency to real-time performance, and resource optimization. Machine Learning (ML), as the most advanced branch of AI in the past few years, has shown encouraging results and applications in the edge environment. Nevertheless, edge-powered ML solutions are more complex to realize due to the joint constraints from both edge computing and AI domains, and the corresponding solutions are expected to be efficient and adapted in technologies such as data processing, model compression, distributed inference, and advanced learning paradigms for Edge ML requirements. Despite the fact that a great deal of the attention garnered by Edge ML is gained in both the academic and industrial communities, we noticed the lack of a complete survey on existing Edge ML technologies to provide a common understanding of this concept. To tackle this, this paper aims at providing a comprehensive taxonomy and a systematic review of Edge ML techniques, focusing on the soft computing aspects of existing paradigms and techniques. We start by identifying the Edge ML requirements driven by the joint constraints. We then extensively survey more than twenty paradigms and techniques along with their representative work, covering two main parts: edge inference, and edge learning. In particular, we analyze how each technique fits into Edge ML by meeting a subset of the identified requirements. We also summarize Edge ML frameworks and open issues to shed light on future directions for Edge ML.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算（EC）与人工智能（AI）的结合提出了边缘AI概念，提供贴近最终用户环境的智能解决方案，实现隐私保护、低延迟实时性能和资源优化。机器学习（ML）作为人工智能在过去几年中最先进的分支，在边缘环境中展现出了令人鼓舞的成果和应用。然而，由于边缘计算和人工智能领域的共同约束，边缘驱动的机器学习解决方案实现起来更加复杂，并且相应的解决方案有望高效并适应边缘机器学习要求的数据处理、模型压缩、分布式推理和高级学习范式等技术。尽管 Edge ML 在学术界和工业界都获得了大量关注，但我们注意到缺乏对现有 Edge ML 技术的完整调查来提供对此概念的共识。为了解决这个问题，本文旨在提供对 Edge ML 技术的全面分类和系统回顾，重点关注现有范例和技术的软计算方面。我们首先确定由联合约束驱动的 Edge ML 需求。然后，我们广泛调查了二十多个范式和技术及其代表性工作，涵盖两个主要部分：边缘推理和边缘学习。特别是，我们通过满足已确定的要求的子集来分析每种技术如何适合 Edge ML。我们还总结了 Edge ML 框架和未解决的问题，以阐明 Edge ML 的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提供一个关于边缘机器学习（Edge ML）技术的全面分类和系统综述，重点分析其软计算方面。
AI.motivation: 尽管边缘机器学习在学术和工业界受到广泛关注，但缺乏对现有技术的完整综述，导致对其概念的理解不统一。
AI.method: 通过识别由边缘计算与AI联合约束驱动的需求，系统调研了20多种范式与技术，并分析其如何满足边缘ML需求。
AI.result: 提出了边缘ML的分类框架，总结了现有技术、框架及开放性问题，为未来研究方向提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文为边缘机器学习领域提供了结构化理解，明确了技术挑战与发展方向，推动该领域的进一步研究与应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在提供一个关于边缘机器学习（Edge ML）技术的全面分类和系统综述，重点分析其软计算方面。

search_text: A Comprehensive Review and a Taxonomy of Edge Machine Learning: Requirements, Paradigms, and Techniques 边缘机器学习的全面回顾和分类：要求、范式和技术 The union of Edge Computing (EC) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) has brought forward the Edge AI concept to provide intelligent solutions close to the end-user environment, for privacy preservation, low latency to real-time performance, and resource optimization. Machine Learning (ML), as the most advanced branch of AI in the past few years, has shown encouraging results and applications in the edge environment. Nevertheless, edge-powered ML solutions are more complex to realize due to the joint constraints from both edge computing and AI domains, and the corresponding solutions are expected to be efficient and adapted in technologies such as data processing, model compression, distributed inference, and advanced learning paradigms for Edge ML requirements. Despite the fact that a great deal of the attention garnered by Edge ML is gained in both the academic and industrial communities, we noticed the lack of a complete survey on existing Edge ML technologies to provide a common understanding of this concept. To tackle this, this paper aims at providing a comprehensive taxonomy and a systematic review of Edge ML techniques, focusing on the soft computing aspects of existing paradigms and techniques. We start by identifying the Edge ML requirements driven by the joint constraints. We then extensively survey more than twenty paradigms and techniques along with their representative work, covering two main parts: edge inference, and edge learning. In particular, we analyze how each technique fits into Edge ML by meeting a subset of the identified requirements. We also summarize Edge ML frameworks and open issues to shed light on future directions for Edge ML. 边缘计算（EC）与人工智能（AI）的结合提出了边缘AI概念，提供贴近最终用户环境的智能解决方案，实现隐私保护、低延迟实时性能和资源优化。机器学习（ML）作为人工智能在过去几年中最先进的分支，在边缘环境中展现出了令人鼓舞的成果和应用。然而，由于边缘计算和人工智能领域的共同约束，边缘驱动的机器学习解决方案实现起来更加复杂，并且相应的解决方案有望高效并适应边缘机器学习要求的数据处理、模型压缩、分布式推理和高级学习范式等技术。尽管 Edge ML 在学术界和工业界都获得了大量关注，但我们注意到缺乏对现有 Edge ML 技术的完整调查来提供对此概念的共识。为了解决这个问题，本文旨在提供对 Edge ML 技术的全面分类和系统回顾，重点关注现有范例和技术的软计算方面。我们首先确定由联合约束驱动的 Edge ML 需求。然后，我们广泛调查了二十多个范式和技术及其代表性工作，涵盖两个主要部分：边缘推理和边缘学习。特别是，我们通过满足已确定的要求的子集来分析每种技术如何适合 Edge ML。我们还总结了 Edge ML 框架和未解决的问题，以阐明 Edge ML 的未来方向。 本文旨在提供一个关于边缘机器学习（Edge ML）技术的全面分类和系统综述，重点分析其软计算方面。 Wenbin Li,Hakim Hacid,Ebtesam Almazrouei,Merouane Debbah cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Harshit Sikchi,Qinqing Zheng,Amy Zhang,Scott Niekum
title: Dual RL: Unification and New Methods for Reinforcement and Imitation Learning
title_zh: 对偶强化学习：强化和模仿学习的统一和新方法
comment: Published as a conference paper (spotlight) at ICLR 2024. 48 pages
comments: Published as a conference paper (spotlight) at ICLR 2024. 48 pages
abstract: The goal of reinforcement learning (RL) is to find a policy that maximizes the expected cumulative return. It has been shown that this objective can be represented as an optimization problem of state-action visitation distribution under linear constraints. The dual problem of this formulation, which we refer to as dual RL, is unconstrained and easier to optimize. In this work, we first cast several state-of-the-art offline RL and offline imitation learning (IL) algorithms as instances of dual RL approaches with shared structures. Such unification allows us to identify the root cause of the shortcomings of prior methods. For offline IL, our analysis shows that prior methods are based on a restrictive coverage assumption that greatly limits their performance in practice. To fix this limitation, we propose a new discriminator-free method ReCOIL that learns to imitate from arbitrary off-policy data to obtain near-expert performance. For offline RL, our analysis frames a recent offline RL method XQL in the dual framework, and we further propose a new method f-DVL that provides alternative choices to the Gumbel regression loss that fixes the known training instability issue of XQL. The performance improvements by both of our proposed methods, ReCOIL and f-DVL, in IL and RL are validated on an extensive suite of simulated robot locomotion and manipulation tasks. Project code and details can be found at this https://hari-sikchi.github.io/dual-rl.
summary: The goal of reinforcement learning (RL) is to find a policy that maximizes the expected cumulative return. It has been shown that this objective can be represented as an optimization problem of state-action visitation distribution under linear constraints. The dual problem of this formulation, which we refer to as dual RL, is unconstrained and easier to optimize. In this work, we first cast several state-of-the-art offline RL and offline imitation learning (IL) algorithms as instances of dual RL approaches with shared structures. Such unification allows us to identify the root cause of the shortcomings of prior methods. For offline IL, our analysis shows that prior methods are based on a restrictive coverage assumption that greatly limits their performance in practice. To fix this limitation, we propose a new discriminator-free method ReCOIL that learns to imitate from arbitrary off-policy data to obtain near-expert performance. For offline RL, our analysis frames a recent offline RL method XQL in the dual framework, and we further propose a new method f-DVL that provides alternative choices to the Gumbel regression loss that fixes the known training instability issue of XQL. The performance improvements by both of our proposed methods, ReCOIL and f-DVL, in IL and RL are validated on an extensive suite of simulated robot locomotion and manipulation tasks. Project code and details can be found at this https://hari-sikchi.github.io/dual-rl.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）的目标是找到一种最大化预期累积回报的策略。事实证明，该目标可以表示为线性约束下状态-动作访问分布的优化问题。这个公式的对偶问题，我们称之为对偶强化学习，是不受约束的并且更容易优化。在这项工作中，我们首先将几种最先进的离线强化学习和离线模仿学习 (IL) 算法作为具有共享结构的双重强化学习方法的实例。这种统一使我们能够确定现有方法缺点的根本原因。对于离线IL，我们的分析表明，先前的方法基于限制性覆盖假设，这极大地限制了它们在实践中的性能。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的无判别器方法 ReCOIL，它可以学习模仿任意离策略数据以获得接近专家的性能。对于离线 RL，我们的分析在双框架中构建了最近的离线 RL 方法 XQL，并且我们进一步提出了一种新方法 f-DVL，它为 Gumbel 回归损失提供了替代选择，解决了 XQL 已知的训练不稳定问题。我们提出的两种方法 ReCOIL 和 f-DVL 在 IL 和 RL 中的性能改进在一系列广泛的模拟机器人运动和操作任务中得到了验证。项目代码和详细信息可以在 https://hari-sikchi.github.io/dual-rl 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dual RL框架，统一强化学习与模仿学习方法，并设计新型算法解决离线学习中的性能限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线模仿学习依赖受限的覆盖假设导致性能瓶颈，离线强化学习方法存在训练不稳定等缺陷，需寻求更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过构建Dual RL对偶优化框架，将主流离线RL/IL算法统一表征，提出无判别器模仿学习方法ReCOIL和改进型XQL的f-DVL算法。
AI.result: 在机器人运动与操作任务基准测试中，ReCOIL和f-DVL均显著优于现有方法，验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: Dual RL框架揭示了离线学习方法的本质联系，提出的新型算法有效解决了覆盖假设限制和训练稳定性问题。

authors_text: Ismaïl Baaj
title: Chebyshev distances associated to the second members of systems of Max-product/Lukasiewicz Fuzzy relational equations
title_zh: 与 Max-product/Lukasiewicz 模糊关系方程组第二成员相关的切比雪夫距离
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.06141
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.06141
abstract: In this article, we study the inconsistency of a system of $\max$-product fuzzy relational equations and of a system of $\max$-Lukasiewicz fuzzy relational equations. For a system of $\max-\min$ fuzzy relational equations $A \Box_{\min}^{\max} x = b$ and using the $L_\infty$ norm, (Baaj, 2023) showed that the Chebyshev distance $Δ= \inf_{c \in \mathcal{C}} \Vert b - c \Vert$, where $\mathcal{C}$ is the set of second members of consistent systems defined with the same matrix $A$, can be computed by an explicit analytical formula according to the components of the matrix $A$ and its second member $b$. In this article, we give analytical formulas analogous to that of (Baaj, 2023) to compute the Chebyshev distance associated to the second member of a system of $\max$-product fuzzy relational equations and that associated to the second member of a system of $\max$-Lukasiewicz fuzzy relational equations.
summary: In this article, we study the inconsistency of a system of $\max$-product fuzzy relational equations and of a system of $\max$-Lukasiewicz fuzzy relational equations. For a system of $\max-\min$ fuzzy relational equations $A \Box_{\min}^{\max} x = b$ and using the $L_\infty$ norm, (Baaj, 2023) showed that the Chebyshev distance $Δ= \inf_{c \in \mathcal{C}} \Vert b - c \Vert$, where $\mathcal{C}$ is the set of second members of consistent systems defined with the same matrix $A$, can be computed by an explicit analytical formula according to the components of the matrix $A$ and its second member $b$. In this article, we give analytical formulas analogous to that of (Baaj, 2023) to compute the Chebyshev distance associated to the second member of a system of $\max$-product fuzzy relational equations and that associated to the second member of a system of $\max$-Lukasiewicz fuzzy relational equations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究$\max$-product 模糊关系方程组和$\max$-Lukasiewicz 模糊关系方程组的不一致。对于 $\max-\min$ 模糊关系方程组 $A \Box_{\min}^{\max} x = b$ 并使用 $L_\infty$ 范数，（Baaj，2023）表明切比雪夫距离 $Δ= \inf_{c \in \mathcal{C}} \Vert b - c \Vert$，其中 $\mathcal{C}$ 是定义的一致系统的第二个成员的集合与相同的矩阵$A$，可以根据矩阵$A$及其第二个成员$b$的分量通过显式解析公式计算。在本文中，我们给出了类似于 (Baaj, 2023) 的解析公式来计算与 $\max$-product 模糊关系方程组的第二个成员相关的切比雪夫距离以及与 $\max$-Lukasiewicz 模糊关系方程组的第二个成员相关的切比雪夫距离。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了max-乘积模糊关系方程和max-Lukasiewicz模糊关系方程系统的不一致性，推导了与第二成员相关的Chebyshev距离的显式公式。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已针对max-min模糊关系方程系统提出Chebyshev距离的解析公式，但尚未解决max-乘积和max-Lukasiewicz系统的类似问题，需扩展方法以填补这一空白。
AI.method: 基于Baaj (2023) 对max-min系统的分析方法，通过数学推导和规范变换，建立适用于max-乘积和max-Lukasiewicz系统的Chebyshev距离计算框架。
AI.result: 成功推导出两种系统下Chebyshev距离的显式解析公式，公式依赖于矩阵A和第二成员b的组件特性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为两种模糊关系方程系统提供了计算Chebyshev距离的通用方法，有助于解决系统不一致性问题并优化相关应用。

result: 成功推导出两种系统下Chebyshev距离的显式解析公式，公式依赖于矩阵A和第二成员b的组件特性。
conclusion: 本文为两种模糊关系方程系统提供了计算Chebyshev距离的通用方法，有助于解决系统不一致性问题并优化相关应用。
search_text: Chebyshev distances associated to the second members of systems of Max-product/Lukasiewicz Fuzzy relational equations 与 Max-product/Lukasiewicz 模糊关系方程组第二成员相关的切比雪夫距离 In this article, we study the inconsistency of a system of $\max$-product fuzzy relational equations and of a system of $\max$-Lukasiewicz fuzzy relational equations. For a system of $\max-\min$ fuzzy relational equations $A \Box_{\min}^{\max} x = b$ and using the $L_\infty$ norm, (Baaj, 2023) showed that the Chebyshev distance $Δ= \inf_{c \in \mathcal{C}} \Vert b - c \Vert$, where $\mathcal{C}$ is the set of second members of consistent systems defined with the same matrix $A$, can be computed by an explicit analytical formula according to the components of the matrix $A$ and its second member $b$. In this article, we give analytical formulas analogous to that of (Baaj, 2023) to compute the Chebyshev distance associated to the second member of a system of $\max$-product fuzzy relational equations and that associated to the second member of a system of $\max$-Lukasiewicz fuzzy relational equations. 在本文中，我们研究$\max$-product 模糊关系方程组和$\max$-Lukasiewicz 模糊关系方程组的不一致。对于 $\max-\min$ 模糊关系方程组 $A \Box_{\min}^{\max} x = b$ 并使用 $L_\infty$ 范数，（Baaj，2023）表明切比雪夫距离 $Δ= \inf_{c \in \mathcal{C}} \Vert b - c \Vert$，其中 $\mathcal{C}$ 是定义的一致系统的第二个成员的集合与相同的矩阵$A$，可以根据矩阵$A$及其第二个成员$b$的分量通过显式解析公式计算。在本文中，我们给出了类似于 (Baaj, 2023) 的解析公式来计算与 $\max$-product 模糊关系方程组的第二个成员相关的切比雪夫距离以及与 $\max$-Lukasiewicz 模糊关系方程组的第二个成员相关的切比雪夫距离。 本文研究了max-乘积模糊关系方程和max-Lukasiewicz模糊关系方程系统的不一致性，推导了与第二成员相关的Chebyshev距离的显式公式。 Ismaïl Baaj cs.AI,cs.LO,math.LO

authors_text: Jian Wu,Zhuo Chen,Min Hu,Xiong Xiao,Jinyu Li
title: Speaker Change Detection for Transformer Transducer ASR
title_zh: 变压器换能器 ASR 的扬声器变化检测
abstract: Speaker change detection (SCD) is an important feature that improves the readability of the recognized words from an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system by breaking the word sequence into paragraphs at speaker change points. Existing SCD solutions either require additional ensemble for the time based decisions and recognized word sequences, or implement a tight integration between ASR and SCD, limiting the potential optimum performance for both tasks. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework for the SCD task, where an additional SCD module is built on top of an existing Transformer Transducer ASR (TT-ASR) network. Two variants of the SCD network are explored in this framework that naturally estimate speaker change probability for each word, while allowing the ASR and SCD to have independent optimization scheme for the best performance. Experiments show that our methods can significantly improve the F1 score on LibriCSS and Microsoft call center data sets without ASR degradation, compared with a joint SCD and ASR baseline.
summary: Speaker change detection (SCD) is an important feature that improves the readability of the recognized words from an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system by breaking the word sequence into paragraphs at speaker change points. Existing SCD solutions either require additional ensemble for the time based decisions and recognized word sequences, or implement a tight integration between ASR and SCD, limiting the potential optimum performance for both tasks. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework for the SCD task, where an additional SCD module is built on top of an existing Transformer Transducer ASR (TT-ASR) network. Two variants of the SCD network are explored in this framework that naturally estimate speaker change probability for each word, while allowing the ASR and SCD to have independent optimization scheme for the best performance. Experiments show that our methods can significantly improve the F1 score on LibriCSS and Microsoft call center data sets without ASR degradation, compared with a joint SCD and ASR baseline.
abstract_zh: 说话人变化检测 (SCD) 是一项重要功能，它通过在说话人变化点将单词序列分成段落来提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统所识别单词的可读性。现有的 SCD 解决方案要么需要额外的集成来进行基于时间的决策和识别的单词序列，要么实现 ASR 和 SCD 之间的紧密集成，从而限制了这两项任务的潜在最佳性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 SCD 任务框架，其中在现有 Transformer Transducer ASR (TT-ASR) 网络之上构建了一个额外的 SCD 模块。该框架探索了 SCD 网络的两种变体，它们自然地估计每个单词的说话者变化概率，同时允许 ASR 和 SCD 具有独立的优化方案以获得最佳性能。实验表明，与联合 SCD 和 ASR 基线相比，我们的方法可以显着提高 LibriCSS 和 Microsoft 呼叫中心数据集上的 F1 分数，而不会降低 ASR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在Transformer Transducer ASR框架上构建的说话人切换检测（SCD）模块，实现ASR与SCD任务的独立优化。
AI.motivation: 现有SCD方案需额外集成或与ASR紧密耦合，限制了两者性能的最优发挥。
AI.method: 在TT-ASR网络顶层添加SCD模块，设计两种变体通过独立优化方案估计每个词的说话人切换概率。
AI.result: 在LibriCSS和Microsoft客服数据集上显著提升F1分数，且未导致ASR性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解耦ASR与SCD任务，在保持语音识别质量的同时提升说话人切换检测效果。

authors_text: Minghao Li,Ran Ben Basat,Shay Vargaftik,ChonLam Lao,Kevin Xu,Michael Mitzenmacher,Minlan Yu
title: THC: Accelerating Distributed Deep Learning Using Tensor Homomorphic Compression
title_zh: THC：使用张量同态压缩加速分布式深度学习
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are the de facto standard for essential use cases, such as image classification, computer vision, and natural language processing. As DNNs and datasets get larger, they require distributed training on increasingly larger clusters. A main bottleneck is the resulting communication overhead where workers exchange model updates (i.e., gradients) on a per-round basis. To address this bottleneck and accelerate training, a widely-deployed approach is compression. However, previous deployments often apply bi-directional compression schemes by simply using a uni-directional gradient compression scheme in each direction. This results in significant computational overheads at the parameter server and increased compression error, leading to longer training and lower accuracy. We introduce Tensor Homomorphic Compression (THC), a novel bi-directional compression framework that enables the direct aggregation of compressed values and thus eliminating the aforementioned computational overheads. Moreover, THC is compatible with in-network aggregation (INA), which allows for further acceleration. Our evaluation shows that training representative vision and language models with THC reaches target accuracy by 1.40x to 1.47x faster using INA and 1.28x to 1.33x faster using a software PS compared with state-of-the-art systems.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are the de facto standard for essential use cases, such as image classification, computer vision, and natural language processing. As DNNs and datasets get larger, they require distributed training on increasingly larger clusters. A main bottleneck is the resulting communication overhead where workers exchange model updates (i.e., gradients) on a per-round basis. To address this bottleneck and accelerate training, a widely-deployed approach is compression. However, previous deployments often apply bi-directional compression schemes by simply using a uni-directional gradient compression scheme in each direction. This results in significant computational overheads at the parameter server and increased compression error, leading to longer training and lower accuracy. We introduce Tensor Homomorphic Compression (THC), a novel bi-directional compression framework that enables the direct aggregation of compressed values and thus eliminating the aforementioned computational overheads. Moreover, THC is compatible with in-network aggregation (INA), which allows for further acceleration. Our evaluation shows that training representative vision and language models with THC reaches target accuracy by 1.40x to 1.47x faster using INA and 1.28x to 1.33x faster using a software PS compared with state-of-the-art systems.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 是图像分类、计算机视觉和自然语言处理等基本用例的事实上的标准。随着 DNN 和数据集变得越来越大，它们需要在越来越大的集群上进行分布式训练。主要瓶颈是由此产生的通信开销，其中工作人员每轮交换模型更新（即梯度）。为了解决这个瓶颈并加速训练，一种广泛部署的方法是压缩。然而，以前的部署通常通过在每个方向简单地使用单向梯度压缩方案来应用双向压缩方案。这会导致参数服务器产生大量计算开销并增加压缩误差，从而导致训练时间更长和准确性降低。我们引入张量同态压缩（THC），这是一种新颖的双向压缩框架，可以直接聚合压缩值，从而消除上述计算开销。此外，THC 与网内聚合 (INA) 兼容，可以进一步加速。我们的评估表明，与最先进的系统相比，使用 THC 训练代表性视觉和语言模型时，使用 INA 训练代表性视觉和语言模型的目标准确度要快 1.40 倍至 1.47 倍，使用软件 PS 的目标准确度要快 1.28 倍至 1.33 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tensor Homomorphic Compression（THC），一种加速分布式深度学习的双向压缩框架，通过直接聚合压缩值减少通信开销。
AI.motivation: 分布式深度学习中，工人节点交换梯度的通信开销是主要瓶颈，传统单向压缩方案导致计算开销大且压缩误差高。
AI.method: THC通过双向压缩框架直接聚合压缩值，消除计算开销，并兼容网络内聚合（INA）技术进一步加速。
AI.result: 使用THC训练视觉和语言模型，在INA下比现有系统快1.40x至1.47x，在软件参数服务器下快1.28x至1.33x，且保持较高精度。
AI.conclusion: THC通过高效压缩和聚合机制显著降低通信开销，为分布式深度学习提供更优解决方案。

search_text: THC: Accelerating Distributed Deep Learning Using Tensor Homomorphic Compression THC：使用张量同态压缩加速分布式深度学习 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are the de facto standard for essential use cases, such as image classification, computer vision, and natural language processing. authors_text: Gabriel Jimenez,Anuradha Kar,Mehdi Ounissi,Léa Ingrassia,Susana Boluda,Benoît Delatour,Lev Stimmer,Daniel Racoceanu
title: Visual deep learning-based explanation for neuritic plaques segmentation in Alzheimer's Disease using weakly annotated whole slide histopathological images
title_zh: 使用弱注释的全玻片组织病理学图像基于视觉深度学习解释阿尔茨海默病的神经炎斑块分割
comment: ef:Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention -- MICCAI 2022, Sep 2022, Singapore (SG), Singapore. pp.336-344
comments: ef:Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention -- MICCAI 2022, Sep 2022, Singapore (SG), Singapore. pp.336-344
abstract: Quantifying the distribution and morphology of tau protein structures in brain tissues is key to diagnosing Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and its subtypes. Recently, deep learning (DL) models such as UNet have been successfully used for automatic segmentation of histopathological whole slide images (WSI) of biological tissues. In this study, we propose a DL-based methodology for semantic segmentation of tau lesions (i.e., neuritic plaques) in WSI of postmortem patients with AD. The state of the art in semantic segmentation of neuritic plaques in human WSI is very limited. Our study proposes a baseline able to generate a significant advantage for morphological analysis of these tauopathies for further stratification of AD patients. Essential discussions concerning biomarkers (ALZ50 versus AT8 tau antibodies), the imaging modality (different slide scanner resolutions), and the challenge of weak annotations are addressed within this seminal study. The analysis of the impact of context in plaque segmentation is important to understand the role of the micro-environment for reliable tau protein segmentation. In addition, by integrating visual interpretability, we are able to explain how the network focuses on a region of interest (ROI), giving additional insights to pathologists. Finally, the release of a new expert-annotated database and the code (\url{https://github.com/aramis-lab/miccai2022-stratifiad.git}) will be helpful for the scientific community to accelerate the development of new pipelines for human WSI processing in AD.
summary: Quantifying the distribution and morphology of tau protein structures in brain tissues is key to diagnosing Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and its subtypes. Recently, deep learning (DL) models such as UNet have been successfully used for automatic segmentation of histopathological whole slide images (WSI) of biological tissues. In this study, we propose a DL-based methodology for semantic segmentation of tau lesions (i.e., neuritic plaques) in WSI of postmortem patients with AD. The state of the art in semantic segmentation of neuritic plaques in human WSI is very limited. Our study proposes a baseline able to generate a significant advantage for morphological analysis of these tauopathies for further stratification of AD patients. Essential discussions concerning biomarkers (ALZ50 versus AT8 tau antibodies), the imaging modality (different slide scanner resolutions), and the challenge of weak annotations are addressed within this seminal study. The analysis of the impact of context in plaque segmentation is important to understand the role of the micro-environment for reliable tau protein segmentation. In addition, by integrating visual interpretability, we are able to explain how the network focuses on a region of interest (ROI), giving additional insights to pathologists. Finally, the release of a new expert-annotated database and the code (\url{https://github.com/aramis-lab/miccai2022-stratifiad.git}) will be helpful for the scientific community to accelerate the development of new pipelines for human WSI processing in AD.
abstract_zh: 量化脑组织中 tau 蛋白结构的分布和形态是诊断阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 及其亚型的关键。最近，UNet等深度学习（DL）模型已成功用于生物组织的组织病理学全切片图像（WSI）的自动分割。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于对 AD 死后患者 WSI 中的 tau 病变（即神经炎斑块）进行语义分割。人类 WSI 中神经炎斑块语义分割的最新技术非常有限。我们的研究提出了一个基线，能够对这些 tau蛋白病的形态学分析产生显着的优势，从而进一步对 AD 患者进行分层。这项开创性研究解决了有关生物标志物（ALZ50 与 AT8 tau 抗体）、成像方式（不同的载玻片扫描仪分辨率）以及弱注释挑战的重要讨论。分析环境对斑块分割的影响对于理解微环境在可靠的 tau 蛋白分割中的作用非常重要。此外，通过整合视觉可解释性，我们能够解释网络如何聚焦于感兴趣区域（ROI），为病理学家提供更多见解。最后，新的专家注释数据库和代码（\url{https://github.com/aramis-lab/miccai2022-stratifiad.git}）的发布将有助于科学界加速 AD 中人类 WSI 处理新管道的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于利用弱标注的全切片组织病理学图像对阿尔茨海默病（AD）患者脑组织中的神经原纤维斑块进行分割，并提供可视化解释。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病的诊断需要量化tau蛋白结构的分布和形态，但现有技术在神经原纤维斑块分割方面存在不足，且弱标注数据的处理具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用改进的UNet架构结合弱标注数据进行语义分割，并引入可视化可解释性技术以突出网络关注的感兴趣区域（ROI），同时讨论了生物标志物、图像分辨率及上下文影响。
AI.result: 提出了一个可用于形态学分析的基线模型，发布了专家标注的数据库及代码，为AD患者的分层提供了新工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合弱标注处理与可视化解释，提升了tau病变分割的可靠性，有助于加速AD病理图像分析领域的发展。

search_text: Visual deep learning-based explanation for neuritic plaques segmentation in Alzheimer's Disease using weakly annotated whole slide histopathological images 使用弱注释的全玻片组织病理学图像基于视觉深度学习解释阿尔茨海默病的神经炎斑块分割 Quantifying the distribution and morphology of tau protein structures in brain tissues is key to diagnosing Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and its subtypes. Recently, deep learning (DL) models such as UNet have been successfully used for automatic segmentation of histopathological whole slide images (WSI) of biological tissues. In this study, we propose a DL-based methodology for semantic segmentation of tau lesions (i.e., neuritic plaques) in WSI of postmortem patients with AD. authors_text: Ting-Hsuan Liao,Songwei Ge,Yiran Xu,Yao-Chih Lee,Badour AlBahar,Jia-Bin Huang
title: Text-driven Visual Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Prior
title_zh: 具有潜在扩散先验的文本驱动视觉合成
abstract: There has been tremendous progress in large-scale text-to-image synthesis driven by diffusion models enabling versatile downstream applications such as 3D object synthesis from texts, image editing, and customized generation. We present a generic approach using latent diffusion models as powerful image priors for various visual synthesis tasks. Existing methods that utilize such priors fail to use these models' full capabilities. To improve this, our core ideas are 1) a feature matching loss between features from different layers of the decoder to provide detailed guidance and 2) a KL divergence loss to regularize the predicted latent features and stabilize the training. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on three different applications, text-to-3D, StyleGAN adaptation, and layered image editing. Extensive results show our method compares favorably against baselines.
summary: There has been tremendous progress in large-scale text-to-image synthesis driven by diffusion models enabling versatile downstream applications such as 3D object synthesis from texts, image editing, and customized generation. We present a generic approach using latent diffusion models as powerful image priors for various visual synthesis tasks. Existing methods that utilize such priors fail to use these models' full capabilities. To improve this, our core ideas are 1) a feature matching loss between features from different layers of the decoder to provide detailed guidance and 2) a KL divergence loss to regularize the predicted latent features and stabilize the training. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on three different applications, text-to-3D, StyleGAN adaptation, and layered image editing. Extensive results show our method compares favorably against baselines.
abstract_zh: 由扩散模型驱动的大规模文本到图像合成已经取得了巨大进展，支持多种下游应用，例如从文本合成 3D 对象、图像编辑和定制生成。我们提出了一种通用方法，使用潜在扩散模型作为各种视觉合成任务的强大图像先验。利用此类先验的现有方法无法充分利用这些模型的功能。为了改善这一点，我们的核心思想是 1) 解码器不同层的特征之间的特征匹配损失，以提供详细的指导；2) KL 散度损失，以正则化预测的潜在特征并稳定训练。我们在三种不同的应用程序（文本转 3D、StyleGAN 适应和分层图像编辑）上展示了我们的方法的有效性。大量结果表明我们的方法与基线相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于潜在扩散模型的文本驱动视觉合成方法，用于多种视觉生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用扩散模型的潜力方面存在不足，需改进以提升生成效果和稳定性。
AI.method: 采用解码器多层特征匹配损失与KL散度损失，分别提供细节指导和潜在特征正则化。
AI.result: 在文本到3D、StyleGAN适应和分层图像编辑任务中，方法效果优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 双损失函数设计有效提升模型性能，验证了潜在扩散先验的通用性。

authors_text: Kangle Deng,Gengshan Yang,Deva Ramanan,Jun-Yan Zhu
title: 3D-aware Conditional Image Synthesis
title_zh: 3D 感知条件图像合成
abstract: We propose pix2pix3D, a 3D-aware conditional generative model for controllable photorealistic image synthesis. Given a 2D label map, such as a segmentation or edge map, our model learns to synthesize a corresponding image from different viewpoints. To enable explicit 3D user control, we extend conditional generative models with neural radiance fields. Given widely-available monocular images and label map pairs, our model learns to assign a label to every 3D point in addition to color and density, which enables it to render the image and pixel-aligned label map simultaneously. Finally, we build an interactive system that allows users to edit the label map from any viewpoint and generate outputs accordingly.
summary: We propose pix2pix3D, a 3D-aware conditional generative model for controllable photorealistic image synthesis. Given a 2D label map, such as a segmentation or edge map, our model learns to synthesize a corresponding image from different viewpoints. To enable explicit 3D user control, we extend conditional generative models with neural radiance fields. Given widely-available monocular images and label map pairs, our model learns to assign a label to every 3D point in addition to color and density, which enables it to render the image and pixel-aligned label map simultaneously. Finally, we build an interactive system that allows users to edit the label map from any viewpoint and generate outputs accordingly.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 pix2pix3D，一种用于可控真实感图像合成的 3D 感知条件生成模型。给定一个 2D 标签图，例如分割图或边缘图，我们的模型学习从不同的角度合成相应的图像。为了实现显式 3D 用户控制，我们使用神经辐射场扩展条件生成模型。给定广泛可用的单目图像和标签图对，我们的模型除了颜色和密度之外，还学会为每个 3D 点分配标签，这使其能够同时渲染图像和像素对齐的标签图。最后，我们构建了一个交互式系统，允许用户从任何角度编辑标签图并相应地生成输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经辐射场的3D感知条件生成模型pix2pix3D，能够根据2D标签图从不同视角合成逼真图像。
AI.motivation: 现有条件图像生成模型难以实现对3D结构的显式控制，无法支持多视角图像合成与标签图编辑需求。
AI.method: 将神经辐射场（NeRF）扩展至条件生成模型，通过单目图像和标签图对齐学习3D空间中的标签、颜色和密度分布，实现多视角图像与像素级标签图的联合渲染。
AI.result: 模型可从任意视角编辑标签图并生成对应图像，实验表明在多个数据集上优于现有方法，交互系统验证了实时编辑能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现了基于神经辐射场的3D感知条件图像合成，为可控图像生成和三维内容创作提供了新范式。

method: 将神经辐射场（NeRF）扩展至条件生成模型，通过单目图像和标签图对齐学习3D空间中的标签、颜色和密度分布，实现多视角图像与像素级标签图的联合渲染。
result: 模型可从任意视角编辑标签图并生成对应图像，实验表明在多个数据集上优于现有方法，交互系统验证了实时编辑能力。
conclusion: 该方法首次实现了基于神经辐射场的3D感知条件图像合成，为可控图像生成和三维内容创作提供了新范式。
search_text: 3D-aware Conditional Image Synthesis 3D 感知条件图像合成 We propose pix2pix3D, a 3D-aware conditional generative model for controllable photorealistic image synthesis. Given a 2D label map, such as a segmentation or edge map, our model learns to synthesize a corresponding image from different viewpoints. To enable explicit 3D user control, we extend conditional generative models with neural radiance fields. Given widely-available monocular images and label map pairs, our model learns to assign a label to every 3D point in addition to color and density, which enables it to render the image and pixel-aligned label map simultaneously. Finally, we build an interactive system that allows users to edit the label map from any viewpoint and generate outputs accordingly. 我们提出了 pix2pix3D，一种用于可控真实感图像合成的 3D 感知条件生成模型。给定一个 2D 标签图，例如分割图或边缘图，我们的模型学习从不同的角度合成相应的图像。为了实现显式 3D 用户控制，我们使用神经辐射场扩展条件生成模型。给定广泛可用的单目图像和标签图对，我们的模型除了颜色和密度之外，还学会为每个 3D 点分配标签，这使其能够同时渲染图像和像素对齐的标签图。最后，我们构建了一个交互式系统，允许用户从任何角度编辑标签图并相应地生成输出。 本文提出了一种基于神经辐射场的3D感知条件生成模型pix2pix3D，能够根据2D标签图从不同视角合成逼真图像。 Kangle Deng,Gengshan Yang,Deva Ramanan,Jun-Yan Zhu cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Romain Xu-Darme,Georges Quénot,Zakaria Chihani,Marie-Christine Rousset
title: Sanity checks and improvements for patch visualisation in prototype-based image classification
title_zh: 基于原型的图像分类中补丁可视化的健全性检查和改进
abstract: In this work, we perform an in-depth analysis of the visualisation methods implemented in two popular self-explaining models for visual classification based on prototypes - ProtoPNet and ProtoTree. Using two fine-grained datasets (CUB-200-2011 and Stanford Cars), we first show that such methods do not correctly identify the regions of interest inside of the images, and therefore do not reflect the model behaviour. Secondly, using a deletion metric, we demonstrate quantitatively that saliency methods such as Smoothgrads or PRP provide more faithful image patches. We also propose a new relevance metric based on the segmentation of the object provided in some datasets (e.g. CUB-200-2011) and show that the imprecise patch visualisations generated by ProtoPNet and ProtoTree can create a false sense of bias that can be mitigated by the use of more faithful methods. Finally, we discuss the implications of our findings for other prototype-based models sharing the same visualisation method.
summary: In this work, we perform an in-depth analysis of the visualisation methods implemented in two popular self-explaining models for visual classification based on prototypes - ProtoPNet and ProtoTree. Using two fine-grained datasets (CUB-200-2011 and Stanford Cars), we first show that such methods do not correctly identify the regions of interest inside of the images, and therefore do not reflect the model behaviour. Secondly, using a deletion metric, we demonstrate quantitatively that saliency methods such as Smoothgrads or PRP provide more faithful image patches. We also propose a new relevance metric based on the segmentation of the object provided in some datasets (e.g. CUB-200-2011) and show that the imprecise patch visualisations generated by ProtoPNet and ProtoTree can create a false sense of bias that can be mitigated by the use of more faithful methods. Finally, we discuss the implications of our findings for other prototype-based models sharing the same visualisation method.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们对两种流行的基于原型的自解释视觉分类模型（ProtoPNet 和 ProtoTree）中实现的可视化方法进行了深入分析。使用两个细粒度数据集（CUB-200-2011 和斯坦福汽车），我们首先表明此类方法不能正确识别图像内部的感兴趣区域，因此不能反映模型行为。其次，使用删除度量，我们定量地证明了 Smoothgrads 或 PRP 等显着性方法提供了更忠实的图像补丁。我们还基于某些数据集（例如 CUB-200-2011）中提供的对象分割提出了一种新的相关性度量，并表明由 ProtoPNet 和 ProtoTree 生成的不精确的补丁可视化可能会产生错误的偏差感，可以通过使用更忠实的方法来减轻这种偏差。最后，我们讨论了我们的发现对共享相同可视化方法的其他基于原型的模型的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于原型的图像分类模型（ProtoPNet和ProtoTree）的补丁可视化方法进行了深入分析，并提出了改进方案。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化方法可能无法准确反映模型行为，导致对模型决策的误解，需通过验证和改进提高可视化可靠性。
AI.method: 使用CUB-200-2011和Stanford Cars数据集，结合删除度量法评估可视化方法，并提出基于物体分割的新相关性度量。
AI.result: 发现ProtoPNet和ProtoTree的可视化方法存在偏差，而Smoothgrads等方法更可靠，新度量可缓解虚假偏见问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果对其他采用类似可视化的原型模型具有重要参考价值，需谨慎选择和验证可视化技术。

authors_text: Georgy Noarov,Aaron Roth
title: The Scope of Multicalibration: Characterizing Multicalibration via Property Elicitation
title_zh: 多重校准的范围：通过属性导出表征多重校准
abstract: We make a connection between multicalibration and property elicitation and show that (under mild technical conditions) it is possible to produce a multicalibrated predictor for a continuous scalar distributional property $Γ$ if and only if $Γ$ is elicitable. On the negative side, we show that for non-elicitable continuous properties there exist simple data distributions on which even the true distributional predictor is not calibrated. On the positive side, for elicitable $Γ$, we give simple canonical algorithms for the batch and the online adversarial setting, that learn a $Γ$-multicalibrated predictor. This generalizes past work on multicalibrated means and quantiles, and in fact strengthens existing online quantile multicalibration results. To further counter-weigh our negative result, we show that if a property $Γ^1$ is not elicitable by itself, but is elicitable conditionally on another elicitable property $Γ^0$, then there is a canonical algorithm that jointly multicalibrates $Γ^1$ and $Γ^0$; this generalizes past work on mean-moment multicalibration. Finally, as applications of our theory, we provide novel algorithmic and impossibility results for fair (multicalibrated) risk assessment.
summary: We make a connection between multicalibration and property elicitation and show that (under mild technical conditions) it is possible to produce a multicalibrated predictor for a continuous scalar distributional property $Γ$ if and only if $Γ$ is elicitable. On the negative side, we show that for non-elicitable continuous properties there exist simple data distributions on which even the true distributional predictor is not calibrated. On the positive side, for elicitable $Γ$, we give simple canonical algorithms for the batch and the online adversarial setting, that learn a $Γ$-multicalibrated predictor. This generalizes past work on multicalibrated means and quantiles, and in fact strengthens existing online quantile multicalibration results. To further counter-weigh our negative result, we show that if a property $Γ^1$ is not elicitable by itself, but is elicitable conditionally on another elicitable property $Γ^0$, then there is a canonical algorithm that jointly multicalibrates $Γ^1$ and $Γ^0$; this generalizes past work on mean-moment multicalibration. Finally, as applications of our theory, we provide novel algorithmic and impossibility results for fair (multicalibrated) risk assessment.
abstract_zh: 我们在多重校准和属性导出之间建立了联系，并表明（在温和的技术条件下）当且仅当 $Γ$ 可导出时，才有可能为连续标量分布属性 $Γ$ 生成多重校准预测器。从消极的一面来看，我们表明，对于不可导出的连续属性，存在简单的数据分布，甚至真实的分布预测器也没有被校准。从积极的一面来看，对于可导出的$Γ$，我们为批次和在线对抗性设置提供了简单的规范算法，该算法学习$Γ$-多校准预测器。这概括了过去关于多重校准手段和分位数的工作，并且实际上加强了现有的在线分位数多重校准结果。为了进一步权衡我们的负面结果，我们证明，如果一个属性$ ^ 1 $本身不可导出，但可以在另一个可导出属性$ ^ 0 $上有条件地导出，则存在一个联合多重校准$ Г ^ 1 $和$ Г ^ 0 $的规范算法；这概括了过去关于平均矩多重校准的工作。最后，作为我们理论的应用，我们为公平（多重校准）风险评估提供了新颖的算法和不可能结果。

AI.tldr: 本文通过属性激励理论分析多校准的适用范围，探讨了连续标量分布属性Γ的多校准预测器存在的充要条件，并提出相关算法。
AI.motivation: 多校准在机器学习公平性中至关重要，但其理论边界尚不明确。本文旨在通过属性激励理论建立多校准的数学表征，解决非可激励属性的校准难题。
AI.method: 将多校准与属性激励理论结合，分析可激励属性Γ的多校准条件，设计批量与在线对抗场景下的通用算法，并扩展至条件可激励属性的联合校准。
AI.result: 证明Γ多校准存在的充要条件为Γ可激励；对非可激励属性给出反例；提出通用算法并改进在线分位数校准结果；扩展至条件可激励属性的联合校准框架。
AI.conclusion: 多校准的可行性依赖属性的可激励性，该理论为公平风险评估提供了算法设计依据与不可行性边界，推动了校准理论的系统化发展。

authors_text: Renjie Li,Chun Yu Lao,Rebecca St. George,Katherine Lawler,Saurabh Garg,Son N. Tran,Quan Bai,Jane Alty
title: Rapid-Motion-Track: Markerless Tracking of Fast Human Motion with Deeper Learning
title_zh: Rapid-Motion-Track：通过更深入的学习对快速人体运动进行无标记跟踪
abstract: Objective The coordination of human movement directly reflects function of the central nervous system. Small deficits in movement are often the first sign of an underlying neurological problem. The objective of this research is to develop a new end-to-end, deep learning-based system, Rapid-Motion-Track (RMT) that can track the fastest human movement accurately when webcams or laptop cameras are used. Materials and Methods We applied RMT to finger tapping, a well-validated test of motor control that is one of the most challenging human motions to track with computer vision due to the small keypoints of digits and the high velocities that are generated. We recorded 160 finger tapping assessments simultaneously with a standard 2D laptop camera (30 frames/sec) and a high-speed wearable sensor-based 3D motion tracking system (250 frames/sec). RMT and a range of DLC models were applied to the video data with tapping frequencies up to 8Hz to extract movement features. Results The movement features (e.g. speed, rhythm, variance) identified with the new RMT system exhibited very high concurrent validity with the gold-standard measurements (97.3\% of RMT measures were within +/-0.5Hz of the Optotrak measures), and outperformed DLC and other advanced computer vision tools (around 88.2\% of DLC measures were within +/-0.5Hz of the Optotrak measures). RMT also accurately tracked a range of other rapid human movements such as foot tapping, head turning and sit-to -stand movements. Conclusion: With the ubiquity of video technology in smart devices, the RMT method holds potential to transform access and accuracy of human movement assessment.
summary: Objective The coordination of human movement directly reflects function of the central nervous system. Small deficits in movement are often the first sign of an underlying neurological problem. The objective of this research is to develop a new end-to-end, deep learning-based system, Rapid-Motion-Track (RMT) that can track the fastest human movement accurately when webcams or laptop cameras are used. Materials and Methods We applied RMT to finger tapping, a well-validated test of motor control that is one of the most challenging human motions to track with computer vision due to the small keypoints of digits and the high velocities that are generated. We recorded 160 finger tapping assessments simultaneously with a standard 2D laptop camera (30 frames/sec) and a high-speed wearable sensor-based 3D motion tracking system (250 frames/sec). RMT and a range of DLC models were applied to the video data with tapping frequencies up to 8Hz to extract movement features. Results The movement features (e.g. speed, rhythm, variance) identified with the new RMT system exhibited very high concurrent validity with the gold-standard measurements (97.3\% of RMT measures were within +/-0.5Hz of the Optotrak measures), and outperformed DLC and other advanced computer vision tools (around 88.2\% of DLC measures were within +/-0.5Hz of the Optotrak measures). RMT also accurately tracked a range of other rapid human movements such as foot tapping, head turning and sit-to -stand movements. Conclusion: With the ubiquity of video technology in smart devices, the RMT method holds potential to transform access and accuracy of human movement assessment.
abstract_zh: 目的人体运动的协调性直接反映中枢神经系统的功能。轻微的运动缺陷通常是潜在神经系统问题的第一个迹象。这项研究的目的是开发一种新的基于深度学习的端到端系统，即快速运动跟踪（RMT），该系统可以在使用网络摄像头或笔记本电脑摄像头时准确跟踪最快的人体运动。材料和方法我们将 RMT 应用于手指敲击，这是一种经过充分验证的运动控制测试，由于手指的关键点较小且生成的速度较高，因此是计算机视觉跟踪最具挑战性的人体运动之一。我们使用标准 2D 笔记本电脑摄像头（30 帧/秒）和基于高速可穿戴传感器的 3D 运动跟踪系统（250 帧/秒）同时记录了 160 次手指敲击评估。 RMT 和一系列 DLC 模型被应用于视频数据，点击频率高达 8Hz，以提取运动特征。结果 新 RMT 系统识别的运动特征（例如速度、节奏、方差）与黄金标准测量结果表现出非常高的并发有效性（97.3% 的 RMT 测量值在 Optotrak 测量值的 +/-0.5Hz 范围内），并且优于 DLC 和其他先进的计算机视觉工具（大约 88.2% 的 DLC 测量值在 Optotrak 测量值的 +/-0.5Hz 范围内）。 RMT 还准确地跟踪了一系列其他快速的人体运动，例如拍脚、转头和从坐到站的动作。结论：随着视频技术在智能设备中的普遍存在，RMT 方法有可能改变人体运动评估的访问和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的端到端系统Rapid-Motion-Track（RMT），用于通过普通摄像头实现快速人体运动的无标记跟踪。
AI.motivation: 人体运动协调性可反映中枢神经系统功能，细微运动缺陷是神经病变的早期信号。现有计算机视觉方法难以准确捕捉高速小关节运动（如手指敲击），需开发更精准且适用于普通设备的跟踪技术。
AI.method: 将RMT与深度学习模型（DLC）对比，使用普通摄像头（30fps）和高速传感器（250fps）同步采集160例手指敲击数据，测试RMT在最高8Hz频率下的运动特征提取能力（如速度、节奏、方差）。
AI.result: RMT运动特征与金标准Optotrak测量结果一致性达97.3%（误差±0.5Hz），显著优于DLC的88.2%，且能准确跟踪足部敲击、头部转动等其他快速运动。
AI.conclusion: RMT利用普及的视频技术可提升人体运动评估的可及性与准确性，为神经疾病早期筛查提供潜在工具。

RMT also accurately tracked a range of other rapid human movements such as foot tapping, head turning and sit-to -stand movements. Conclusion: With the ubiquity of video technology in smart devices, the RMT method holds potential to transform access and accuracy of human movement assessment. 目的人体运动的协调性直接反映中枢神经系统的功能。轻微的运动缺陷通常是潜在神经系统问题的第一个迹象。这项研究的目的是开发一种新的基于深度学习的端到端系统，即快速运动跟踪（RMT），该系统可以在使用网络摄像头或笔记本电脑摄像头时准确跟踪最快的人体运动。材料和方法我们将 RMT 应用于手指敲击，这是一种经过充分验证的运动控制测试，由于手指的关键点较小且生成的速度较高，因此是计算机视觉跟踪最具挑战性的人体运动之一。我们使用标准 2D 笔记本电脑摄像头（30 帧/秒）和基于高速可穿戴传感器的 3D 运动跟踪系统（250 帧/秒）同时记录了 160 次手指敲击评估。 RMT 和一系列 DLC 模型被应用于视频数据，点击频率高达 8Hz，以提取运动特征。结果 新 RMT 系统识别的运动特征（例如速度、节奏、方差）与黄金标准测量结果表现出非常高的并发有效性（97.3% 的 RMT 测量值在 Optotrak 测量值的 +/-0.5Hz 范围内），并且优于 DLC 和其他先进的计算机视觉工具（大约 88.2% 的 DLC 测量值在 Optotrak 测量值的 +/-0.5Hz 范围内）。 RMT 还准确地跟踪了一系列其他快速的人体运动，例如拍脚、转头和从坐到站的动作。结论：随着视频技术在智能设备中的普遍存在，RMT 方法有可能改变人体运动评估的访问和准确性。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的端到端系统Rapid-Motion-Track（RMT），用于通过普通摄像头实现快速人体运动的无标记跟踪。 Renjie Li,Chun Yu Lao,Rebecca St. George,Katherine Lawler,Saurabh Garg,Son N. authors_text: Chung-Yi Weng,Pratul P. Srinivasan,Brian Curless,Ira Kemelmacher-Shlizerman
title: PersonNeRF: Personalized Reconstruction from Photo Collections
title_zh: PersonNeRF：从照片集进行个性化重建
abstract: We present PersonNeRF, a method that takes a collection of photos of a subject (e.g. Roger Federer) captured across multiple years with arbitrary body poses and appearances, and enables rendering the subject with arbitrary novel combinations of viewpoint, body pose, and appearance. PersonNeRF builds a customized neural volumetric 3D model of the subject that is able to render an entire space spanned by camera viewpoint, body pose, and appearance. A central challenge in this task is dealing with sparse observations; a given body pose is likely only observed by a single viewpoint with a single appearance, and a given appearance is only observed under a handful of different body poses. We address this issue by recovering a canonical T-pose neural volumetric representation of the subject that allows for changing appearance across different observations, but uses a shared pose-dependent motion field across all observations. We demonstrate that this approach, along with regularization of the recovered volumetric geometry to encourage smoothness, is able to recover a model that renders compelling images from novel combinations of viewpoint, pose, and appearance from these challenging unstructured photo collections, outperforming prior work for free-viewpoint human rendering.
summary: We present PersonNeRF, a method that takes a collection of photos of a subject (e.g. Roger Federer) captured across multiple years with arbitrary body poses and appearances, and enables rendering the subject with arbitrary novel combinations of viewpoint, body pose, and appearance. PersonNeRF builds a customized neural volumetric 3D model of the subject that is able to render an entire space spanned by camera viewpoint, body pose, and appearance. A central challenge in this task is dealing with sparse observations; a given body pose is likely only observed by a single viewpoint with a single appearance, and a given appearance is only observed under a handful of different body poses. We address this issue by recovering a canonical T-pose neural volumetric representation of the subject that allows for changing appearance across different observations, but uses a shared pose-dependent motion field across all observations. We demonstrate that this approach, along with regularization of the recovered volumetric geometry to encourage smoothness, is able to recover a model that renders compelling images from novel combinations of viewpoint, pose, and appearance from these challenging unstructured photo collections, outperforming prior work for free-viewpoint human rendering.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PersonNeRF，一种方法，可以拍摄多年来以任意身体姿势和外观拍摄的主题（例如罗杰·费德勒）的照片集合，并能够使用视点、身体姿势和外观的任意新颖组合来渲染主题。 PersonNeRF 构建了对象的定制神经体积 3D 模型，能够渲染由相机视点、身体姿势和外观跨越的整个空间。这项任务的一个核心挑战是处理稀疏观测值。给定的身体姿势可能只能通过具有单一外观的单一视点观察到，并且给定的外观只能在少数不同的身体姿势下观察到。我们通过恢复对象的规范 T 姿势神经体积表示来解决这个问题，该表示允许在不同观察中改变外观，但在所有观察中使用共享的依赖于姿势的运动场。我们证明，这种方法以及对恢复的体积几何进行正则化以促进平滑度，能够恢复一个模型，该模型可以从这些具有挑战性的非结构化照片集中的视点、姿势和外观的新颖组合中渲染引人注目的图像，优于之前的自由视点人体渲染工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PersonNeRF方法，通过多视角、多姿态和多外观的图像集合，构建个性化神经体素模型，实现对目标人物的新视角、姿态和外观组合的高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理稀疏观测数据（同一姿态仅对应单一视角和外观，同一外观仅对应少量姿态），导致无法生成多样化的新型渲染结果。
AI.method: 通过恢复目标人物的规范T姿态神经体素表示，结合跨观测的共享姿态依赖运动场和几何正则化，解决稀疏观测下的姿态-外观解耦问题。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的非结构化图像集合上，该方法在新颖视角、姿态和外观组合的渲染任务中优于现有方法，生成更具真实感的图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过规范姿态表示与几何正则化的结合，PersonNeRF有效解决了稀疏观测下的个性化重建问题，为自由视角人体渲染提供了新思路。

authors_text: Anis Bourou,Auguste Genovesio
title: Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation with Limited Data to Reveal Subtle Phenotypes
title_zh: 用有限的数据进行不配对的图像到图像的翻译来揭示微妙的表型
abstract: Unpaired image-to-image translation methods aim at learning a mapping of images from a source domain to a target domain. Recently, these methods proved to be very useful in biological applications to display subtle phenotypic cell variations otherwise invisible to the human eye. However, current models require a large number of images to be trained, while mostmicroscopy experiments remain limited in the number of images they can produce. In this work, we present an improved CycleGAN architecture that employs self-supervised discriminators to alleviate the need for numerous images. We demonstrate quantitatively and qualitatively that the proposed approach outperforms the CycleGAN baseline, including when it is combined with differentiable augmentations. We also provide results obtained with small biological datasets on obvious and non-obvious cell phenotype variations, demonstrating a straightforward application of this method.
summary: Unpaired image-to-image translation methods aim at learning a mapping of images from a source domain to a target domain. Recently, these methods proved to be very useful in biological applications to display subtle phenotypic cell variations otherwise invisible to the human eye. However, current models require a large number of images to be trained, while mostmicroscopy experiments remain limited in the number of images they can produce. In this work, we present an improved CycleGAN architecture that employs self-supervised discriminators to alleviate the need for numerous images. We demonstrate quantitatively and qualitatively that the proposed approach outperforms the CycleGAN baseline, including when it is combined with differentiable augmentations. We also provide results obtained with small biological datasets on obvious and non-obvious cell phenotype variations, demonstrating a straightforward application of this method.
abstract_zh: 不成对的图像到图像转换方法旨在学习图像从源域到目标域的映射。最近，这些方法被证明在生物应用中非常有用，可以显示人眼看不见的微妙表型细胞变化。然而，当前的模型需要大量图像进行训练，而大多数显微镜实验所能产生的图像数量仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种改进的 CycleGAN 架构，它采用自监督判别器来减轻对大量图像的需求。我们从数量和质量上证明，所提出的方法优于 CycleGAN 基线，包括当它与可微增强相结合时。我们还提供了通过小型生物数据集获得的关于明显和不明显细胞表型变异的结果，证明了该方法的直接应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的CycleGAN架构，用于在有限数据条件下进行无配对图像到图像转换，以揭示细胞的细微表型差异。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要大量图像数据，但生物显微镜实验通常数据有限，因此需要一种能在小数据下有效工作的图像转换方法。
AI.method: 采用改进的CycleGAN架构，引入自监督判别器，并结合可微分增强技术，以减少对大量训练数据的依赖。
AI.result: 定量和定性结果表明，该方法在小数据集上优于传统CycleGAN，能有效揭示明显和非明显的细胞表型变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在有限数据条件下进行生物图像转换提供了有效解决方案，适用于揭示细胞细微表型差异。

authors_text: Jakob Mökander,Jonas Schuett,Hannah Rose Kirk,Luciano Floridi
title: Auditing large language models: a three-layered approach
title_zh: 审核大型语言模型：三层方法
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) represent a major advance in artificial intelligence (AI) research. However, the widespread use of LLMs is also coupled with significant ethical and social challenges. Previous research has pointed towards auditing as a promising governance mechanism to help ensure that AI systems are designed and deployed in ways that are ethical, legal, and technically robust. However, existing auditing procedures fail to address the governance challenges posed by LLMs, which display emergent capabilities and are adaptable to a wide range of downstream tasks. In this article, we address that gap by outlining a novel blueprint for how to audit LLMs. Specifically, we propose a three-layered approach, whereby governance audits (of technology providers that design and disseminate LLMs), model audits (of LLMs after pre-training but prior to their release), and application audits (of applications based on LLMs) complement and inform each other. We show how audits, when conducted in a structured and coordinated manner on all three levels, can be a feasible and effective mechanism for identifying and managing some of the ethical and social risks posed by LLMs. However, it is important to remain realistic about what auditing can reasonably be expected to achieve. Therefore, we discuss the limitations not only of our three-layered approach but also of the prospect of auditing LLMs at all. Ultimately, this article seeks to expand the methodological toolkit available to technology providers and policymakers who wish to analyse and evaluate LLMs from technical, ethical, and legal perspectives.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) represent a major advance in artificial intelligence (AI) research. However, the widespread use of LLMs is also coupled with significant ethical and social challenges. Previous research has pointed towards auditing as a promising governance mechanism to help ensure that AI systems are designed and deployed in ways that are ethical, legal, and technically robust. However, existing auditing procedures fail to address the governance challenges posed by LLMs, which display emergent capabilities and are adaptable to a wide range of downstream tasks. In this article, we address that gap by outlining a novel blueprint for how to audit LLMs. Specifically, we propose a three-layered approach, whereby governance audits (of technology providers that design and disseminate LLMs), model audits (of LLMs after pre-training but prior to their release), and application audits (of applications based on LLMs) complement and inform each other. We show how audits, when conducted in a structured and coordinated manner on all three levels, can be a feasible and effective mechanism for identifying and managing some of the ethical and social risks posed by LLMs. However, it is important to remain realistic about what auditing can reasonably be expected to achieve. Therefore, we discuss the limitations not only of our three-layered approach but also of the prospect of auditing LLMs at all. Ultimately, this article seeks to expand the methodological toolkit available to technology providers and policymakers who wish to analyse and evaluate LLMs from technical, ethical, and legal perspectives.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 代表了人工智能 (AI) 研究的重大进步。然而，法学硕士的广泛使用也带来了重大的道德和社会挑战。先前的研究指出，审计是一种很有前景的治理机制，有助于确保人工智能系统的设计和部署符合道德、合法和技术上的稳健性。然而，现有的审计程序无法解决法学硕士带来的治理挑战，法学硕士显示出新兴的能力并适应广泛的下游任务。在本文中，我们通过概述如何审计法学硕士的新颖蓝图来解决这一差距。具体来说，我们提出了一种三层方法，其中治理审计（设计和传播法学硕士的技术提供商）、模型审计（法学硕士在预培训后但发布之前）和应用程序审计（基于法学硕士的应用程序）相互补充和通报。我们展示了在所有三个层面上以结构化和协调的方式进行审计时，如何成为识别和管理法学硕士带来的一些道德和社会风险的可行且有效的机制。然而，重要的是要对审计合理预期达到的目标保持现实态度。因此，我们不仅讨论了三层方法的局限性，而且还讨论了审计法学硕士的前景。最终，本文旨在扩展希望从技术、道德和法律角度分析和评估法学硕士的技术提供商和政策制定者可用的方法工具包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大型语言模型（LLMs）的三层审计框架，以应对现有审计方法无法有效管理LLMs带来的伦理和社会风险的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs的广泛应用，其带来的伦理和社会挑战日益显著，而现有审计流程未能有效应对LLMs的复杂性和适应性问题。
AI.method: 设计三层审计体系：治理审计（针对技术提供商）、模型审计（预训练后至发布前的模型）和应用审计（基于LLMs的应用场景），通过协调三层次审计实现风险管控。
AI.result: 三层审计框架可有效识别和管理LLMs的部分伦理风险，但需正视审计本身的局限性及技术可行性边界。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为技术提供者和政策制定者提供了从技术、伦理和法律多维度评估LLMs的方法论工具，同时强调需理性看待审计的效能边界。

authors_text: Devansh Saxena,Erina Seh-Young Moon,Aryan Chaurasia,Yixin Guan,Shion Guha
title: Rethinking "Risk" in Algorithmic Systems Through A Computational Narrative Analysis of Casenotes in Child-Welfare
title_zh: 通过儿童福利案例的计算叙事分析重新思考算法系统中的“风险”
abstract: Risk assessment algorithms are being adopted by public sector agencies to make high-stakes decisions about human lives. Algorithms model "risk" based on individual client characteristics to identify clients most in need. However, this understanding of risk is primarily based on easily quantifiable risk factors that present an incomplete and biased perspective of clients. We conducted a computational narrative analysis of child-welfare casenotes and draw attention to deeper systemic risk factors that are hard to quantify but directly impact families and street-level decision-making. We found that beyond individual risk factors, the system itself poses a significant amount of risk where parents are over-surveilled by caseworkers and lack agency in decision-making processes. We also problematize the notion of risk as a static construct by highlighting the temporality and mediating effects of different risk, protective, systemic, and procedural factors. Finally, we draw caution against using casenotes in NLP-based systems by unpacking their limitations and biases embedded within them.
summary: Risk assessment algorithms are being adopted by public sector agencies to make high-stakes decisions about human lives. Algorithms model "risk" based on individual client characteristics to identify clients most in need. However, this understanding of risk is primarily based on easily quantifiable risk factors that present an incomplete and biased perspective of clients. We conducted a computational narrative analysis of child-welfare casenotes and draw attention to deeper systemic risk factors that are hard to quantify but directly impact families and street-level decision-making. We found that beyond individual risk factors, the system itself poses a significant amount of risk where parents are over-surveilled by caseworkers and lack agency in decision-making processes. We also problematize the notion of risk as a static construct by highlighting the temporality and mediating effects of different risk, protective, systemic, and procedural factors. Finally, we draw caution against using casenotes in NLP-based systems by unpacking their limitations and biases embedded within them.
abstract_zh: 公共部门机构正在采用风险评估算法来做出关乎人类生命的高风险决策。算法根据个人客户特征对“风险”进行建模，以识别最需要的客户。然而，这种对风险的理解主要基于容易量化的风险因素，这些因素呈现出客户不完整且有偏见的观点。我们对儿童福利案例进行了计算性叙述分析，并提请人们注意难以量化但直接影响家庭和街头决策的更深层次的系统性风险因素。我们发现，除了个人风险因素之外，系统本身也带来了很大的风险，因为父母受到社会工作者的过度监督，并且在决策过程中缺乏代理权。我们还通过强调不同风险、保护性、系统性和程序性因素的暂时性和中介效应，对风险作为静态结构的概念提出了问题。最后，我们通过解开案例笔记中嵌入的局限性和偏见来警告不要在基于 NLP 的系统中使用案例笔记。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算叙事分析儿童福利案例笔记，重新审视算法系统中‘风险’的定义，揭示现有风险评估模型的不足并提出系统性风险因素。
AI.motivation: 现有风险评估算法过度依赖可量化的个体特征，导致风险判断存在偏差和不完整性，需探索更全面的系统性风险分析方法。
AI.method: 采用计算叙事分析技术，对儿童福利领域的案例笔记进行文本挖掘与分析，结合系统性因素与动态风险变量进行研究。
AI.result: 发现系统性风险因素（如过度监控、决策权缺失）对家庭影响显著，风险具有动态性且受多重因素中介，案例笔记本身存在偏见与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需谨慎使用案例笔记构建NLP系统，应重新定义风险为动态多维概念，关注结构性不平等与决策过程中的权力关系。

search_text: Rethinking "Risk" in Algorithmic Systems Through A Computational Narrative Analysis of Casenotes in Child-Welfare 通过儿童福利案例的计算叙事分析重新思考算法系统中的“风险” Risk assessment algorithms are being adopted by public sector agencies to make high-stakes decisions about human lives. Algorithms model "risk" based on individual client characteristics to identify clients most in need. However, this understanding of risk is primarily based on easily quantifiable risk factors that present an incomplete and biased perspective of clients. We conducted a computational narrative analysis of child-welfare casenotes and draw attention to deeper systemic risk factors that are hard to quantify but directly impact families and street-level decision-making. We found that beyond individual risk factors, the system itself poses a significant amount of risk where parents are over-surveilled by caseworkers and lack agency in decision-making processes. We also problematize the notion of risk as a static construct by highlighting the temporality and mediating effects of different risk, protective, systemic, and procedural factors. Finally, we draw caution against using casenotes in NLP-based systems by unpacking their limitations and biases embedded within them. 公共部门机构正在采用风险评估算法来做出关乎人类生命的高风险决策。算法根据个人客户特征对“风险”进行建模，以识别最需要的客户。然而，这种对风险的理解主要基于容易量化的风险因素，这些因素呈现出客户不完整且有偏见的观点。我们对儿童福利案例进行了计算性叙述分析，并提请人们注意难以量化但直接影响家庭和街头决策的更深层次的系统性风险因素。我们发现，除了个人风险因素之外，系统本身也带来了很大的风险，因为父母受到社会工作者的过度监督，并且在决策过程中缺乏代理权。我们还通过强调不同风险、保护性、系统性和程序性因素的暂时性和中介效应，对风险作为静态结构的概念提出了问题。最后，我们通过解开案例笔记中嵌入的局限性和偏见来警告不要在基于 NLP 的系统中使用案例笔记。 本文通过计算叙事分析儿童福利案例笔记，重新审视算法系统中‘风险’的定义，揭示现有风险评估模型的不足并提出系统性风险因素。 Devansh Saxena,Erina Seh-Young Moon,Aryan Chaurasia,Yixin Guan,Shion Guha cs.HC

authors_text: Scott Howland,Lara Kassab,Keerti Kappagantula,Henry Kvinge,Tegan Emerson
title: Parameters, Properties, and Process: Conditional Neural Generation of Realistic SEM Imagery Towards ML-assisted Advanced Manufacturing
title_zh: 参数、属性和过程：通过条件神经生成逼真的 SEM 图像，实现 ML 辅助的先进制造
abstract: The research and development cycle of advanced manufacturing processes traditionally requires a large investment of time and resources. Experiments can be expensive and are hence conducted on relatively small scales. This poses problems for typically data-hungry machine learning tools which could otherwise expedite the development cycle. We build upon prior work by applying conditional generative adversarial networks (GANs) to scanning electron microscope (SEM) imagery from an emerging manufacturing process, shear assisted processing and extrusion (ShAPE). We generate realistic images conditioned on temper and either experimental parameters or material properties. In doing so, we are able to integrate machine learning into the development cycle, by allowing a user to immediately visualize the microstructure that would arise from particular process parameters or properties. This work forms a technical backbone for a fundamentally new approach for understanding manufacturing processes in the absence of first-principle models. By characterizing microstructure from a topological perspective we are able to evaluate our models' ability to capture the breadth and diversity of experimental scanning electron microscope (SEM) samples. Our method is successful in capturing the visual and general microstructural features arising from the considered process, with analysis highlighting directions to further improve the topological realism of our synthetic imagery.
summary: The research and development cycle of advanced manufacturing processes traditionally requires a large investment of time and resources. Experiments can be expensive and are hence conducted on relatively small scales. This poses problems for typically data-hungry machine learning tools which could otherwise expedite the development cycle. We build upon prior work by applying conditional generative adversarial networks (GANs) to scanning electron microscope (SEM) imagery from an emerging manufacturing process, shear assisted processing and extrusion (ShAPE). We generate realistic images conditioned on temper and either experimental parameters or material properties. In doing so, we are able to integrate machine learning into the development cycle, by allowing a user to immediately visualize the microstructure that would arise from particular process parameters or properties. This work forms a technical backbone for a fundamentally new approach for understanding manufacturing processes in the absence of first-principle models. By characterizing microstructure from a topological perspective we are able to evaluate our models' ability to capture the breadth and diversity of experimental scanning electron microscope (SEM) samples. Our method is successful in capturing the visual and general microstructural features arising from the considered process, with analysis highlighting directions to further improve the topological realism of our synthetic imagery.
abstract_zh: 传统上，先进制造工艺的研发周期需要投入大量的时间和资源。实验可能很昂贵，因此是在相对较小的规模上进行的。这给通常需要大量数据的机器学习工具带来了问题，否则这些工具可能会加快开发周期。我们在之前的工作基础上，将条件生成对抗网络 (GAN) 应用于新兴制造工艺、剪切辅助加工和挤压 (ShAPE) 的扫描电子显微镜 (SEM) 图像。我们根据脾气和实验参数或材料特性生成逼真的图像。在此过程中，我们能够将机器学习集成到开发周期中，允许用户立即可视化由特定工艺参数或属性产生的微观结构。这项工作为在缺乏第一原理模型的情况下理解制造过程的全新方法奠定了技术支柱。通过从拓扑角度表征微观结构，我们能够评估我们的模型捕获实验扫描电子显微镜 (SEM) 样品的广度和多样性的能力。我们的方法成功地捕捉了所考虑过程中产生的视觉和一般微观结构特征，并通过分析突出了进一步提高合成图像的拓扑真实性的方向。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出基于条件生成对抗网络（GAN）生成真实扫描电子显微镜（SEM）图像，以加速先进制造工艺的开发周期。
AI.motivation: 先进制造工艺的研发周期需要大量时间和资源，实验成本高且数据量不足，难以满足机器学习工具对数据的需求。
AI.method: 采用条件GAN模型，以温度、实验参数或材料属性为条件，生成与剪切辅助加工和挤出（ShAPE）工艺相关的SEM图像。
AI.result: 模型成功捕捉了工艺产生的微观结构特征，但合成图像的拓扑真实性仍有提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无第一性原理模型的情况下理解制造工艺提供了技术基础，并可集成到开发流程中以辅助微结构可视化。

authors_text: Ryosuke Hyodo,Teppei Nakano,Tetsuji Ogawa
title: Deep Multi-stream Network for Video-based Calving Sign Detection
title_zh: 用于基于视频的产犊迹象检测的深度多流网络
abstract: We have designed a deep multi-stream network for automatically detecting calving signs from video. Calving sign detection from a camera, which is a non-contact sensor, is expected to enable more efficient livestock management. As large-scale, well-developed data cannot generally be assumed when establishing calving detection systems, the basis for making the prediction needs to be presented to farmers during operation, so black-box modeling (also known as end-to-end modeling) is not appropriate. For practical operation of calving detection systems, the present study aims to incorporate expert knowledge into a deep neural network. To this end, we propose a multi-stream calving sign detection network in which multiple calving-related features are extracted from the corresponding feature extraction networks designed for each attribute with different characteristics, such as a cow's posture, rotation, and movement, known as calving signs, and are then integrated appropriately depending on the cow's situation. Experimental comparisons conducted using videos of 15 cows demonstrated that our multi-stream system yielded a significant improvement over the end-to-end system, and the multi-stream architecture significantly contributed to a reduction in detection errors. In addition, the distinctive mixture weights we observed helped provide interpretability of the system's behavior.
summary: We have designed a deep multi-stream network for automatically detecting calving signs from video. Calving sign detection from a camera, which is a non-contact sensor, is expected to enable more efficient livestock management. As large-scale, well-developed data cannot generally be assumed when establishing calving detection systems, the basis for making the prediction needs to be presented to farmers during operation, so black-box modeling (also known as end-to-end modeling) is not appropriate. For practical operation of calving detection systems, the present study aims to incorporate expert knowledge into a deep neural network. To this end, we propose a multi-stream calving sign detection network in which multiple calving-related features are extracted from the corresponding feature extraction networks designed for each attribute with different characteristics, such as a cow's posture, rotation, and movement, known as calving signs, and are then integrated appropriately depending on the cow's situation. Experimental comparisons conducted using videos of 15 cows demonstrated that our multi-stream system yielded a significant improvement over the end-to-end system, and the multi-stream architecture significantly contributed to a reduction in detection errors. In addition, the distinctive mixture weights we observed helped provide interpretability of the system's behavior.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一个深度多流网络，用于自动检测视频中的产犊迹象。通过摄像头（一种非接触式传感器）进行产犊迹象检测有望实现更高效的牲畜管理。由于在建立产犊检测系统时一般无法假设大规模、完善的数据，因此需要在操作过程中向农民提供进行预测的依据，因此黑盒建模（也称为端到端建模）是不合适的。对于产犊检测系统的实际操作，本研究旨在将专家知识纳入深度神经网络。为此，我们提出了一种多流产犊迹象检测网络，其中从针对具有不同特征的每个属性设计的相应特征提取网络中提取多个与产犊相关的特征，例如奶牛的姿势、旋转和运动，称为产犊迹象，然后根据奶牛的情况适当地进行集成。使用 15 头奶牛的视频进行的实验比较表明，我们的多流系统比端到端系统有了显着的改进，并且多流架构显着有助于减少检测错误。此外，我们观察到的独特的混合权重有助于提供系统行为的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种深度多流网络，用于从视频中自动检测分娩迹象，以提升牲畜管理的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统端到端模型缺乏可解释性，难以在数据不足的情况下为农民提供可靠的预测依据，需结合专家知识提升检测准确性。
AI.method: 提出多流网络架构，分别提取与分娩相关的姿态、旋转和运动等特征，并根据牛的实际情况动态整合多特征信息。
AI.result: 实验表明多流系统较端到端模型显著减少检测错误，且混合权重机制增强了系统行为的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 多流网络通过融合专家知识与多特征分析，有效提升了分娩迹象检测的准确性与实用性。

result: 实验表明多流系统较端到端模型显著减少检测错误，且混合权重机制增强了系统行为的可解释性。
conclusion: 多流网络通过融合专家知识与多特征分析，有效提升了分娩迹象检测的准确性与实用性。
search_text: Deep Multi-stream Network for Video-based Calving Sign Detection 用于基于视频的产犊迹象检测的深度多流网络 We have designed a deep multi-stream network for automatically detecting calving signs from video. Calving sign detection from a camera, which is a non-contact sensor, is expected to enable more efficient livestock management. As large-scale, well-developed data cannot generally be assumed when establishing calving detection systems, the basis for making the prediction needs to be presented to farmers during operation, so black-box modeling (also known as end-to-end modeling) is not appropriate. For practical operation of calving detection systems, the present study aims to incorporate expert knowledge into a deep neural network. To this end, we propose a multi-stream calving sign detection network in which multiple calving-related features are extracted from the corresponding feature extraction networks designed for each attribute with different characteristics, such as a cow's posture, rotation, and movement, known as calving signs, and are then integrated appropriately depending on the cow's situation. Experimental comparisons conducted using videos of 15 cows demonstrated that our multi-stream system yielded a significant improvement over the end-to-end system, and the multi-stream architecture significantly contributed to a reduction in detection errors. In addition, the distinctive mixture weights we observed helped provide interpretability of the system's behavior. 我们设计了一个深度多流网络，用于自动检测视频中的产犊迹象。通过摄像头（一种非接触式传感器）进行产犊迹象检测有望实现更高效的牲畜管理。由于在建立产犊检测系统时一般无法假设大规模、完善的数据，因此需要在操作过程中向农民提供进行预测的依据，因此黑盒建模（也称为端到端建模）是不合适的。对于产犊检测系统的实际操作，本研究旨在将专家知识纳入深度神经网络。为此，我们提出了一种多流产犊迹象检测网络，其中从针对具有不同特征的每个属性设计的相应特征提取网络中提取多个与产犊相关的特征，例如奶牛的姿势、旋转和运动，称为产犊迹象，然后根据奶牛的情况适当地进行集成。使用 15 头奶牛的视频进行的实验比较表明，我们的多流系统比端到端系统有了显着的改进，并且多流架构显着有助于减少检测错误。此外，我们观察到的独特的混合权重有助于提供系统行为的可解释性。 本文设计了一种深度多流网络，用于从视频中自动检测分娩迹象，以提升牲畜管理的效率。 Ryosuke Hyodo,Teppei Nakano,Tetsuji Ogawa cs.CV,cs.HC,eess.IV

authors_text: Guangliang Cheng,Peng Sun,Ting-Bing Xu,Shuchang Lyu,Peiwen Lin
title: Local-to-Global Information Communication for Real-Time Semantic Segmentation Network Search
title_zh: 用于实时语义分割网络搜索的局部到全局信息通信
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1909.06793
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1909.06793
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has shown great potentials in automatically designing neural network architectures for real-time semantic segmentation. Unlike previous works that utilize a simplified search space with cell-sharing way, we introduce a new search space where a lightweight model can be more effectively searched by replacing the cell-sharing manner with cell-independent one. Based on this, the communication of local to global information is achieved through two well-designed modules. For local information exchange, a graph convolutional network (GCN) guided module is seamlessly integrated as a communication deliver between cells. For global information aggregation, we propose a novel dense-connected fusion module (cell) which aggregates long-range multi-level features in the network automatically. In addition, a latency-oriented constraint is endowed into the search process to balance the accuracy and latency. We name the proposed framework as Local-to-Global Information Communication Network Search (LGCNet). Extensive experiments on Cityscapes and CamVid datasets demonstrate that LGCNet achieves the new state-of-the-art trade-off between accuracy and speed. In particular, on Cityscapes dataset, LGCNet achieves the new best performance of 74.0\% mIoU with the speed of 115.2 FPS on Titan Xp.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has shown great potentials in automatically designing neural network architectures for real-time semantic segmentation. Unlike previous works that utilize a simplified search space with cell-sharing way, we introduce a new search space where a lightweight model can be more effectively searched by replacing the cell-sharing manner with cell-independent one. Based on this, the communication of local to global information is achieved through two well-designed modules. For local information exchange, a graph convolutional network (GCN) guided module is seamlessly integrated as a communication deliver between cells. For global information aggregation, we propose a novel dense-connected fusion module (cell) which aggregates long-range multi-level features in the network automatically. In addition, a latency-oriented constraint is endowed into the search process to balance the accuracy and latency. We name the proposed framework as Local-to-Global Information Communication Network Search (LGCNet). Extensive experiments on Cityscapes and CamVid datasets demonstrate that LGCNet achieves the new state-of-the-art trade-off between accuracy and speed. In particular, on Cityscapes dataset, LGCNet achieves the new best performance of 74.0\% mIoU with the speed of 115.2 FPS on Titan Xp.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）在自动设计用于实时语义分割的神经网络架构方面显示出了巨大的潜力。与之前利用单元共享方式简化搜索空间的工作不同，我们引入了一种新的搜索空间，通过用单元无关的方式替换单元共享方式，可以更有效地搜索轻量级模型。在此基础上，通过两个精心设计的模块实现了本地到全球信息的沟通。对于本地信息交换，图卷积网络（GCN）引导模块被无缝集成为细胞之间的通信传递。对于全局信息聚合，我们提出了一种新颖的密集连接融合模块（单元），它自动聚合网络中的远程多级特征。此外，搜索过程中还引入了面向延迟的约束，以平衡准确性和延迟。我们将提议的框架命名为本地到全球信息通信网络搜索（LGCNet）。对 Cityscapes 和 CamVid 数据集的大量实验表明，LGCNet 在准确性和速度之间实现了新的最先进的权衡。特别是，在 Cityscapes 数据集上，LGCNet 在 Titan Xp 上以 115.2 FPS 的速度实现了 74.0\% mIoU 的新最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经架构搜索框架LGCNet，通过局部到全局的信息通信机制优化实时语义分割网络设计。
AI.motivation: 传统共享单元搜索空间限制了轻量级模型的有效搜索，缺乏局部与全局信息的有效交互机制，难以平衡分割精度与推理速度。
AI.method: 构建非共享单元搜索空间，引入图卷积网络模块实现局部信息交换，设计密集连接融合模块完成全局特征聚合，并嵌入延迟约束优化搜索过程。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和CamVid数据集上达到新SOTA，其中Cityscapes数据集实现74.0% mIoU与115.2 FPS的最优精度速度权衡。
AI.conclusion: LGCNet通过创新的信息通信机制有效提升了实时语义分割的性能，未来可探索更复杂的模块组合与硬件感知优化策略。

authors_text: Vanessa Volz,Boris Naujoks,Pascal Kerschke,Tea Tusar
title: Tools for Landscape Analysis of Optimisation Problems in Procedural Content Generation for Games
title_zh: 游戏程序内容生成中优化问题的景观分析工具
comment: 30 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in Applied Soft Computing
comments: 30 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in Applied Soft Computing
abstract: The term Procedural Content Generation (PCG) refers to the (semi-)automatic generation of game content by algorithmic means, and its methods are becoming increasingly popular in game-oriented research and industry. A special class of these methods, which is commonly known as search-based PCG, treats the given task as an optimisation problem. Such problems are predominantly tackled by evolutionary algorithms. We will demonstrate in this paper that obtaining more information about the defined optimisation problem can substantially improve our understanding of how to approach the generation of content. To do so, we present and discuss three efficient analysis tools, namely diagonal walks, the estimation of high-level properties, as well as problem similarity measures. We discuss the purpose of each of the considered methods in the context of PCG and provide guidelines for the interpretation of the results received. This way we aim to provide methods for the comparison of PCG approaches and eventually, increase the quality and practicality of generated content in industry.
summary: The term Procedural Content Generation (PCG) refers to the (semi-)automatic generation of game content by algorithmic means, and its methods are becoming increasingly popular in game-oriented research and industry. A special class of these methods, which is commonly known as search-based PCG, treats the given task as an optimisation problem. Such problems are predominantly tackled by evolutionary algorithms. We will demonstrate in this paper that obtaining more information about the defined optimisation problem can substantially improve our understanding of how to approach the generation of content. To do so, we present and discuss three efficient analysis tools, namely diagonal walks, the estimation of high-level properties, as well as problem similarity measures. We discuss the purpose of each of the considered methods in the context of PCG and provide guidelines for the interpretation of the results received. This way we aim to provide methods for the comparison of PCG approaches and eventually, increase the quality and practicality of generated content in industry.
abstract_zh: 过程内容生成（PCG）一词是指通过算法手段（半）自动生成游戏内容，其方法在面向游戏的研究和工业中越来越流行。这些方法中有一类特殊的方法，通常称为基于搜索的 PCG，将给定的任务视为优化问题。此类问题主要通过进化算法来解决。我们将在本文中证明，获取有关定义的优化问题的更多信息可以极大地提高我们对如何处理内容生成的理解。为此，我们提出并讨论了三种有效的分析工具，即对角游走、高级属性的估计以及问题相似性度量。我们在 PCG 背景下讨论每种考虑方法的目的，并为解释收到的结果提供指南。通过这种方式，我们的目标是提供比较 PCG 方法的方法，并最终提高行业中生成内容的质量和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种分析工具（对角线行走、高层属性估计、问题相似性度量）以提升游戏程序化内容生成（PCG）中优化问题的理解与生成质量。
AI.motivation: 程序化内容生成（PCG）依赖优化算法，但缺乏对优化问题景观的深入分析，导致生成效果受限。需通过分析工具提升对问题结构的理解，从而改进生成策略。
AI.method: 开发并讨论三种分析方法：对角线行走（探索搜索空间特性）、高层属性估计（量化问题难度与约束）、问题相似性度量（比较不同PCG任务的景观结构）。
AI.result: 三种工具可有效辅助比较PCG方法，揭示优化问题的关键特征，为生成策略优化提供依据，最终提升游戏内容生成的质量与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过景观分析工具深化对PCG优化问题的理解，能够指导更高效的内容生成方法设计，推动行业应用中的实践效果提升。
