To do so, we present and discuss three efficient analysis tools, namely diagonal walks, the estimation of high-level properties, as well as problem similarity measures. We discuss the purpose of each of the considered methods in the context of PCG and provide guidelines for the interpretation of the results received. This way we aim to provide methods for the comparison of PCG approaches and eventually, increase the quality and practicality of generated content in industry. 过程内容生成（PCG）一词是指通过算法手段（半）自动生成游戏内容，其方法在面向游戏的研究和工业中越来越流行。这些方法中有一类特殊的方法，通常称为基于搜索的 PCG，将给定的任务视为优化问题。此类问题主要通过进化算法来解决。我们将在本文中证明，获取有关定义的优化问题的更多信息可以极大地提高我们对如何处理内容生成的理解。为此，我们提出并讨论了三种有效的分析工具，即对角游走、高级属性的估计以及问题相似性度量。我们在 PCG 背景下讨论每种考虑方法的目的，并为解释收到的结果提供指南。通过这种方式，我们的目标是提供比较 PCG 方法的方法，并最终提高行业中生成内容的质量和实用性。 本文提出三种分析工具（对角线行走、高层属性估计、问题相似性度量）以提升游戏程序化内容生成（PCG）中优化问题的理解与生成质量。 Vanessa Volz,Boris Naujoks,Pascal Kerschke,Tea Tusar cs.AI

authors_text: Tomoki Yoshida,Yuki Kondo,Takahiro Maeda,Kazutoshi Akita,Norimichi Ukita
title: Kernelized Back-Projection Networks for Blind Super Resolution
title_zh: 用于盲超分辨率的核化背投网络
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: Since non-blind Super Resolution (SR) fails to super-resolve Low-Resolution (LR) images degraded by arbitrary degradations, SR with the degradation model is required. However, this paper reveals that non-blind SR that is trained simply with various blur kernels exhibits comparable performance as those with the degradation model for blind SR. This result motivates us to revisit high-performance non-blind SR and extend it to blind SR with blur kernels. This paper proposes two SR networks by integrating kernel estimation and SR branches in an iterative end-to-end manner. In the first model, which is called the Kernel Conditioned Back-Projection Network (KCBPN), the low-dimensional kernel representations are estimated for conditioning the SR branch. In our second model, the Kernelized BackProjection Network (KBPN), a raw kernel is estimated and directly employed for modeling the image degradation. The estimated kernel is employed not only for back-propagating its residual but also for forward-propagating the residual to iterative stages. This forward-propagation encourages these stages to learn a variety of different features in different stages by focusing on pixels with large residuals in each stage. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our proposed networks for kernel estimation and SR. We will release the code for this work.
summary: Since non-blind Super Resolution (SR) fails to super-resolve Low-Resolution (LR) images degraded by arbitrary degradations, SR with the degradation model is required. However, this paper reveals that non-blind SR that is trained simply with various blur kernels exhibits comparable performance as those with the degradation model for blind SR. This result motivates us to revisit high-performance non-blind SR and extend it to blind SR with blur kernels. This paper proposes two SR networks by integrating kernel estimation and SR branches in an iterative end-to-end manner. In the first model, which is called the Kernel Conditioned Back-Projection Network (KCBPN), the low-dimensional kernel representations are estimated for conditioning the SR branch. In our second model, the Kernelized BackProjection Network (KBPN), a raw kernel is estimated and directly employed for modeling the image degradation. The estimated kernel is employed not only for back-propagating its residual but also for forward-propagating the residual to iterative stages. This forward-propagation encourages these stages to learn a variety of different features in different stages by focusing on pixels with large residuals in each stage. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our proposed networks for kernel estimation and SR. We will release the code for this work.
abstract_zh: 由于非盲超分辨率 (SR) 无法超分辨率因任意降级而降级的低分辨率 (LR) 图像，因此需要具有降级模型的 SR。然而，本文表明，仅使用各种模糊内核训练的非盲 SR 表现出与盲 SR 退化模型相当的性能。这一结果促使我们重新审视高性能非盲 SR，并将其扩展到具有模糊内核的盲 SR。本文通过以迭代端到端的方式集成核估计和SR分支，提出了两个SR网络。在第一个模型中，称为核条件反投影网络 (KCBPN)，估计​​低维核表示以调节 SR 分支。在我们的第二个模型“核化反投影网络”（KBPN）中，估计原始核并直接用于对图像退化进行建模。估计的核不仅用于反向传播其残差，而且还用于将残差前向传播到迭代阶段。这种前向传播鼓励这些阶段通过关注每个阶段中残差较大的像素来学习不同阶段中的各种不同特征。实验结果验证了我们提出的核估计和 SR 网络的有效性。我们将发布这项工作的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于核估计的盲超分辨率网络（KCBPN和KBPN），通过迭代端到端方式整合核估计与超分分支，解决未知退化模型下的图像超分问题。
AI.motivation: 传统非盲超分在未知退化模型下效果受限，但研究发现使用多种模糊核训练的非盲超分性能可与基于退化模型的方法媲美，因此提出改进非盲超分以适应盲超分任务。
AI.method: 设计KCBPN通过低维核表示条件化超分分支，KBPN则直接估计原始核并用于退化建模，通过前向传播残差激励各阶段学习不同特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提网络在核估计与超分任务中的有效性，代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: 将核估计与超分分支迭代结合，可提升盲超分性能，为未知退化场景提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Rohan Agarwal,Wei Zhou,Xiaofeng Wu,Yuhan Li
title: Efficient 3D Object Reconstruction using Visual Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Visual Transformers 进行高效 3D 对象重建
abstract: Reconstructing a 3D object from a 2D image is a well-researched vision problem, with many kinds of deep learning techniques having been tried. Most commonly, 3D convolutional approaches are used, though previous work has shown state-of-the-art methods using 2D convolutions that are also significantly more efficient to train. With the recent rise of transformers for vision tasks, often outperforming convolutional methods, along with some earlier attempts to use transformers for 3D object reconstruction, we set out to use visual transformers in place of convolutions in existing efficient, high-performing techniques for 3D object reconstruction in order to achieve superior results on the task. Using a transformer-based encoder and decoder to predict 3D structure from 2D images, we achieve accuracy similar or superior to the baseline approach. This study serves as evidence for the potential of visual transformers in the task of 3D object reconstruction.
summary: Reconstructing a 3D object from a 2D image is a well-researched vision problem, with many kinds of deep learning techniques having been tried. Most commonly, 3D convolutional approaches are used, though previous work has shown state-of-the-art methods using 2D convolutions that are also significantly more efficient to train. With the recent rise of transformers for vision tasks, often outperforming convolutional methods, along with some earlier attempts to use transformers for 3D object reconstruction, we set out to use visual transformers in place of convolutions in existing efficient, high-performing techniques for 3D object reconstruction in order to achieve superior results on the task. Using a transformer-based encoder and decoder to predict 3D structure from 2D images, we achieve accuracy similar or superior to the baseline approach. This study serves as evidence for the potential of visual transformers in the task of 3D object reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 从 2D 图像重建 3D 物体是一个经过深入研究的视觉问题，人们已经尝试了多种深度学习技术。最常见的是使用 3D 卷积方法，尽管之前的工作已经展示了使用 2D 卷积的最先进方法，这些方法的训练效率也显着提高。随着最近用于视觉任务的 Transformer 的兴起，其性能通常优于卷积方法，以及一些早期尝试使用 Transformer 进行 3D 对象重建，我们开始使用视觉 Transformer 代替现有高效、高性能的 3D 对象重建技术中的卷积，以便在任务中取得优异的结果。使用基于 Transformer 的编码器和解码器从 2D 图像预测 3D 结构，我们实现了与基线方法相似或优于基线方法的精度。这项研究证明了视觉 Transformer 在 3D 对象重建任务中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用视觉Transformer进行高效的3D物体重建，以替代传统卷积方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D卷积方法在3D重建中被广泛使用，但基于2D卷积的方法更高效。视觉Transformer在图像任务中表现优异，因此尝试将其应用于3D重建以提升效果。
AI.method: 采用基于视觉Transformer的编码器-解码器结构，从2D图像预测3D物体结构。
AI.result: 在3D重建任务中，模型准确率与基线方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer在3D物体重建任务中展现出潜力，为未来研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Malte J. Rasch,Charles Mackin,Manuel Le Gallo,An Chen,Andrea Fasoli,Frederic Odermatt,Ning Li,S. R. Nandakumar,Pritish Narayanan,Hsinyu Tsai,Geoffrey W. Burr,Abu Sebastian,Vijay Narayanan
title: Hardware-aware training for large-scale and diverse deep learning inference workloads using in-memory computing-based accelerators
title_zh: 使用基于内存计算的加速器对大规模和多样化的深度学习推理工作负载进行硬件感知训练
abstract: Analog in-memory computing (AIMC) -- a promising approach for energy-efficient acceleration of deep learning workloads -- computes matrix-vector multiplications (MVMs) but only approximately, due to nonidealities that often are non-deterministic or nonlinear. This can adversely impact the achievable deep neural network (DNN) inference accuracy as compared to a conventional floating point (FP) implementation. While retraining has previously been suggested to improve robustness, prior work has explored only a few DNN topologies, using disparate and overly simplified AIMC hardware models. Here, we use hardware-aware (HWA) training to systematically examine the accuracy of AIMC for multiple common artificial intelligence (AI) workloads across multiple DNN topologies, and investigate sensitivity and robustness to a broad set of nonidealities. By introducing a new and highly realistic AIMC crossbar-model, we improve significantly on earlier retraining approaches. We show that many large-scale DNNs of various topologies, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), recurrent neural networks (RNNs), and transformers, can in fact be successfully retrained to show iso-accuracy on AIMC. Our results further suggest that AIMC nonidealities that add noise to the inputs or outputs, not the weights, have the largest impact on DNN accuracy, and that RNNs are particularly robust to all nonidealities.
summary: Analog in-memory computing (AIMC) -- a promising approach for energy-efficient acceleration of deep learning workloads -- computes matrix-vector multiplications (MVMs) but only approximately, due to nonidealities that often are non-deterministic or nonlinear. This can adversely impact the achievable deep neural network (DNN) inference accuracy as compared to a conventional floating point (FP) implementation. While retraining has previously been suggested to improve robustness, prior work has explored only a few DNN topologies, using disparate and overly simplified AIMC hardware models. Here, we use hardware-aware (HWA) training to systematically examine the accuracy of AIMC for multiple common artificial intelligence (AI) workloads across multiple DNN topologies, and investigate sensitivity and robustness to a broad set of nonidealities. By introducing a new and highly realistic AIMC crossbar-model, we improve significantly on earlier retraining approaches. We show that many large-scale DNNs of various topologies, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), recurrent neural networks (RNNs), and transformers, can in fact be successfully retrained to show iso-accuracy on AIMC. Our results further suggest that AIMC nonidealities that add noise to the inputs or outputs, not the weights, have the largest impact on DNN accuracy, and that RNNs are particularly robust to all nonidealities.
abstract_zh: 模拟内存计算 (AIMC) 是一种很有前途的深度学习工作负载节能加速方法，它可以计算矩阵向量乘法 (MVM)，但由于非理想性通常是非确定性或非线性的，因此只能进行近似计算。与传统浮点 (FP) 实现相比，这可能会对可实现的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理精度产生不利影响。虽然之前有人建议重新训练来提高鲁棒性，但之前的工作只探索了几种 DNN 拓扑，使用不同且过度简化的 AIMC 硬件模型。在这里，我们使用硬件感知 (HWA) 训练来系统地检查 AIMC 对于跨多个 DNN 拓扑的多个常见人工智能 (AI) 工作负载的准确性，并研究对广泛的非理想情况的敏感性和鲁棒性。通过引入一种新的、高度真实的 AIMC 交叉模型，我们显着改进了早期的再训练方法。我们证明，许多不同拓扑的大规模 DNN，包括卷积神经网络 (CNN)、循环神经网络 (RNN) 和 Transformer，实际上可以成功地进行重新训练，以在 AIMC 上显示出等精度。我们的结果进一步表明，向输入或输出添加噪声（而不是权重）的 AIMC 非理想性对 DNN 准确性的影响最大，并且 RNN 对所有非理想性特别稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种硬件感知（HWA）训练方法，用于在基于存内计算（AIMC）的加速器上提升大规模和多样化深度学习推理任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于AIMC存在非理想性（如非线性和非确定性噪声），其计算结果与传统浮点运算存在偏差，导致深度神经网络（DNN）推理精度下降。现有研究对DNN结构和硬件模型的覆盖不足，需更系统地解决这一问题。
AI.method: 引入高保真AIMC交叉条模型，结合硬件感知训练，对多种DNN架构（CNN、RNN、Transformer等）进行系统性训练，分析不同非理想性对精度的影响。
AI.result: 多种大规模DNN可在AIMC上实现与浮点运算相当的精度；输入/输出噪声对精度影响最大，而RNN对非理想性具有较强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 硬件感知训练能有效提升AIMC加速器的DNN推理精度，且非理想性影响存在架构差异性，为AIMC实际应用提供了关键优化方向。

search_text: Hardware-aware training for large-scale and diverse deep learning inference workloads using in-memory computing-based accelerators 使用基于内存计算的加速器对大规模和多样化的深度学习推理工作负载进行硬件感知训练 Analog in-memory computing (AIMC) -- a promising approach for energy-efficient acceleration of deep learning workloads -- computes matrix-vector multiplications (MVMs) but only approximately, due to nonidealities that often are non-deterministic or nonlinear. This can adversely impact the achievable deep neural network (DNN) inference accuracy as compared to a conventional floating point (FP) implementation. While retraining has previously been suggested to improve robustness, prior work has explored only a few DNN topologies, using disparate and overly simplified AIMC hardware models. Here, we use hardware-aware (HWA) training to systematically examine the accuracy of AIMC for multiple common artificial intelligence (AI) workloads across multiple DNN topologies, and investigate sensitivity and robustness to a broad set of nonidealities. By introducing a new and highly realistic AIMC crossbar-model, we improve significantly on earlier retraining approaches. We show that many large-scale DNNs of various topologies, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), recurrent neural networks (RNNs), and transformers, can in fact be successfully retrained to show iso-accuracy on AIMC. Our results further suggest that AIMC nonidealities that add noise to the inputs or outputs, not the weights, have the largest impact on DNN accuracy, and that RNNs are particularly robust to all nonidealities. 模拟内存计算 (AIMC) 是一种很有前途的深度学习工作负载节能加速方法，它可以计算矩阵向量乘法 (MVM)，但由于非理想性通常是非确定性或非线性的，因此只能进行近似计算。与传统浮点 (FP) 实现相比，这可能会对可实现的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理精度产生不利影响。虽然之前有人建议重新训练来提高鲁棒性，但之前的工作只探索了几种 DNN 拓扑，使用不同且过度简化的 AIMC 硬件模型。在这里，我们使用硬件感知 (HWA) 训练来系统地检查 AIMC 对于跨多个 DNN 拓扑的多个常见人工智能 (AI) 工作负载的准确性，并研究对广泛的非理想情况的敏感性和鲁棒性。通过引入一种新的、高度真实的 AIMC 交叉模型，我们显着改进了早期的再训练方法。我们证明，许多不同拓扑的大规模 DNN，包括卷积神经网络 (CNN)、循环神经网络 (RNN) 和 Transformer，实际上可以成功地进行重新训练，以在 AIMC 上显示出等精度。我们的结果进一步表明，向输入或输出添加噪声（而不是权重）的 AIMC 非理想性对 DNN 准确性的影响最大，并且 RNN 对所有非理想性特别稳健。 本文提出了一种硬件感知（HWA）训练方法，用于在基于存内计算（AIMC）的加速器上提升大规模和多样化深度学习推理任务的准确性。 Malte J. Rasch,Charles Mackin,Manuel Le Gallo,An Chen,Andrea Fasoli,Frederic Odermatt,Ning Li,S. R. Nandakumar,Pritish Narayanan,Hsinyu Tsai,Geoffrey W. Burr,Abu Sebastian,Vijay Narayanan cs.LG,cs.ET

authors_text: Asaf Yehudai,Arie Cattan,Omri Abend,Gabriel Stanovsky
title: Evaluating and Improving the Coreference Capabilities of Machine Translation Models
title_zh: 评估和提高机器翻译模型的共指能力
abstract: Machine translation (MT) requires a wide range of linguistic capabilities, which current end-to-end models are expected to learn implicitly by observing aligned sentences in bilingual corpora. In this work, we ask: \emph{How well do MT models learn coreference resolution from implicit signal?} To answer this question, we develop an evaluation methodology that derives coreference clusters from MT output and evaluates them without requiring annotations in the target language. We further evaluate several prominent open-source and commercial MT systems, translating from English to six target languages, and compare them to state-of-the-art coreference resolvers on three challenging benchmarks. Our results show that the monolingual resolvers greatly outperform MT models. Motivated by this result, we experiment with different methods for incorporating the output of coreference resolution models in MT, showing improvement over strong baselines.
summary: Machine translation (MT) requires a wide range of linguistic capabilities, which current end-to-end models are expected to learn implicitly by observing aligned sentences in bilingual corpora. In this work, we ask: \emph{How well do MT models learn coreference resolution from implicit signal?} To answer this question, we develop an evaluation methodology that derives coreference clusters from MT output and evaluates them without requiring annotations in the target language. We further evaluate several prominent open-source and commercial MT systems, translating from English to six target languages, and compare them to state-of-the-art coreference resolvers on three challenging benchmarks. Our results show that the monolingual resolvers greatly outperform MT models. Motivated by this result, we experiment with different methods for incorporating the output of coreference resolution models in MT, showing improvement over strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 机器翻译（MT）需要广泛的语言能力，当前的端到端模型有望通过观察双语语料库中对齐的句子来隐式学习这些能力。在这项工作中，我们问：\emph{机器翻译模型如何从隐式信号中学习共指解析？}为了回答这个问题，我们开发了一种评估方法，该方法可以从机器翻译输出中导出共指簇并对其进行评估，而无需目标语言中的注释。我们进一步评估了几个著名的开源和商业机器翻译系统，将英语翻译成六种目标语言，并在三个具有挑战性的基准上将它们与最先进的共指解析器进行比较。我们的结果表明，单语言解析器的性能大大优于 MT 模型。受这一结果的启发，我们尝试了不同的方法，将共指消解模型的输出合并到机器翻译中，结果显示相对于强基线的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文评估并改进机器翻译模型的共指能力，通过开发无需目标语言标注的评估方法，并尝试将共指模型整合到翻译系统中。
AI.motivation: 当前机器翻译模型依赖隐式信号学习共指解析，但其效果尚不明确，需验证并提升其共指能力。
AI.method: 提出基于机器翻译输出的共指聚类评估方法，对比多语言MT系统与核心ference解析器性能，并尝试将核心ference模型整合至翻译流程。
AI.result: 单语核心ference解析器显著优于MT模型，但通过整合核心ference模型可提升MT基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 机器翻译需显式引入核心ference解析模块以提升共指处理能力。

authors_text: Yinsen Jia,Jingxi Xu,Dinesh Jayaraman,Shuran Song
title: Dynamic Grasping with a Learned Meta-Controller
title_zh: 使用学习元控制器进行动态抓取
abstract: Grasping moving objects is a challenging task that requires multiple submodules such as object pose predictor, arm motion planner, etc. Each submodule operates under its own set of meta-parameters. For example, how far the pose predictor should look into the future (i.e., look-ahead time) and the maximum amount of time the motion planner can spend planning a motion (i.e., time budget). Many previous works assign fixed values to these parameters; however, at different moments within a single episode of dynamic grasping, the optimal values should vary depending on the current scene. In this work, we propose a dynamic grasping pipeline with a meta-controller that controls the look-ahead time and time budget dynamically. We learn the meta-controller through reinforcement learning with a sparse reward. Our experiments show the meta-controller improves the grasping success rate (up to 28% in the most cluttered environment) and reduces grasping time, compared to the strongest baseline. Our meta-controller learns to reason about the reachable workspace and maintain the predicted pose within the reachable region. In addition, it assigns a small but sufficient time budget for the motion planner. Our method can handle different objects, trajectories, and obstacles. Despite being trained only with 3-6 random cuboidal obstacles, our meta-controller generalizes well to 7-9 obstacles and more realistic out-of-domain household setups with unseen obstacle shapes.
summary: Grasping moving objects is a challenging task that requires multiple submodules such as object pose predictor, arm motion planner, etc. Each submodule operates under its own set of meta-parameters. For example, how far the pose predictor should look into the future (i.e., look-ahead time) and the maximum amount of time the motion planner can spend planning a motion (i.e., time budget). Many previous works assign fixed values to these parameters; however, at different moments within a single episode of dynamic grasping, the optimal values should vary depending on the current scene. In this work, we propose a dynamic grasping pipeline with a meta-controller that controls the look-ahead time and time budget dynamically. We learn the meta-controller through reinforcement learning with a sparse reward. Our experiments show the meta-controller improves the grasping success rate (up to 28% in the most cluttered environment) and reduces grasping time, compared to the strongest baseline. Our meta-controller learns to reason about the reachable workspace and maintain the predicted pose within the reachable region. In addition, it assigns a small but sufficient time budget for the motion planner. Our method can handle different objects, trajectories, and obstacles. Despite being trained only with 3-6 random cuboidal obstacles, our meta-controller generalizes well to 7-9 obstacles and more realistic out-of-domain household setups with unseen obstacle shapes.
abstract_zh: 抓取移动物体是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要多个子模块，例如物体姿态预测器、手臂运动规划器等。每个子模块都在自己的一组元参数下运行。例如，姿势预测器应该展望未来多远（即，前瞻时间）以及运动规划器可以花费在规划运动上的最大时间（即，时间预算）。许多先前的工作为这些参数分配固定值；然而，在一次动态抓取的不同时刻，最佳值应该根据当前场景而变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种带有元控制器的动态抓取管道，可以动态控制前瞻时间和时间预算。我们通过强化学习和稀疏奖励来学习元控制器。我们的实验表明，与最强基线相比，元控制器提高了抓取成功率（在最混乱的环境中高达 28%）并减少了抓取时间。我们的元控制器学习推理可到达的工作空间并将预测的姿势保持在可到达的区域内。此外，它为运动规划器分配了少量但足够的时间预算。我们的方法可以处理不同的物体、轨迹和障碍物。尽管仅接受了 3-6 个随机立方体障碍物的训练，但我们的元控制器可以很好地泛化到 7-9 个障碍物以及具有看不见的障碍物形状的更现实的域外家庭设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习元控制器动态调整参数的抓取系统，以应对动态环境中移动物体的抓取挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法采用固定参数（如预测时间窗口和规划时间预算），无法适应动态场景中不断变化的最优参数需求，导致抓取效率和成功率受限。
AI.method: 设计元控制器通过强化学习（稀疏奖励）动态调整预测时间窗口和运动规划时间预算，使系统能根据场景实时优化参数。
AI.result: 在最杂乱环境中抓取成功率提升28%，抓取时间减少，且能泛化到更多障碍物和真实家居场景。
AI.conclusion: 元控制器通过动态参数调整显著提升了动态抓取性能，并展示了对复杂场景的良好泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习元控制器动态调整参数的抓取系统，以应对动态环境中移动物体的抓取挑战。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法采用固定参数（如预测时间窗口和规划时间预算），无法适应动态场景中不断变化的最优参数需求，导致抓取效率和成功率受限。
ai_content.method: 设计元控制器通过强化学习（稀疏奖励）动态调整预测时间窗口和运动规划时间预算，使系统能根据场景实时优化参数。
ai_content.result: 在最杂乱环境中抓取成功率提升28%，抓取时间减少，且能泛化到更多障碍物和真实家居场景。
ai_content.conclusion: 元控制器通过动态参数调整显著提升了动态抓取性能，并展示了对复杂场景的良好泛化能力。

search_text: Dynamic Grasping with a Learned Meta-Controller 使用学习元控制器进行动态抓取 Grasping moving objects is a challenging task that requires multiple submodules such as object pose predictor, arm motion planner, etc. Each submodule operates under its own set of meta-parameters. For example, how far the pose predictor should look into the future (i.e., look-ahead time) and the maximum amount of time the motion planner can spend planning a motion (i.e., time budget). Many previous works assign fixed values to these parameters; however, at different moments within a single episode of dynamic grasping, the optimal values should vary depending on the current scene. In this work, we propose a dynamic grasping pipeline with a meta-controller that controls the look-ahead time and time budget dynamically. We learn the meta-controller through reinforcement learning with a sparse reward. Our experiments show the meta-controller improves the grasping success rate (up to 28% in the most cluttered environment) and reduces grasping time, compared to the strongest baseline. Our meta-controller learns to reason about the reachable workspace and maintain the predicted pose within the reachable region. In addition, it assigns a small but sufficient time budget for the motion planner. Our method can handle different objects, trajectories, and obstacles. Despite being trained only with 3-6 random cuboidal obstacles, our meta-controller generalizes well to 7-9 obstacles and more realistic out-of-domain household setups with unseen obstacle shapes. 抓取移动物体是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要多个子模块，例如物体姿态预测器、手臂运动规划器等。每个子模块都在自己的一组元参数下运行。例如，姿势预测器应该展望未来多远（即，前瞻时间）以及运动规划器可以花费在规划运动上的最大时间（即，时间预算）。许多先前的工作为这些参数分配固定值；然而，在一次动态抓取的不同时刻，最佳值应该根据当前场景而变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种带有元控制器的动态抓取管道，可以动态控制前瞻时间和时间预算。我们通过强化学习和稀疏奖励来学习元控制器。我们的实验表明，与最强基线相比，元控制器提高了抓取成功率（在最混乱的环境中高达 28%）并减少了抓取时间。我们的元控制器学习推理可到达的工作空间并将预测的姿势保持在可到达的区域内。此外，它为运动规划器分配了少量但足够的时间预算。我们的方法可以处理不同的物体、轨迹和障碍物。尽管仅接受了 3-6 个随机立方体障碍物的训练，但我们的元控制器可以很好地泛化到 7-9 个障碍物以及具有看不见的障碍物形状的更现实的域外家庭设置。 本文提出了一种通过学习元控制器动态调整参数的抓取系统，以应对动态环境中移动物体的抓取挑战。 Yinsen Jia,Jingxi Xu,Dinesh Jayaraman,Shuran Song cs.RO

authors_text: Kelton Minor,Esteban Moro,Nick Obradovich
title: Adverse weather amplifies social media activity
title_zh: 恶劣天气加剧了社交媒体活动
abstract: Humanity spends an increasing proportion of its time interacting online. Scholars are intensively investigating the societal drivers and resultant impacts of this collective shift in our allocation of time and attention. Yet, the external factors that regularly shape online behavior remain markedly understudied. Do environmental factors alter rates of online activity? Here we show that adverse meteorological conditions markedly increase social media use in the United States. To do so, we employ climate econometric methods alongside over three and a half billion social media posts from tens of millions of individuals from both Facebook and Twitter between 2009 and 2016. We find that more extreme temperatures and added precipitation each independently amplify social media activity. Weather that is adverse on both the temperature and precipitation dimensions produces markedly larger increases in social media activity. On average across both platforms, compared to the temperate weather baseline, days colder than -5°C with 1.5-2cm of precipitation elevate social media activity by 35%. This effect is nearly three times the typical increase in social media activity observed on New Year's Eve in New York City. We observe meteorological effects on social media participation at both the aggregate and individual level, even accounting for individual-specific, temporal, and location-specific potential confounds.

Scholars are intensively investigating the societal drivers and resultant impacts of this collective shift in our allocation of time and attention. Yet, the external factors that regularly shape online behavior remain markedly understudied. Do environmental factors alter rates of online activity? Here we show that adverse meteorological conditions markedly increase social media use in the United States. To do so, we employ climate econometric methods alongside over three and a half billion social media posts from tens of millions of individuals from both Facebook and Twitter between 2009 and 2016. We find that more extreme temperatures and added precipitation each independently amplify social media activity. Weather that is adverse on both the temperature and precipitation dimensions produces markedly larger increases in social media activity. On average across both platforms, compared to the temperate weather baseline, days colder than -5°C with 1.5-2cm of precipitation elevate social media activity by 35%. This effect is nearly three times the typical increase in social media activity observed on New Year's Eve in New York City. We observe meteorological effects on social media participation at both the aggregate and individual level, even accounting for individual-specific, temporal, and location-specific potential confounds.
abstract_zh: 人类花费越来越多的时间进行在线互动。学者们正在深入研究我们时间和注意力分配的集体转变的社会驱动因素和由此产生的影响。然而，对经常影响在线行为的外部因素的研究仍然明显不足。环境因素会改变在线活动率吗？在这里，我们表明不利的气象条件显着增加了美国社交媒体的使用。为此，我们采用了气候计量经济学方法，以及 2009 年至 2016 年间 Facebook 和 Twitter 上数千万个人发布的超过 3.5 亿条社交媒体帖子。我们发现，更极端的气温和增加的降水各自独立地放大了社交媒体活动。对温度和降水量均不利的天气会导致社交媒体活动显着增加。平均而言，与温带天气基准相比，这两个平台的气温低于 -5°C 且降水量为 1.5-2 厘米的日子会使社交媒体活动增加 35%。这一效应几乎是纽约市除夕夜社交媒体活动典型增长的三倍。我们在总体和个人层面上观察气象对社交媒体参与的影响，甚至考虑到个人特定、时间和地点特定的潜在混淆。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了恶劣天气如何影响美国社交媒体使用情况，并分析了其影响程度。
AI.motivation: 尽管人们在线上花费的时间越来越多，但环境因素对在线行为的影响仍缺乏研究。本文旨在探讨气象条件对社交媒体活动的影响。
AI.method: 研究采用气候计量经济学方法，结合2009年至2016年间来自Facebook和Twitter的超过35亿条社交媒体帖子数据，分析极端温度和降水对社交媒体使用的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，极端温度和降水分别独立地增加了社交媒体活动。当天气在温度和降水两个维度上都恶劣时，社交媒体活动增加尤为明显。平均而言，比温和天气基准值，气温低于-5°C且有1.5-2厘米降水的天气会将社交媒体活动提升35%。
AI.conclusion: 气象条件显著影响社交媒体的使用，这一效应在总体和个体层面均被观察到，即使考虑了个体、时间和地点相关的潜在混杂因素。

authors_text: Chong Mou,Xintao Wang,Liangbin Xie,Yanze Wu,Jian Zhang,Zhongang Qi,Ying Shan,Xiaohu Qie
title: T2I-Adapter: Learning Adapters to Dig out More Controllable Ability for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: T2I-Adapter：学习适配器为文本到图像扩散模型挖掘更多可控能力
abstract: The incredible generative ability of large-scale text-to-image (T2I) models has demonstrated strong power of learning complex structures and meaningful semantics. However, relying solely on text prompts cannot fully take advantage of the knowledge learned by the model, especially when flexible and accurate controlling (e.g., color and structure) is needed. In this paper, we aim to ``dig out" the capabilities that T2I models have implicitly learned, and then explicitly use them to control the generation more granularly. Specifically, we propose to learn simple and lightweight T2I-Adapters to align internal knowledge in T2I models with external control signals, while freezing the original large T2I models. In this way, we can train various adapters according to different conditions, achieving rich control and editing effects in the color and structure of the generation results. Further, the proposed T2I-Adapters have attractive properties of practical value, such as composability and generalization ability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our T2I-Adapter has promising generation quality and a wide range of applications.
summary: The incredible generative ability of large-scale text-to-image (T2I) models has demonstrated strong power of learning complex structures and meaningful semantics. However, relying solely on text prompts cannot fully take advantage of the knowledge learned by the model, especially when flexible and accurate controlling (e.g., color and structure) is needed. In this paper, we aim to ``dig out" the capabilities that T2I models have implicitly learned, and then explicitly use them to control the generation more granularly. Specifically, we propose to learn simple and lightweight T2I-Adapters to align internal knowledge in T2I models with external control signals, while freezing the original large T2I models. In this way, we can train various adapters according to different conditions, achieving rich control and editing effects in the color and structure of the generation results. Further, the proposed T2I-Adapters have attractive properties of practical value, such as composability and generalization ability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our T2I-Adapter has promising generation quality and a wide range of applications.
abstract_zh: 大规模文本到图像（T2I）模型令人难以置信的生成能力展示了学习复杂结构和有意义语义的强大能力。然而，仅仅依靠文本提示并不能充分利用模型学到的知识，尤其是在需要灵活准确的控制（例如颜色和结构）时。在本文中，我们的目标是“挖掘”T2I模型隐式学习的能力，然后显式地使用它们来更精细地控制生成。具体来说，我们提出学习简单、轻量级的T2I-Adapters，将T2I模型中的内部知识与外部控制信号对齐，同时冻结原始大型T2I模型。这样，我们可以根据不同的条件训练各种适配器，在生成结果的颜色和结构上实现丰富的控制和编辑效果。 T2I-Adapters 具有有吸引力的实用价值，例如可组合性和泛化能力，大量实验表明我们的 T2I-Adapter 具有良好的生成质量和广泛的应用范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出T2I-Adapter，通过学习轻量适配器增强文本到图像扩散模型的可控性，实现对生成结果颜色和结构的精细控制。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模文本到图像模型虽具强大生成能力，但仅依赖文本提示难以充分利用模型隐含知识，尤其在需要灵活精确控制（如颜色、结构）时存在局限。
AI.method: 设计简单轻量的T2I-Adapter模块，冻结原始模型参数，通过适配器对齐内部知识与外部控制信号，支持按不同条件训练适配器以实现多维度控制。
AI.result: 实验表明T2I-Adapter在生成质量与控制效果上表现优异，具备组合性与泛化能力，可广泛应用于图像生成与编辑任务。
AI.conclusion: T2I-Adapter有效挖掘并显式利用了模型隐含能力，为文本到图像生成提供了更精细的控制手段，具有重要实践价值。

tldr: 本文提出T2I-Adapter，通过学习轻量适配器增强文本到图像扩散模型的可控性，实现对生成结果颜色和结构的精细控制。
motivation: 现有大规模文本到图像模型虽具强大生成能力，但仅依赖文本提示难以充分利用模型隐含知识，尤其在需要灵活精确控制（如颜色、结构）时存在局限。
method: 设计简单轻量的T2I-Adapter模块，冻结原始模型参数，通过适配器对齐内部知识与外部控制信号，支持按不同条件训练适配器以实现多维度控制。
result: 实验表明T2I-Adapter在生成质量与控制效果上表现优异，具备组合性与泛化能力，可广泛应用于图像生成与编辑任务。
conclusion: T2I-Adapter有效挖掘并显式利用了模型隐含能力，为文本到图像生成提供了更精细的控制手段，具有重要实践价值。
search_text: T2I-Adapter: Learning Adapters to Dig out More Controllable Ability for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models T2I-Adapter：学习适配器为文本到图像扩散模型挖掘更多可控能力 The incredible generative ability of large-scale text-to-image (T2I) models has demonstrated strong power of learning complex structures and meaningful semantics. However, relying solely on text prompts cannot fully take advantage of the knowledge learned by the model, especially when flexible and accurate controlling (e.g., color and structure) is needed. In this paper, we aim to ``dig out" the capabilities that T2I models have implicitly learned, and then explicitly use them to control the generation more granularly. Specifically, we propose to learn simple and lightweight T2I-Adapters to align internal knowledge in T2I models with external control signals, while freezing the original large T2I models. In this way, we can train various adapters according to different conditions, achieving rich control and editing effects in the color and structure of the generation results. Further, the proposed T2I-Adapters have attractive properties of practical value, such as composability and generalization ability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our T2I-Adapter has promising generation quality and a wide range of applications. 大规模文本到图像（T2I）模型令人难以置信的生成能力展示了学习复杂结构和有意义语义的强大能力。然而，仅仅依靠文本提示并不能充分利用模型学到的知识，尤其是在需要灵活准确的控制（例如颜色和结构）时。在本文中，我们的目标是“挖掘”T2I模型隐式学习的能力，然后显式地使用它们来更精细地控制生成。具体来说，我们提出学习简单、轻量级的T2I-Adapters，将T2I模型中的内部知识与外部控制信号对齐，同时冻结原始大型T2I模型。这样，我们可以根据不同的条件训练各种适配器，在生成结果的颜色和结构上实现丰富的控制和编辑效果。 T2I-Adapters 具有有吸引力的实用价值，例如可组合性和泛化能力，大量实验表明我们的 T2I-Adapter 具有良好的生成质量和广泛的应用范围。 本文提出T2I-Adapter，通过学习轻量适配器增强文本到图像扩散模型的可控性，实现对生成结果颜色和结构的精细控制。 Chong Mou,Xintao Wang,Liangbin Xie,Yanze Wu,Jian Zhang,Zhongang Qi,Ying Shan,Xiaohu Qie cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Joon Sik Kim,Valerie Chen,Danish Pruthi,Nihar B. Shah,Ameet Talwalkar
title: Assisting Human Decisions in Document Matching
title_zh: 在文档匹配中协助人类决策
abstract: Many practical applications, ranging from paper-reviewer assignment in peer review to job-applicant matching for hiring, require human decision makers to identify relevant matches by combining their expertise with predictions from machine learning models. In many such model-assisted document matching tasks, the decision makers have stressed the need for assistive information about the model outputs (or the data) to facilitate their decisions. In this paper, we devise a proxy matching task that allows us to evaluate which kinds of assistive information improve decision makers' performance (in terms of accuracy and time). Through a crowdsourced (N=271 participants) study, we find that providing black-box model explanations reduces users' accuracy on the matching task, contrary to the commonly-held belief that they can be helpful by allowing better understanding of the model. On the other hand, custom methods that are designed to closely attend to some task-specific desiderata are found to be effective in improving user performance. Surprisingly, we also find that the users' perceived utility of assistive information is misaligned with their objective utility (measured through their task performance).
summary: Many practical applications, ranging from paper-reviewer assignment in peer review to job-applicant matching for hiring, require human decision makers to identify relevant matches by combining their expertise with predictions from machine learning models. In many such model-assisted document matching tasks, the decision makers have stressed the need for assistive information about the model outputs (or the data) to facilitate their decisions. In this paper, we devise a proxy matching task that allows us to evaluate which kinds of assistive information improve decision makers' performance (in terms of accuracy and time). Through a crowdsourced (N=271 participants) study, we find that providing black-box model explanations reduces users' accuracy on the matching task, contrary to the commonly-held belief that they can be helpful by allowing better understanding of the model. On the other hand, custom methods that are designed to closely attend to some task-specific desiderata are found to be effective in improving user performance. Surprisingly, we also find that the users' perceived utility of assistive information is misaligned with their objective utility (measured through their task performance).
abstract_zh: 许多实际应用，从同行评审中的论文审稿人分配到招聘中的求职者匹配，都要求人类决策者通过将他们的专业知识与机器学习模型的预测相结合来识别相关匹配。在许多此类模型辅助文档匹配任务中，决策者强调需要有关模型输出（或数据）的辅助信息以促进他们的决策。在本文中，我们设计了一个代理匹配任务，使我们能够评估哪些类型的辅助信息可以提高决策者的绩效（在准确性和时间方面）。通过一项众包（N=271 名参与者）研究，我们发现提供黑盒模型解释会降低用户在匹配任务上的准确性，这与人们普遍认为的“黑盒模型解释可以通过更好地理解模型来提供帮助”相反。另一方面，旨在密切关注某些特定任务需求的自定义方法被发现可以有效提高用户性能。令人惊讶的是，我们还发现用户对辅助信息的感知效用与其目标效用（通过任务绩效衡量）不一致。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在文档匹配任务中，何种辅助信息能有效提升人类决策者的性能。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中人类决策者需结合机器学习模型预测与自身专业知识进行匹配，但现有辅助信息的效果尚不明确。
AI.method: 设计代理匹配任务并通过271名参与者的众包实验，对比黑箱模型解释与定制化辅助信息的效果。
AI.result: 黑箱解释降低用户准确性，定制化方法有效提升性能，且用户感知效用与实际效用存在偏差。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定的定制化辅助信息比通用模型解释更有效，需关注用户主观感知与客观性能的差异。

authors_text: Joakim Blikstad,Peter Kiss
title: Incremental $(1-ε)$-approximate dynamic matching in $O(poly(1/ε))$ update time
title_zh: $O(poly(1/ε))$更新时间内的增量$(1-ε)$近似动态匹配
abstract: In the dynamic approximate maximum bipartite matching problem we are given bipartite graph $G$ undergoing updates and our goal is to maintain a matching of $G$ which is large compared the maximum matching size $μ(G)$. We define a dynamic matching algorithm to be $α$ (respectively $(α, β)$)-approximate if it maintains matching $M$ such that at all times $|M | \geq μ(G) \cdot α$ (respectively $|M| \geq μ(G) \cdot α- β$). We present the first deterministic $(1-ε)$-approximate dynamic matching algorithm with $O(poly(ε^{-1}))$ amortized update time for graphs undergoing edge insertions. Previous solutions either required super-constant [Gupta FSTTCS'14, Bhattacharya-Kiss-Saranurak SODA'23] or exponential in $1/ε$ [Grandoni-Leonardi-Sankowski-Schwiegelshohn-Solomon SODA'19] update time. Our implementation is arguably simpler than the mentioned algorithms and its description is self contained. Moreover, we show that if we allow for additive $(1, ε\cdot n)$-approximation our algorithm seamlessly extends to also handle vertex deletions, on top of edge insertions. This makes our algorithm one of the few small update time algorithms for $(1-ε)$-approximate dynamic matching allowing for updates both increasing and decreasing the maximum matching size of $G$ in a fully dynamic manner.
summary: In the dynamic approximate maximum bipartite matching problem we are given bipartite graph $G$ undergoing updates and our goal is to maintain a matching of $G$ which is large compared the maximum matching size $μ(G)$. We define a dynamic matching algorithm to be $α$ (respectively $(α, β)$)-approximate if it maintains matching $M$ such that at all times $|M | \geq μ(G) \cdot α$ (respectively $|M| \geq μ(G) \cdot α- β$). We present the first deterministic $(1-ε)$-approximate dynamic matching algorithm with $O(poly(ε^{-1}))$ amortized update time for graphs undergoing edge insertions. Previous solutions either required super-constant [Gupta FSTTCS'14, Bhattacharya-Kiss-Saranurak SODA'23] or exponential in $1/ε$ [Grandoni-Leonardi-Sankowski-Schwiegelshohn-Solomon SODA'19] update time. Our implementation is arguably simpler than the mentioned algorithms and its description is self contained. Moreover, we show that if we allow for additive $(1, ε\cdot n)$-approximation our algorithm seamlessly extends to also handle vertex deletions, on top of edge insertions. This makes our algorithm one of the few small update time algorithms for $(1-ε)$-approximate dynamic matching allowing for updates both increasing and decreasing the maximum matching size of $G$ in a fully dynamic manner.
abstract_zh: 在动态近似最大二部匹配问题中，我们给定正在进行更新的二部图 $G$，我们的目标是维持 $G$ 的匹配，该匹配与最大匹配大小 $μ(G)$ 相比较大。我们将动态匹配算法定义为$α$（分别为$(α, β)$）-近似，如果它保持匹配$M$，使得在任何时候$|M | \geq μ(G) \cdot α$ （分别为 $|M| \geq μ(G) \cdot α- β$）。我们提出了第一个确定性 $(1-ε)$ 近似动态匹配算法，对于进行边缘插入的图，其摊销更新时间为 $O(poly(ε^{-1}))$。以前的解决方案要么需要超常数 [Gupta FSTTCS'14、Bhattacharya-Kiss-Saranurak SODA'23]，要么需要 $1/ε$ [Grandoni-Leonardi-Sankowski-Schwiegelshohn-Solomon SODA'19] 指数更新时间。我们的实现可以说比提到的算法更简单，并且它的描述是独立的。此外，我们表明，如果我们允许加性 $(1, ε\cdot n)$ 近似，我们的算法可以无缝扩展到在边缘插入之上处理顶点删除。这使得我们的算法成为 $(1-ε)$ 近似动态匹配的少数更新时间较小的算法之一，允许更新以完全动态的方式增加和减少 $G$ 的最大匹配大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的动态近似最大二分图匹配算法，能够在边插入和顶点删除操作下保持(1-ε)近似比，且更新时间为多项式级别。
AI.motivation: 现有动态匹配算法在处理边插入时要么需要超常数时间，要么无法处理顶点删除，缺乏高效且通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计一种确定性算法，通过多项式时间复杂度实现(1-ε)近似比，并扩展其能力以处理顶点删除操作。
AI.result: 首次实现O(poly(1/ε))时间复杂度的确定性动态匹配算法，支持边插入和顶点删除，且近似比为(1-ε)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在效率和适用性上优于现有方案，为动态图匹配问题提供了新的解决思路。

authors_text: Emma Sarfati,Alexandre Bone,Marc-Michel Rohe,Pietro Gori,Isabelle Bloch
title: Learning to diagnose cirrhosis from radiological and histological labels with joint self and weakly-supervised pretraining strategies
title_zh: 通过联合自我和弱监督预训练策略学习从放射学和组织学标签诊断肝硬化
abstract: Identifying cirrhosis is key to correctly assess the health of the liver. However, the gold standard diagnosis of the cirrhosis needs a medical intervention to obtain the histological confirmation, e.g. the METAVIR score, as the radiological presentation can be equivocal. In this work, we propose to leverage transfer learning from large datasets annotated by radiologists, which we consider as a weak annotation, to predict the histological score available on a small annex dataset. To this end, we propose to compare different pretraining methods, namely weakly-supervised and self-supervised ones, to improve the prediction of the cirrhosis. Finally, we introduce a loss function combining both supervised and self-supervised frameworks for pretraining. This method outperforms the baseline classification of the METAVIR score, reaching an AUC of 0.84 and a balanced accuracy of 0.75, compared to 0.77 and 0.72 for a baseline classifier.
summary: Identifying cirrhosis is key to correctly assess the health of the liver. However, the gold standard diagnosis of the cirrhosis needs a medical intervention to obtain the histological confirmation, e.g. the METAVIR score, as the radiological presentation can be equivocal. In this work, we propose to leverage transfer learning from large datasets annotated by radiologists, which we consider as a weak annotation, to predict the histological score available on a small annex dataset. To this end, we propose to compare different pretraining methods, namely weakly-supervised and self-supervised ones, to improve the prediction of the cirrhosis. Finally, we introduce a loss function combining both supervised and self-supervised frameworks for pretraining. This method outperforms the baseline classification of the METAVIR score, reaching an AUC of 0.84 and a balanced accuracy of 0.75, compared to 0.77 and 0.72 for a baseline classifier.
abstract_zh: 识别肝硬化是正确评估肝脏健康状况的关键。然而，肝硬化的金标准诊断需要医疗干预以获得组织学确认，例如METAVIR 评分，因为放射学表现可能不明确。在这项工作中，我们建议利用放射科医生注释的大型数据集的迁移学习（我们认为这是弱注释）来预测小型附件数据集上可用的组织学评分。为此，我们建议比较不同的预训练方法，即弱监督和自监督方法，以提高肝硬化的预测。最后，我们引入了一个结合了监督和自监督框架的损失函数来进行预训练。该方法优于 METAVIR 评分的基线分类，达到 0.84 的 AUC 和 0.75 的平衡准确度，而基线分类器的 AUC 为 0.77 和 0.72。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合弱监督和自监督预训练策略，利用放射学与组织学标签联合学习肝硬化诊断模型。
AI.motivation: 肝硬化组织学诊断需侵入性检查且放射学表现不明确，需利用大样本弱标注数据提升小数据集的预测性能。
AI.method: 比较弱监督与自监督预训练方法，设计融合监督与自监督框架的联合损失函数进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在METAVIR评分预测任务中达到AUC 0.84、平衡准确率0.75，优于基线模型的AUC 0.77和准确率0.72。
AI.conclusion: 联合预训练策略有效提升肝硬化诊断性能，为小样本医学图像分析提供新方法。

However, the gold standard diagnosis of the cirrhosis needs a medical intervention to obtain the histological confirmation, e.g. the METAVIR score, as the radiological presentation can be equivocal. In this work, we propose to leverage transfer learning from large datasets annotated by radiologists, which we consider as a weak annotation, to predict the histological score available on a small annex dataset. To this end, we propose to compare different pretraining methods, namely weakly-supervised and self-supervised ones, to improve the prediction of the cirrhosis. Finally, we introduce a loss function combining both supervised and self-supervised frameworks for pretraining. authors_text: Minrui Xu,Dusit Niyato,Junlong Chen,Hongliang Zhang,Jiawen Kang,Zehui Xiong,Shiwen Mao,Zhu Han
title: Generative AI-empowered Simulation for Autonomous Driving in Vehicular Mixed Reality Metaverses
title_zh: 车辆混合现实元宇宙中自动驾驶的生成式人工智能仿真
abstract: In the vehicular mixed reality (MR) Metaverse, the distance between physical and virtual entities can be overcome by fusing the physical and virtual environments with multi-dimensional communications in autonomous driving systems. Assisted by digital twin (DT) technologies, connected autonomous vehicles (AVs), roadside units (RSU), and virtual simulators can maintain the vehicular MR Metaverse via digital simulations for sharing data and making driving decisions collaboratively. However, large-scale traffic and driving simulation via realistic data collection and fusion from the physical world for online prediction and offline training in autonomous driving systems are difficult and costly. In this paper, we propose an autonomous driving architecture, where generative AI is leveraged to synthesize unlimited conditioned traffic and driving data in simulations for improving driving safety and traffic efficiency. First, we propose a multi-task DT offloading model for the reliable execution of heterogeneous DT tasks with different requirements at RSUs. Then, based on the preferences of AV's DTs and collected realistic data, virtual simulators can synthesize unlimited conditioned driving and traffic datasets to further improve robustness. Finally, we propose a multi-task enhanced auction-based mechanism to provide fine-grained incentives for RSUs in providing resources for autonomous driving. The property analysis and experimental results demonstrate that the proposed mechanism and architecture are strategy-proof and effective, respectively.
summary: In the vehicular mixed reality (MR) Metaverse, the distance between physical and virtual entities can be overcome by fusing the physical and virtual environments with multi-dimensional communications in autonomous driving systems. Assisted by digital twin (DT) technologies, connected autonomous vehicles (AVs), roadside units (RSU), and virtual simulators can maintain the vehicular MR Metaverse via digital simulations for sharing data and making driving decisions collaboratively. However, large-scale traffic and driving simulation via realistic data collection and fusion from the physical world for online prediction and offline training in autonomous driving systems are difficult and costly. In this paper, we propose an autonomous driving architecture, where generative AI is leveraged to synthesize unlimited conditioned traffic and driving data in simulations for improving driving safety and traffic efficiency. First, we propose a multi-task DT offloading model for the reliable execution of heterogeneous DT tasks with different requirements at RSUs. Then, based on the preferences of AV's DTs and collected realistic data, virtual simulators can synthesize unlimited conditioned driving and traffic datasets to further improve robustness. Finally, we propose a multi-task enhanced auction-based mechanism to provide fine-grained incentives for RSUs in providing resources for autonomous driving. The property analysis and experimental results demonstrate that the proposed mechanism and architecture are strategy-proof and effective, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在车辆混合现实（MR）元宇宙中，可以通过将物理和虚拟环境与自动驾驶系统中的多维通信融合来克服物理和虚拟实体之间的距离。在数字孪生 (DT) 技术的辅助下，联网自动驾驶车辆 (AV)、路侧单元 (RSU) 和虚拟模拟器可以通过数字模拟维护车辆 MR Metaverse，以共享数据并协作做出驾驶决策。然而，通过现实数据收集和融合来自物理世界的大规模交通和驾驶模拟来进行自动驾驶系统的在线预测和离线训练是困难且成本高昂的。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动驾驶架构，利用生成式人工智能在模拟中合成无限的条件交通和驾驶数据，以提高驾驶安全性和交通效率。首先，我们提出了一种多任务 DT 卸载模型，用于在 RSU 上可靠地执行具有不同要求的异构 DT 任务。然后，根据 AV DT 的偏好和收集的真实数据，虚拟模拟器可以合成无限的条件驾驶和交通数据集，以进一步提高鲁棒性。最后，我们提出了一种基于多任务增强拍卖的机制，为 RSU 为自动驾驶提供资源提供细粒度的激励。属性分析和实验结果表明，所提出的机制和架构分别是策略证明和有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成式AI的自主驾驶架构，通过合成交通数据提升车联混合现实元宇宙中的驾驶安全与交通效率。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据采集与融合成本高且难以满足大规模交通仿真需求，需借助生成式AI合成条件化数据以优化自主驾驶系统。
AI.method: 设计多任务数字孪生卸载模型、基于真实数据的虚拟仿真数据生成方法及多任务增强拍卖机制，实现资源分配与数据合成。
AI.result: 实验验证所提机制具有策略安全性，架构有效提升仿真鲁棒性与交通效率。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI驱动的仿真架构可高效支持车联混合现实元宇宙中的自主驾驶需求，兼具经济性与可靠性。

authors_text: Martin Zach,Thomas Pock,Erich Kobler,Antonin Chambolle
title: Explicit Diffusion of Gaussian Mixture Model Based Image Priors
title_zh: 基于图像先验的高斯混合模型的显式扩散
comment: ef:Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision (2023). Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14009. 3-15
comments: ef:Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision (2023). Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14009. 3-15
abstract: In this work we tackle the problem of estimating the density $f_X$ of a random variable $X$ by successive smoothing, such that the smoothed random variable $Y$ fulfills $(\partial_t - Δ_1)f_Y(\,\cdot\,, t) = 0$, $f_Y(\,\cdot\,, 0) = f_X$. With a focus on image processing, we propose a product/fields of experts model with Gaussian mixture experts that admits an analytic expression for $f_Y (\,\cdot\,, t)$ under an orthogonality constraint on the filters. This construction naturally allows the model to be trained simultaneously over the entire diffusion horizon using empirical Bayes. We show preliminary results on image denoising where our model leads to competitive results while being tractable, interpretable, and having only a small number of learnable parameters. As a byproduct, our model can be used for reliable noise estimation, allowing blind denoising of images corrupted by heteroscedastic noise.
summary: In this work we tackle the problem of estimating the density $f_X$ of a random variable $X$ by successive smoothing, such that the smoothed random variable $Y$ fulfills $(\partial_t - Δ_1)f_Y(\,\cdot\,, t) = 0$, $f_Y(\,\cdot\,, 0) = f_X$. With a focus on image processing, we propose a product/fields of experts model with Gaussian mixture experts that admits an analytic expression for $f_Y (\,\cdot\,, t)$ under an orthogonality constraint on the filters. This construction naturally allows the model to be trained simultaneously over the entire diffusion horizon using empirical Bayes. We show preliminary results on image denoising where our model leads to competitive results while being tractable, interpretable, and having only a small number of learnable parameters. As a byproduct, our model can be used for reliable noise estimation, allowing blind denoising of images corrupted by heteroscedastic noise.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了通过连续平滑估计随机变量$X$的密度$f_X$的问题，使得平滑后的随机变量$Y$满足$(\partial_t - Δ_1)f_Y(\,\cdot\,, t) = 0$，$f_Y(\,\cdot\,, 0) = f_X$。着眼于图像处理，我们提出了一个具有高斯混合专家的产品/专家领域模型，该模型在滤波器的正交性约束下允许 $f_Y (\,\cdot\,, t)$ 的分析表达式。这种结构自然允许使用经验贝叶斯在整个扩散范围内同时训练模型。我们展示了图像去噪的初步结果，我们的模型在易于处理、可解释且仅具有少量可学习参数的同时带来了有竞争力的结果。作为副产品，我们的模型可用于可靠的噪声估计，允许对异方差噪声损坏的图像进行盲去噪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯混合模型的图像先验扩散方法，用于密度估计和图像去噪。
AI.motivation: 解决图像处理中异方差噪声的盲去噪问题，传统方法存在参数多、可解释性差等缺陷。
AI.method: 构建带有正交滤波器约束的高斯混合专家模型，通过解析表达式实现扩散过程，并利用经验贝叶斯进行全局训练。
AI.result: 在图像去噪任务中取得竞争力结果，模型参数少且可解释，可可靠估计噪声实现盲去噪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为图像先验建模提供了高效可解释的解决方案，适用于噪声估计与去噪任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯混合模型的图像先验扩散方法，用于密度估计和图像去噪。
ai_content.motivation: 解决图像处理中异方差噪声的盲去噪问题，传统方法存在参数多、可解释性差等缺陷。
ai_content.method: 构建带有正交滤波器约束的高斯混合专家模型，通过解析表达式实现扩散过程，并利用经验贝叶斯进行全局训练。
ai_content.result: 在图像去噪任务中取得竞争力结果，模型参数少且可解释，可可靠估计噪声实现盲去噪。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为图像先验建模提供了高效可解释的解决方案，适用于噪声估计与去噪任务。

search_text: Explicit Diffusion of Gaussian Mixture Model Based Image Priors 基于图像先验的高斯混合模型的显式扩散 In this work we tackle the problem of estimating the density $f_X$ of a random variable $X$ by successive smoothing, such that the smoothed random variable $Y$ fulfills $(\partial_t - Δ_1)f_Y(\,\cdot\,, t) = 0$, $f_Y(\,\cdot\,, 0) = f_X$. With a focus on image processing, we propose a product/fields of experts model with Gaussian mixture experts that admits an analytic expression for $f_Y (\,\cdot\,, t)$ under an orthogonality constraint on the filters. This construction naturally allows the model to be trained simultaneously over the entire diffusion horizon using empirical Bayes. We show preliminary results on image denoising where our model leads to competitive results while being tractable, interpretable, and having only a small number of learnable parameters. As a byproduct, our model can be used for reliable noise estimation, allowing blind denoising of images corrupted by heteroscedastic noise. 在这项工作中，我们解决了通过连续平滑估计随机变量$X$的密度$f_X$的问题，使得平滑后的随机变量$Y$满足$(\partial_t - Δ_1)f_Y(\,\cdot\,, t) = 0$，$f_Y(\,\cdot\,, 0) = f_X$。着眼于图像处理，我们提出了一个具有高斯混合专家的产品/专家领域模型，该模型在滤波器的正交性约束下允许 $f_Y (\,\cdot\,, t)$ 的分析表达式。这种结构自然允许使用经验贝叶斯在整个扩散范围内同时训练模型。我们展示了图像去噪的初步结果，我们的模型在易于处理、可解释且仅具有少量可学习参数的同时带来了有竞争力的结果。作为副产品，我们的模型可用于可靠的噪声估计，允许对异方差噪声损坏的图像进行盲去噪。 本文提出一种基于高斯混合模型的图像先验扩散方法，用于密度估计和图像去噪。 Martin Zach,Thomas Pock,Erich Kobler,Antonin Chambolle cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tomer Ullman
title: Large Language Models Fail on Trivial Alterations to Theory-of-Mind Tasks
title_zh: 大型语言模型无法对心理理论任务进行微小的改变
abstract: Intuitive psychology is a pillar of common-sense reasoning. The replication of this reasoning in machine intelligence is an important stepping-stone on the way to human-like artificial intelligence. Several recent tasks and benchmarks for examining this reasoning in Large-Large Models have focused in particular on belief attribution in Theory-of-Mind tasks. These tasks have shown both successes and failures. We consider in particular a recent purported success case, and show that small variations that maintain the principles of ToM turn the results on their head. We argue that in general, the zero-hypothesis for model evaluation in intuitive psychology should be skeptical, and that outlying failure cases should outweigh average success rates. We also consider what possible future successes on Theory-of-Mind tasks by more powerful LLMs would mean for ToM tasks with people.
summary: Intuitive psychology is a pillar of common-sense reasoning. The replication of this reasoning in machine intelligence is an important stepping-stone on the way to human-like artificial intelligence. Several recent tasks and benchmarks for examining this reasoning in Large-Large Models have focused in particular on belief attribution in Theory-of-Mind tasks. These tasks have shown both successes and failures. We consider in particular a recent purported success case, and show that small variations that maintain the principles of ToM turn the results on their head. We argue that in general, the zero-hypothesis for model evaluation in intuitive psychology should be skeptical, and that outlying failure cases should outweigh average success rates. We also consider what possible future successes on Theory-of-Mind tasks by more powerful LLMs would mean for ToM tasks with people.
abstract_zh: 直觉心理学是常识推理的支柱。在机器智能中复制这种推理是通向类人人工智能之路的重要垫脚石。最近用于检查大型模型中这种推理的几个任务和基准特别关注心理理论任务中的信念归因。这些任务既有成功的，也有失败的。我们特别考虑了最近据称的成功案例，并表明维持 ToM 原则的微小变化会导致结果发生逆转。我们认为，一般来说，直觉心理学中模型评估的零假设应该持怀疑态度，并且外围失败案例应该超过平均成功率。我们还考虑了未来更强大的法学硕士在心智理论任务上可能取得的成功，这对于人类的思维理论任务意味着什么。

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在理论心智任务中对微小变化的敏感性，揭示其在常识推理中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 评估当前LLMs在理论心智任务中的可靠性，并质疑现有评估方法的有效性。
AI.method: 通过修改理论心智任务中的微小细节，测试大型语言模型的表现变化，并分析其结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使微小的改动也能使模型在理论心智任务中的表现显著下降，显示出其对任务细节的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 论文主张在评估模型的常识推理能力时应更加谨慎，异常失败案例比平均成功率更重要，并指出未来更强大的LLMs可能需要新的评估标准。

authors_text: Mohammad Ahmadi,Hamidreza Bolhasani
title: Photonic Neural Networks: A Compact Review
title_zh: 光子神经网络：简要回顾
abstract: It has long been known that photonic science and especially photonic communications can raise the speed of technologies and producing manufacturing. More recently, photonic science has also been interested in its capabilities to implement low-precision linear operations, such as matrix multiplications, fast and effciently. For a long time most scientists taught that Electronics is the end of science but after many years and about 35 years ago had been understood that electronics do not answer alone and should have a new science. Today we face modern ways and instruments for doing tasks as soon as possible in proportion to many decays before. The velocity of progress in science is very fast. All our progress in science area is dependent on modern knowledge about new methods. In this research, we want to review the concept of a photonic neural network. For this research was selected 18 main articles were among the main 30 articles on this subject from 2015 to the 2022 year. These articles noticed three principles: 1- Experimental concepts, 2- Theoretical concepts, and, finally 3- Mathematic concepts. We should be careful with this research because mathematics has a very important and constructive role in our topics! One of the topics that are very valid and also new, is simulation. We used to work with simulation in some parts of this research. First, briefly, we start by introducing photonics and neural networks. In the second we explain the advantages and disadvantages of a combination of both in the science world and industries and technologies about them. Also, we are talking about the achievements of a thin modern science. Third, we try to introduce some important and valid parameters in neural networks. In this manner, we use many mathematic tools in some portions of this article.

abstract_zh: 众所周知，光子科学，尤其是光子通信可以提高技术和生产制造的速度。最近，光子科学也对其快速高效地实现低精度线性运算（例如矩阵乘法）的能力感兴趣。很长一段时间以来，大多数科学家都教导说，电子学是科学的终结，但多年后，大约 35 年前，人们认识到电子学并不能单独回答问题，应该有一门新的科学。今天，我们面临着比以前许多衰退更快地完成任务的现代方法和工具。科学进步的速度非常快。我们在科学领域的所有进步都依赖于有关新方法的现代知识。在这项研究中，我们想回顾一下光子神经网络的概念。本研究从 2015 年至 2022 年有关该主题的 30 篇主要文章中选择了 18 篇主要文章。这些文章注意到三个原则：1- 实验概念，2- 理论概念，最后 3- 数学概念。我们应该谨慎对待这项研究，因为数学在我们的主题中具有非常重要和建设性的作用！模拟是非常有效且新颖的主题之一。我们曾经在这项研究的某些部分使用模拟。首先，我们首先简要介绍光子学和神经网络。在第二部分中，我们解释了科学界以及相关行业和技术的结合的优点和缺点。另外，我们谈论的是薄弱的现代科学的成就。第三，我们尝试在神经网络中引入一些重要且有效的参数。通过这种方式，我们在本文的某些部分使用了许多数学工具。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了光子神经网络的概念，分析其在实验、理论及数学层面的关键原理与应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 光子学在速度与制造效率上的优势使其成为突破电子学局限性的新科学方向，需系统梳理其与神经网络结合的可行性与挑战。
AI.method: 筛选2015-2022年间30篇核心文献中的18篇，从实验、理论及数学三个维度展开分析，并结合模拟方法验证关键参数。
AI.result: 明确了光子神经网络在低精度线性运算中的优势，指出现有研究在数学建模与工程实现上的不足，强调跨学科方法的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 光子神经网络代表未来计算技术的重要方向，需进一步深化数学理论与实验验证的协同创新以推动实际应用。

authors_text: Badri N. Patro,Vijay Srinivas Agneeswaran
title: Efficiency 360: Efficient Vision Transformers
title_zh: Efficiency 360：高效视觉转换器
abstract: Transformers are widely used for solving tasks in natural language processing, computer vision, speech, and music domains. In this paper, we talk about the efficiency of transformers in terms of memory (the number of parameters), computation cost (number of floating points operations), and performance of models, including accuracy, the robustness of the model, and fair \& bias-free features. We mainly discuss the vision transformer for the image classification task. Our contribution is to introduce an efficient 360 framework, which includes various aspects of the vision transformer, to make it more efficient for industrial applications. By considering those applications, we categorize them into multiple dimensions such as privacy, robustness, transparency, fairness, inclusiveness, continual learning, probabilistic models, approximation, computational complexity, and spectral complexity. We compare various vision transformer models based on their performance, the number of parameters, and the number of floating point operations (FLOPs) on multiple datasets.
summary: Transformers are widely used for solving tasks in natural language processing, computer vision, speech, and music domains. In this paper, we talk about the efficiency of transformers in terms of memory (the number of parameters), computation cost (number of floating points operations), and performance of models, including accuracy, the robustness of the model, and fair \& bias-free features. We mainly discuss the vision transformer for the image classification task. Our contribution is to introduce an efficient 360 framework, which includes various aspects of the vision transformer, to make it more efficient for industrial applications. By considering those applications, we categorize them into multiple dimensions such as privacy, robustness, transparency, fairness, inclusiveness, continual learning, probabilistic models, approximation, computational complexity, and spectral complexity. We compare various vision transformer models based on their performance, the number of parameters, and the number of floating point operations (FLOPs) on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: Transformer 广泛用于解决自然语言处理、计算机视觉、语音和音乐领域的任务。在本文中，我们讨论了 Transformer 在内存（参数数量）、计算成本（浮点运算数量）和模型性能方面的效率，包括准确性、模型的鲁棒性以及公平和无偏差特征。我们主要讨论图像分类任务的视觉变换器。我们的贡献是引入一个高效的 360 度框架，其中包括视觉转换器的各个方面，以使其在工业应用中更加高效。通过考虑这些应用，我们将它们分为多个维度，例如隐私、鲁棒性、透明度、公平性、包容性、持续学习、概率模型、近似、计算复杂性和谱复杂性。我们根据多个数据集上的性能、参数数量和浮点运算 (FLOP) 数量来比较各种视觉转换器模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一个高效360框架，优化视觉Transformer在工业应用中的效率，涵盖隐私、鲁棒性、公平性等多维度。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在多个领域广泛应用，但工业应用需更高效模型，需从隐私、鲁棒性、公平性等多维度提升效率与性能。
AI.method: 引入360框架，涵盖隐私、鲁棒性、公平性等维度，通过参数量、FLOPs及性能对比分析优化视觉Transformer。
AI.result: 比较了多个视觉Transformer模型在多数据集上的性能、参数量及FLOPs，评估其效率与效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的360框架为工业应用提供了高效且全面的视觉Transformer解决方案，平衡效率与性能。

authors_text: Ruyu Wang,Sabrina Hoppe,Eduardo Monari,Marco F. Huber
title: Defect Transfer GAN: Diverse Defect Synthesis for Data Augmentation
title_zh: 缺陷转移 GAN：用于数据增强的多种缺陷合成
abstract: Data-hunger and data-imbalance are two major pitfalls in many deep learning approaches. For example, on highly optimized production lines, defective samples are hardly acquired while non-defective samples come almost for free. The defects however often seem to resemble each other, e.g., scratches on different products may only differ in a few characteristics. In this work, we introduce a framework, Defect Transfer GAN (DT-GAN), which learns to represent defect types independent of and across various background products and yet can apply defect-specific styles to generate realistic defective images. An empirical study on the MVTec AD and two additional datasets showcase DT-GAN outperforms state-of-the-art image synthesis methods w.r.t. sample fidelity and diversity in defect generation. We further demonstrate benefits for a critical downstream task in manufacturing -- defect classification. Results show that the augmented data from DT-GAN provides consistent gains even in the few samples regime and reduces the error rate up to 51% compared to both traditional and advanced data augmentation methods.
summary: Data-hunger and data-imbalance are two major pitfalls in many deep learning approaches. For example, on highly optimized production lines, defective samples are hardly acquired while non-defective samples come almost for free. The defects however often seem to resemble each other, e.g., scratches on different products may only differ in a few characteristics. In this work, we introduce a framework, Defect Transfer GAN (DT-GAN), which learns to represent defect types independent of and across various background products and yet can apply defect-specific styles to generate realistic defective images. An empirical study on the MVTec AD and two additional datasets showcase DT-GAN outperforms state-of-the-art image synthesis methods w.r.t. sample fidelity and diversity in defect generation. We further demonstrate benefits for a critical downstream task in manufacturing -- defect classification. Results show that the augmented data from DT-GAN provides consistent gains even in the few samples regime and reduces the error rate up to 51% compared to both traditional and advanced data augmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 数据饥饿和数据不平衡是许多深度学习方法中的两个主要陷阱。例如，在高度优化的生产线上，缺陷样品很难获得，而无缺陷样品几乎是免费的。然而，这些缺陷通常看起来彼此相似，例如，不同产品上的划痕可能仅在少数特征上有所不同。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个框架，缺陷转移 GAN (DT-GAN)，它学习表示独立于各种背景产品的缺陷类型，并且可以应用特定于缺陷的样式来生成真实的缺陷图像。对 MVTec AD 和两个附加数据集的实证研究表明 DT-GAN 优于最先进的图像合成方法。缺陷生成中的样本保真度和多样性。我们进一步展示了制造中关键下游任务——缺陷分类的好处。结果表明，与传统和先进的数据增强方法相比，DT-GAN 的增强数据即使在少量样本情况下也能提供一致的增益，并将错误率降低高达 51%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Defect Transfer GAN（DT-GAN）框架，通过跨背景产品缺陷表示学习，实现多样化缺陷图像生成以解决工业检测中的数据不足与不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中缺陷样本稀缺且特征相似，传统数据增强方法难以生成多样化缺陷数据，导致缺陷分类模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计DT-GAN框架，分离缺陷类型与背景产品特征，通过生成对抗网络学习缺陷风格迁移，实现跨产品缺陷图像的高保真合成。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD等数据集上，DT-GAN在样本保真度和多样性指标优于现有方法，缺陷分类任务中少量样本下错误率降低达51%。
AI.conclusion: DT-GAN有效解决了工业缺陷检测的数据瓶颈问题，其生成的多样化缺陷数据显著提升分类模型性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景表现突出。

authors_text: Frances Cleary,Witawas Srisa-an,David C. Henshall,Sasitharan Balasubramaniam
title: Dynamic Field Programmable Logic-Driven Soft Exosuit
title_zh: 动态现场可编程逻辑驱动软外装
abstract: The next generation of etextiles foresees an era of smart wearable garments where embedded seamless intelligence provides the ability to sense, process and perform. Core to this vision is embedded textile functionality enabling dynamic configuration. In this paper we detail a methodology, design and implementation of a dynamic field programmable logic-driven fabric soft exosuit. Dynamic field programmability allows the soft exosuit to alter its functionality and adapt to specific exercise programs depending on the wearers need. The dynamic field programmability is enabled through motion based control arm movements of the soft exosuit triggering momentary sensors embedded in the fabric exosuit at specific joint placement points (right arm: wrist, elbow).The embedded circuitry in the fabric exosuit is implemented using a layered and interchangeable approach. This includes logic gate patches (AND,OR,NOT) and a layered textile interconnection panel. This modular and interchangeable design enhances the soft exosuits flexibility and adaptability. A truth table aligning to a rehabilitation healthcare use case was utilised. Tests were completed validating the field programmability of the soft exosuit and its capability to switch between its embedded logic driven circuitry and its operational and functionality options controlled by motion movement of the wearers right arm (elbow and wrist). Iterative exercise movement and acceleration based tests were completed to validate the functionality of the field programmable logic driven fabric exosuit. We demonstrate a working soft exosuit prototype with motion controlled operational functionality that can be applied to rehabilitation applications.
summary: The next generation of etextiles foresees an era of smart wearable garments where embedded seamless intelligence provides the ability to sense, process and perform. Core to this vision is embedded textile functionality enabling dynamic configuration. In this paper we detail a methodology, design and implementation of a dynamic field programmable logic-driven fabric soft exosuit. Dynamic field programmability allows the soft exosuit to alter its functionality and adapt to specific exercise programs depending on the wearers need. The dynamic field programmability is enabled through motion based control arm movements of the soft exosuit triggering momentary sensors embedded in the fabric exosuit at specific joint placement points (right arm: wrist, elbow).The embedded circuitry in the fabric exosuit is implemented using a layered and interchangeable approach. This includes logic gate patches (AND,OR,NOT) and a layered textile interconnection panel. This modular and interchangeable design enhances the soft exosuits flexibility and adaptability. A truth table aligning to a rehabilitation healthcare use case was utilised. Tests were completed validating the field programmability of the soft exosuit and its capability to switch between its embedded logic driven circuitry and its operational and functionality options controlled by motion movement of the wearers right arm (elbow and wrist). Iterative exercise movement and acceleration based tests were completed to validate the functionality of the field programmable logic driven fabric exosuit. We demonstrate a working soft exosuit prototype with motion controlled operational functionality that can be applied to rehabilitation applications.
abstract_zh: 下一代电子纺织品预示着智能可穿戴服装的时代，其中嵌入式无缝智能提供感知、处理和执行的能力。这一愿景的核心是嵌入式纺织品功能，可实现动态配置。在本文中，我们详细介绍了动态现场可编程逻辑驱动的织物软外装的方法、设计和实现。动态现场可编程性允许软外装改变其功能并根据佩戴者的需要适应特定的锻炼计划。动态场可编程性是通过基于运动的软外装套装的控制臂运动触发嵌入在织物外装套装中特定关节放置点（右臂：手腕、肘部）的瞬时传感器来实现的。织物外装套装中的嵌入式电路是使用分层和可互换的方法实现的。这包括逻辑门贴片（AND、OR、NOT）和分层纺织互连面板。这种模块化和可互换的设计增强了软式外装的灵活性和适应性。使用了与康复医疗用例相符的真值表。测试已完成，验证了软外装的现场可编程性及其在嵌入式逻辑驱动电路与由佩戴者右臂（肘部和手腕）的运动控制的操作和功能选项之间切换的能力。完成了基于迭代运动和加速的测试，以验证现场可编程逻辑驱动的织物外装的功能。我们展示了一种具有运动控制操作功能的工作软外装原型，可应用于康复应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态现场可编程逻辑的软体外骨骼服设计方法，通过嵌入式纺织电路实现功能动态配置。
AI.motivation: 下一代智能可穿戴服装需要具备动态配置能力以适应不同康复训练需求，传统外骨骼缺乏灵活性和可编程性。
AI.method: 采用逻辑门补丁（AND/OR/NOT）和分层纺织互连板构建可编程纺织电路，通过手臂运动触发嵌入式传感器实现功能切换。
AI.result: 成功开发出可编程软体外骨骼原型，验证了其通过运动控制切换逻辑电路功能的能力，适用于康复训练场景。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化设计显著提升了软体外骨骼的适应性，为个性化康复训练提供了可编程硬件支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态现场可编程逻辑的软体外骨骼服设计方法，通过嵌入式纺织电路实现功能动态配置。
ai_content.motivation: 下一代智能可穿戴服装需要具备动态配置能力以适应不同康复训练需求，传统外骨骼缺乏灵活性和可编程性。
ai_content.method: 采用逻辑门补丁（AND/OR/NOT）和分层纺织互连板构建可编程纺织电路，通过手臂运动触发嵌入式传感器实现功能切换。
ai_content.result: 成功开发出可编程软体外骨骼原型，验证了其通过运动控制切换逻辑电路功能的能力，适用于康复训练场景。

search_text: Dynamic Field Programmable Logic-Driven Soft Exosuit 动态现场可编程逻辑驱动软外装 The next generation of etextiles foresees an era of smart wearable garments where embedded seamless intelligence provides the ability to sense, process and perform. Core to this vision is embedded textile functionality enabling dynamic configuration. In this paper we detail a methodology, design and implementation of a dynamic field programmable logic-driven fabric soft exosuit. Dynamic field programmability allows the soft exosuit to alter its functionality and adapt to specific exercise programs depending on the wearers need. The dynamic field programmability is enabled through motion based control arm movements of the soft exosuit triggering momentary sensors embedded in the fabric exosuit at specific joint placement points (right arm: wrist, elbow).The embedded circuitry in the fabric exosuit is implemented using a layered and interchangeable approach. This includes logic gate patches (AND,OR,NOT) and a layered textile interconnection panel. This modular and interchangeable design enhances the soft exosuits flexibility and adaptability. A truth table aligning to a rehabilitation healthcare use case was utilised. Tests were completed validating the field programmability of the soft exosuit and its capability to switch between its embedded logic driven circuitry and its operational and functionality options controlled by motion movement of the wearers right arm (elbow and wrist). Iterative exercise movement and acceleration based tests were completed to validate the functionality of the field programmable logic driven fabric exosuit. We demonstrate a working soft exosuit prototype with motion controlled operational functionality that can be applied to rehabilitation applications. 下一代电子纺织品预示着智能可穿戴服装的时代，其中嵌入式无缝智能提供感知、处理和执行的能力。这一愿景的核心是嵌入式纺织品功能，可实现动态配置。在本文中，我们详细介绍了动态现场可编程逻辑驱动的织物软外装的方法、设计和实现。动态现场可编程性允许软外装改变其功能并根据佩戴者的需要适应特定的锻炼计划。动态场可编程性是通过基于运动的软外装套装的控制臂运动触发嵌入在织物外装套装中特定关节放置点（右臂：手腕、肘部）的瞬时传感器来实现的。织物外装套装中的嵌入式电路是使用分层和可互换的方法实现的。这包括逻辑门贴片（AND、OR、NOT）和分层纺织互连面板。这种模块化和可互换的设计增强了软式外装的灵活性和适应性。使用了与康复医疗用例相符的真值表。测试已完成，验证了软外装的现场可编程性及其在嵌入式逻辑驱动电路与由佩戴者右臂（肘部和手腕）的运动控制的操作和功能选项之间切换的能力。完成了基于迭代运动和加速的测试，以验证现场可编程逻辑驱动的织物外装的功能。我们展示了一种具有运动控制操作功能的工作软外装原型，可应用于康复应用。 本文提出了一种基于动态现场可编程逻辑的软体外骨骼服设计方法，通过嵌入式纺织电路实现功能动态配置。 Frances Cleary,Witawas Srisa-an,David C. Henshall,Sasitharan Balasubramaniam cs.HC

authors_text: Ye Zhu,Yu Wu,Zhiwei Deng,Olga Russakovsky,Yan Yan
title: Boundary Guided Learning-Free Semantic Control with Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型的边界引导无学习语义控制
comment: NeurIPS 2023. 27 pages including appendices, code at https://github.com/L-YeZhu/BoundaryDiffusion
comments: NeurIPS 2023. 27 pages including appendices, code at https://github.com/L-YeZhu/BoundaryDiffusion
abstract: Applying pre-trained generative denoising diffusion models (DDMs) for downstream tasks such as image semantic editing usually requires either fine-tuning DDMs or learning auxiliary editing networks in the existing literature. In this work, we present our BoundaryDiffusion method for efficient, effective and light-weight semantic control with frozen pre-trained DDMs, without learning any extra networks. As one of the first learning-free diffusion editing works, we start by seeking a comprehensive understanding of the intermediate high-dimensional latent spaces by theoretically and empirically analyzing their probabilistic and geometric behaviors in the Markov chain. We then propose to further explore the critical step for editing in the denoising trajectory that characterizes the convergence of a pre-trained DDM and introduce an automatic search method. Last but not least, in contrast to the conventional understanding that DDMs have relatively poor semantic behaviors, we prove that the critical latent space we found already exhibits semantic subspace boundaries at the generic level in unconditional DDMs, which allows us to do controllable manipulation by guiding the denoising trajectory towards the targeted boundary via a single-step operation. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple DPMs architectures (DDPM, iDDPM) and datasets (CelebA, CelebA-HQ, LSUN-church, LSUN-bedroom, AFHQ-dog) with different resolutions (64, 256), achieving superior or state-of-the-art performance in various task scenarios (image semantic editing, text-based editing, unconditional semantic control) to demonstrate the effectiveness.
summary: Applying pre-trained generative denoising diffusion models (DDMs) for downstream tasks such as image semantic editing usually requires either fine-tuning DDMs or learning auxiliary editing networks in the existing literature. In this work, we present our BoundaryDiffusion method for efficient, effective and light-weight semantic control with frozen pre-trained DDMs, without learning any extra networks. As one of the first learning-free diffusion editing works, we start by seeking a comprehensive understanding of the intermediate high-dimensional latent spaces by theoretically and empirically analyzing their probabilistic and geometric behaviors in the Markov chain. We then propose to further explore the critical step for editing in the denoising trajectory that characterizes the convergence of a pre-trained DDM and introduce an automatic search method. Last but not least, in contrast to the conventional understanding that DDMs have relatively poor semantic behaviors, we prove that the critical latent space we found already exhibits semantic subspace boundaries at the generic level in unconditional DDMs, which allows us to do controllable manipulation by guiding the denoising trajectory towards the targeted boundary via a single-step operation. We conduct extensive experiments on multiple DPMs architectures (DDPM, iDDPM) and datasets (CelebA, CelebA-HQ, LSUN-church, LSUN-bedroom, AFHQ-dog) with different resolutions (64, 256), achieving superior or state-of-the-art performance in various task scenarios (image semantic editing, text-based editing, unconditional semantic control) to demonstrate the effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 将预训练的生成去噪扩散模型（DDM）应用于图像语义编辑等下游任务通常需要微调 DDM 或学习现有文献中的辅助编辑网络。在这项工作中，我们提出了我们的 BoundaryDiffusion 方法，通过冻结的预训练 DDM 进行高效、有效和轻量级的语义控制，而无需学习任何额外的网络。作为第一个免学习扩散编辑工作，我们首先通过理论和实证分析中间高维潜在空间在马尔可夫链中的概率和几何行为来寻求对中间高维潜在空间的全面理解。然后，我们建议进一步探索去噪轨迹编辑的关键步骤，以表征预训练 DDM 的收敛性，并引入自动搜索方法。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，与传统的DDM具有相对较差的语义行为的理解相反，我们证明了我们发现的关键潜在空间已经在无条件DDM中的通用级别上展现了语义子空间边界，这使得我们能够通过单步操作引导去噪轨迹朝向目标边界来进行可控操作。我们对不同分辨率（64、256）的多个 DPM 架构（DDPM、iDDPM）和数据集（CelebA、CelebA-HQ、LSUN-church、LSUN-bedroom、AFHQ-dog）进行了广泛的实验，在各种任务场景（图像语义编辑、基于文本的编辑、无条件语义控制）中实现了卓越或最先进的性能，以证明其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外训练的语义控制方法，通过冻结预训练扩散模型（DDM）实现高效的图像语义编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖微调DDM或学习辅助网络，存在计算成本高、灵活性差的问题，需探索无需额外训练的轻量级语义控制方案。
AI.method: 通过理论与实证分析DDM的潜在空间特性，提出BoundaryDiffusion方法，利用预训练模型的语义边界进行单步轨迹引导，实现可控编辑。
AI.result: 在多个DDPM架构和数据集（如CelebA、LSUN）上验证，于图像语义编辑、文本编辑等任务中达到或超越现有方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 证明冻结预训练DDM可通过语义边界引导实现高效编辑，为学习-free的扩散模型应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Guo,Jing Ma,Arkaitz Zubiaga
title: Cluster-based Deep Ensemble Learning for Emotion Classification in Internet Memes
title_zh: 基于集群的深度集成学习，用于互联网迷因中的情感分类
abstract: Memes have gained popularity as a means to share visual ideas through the Internet and social media by mixing text, images and videos, often for humorous purposes. Research enabling automated analysis of memes has gained attention in recent years, including among others the task of classifying the emotion expressed in memes. In this paper, we propose a novel model, cluster-based deep ensemble learning (CDEL), for emotion classification in memes. CDEL is a hybrid model that leverages the benefits of a deep learning model in combination with a clustering algorithm, which enhances the model with additional information after clustering memes with similar facial features. We evaluate the performance of CDEL on a benchmark dataset for emotion classification, proving its effectiveness by outperforming a wide range of baseline models and achieving state-of-the-art performance. Further evaluation through ablated models demonstrates the effectiveness of the different components of CDEL.
summary: Memes have gained popularity as a means to share visual ideas through the Internet and social media by mixing text, images and videos, often for humorous purposes. Research enabling automated analysis of memes has gained attention in recent years, including among others the task of classifying the emotion expressed in memes. In this paper, we propose a novel model, cluster-based deep ensemble learning (CDEL), for emotion classification in memes. CDEL is a hybrid model that leverages the benefits of a deep learning model in combination with a clustering algorithm, which enhances the model with additional information after clustering memes with similar facial features. We evaluate the performance of CDEL on a benchmark dataset for emotion classification, proving its effectiveness by outperforming a wide range of baseline models and achieving state-of-the-art performance. Further evaluation through ablated models demonstrates the effectiveness of the different components of CDEL.
abstract_zh: 模因作为一种通过互联网和社交媒体通过混合文本、图像和视频来分享视觉想法的方式而广受欢迎，通常是出于幽默的目的。近年来，能够自动分析模因的研究引起了人们的关注，其中包括对模因中表达的情感进行分类的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的模型，即基于集群的深度集成学习（CDEL），用于模因中的情感分类。 CDEL 是一种混合模型，它利用深度学习模型与聚类算法相结合的优势，在对具有相似面部特征的 meme 进行聚类后，通过附加信息来增强模型。我们在情感分类基准数据集上评估 CDEL 的性能，通过超越各种基线模型并实现最先进的性能来证明其有效性。通过消融模型的进一步评估证明了 CDEL 不同组成部分的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于聚类的深度集成学习模型（CDEL），用于互联网迷因的情绪分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在迷因情绪分类中存在不足，需结合深度学习与聚类算法提升分类效果。
AI.method: 融合深度学习与聚类算法，通过聚类相似面部特征的迷因，增强模型信息，构建集成学习框架。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上优于多种基线模型，达到最先进水平，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CDEL模型有效提升了迷因情绪分类性能，为该领域提供了一种新的解决方案。
