Research enabling automated analysis of memes has gained attention in recent years, including among others the task of classifying the emotion expressed in memes. In this paper, we propose a novel model, cluster-based deep ensemble learning (CDEL), for emotion classification in memes. CDEL is a hybrid model that leverages the benefits of a deep learning model in combination with a clustering algorithm, which enhances the model with additional information after clustering memes with similar facial features. We evaluate the performance of CDEL on a benchmark dataset for emotion classification, proving its effectiveness by outperforming a wide range of baseline models and achieving state-of-the-art performance. Further evaluation through ablated models demonstrates the effectiveness of the different components of CDEL. 模因作为一种通过互联网和社交媒体通过混合文本、图像和视频来分享视觉想法的方式而广受欢迎，通常是出于幽默的目的。近年来，能够自动分析模因的研究引起了人们的关注，其中包括对模因中表达的情感进行分类的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的模型，即基于集群的深度集成学习（CDEL），用于模因中的情感分类。 CDEL 是一种混合模型，它利用深度学习模型与聚类算法相结合的优势，在对具有相似面部特征的 meme 进行聚类后，通过附加信息来增强模型。我们在情感分类基准数据集上评估 CDEL 的性能，通过超越各种基线模型并实现最先进的性能来证明其有效性。通过消融模型的进一步评估证明了 CDEL 不同组成部分的有效性。 提出一种基于聚类的深度集成学习模型（CDEL），用于互联网迷因的情绪分类任务。 Xiaoyu Guo,Jing Ma,Arkaitz Zubiaga cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Xiao-Ying Zhao,Qiu-Shi Zhu,Jie Zhang
title: Speech Enhancement with Multi-granularity Vector Quantization
title_zh: 通过多粒度矢量量化进行语音增强
abstract: With advances in deep learning, neural network based speech enhancement (SE) has developed rapidly in the last decade. Meanwhile, the self-supervised pre-trained model and vector quantization (VQ) have achieved excellent performance on many speech-related tasks, while they are less explored on SE. As it was shown in our previous work that utilizing a VQ module to discretize noisy speech representations is beneficial for speech denoising, in this work we therefore study the impact of using VQ at different layers with different number of codebooks. Different VQ modules indeed enable to extract multiple-granularity speech features. Following an attention mechanism, the contextual features extracted by a pre-trained model are fused with the local features extracted by the encoder, such that both global and local information are preserved to reconstruct the enhanced speech. Experimental results on the Valentini dataset show that the proposed model can improve the SE performance, where the impact of choosing pre-trained models is also revealed.
summary: With advances in deep learning, neural network based speech enhancement (SE) has developed rapidly in the last decade. Meanwhile, the self-supervised pre-trained model and vector quantization (VQ) have achieved excellent performance on many speech-related tasks, while they are less explored on SE. As it was shown in our previous work that utilizing a VQ module to discretize noisy speech representations is beneficial for speech denoising, in this work we therefore study the impact of using VQ at different layers with different number of codebooks. Different VQ modules indeed enable to extract multiple-granularity speech features. Following an attention mechanism, the contextual features extracted by a pre-trained model are fused with the local features extracted by the encoder, such that both global and local information are preserved to reconstruct the enhanced speech. Experimental results on the Valentini dataset show that the proposed model can improve the SE performance, where the impact of choosing pre-trained models is also revealed.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的进步，基于神经网络的语音增强（SE）在过去十年中发展迅速。同时，自监督预训练模型和矢量量化（VQ）在许多语音相关任务上取得了优异的性能，但在SE上的探索较少。正如我们之前的工作所示，利用 VQ 模块离散化噪声语音表示有利于语音去噪，因此在这项工作中，我们研究了在不同层使用不同数量的码本的 VQ 的影响。不同的 VQ 模块确实能够提取多粒度语音特征。遵循注意力机制，将预训练模型提取的上下文特征与编码器提取的局部特征融合，从而保留全局和局部信息以重建增强的语音。 Valentini 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的模型可以提高 SE 性能，其中也揭示了选择预训练模型的影响。

AI.tldr: 研究多粒度向量量化在语音增强中的应用，通过结合不同层级的VQ模块和预训练模型特征来提升语音降噪效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督预训练模型和向量量化在语音任务中表现优异，但其在语音增强中的应用尚未充分探索。先前研究表明VQ有助于语音去噪，因此需进一步研究不同层级和数量的VQ模块对SE的影响。
AI.method: 采用多粒度向量量化模块，在不同网络层级使用不同数量的代码本以提取多尺度语音特征；结合注意力机制融合预训练模型的上下文特征与编码器的局部特征，保留全局与局部信息以重建增强语音。
AI.result: 在Valentini数据集上的实验表明，该模型有效提升了语音增强性能，并验证了预训练模型选择对结果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度向量量化结合预训练模型特征融合策略能有效提升语音增强效果，且预训练模型的选择对最终性能有显著影响。

authors_text: Nicholas E. Silionis,Theodora Liangou,Konstantinos N. Anyfantis
title: Conditional deep generative models as surrogates for spatial field solution reconstruction with quantified uncertainty in Structural Health Monitoring applications
title_zh: 条件深度生成模型作为结构健康监测应用中具有量化不确定性的空间场解重建的替代品
comment: 28 pages, 14 figures. Submitted to Elsevier Journal for publication
comments: 28 pages, 14 figures. Submitted to Elsevier Journal for publication
abstract: In recent years, increasingly complex computational models are being built to describe physical systems which has led to increased use of surrogate models to reduce computational cost. In problems related to Structural Health Monitoring (SHM), models capable of both handling high-dimensional data and quantifying uncertainty are required. In this work, our goal is to propose a conditional deep generative model as a surrogate aimed at such applications and high-dimensional stochastic structural simulations in general. To that end, a conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) utilizing convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is employed to obtain reconstructions of spatially ordered structural response quantities for structural elements that are subjected to stochastic loading. Two numerical examples, inspired by potential SHM applications, are utilized to demonstrate the performance of the surrogate. The model is able to achieve high reconstruction accuracy compared to the reference Finite Element (FE) solutions, while at the same time successfully encoding the load uncertainty.
summary: In recent years, increasingly complex computational models are being built to describe physical systems which has led to increased use of surrogate models to reduce computational cost. In problems related to Structural Health Monitoring (SHM), models capable of both handling high-dimensional data and quantifying uncertainty are required. In this work, our goal is to propose a conditional deep generative model as a surrogate aimed at such applications and high-dimensional stochastic structural simulations in general. To that end, a conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) utilizing convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is employed to obtain reconstructions of spatially ordered structural response quantities for structural elements that are subjected to stochastic loading. Two numerical examples, inspired by potential SHM applications, are utilized to demonstrate the performance of the surrogate. The model is able to achieve high reconstruction accuracy compared to the reference Finite Element (FE) solutions, while at the same time successfully encoding the load uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 近年来，越来越复杂的计算模型被建立来描述物理系统，这导致越来越多地使用替代模型来降低计算成本。在与结构健康监测（SHM）相关的问题中，需要能够处理高维数据和量化不确定性的模型。在这项工作中，我们的目标是提出一种条件深度生成模型作为针对此类应用和一般高维随机结构模拟的替代模型。为此，采用利用卷积神经网络（CNN）的条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）来获得受到随机载荷的结构元素的空间有序结构响应量的重建。受潜在 SHM 应用的启发，利用两个数值示例来展示代理的性能。与参考有限元 (FE) 解决方案相比，该模型能够实现较高的重建精度，同时成功编码负载不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种条件深度生成模型作为代理模型，用于结构健康监测中的空间场解重建，并量化不确定性。
AI.motivation: 复杂计算模型的使用增加计算成本，需高效处理高维数据并量化不确定性的代理模型，尤其在结构健康监测（SHM）中。
AI.method: 采用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）结合卷积神经网络（CNNs），重建受随机载荷作用的结构响应，通过两个数值例子验证性能。
AI.result: 模型重建精度优于有限元解，同时成功编码载荷不确定性，验证了其在高维随机结构模拟中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CVAE方法在SHM中表现出高效重建高维结构响应并量化不确定性的能力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Sairam Sri Vatsavai,Ishan Thakkar
title: A Bit-Parallel Deterministic Stochastic Multiplier
title_zh: 位并行确定性随机乘法器
abstract: This paper presents a novel bit-parallel deterministic stochastic multiplier, which improves the area-energy-latency product by up to 10.6$\times$10$^4$, while improving the computational error by 32.2\%, compared to three prior stochastic multipliers.
summary: This paper presents a novel bit-parallel deterministic stochastic multiplier, which improves the area-energy-latency product by up to 10.6$\times$10$^4$, while improving the computational error by 32.2\%, compared to three prior stochastic multipliers.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的位并行确定性随机乘法器，与之前的三种随机乘法器相比，该乘法器将面积能量延迟乘积提高了 10.6$\times$10$^4$，同时将计算误差提高了 32.2\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的位并行确定性随机乘法器。
AI.motivation: 为了提高计算效率和准确性，减少面积、能量和延迟的乘积。
AI.method: 设计了一种位并行的确定性随机乘法器，以优化计算性能。
AI.result: 相比三种先前的随机乘法器，该乘法器将面积-能量-延迟乘积提高了10.6×10^4倍，并将计算误差降低了32.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该乘法器在计算效率和准确性方面表现出显著优势，为相关应用提供了更优的解决方案。

motivation: 为了提高计算效率和准确性，减少面积、能量和延迟的乘积。
method: 设计了一种位并行的确定性随机乘法器，以优化计算性能。
result: 相比三种先前的随机乘法器，该乘法器将面积-能量-延迟乘积提高了10.6×10^4倍，并将计算误差降低了32.2%。
conclusion: 该乘法器在计算效率和准确性方面表现出显著优势，为相关应用提供了更优的解决方案。
search_text: A Bit-Parallel Deterministic Stochastic Multiplier 位并行确定性随机乘法器 This paper presents a novel bit-parallel deterministic stochastic multiplier, which improves the area-energy-latency product by up to 10.6$\times$10$^4$, while improving the computational error by 32.2\%, compared to three prior stochastic multipliers. 本文提出了一种新颖的位并行确定性随机乘法器，与之前的三种随机乘法器相比，该乘法器将面积能量延迟乘积提高了 10.6$\times$10$^4$，同时将计算误差提高了 32.2\%。 本文提出了一种新型的位并行确定性随机乘法器。 Sairam Sri Vatsavai,Ishan Thakkar cs.AR,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Carlos Gonzalez-Garcia,Ruben Tolosana,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Julian Fierrez,Javier Ortega-Garcia
title: Introduction to Presentation Attacks in Signature Biometrics and Recent Advances
title_zh: 签名生物识别中的演示攻击简介和最新进展
comment: Chapter of the Handbook of Biometric Anti-Spoofing (Third Edition)
comments: Chapter of the Handbook of Biometric Anti-Spoofing (Third Edition)
abstract: Applications based on biometric authentication have received a lot of interest in the last years due to the breathtaking results obtained using personal traits such as face or fingerprint. However, it is important not to forget that these biometric systems have to withstand different types of possible attacks. This chapter carries out an analysis of different Presentation Attack (PA) scenarios for on-line handwritten signature verification. The main contributions of this chapter are: i) an updated overview of representative methods for Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) in signature biometrics; ii) a description of the different levels of PAs existing in on-line signature verification regarding the amount of information available to the impostor, as well as the training, effort, and ability to perform the forgeries; and iii) an evaluation of the system performance in signature biometrics under different scenarios considering recent publicly available signature databases, DeepSignDB and SVC2021_EvalDB. This work is in line with recent efforts in the Common Criteria standardization community towards security evaluation of biometric systems.
summary: Applications based on biometric authentication have received a lot of interest in the last years due to the breathtaking results obtained using personal traits such as face or fingerprint. However, it is important not to forget that these biometric systems have to withstand different types of possible attacks. This chapter carries out an analysis of different Presentation Attack (PA) scenarios for on-line handwritten signature verification. The main contributions of this chapter are: i) an updated overview of representative methods for Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) in signature biometrics; ii) a description of the different levels of PAs existing in on-line signature verification regarding the amount of information available to the impostor, as well as the training, effort, and ability to perform the forgeries; and iii) an evaluation of the system performance in signature biometrics under different scenarios considering recent publicly available signature databases, DeepSignDB and SVC2021_EvalDB. This work is in line with recent efforts in the Common Criteria standardization community towards security evaluation of biometric systems.
abstract_zh: 由于使用面部或指纹等个人特征获得了令人惊叹的结果，基于生物特征认证的应用在过去几年中引起了很大的兴趣。然而，重要的是不要忘记这些生物识别系统必须承受不同类型的可能的攻击。本章对在线手写签名验证的不同演示攻击（PA）场景进行了分析。本章的主要贡献是： i) 签名生物识别中演示攻击检测（PAD）代表性方法的更新概述； ii) 对在线签名验证中存在的不同级别 PA 的描述，涉及冒充者可获得的信息量，以及进行伪造的培训、努力和能力； iii) 考虑最新公开的签名数据库 DeepSignDB 和 SVC2021_EvalDB，在不同场景下对签名生物识别系统性能进行评估。这项工作符合通用标准标准化界最近对生物识别系统安全评估所做的努力。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在线手写签名验证中的呈现攻击（PA）场景，并综述了签名生物特征中的呈现攻击检测（PAD）方法。
AI.motivation: 生物特征认证系统面临多种攻击威胁，需针对签名验证中的呈现攻击进行系统性分析与检测方法研究。
AI.method: 通过分析不同攻击层级（信息量、训练难度等），结合DeepSignDB和SVC2021_EvalDB数据库评估系统性能。
AI.result: 总结了现有PAD方法，区分了攻击等级，并基于公开数据集验证了签名生物特征系统的安全性表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文为生物特征系统的安全评估提供了框架支持，符合Common Criteria标准化社区的研究方向。

authors_text: Houjian Guo,Chaoran Liu,Carlos Toshinori Ishi,Hiroshi Ishiguro
title: QuickVC: Any-to-many Voice Conversion Using Inverse Short-time Fourier Transform for Faster Conversion
title_zh: QuickVC：使用短时傅里叶逆变换进行任意对多语音转换以实现更快的转换
abstract: With the development of automatic speech recognition (ASR) and text-to-speech (TTS) technology, high-quality voice conversion (VC) can be achieved by extracting source content information and target speaker information to reconstruct waveforms. However, current methods still require improvement in terms of inference speed. In this study, we propose a lightweight VITS-based VC model that uses the HuBERT-Soft model to extract content information features without speaker information. Through subjective and objective experiments on synthesized speech, the proposed model demonstrates competitive results in terms of naturalness and similarity. Importantly, unlike the original VITS model, we use the inverse short-time Fourier transform (iSTFT) to replace the most computationally expensive part. Experimental results show that our model can generate samples at over 5000 kHz on the 3090 GPU and over 250 kHz on the i9-10900K CPU, achieving competitive speed for the same hardware configuration.
summary: With the development of automatic speech recognition (ASR) and text-to-speech (TTS) technology, high-quality voice conversion (VC) can be achieved by extracting source content information and target speaker information to reconstruct waveforms. However, current methods still require improvement in terms of inference speed. In this study, we propose a lightweight VITS-based VC model that uses the HuBERT-Soft model to extract content information features without speaker information. Through subjective and objective experiments on synthesized speech, the proposed model demonstrates competitive results in terms of naturalness and similarity. Importantly, unlike the original VITS model, we use the inverse short-time Fourier transform (iSTFT) to replace the most computationally expensive part. Experimental results show that our model can generate samples at over 5000 kHz on the 3090 GPU and over 250 kHz on the i9-10900K CPU, achieving competitive speed for the same hardware configuration.
abstract_zh: 随着自动语音识别（ASR）和文本转语音（TTS）技术的发展，通过提取源内容信息和目标说话人信息来重构波形，可以实现高质量的语音转换（VC）。然而，当前的方法在推理速度方面仍然需要改进。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于 VITS 的轻量级 VC 模型，该模型使用 HuBERT-Soft 模型在没有说话人信息的情况下提取内容信息特征。通过对合成语音的主观和客观实验，所提出的模型在自然度和相似度方面展示了有竞争力的结果。重要的是，与原始 VITS 模型不同，我们使用短时傅立叶逆变换（iSTFT）来替换计算成本最高的部分。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以在 3090 GPU 上以超过 5000 kHz 的速度生成样本，在 i9-10900K CPU 上以超过 250 kHz 的速度生成样本，在相同硬件配置下实现具有竞争力的速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuickVC模型，通过逆短时傅里叶变换（iSTFT）加速语音转换过程，实现高质量且快速的任意到多说话人语音转换。
AI.motivation: 现有语音转换方法在推理速度上存在不足，需提升转换效率以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 基于轻量级VITS框架，采用HuBERT-Soft提取内容特征并移除说话人信息，以iSTFT替代原模型中计算量最大的部分。
AI.result: 在3090 GPU上生成速度达5000 kHz，在i9-10900K CPU上达250 kHz，硬件配置相同条件下速度显著提升，合成语音的自然度和相似度具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: QuickVC通过优化计算流程有效提升了语音转换速度，在保持质量的同时为实际部署提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Mohammad Mahdi Azarbeik,Hamidreza Razavi,Kaveh Merat,Hassan Salarieh
title: Augmenting Inertial Motion Capture with SLAM Using EKF and SRUKF Data Fusion Algorithms
title_zh: 使用 EKF 和 SRUKF 数据融合算法通过 SLAM 增强惯性运动捕捉
abstract: Inertial motion capture systems widely use low-cost IMUs to obtain the orientation of human body segments, but these sensors alone are unable to estimate link positions. Therefore, this research used a SLAM method in conjunction with inertial data fusion to estimate link positions. SLAM is a method that tracks a target in a reconstructed map of the environment using a camera. This paper proposes quaternion-based extended and square-root unscented Kalman filters (EKF & SRUKF) algorithms for pose estimation. The Kalman filters use measurements based on SLAM position data, multi-link biomechanical constraints, and vertical referencing to correct errors. In addition to the sensor biases, the fusion algorithm is capable of estimating link geometries, allowing the imposing of biomechanical constraints without a priori knowledge of sensor positions. An optical tracking system is used as a reference of ground-truth to experimentally evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm in various scenarios of human arm movements. The proposed algorithms achieve up to 5.87 (cm) and 1.1 (deg) accuracy in position and attitude estimation. Compared to the EKF, the SRUKF algorithm presents a smoother and higher convergence rate but is 2.4 times more computationally demanding. After convergence, the SRUKF is up to 17% less and 36% more accurate than the EKF in position and attitude estimation, respectively. Using an absolute position measurement method instead of SLAM produced 80% and 40%, in the case of EKF, and 60% and 6%, in the case of SRUKF, less error in position and attitude estimation, respectively.

Therefore, this research used a SLAM method in conjunction with inertial data fusion to estimate link positions. SLAM is a method that tracks a target in a reconstructed map of the environment using a camera. This paper proposes quaternion-based extended and square-root unscented Kalman filters (EKF & SRUKF) algorithms for pose estimation. The Kalman filters use measurements based on SLAM position data, multi-link biomechanical constraints, and vertical referencing to correct errors. In addition to the sensor biases, the fusion algorithm is capable of estimating link geometries, allowing the imposing of biomechanical constraints without a priori knowledge of sensor positions. An optical tracking system is used as a reference of ground-truth to experimentally evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm in various scenarios of human arm movements. The proposed algorithms achieve up to 5.87 (cm) and 1.1 (deg) accuracy in position and attitude estimation. Compared to the EKF, the SRUKF algorithm presents a smoother and higher convergence rate but is 2.4 times more computationally demanding. After convergence, the SRUKF is up to 17% less and 36% more accurate than the EKF in position and attitude estimation, respectively. Using an absolute position measurement method instead of SLAM produced 80% and 40%, in the case of EKF, and 60% and 6%, in the case of SRUKF, less error in position and attitude estimation, respectively.
abstract_zh: 惯性运动捕捉系统广泛使用低成本 IMU 来获取人体各部分的方向，但仅靠这些传感器无法估计连杆位置。因此，本研究采用SLAM方法结合惯性数据融合来估计链路位置。 SLAM 是一种使用摄像机在重建的环境地图中跟踪目标的方法。本文提出了基于四元数的扩展和平方根无迹卡尔曼滤波器（EKF 和 SRUKF）算法用于姿态估计。卡尔曼滤波器使用基于 SLAM 位置数据、多链路生物力学约束和垂直参考的测量来纠正错误。除了传感器偏差之外，融合算法还能够估计链接几何形状，从而无需事先了解传感器位置即可施加生物力学约束。使用光学跟踪系统作为地面实况的参考，通过实验评估所提出的算法在人体手臂运动的各种场景中的性能。所提出的算法在位置和姿态估计方面实现了高达 5.87 (cm) 和 1.1 (deg) 的精度。与 EKF 相比，SRUKF 算法具有更平滑、更高的收敛速度，但计算量要求高出 2.4 倍。收敛后，SRUKF 在位置和姿态估计方面分别比 EKF 低 17% 和 36%。使用绝对位置测量方法代替 SLAM，在 EKF 的情况下，位置和姿态估计的误差分别为 80% 和 40%，在 SRUKF 的情况下，分别为 60% 和 6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合SLAM与EKF/SRUKF数据融合算法，增强惯性运动捕捉系统的位姿估计精度。
AI.motivation: 惯性测量单元（IMU）无法独立估计人体连杆位置，需结合SLAM与生物力学约束提升定位准确性。
AI.method: 基于四元数的EKF和SRUKF算法，融合SLAM位置数据、多连杆生物力学约束及垂直参考，修正传感器偏差并估计连杆几何参数。
AI.result: EKF/SRUKF算法在位置和姿态估计中分别达到5.87厘米和1.1度精度；SRUKF收敛更快但计算量高2.4倍，收敛后位置精度优于EKF 17%，姿态精度低36%。采用绝对定位法可进一步降低误差。
AI.conclusion: SRUKF在收敛后表现更优但计算成本高，绝对定位法较SLAM能显著减少误差，验证了数据融合与生物力学约束的有效性。

search_text: Augmenting Inertial Motion Capture with SLAM Using EKF and SRUKF Data Fusion Algorithms 使用 EKF 和 SRUKF 数据融合算法通过 SLAM 增强惯性运动捕捉 Inertial motion capture systems widely use low-cost IMUs to obtain the orientation of human body segments, but these sensors alone are unable to estimate link positions. Therefore, this research used a SLAM method in conjunction with inertial data fusion to estimate link positions. SLAM is a method that tracks a target in a reconstructed map of the environment using a camera. This paper proposes quaternion-based extended and square-root unscented Kalman filters (EKF & SRUKF) algorithms for pose estimation. The Kalman filters use measurements based on SLAM position data, multi-link biomechanical constraints, and vertical referencing to correct errors. In addition to the sensor biases, the fusion algorithm is capable of estimating link geometries, allowing the imposing of biomechanical constraints without a priori knowledge of sensor positions. An optical tracking system is used as a reference of ground-truth to experimentally evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm in various scenarios of human arm movements. The proposed algorithms achieve up to 5.87 (cm) and 1.1 (deg) accuracy in position and attitude estimation. Compared to the EKF, the SRUKF algorithm presents a smoother and higher convergence rate but is 2.4 times more computationally demanding. After convergence, the SRUKF is up to 17% less and 36% more accurate than the EKF in position and attitude estimation, respectively. Using an absolute position measurement method instead of SLAM produced 80% and 40%, in the case of EKF, and 60% and 6%, in the case of SRUKF, less error in position and attitude estimation, respectively. 惯性运动捕捉系统广泛使用低成本 IMU 来获取人体各部分的方向，但仅靠这些传感器无法估计连杆位置。因此，本研究采用SLAM方法结合惯性数据融合来估计链路位置。 SLAM 是一种使用摄像机在重建的环境地图中跟踪目标的方法。本文提出了基于四元数的扩展和平方根无迹卡尔曼滤波器（EKF 和 SRUKF）算法用于姿态估计。卡尔曼滤波器使用基于 SLAM 位置数据、多链路生物力学约束和垂直参考的测量来纠正错误。除了传感器偏差之外，融合算法还能够估计链接几何形状，从而无需事先了解传感器位置即可施加生物力学约束。使用光学跟踪系统作为地面实况的参考，通过实验评估所提出的算法在人体手臂运动的各种场景中的性能。所提出的算法在位置和姿态估计方面实现了高达 5.87 (cm) 和 1.1 (deg) 的精度。与 EKF 相比，SRUKF 算法具有更平滑、更高的收敛速度，但计算量要求高出 2.4 倍。收敛后，SRUKF 在位置和姿态估计方面分别比 EKF 低 17% 和 36%。使用绝对位置测量方法代替 SLAM，在 EKF 的情况下，位置和姿态估计的误差分别为 80% 和 40%，在 SRUKF 的情况下，分别为 60% 和 6%。 本文提出结合SLAM与EKF/SRUKF数据融合算法，增强惯性运动捕捉系统的位姿估计精度。 Mohammad Mahdi Azarbeik,Hamidreza Razavi,Kaveh Merat,Hassan Salarieh cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zhang Guo,Vuthea Chheang,Jicheng Li,Kenneth E. Barner,Anjana Bhat,Roghayeh Barmaki
title: Social Visual Behavior Analytics for Autism Therapy of Children Based on Automated Mutual Gaze Detection
title_zh: 基于自动相互注视检测的儿童自闭症治疗社会视觉行为分析
comment: Accepted to IEEE/ACM international conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems and Engineering Technologies (CHASE) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE/ACM international conference on Connected Health: Applications, Systems and Engineering Technologies (CHASE) 2023
abstract: Social visual behavior, as a type of non-verbal communication, plays a central role in studying social cognitive processes in interactive and complex settings of autism therapy interventions. However, for social visual behavior analytics in children with autism, it is challenging to collect gaze data manually and evaluate them because it costs a lot of time and effort for human coders. In this paper, we introduce a social visual behavior analytics approach by quantifying the mutual gaze performance of children receiving play-based autism interventions using an automated mutual gaze detection framework. Our analysis is based on a video dataset that captures and records social interactions between children with autism and their therapy trainers (N=28 observations, 84 video clips, 21 Hrs duration). The effectiveness of our framework was evaluated by comparing the mutual gaze ratio derived from the mutual gaze detection framework with the human-coded ratio values. We analyzed the mutual gaze frequency and duration across different therapy settings, activities, and sessions. We created mutual gaze-related measures for social visual behavior score prediction using multiple machine learning-based regression models. The results show that our method provides mutual gaze measures that reliably represent (or even replace) the human coders' hand-coded social gaze measures and effectively evaluates and predicts ASD children's social visual performance during the intervention. Our findings have implications for social interaction analysis in small-group behavior assessments in numerous co-located settings in (special) education and in the workplace.

However, for social visual behavior analytics in children with autism, it is challenging to collect gaze data manually and evaluate them because it costs a lot of time and effort for human coders. In this paper, we introduce a social visual behavior analytics approach by quantifying the mutual gaze performance of children receiving play-based autism interventions using an automated mutual gaze detection framework. Our analysis is based on a video dataset that captures and records social interactions between children with autism and their therapy trainers (N=28 observations, 84 video clips, 21 Hrs duration). The effectiveness of our framework was evaluated by comparing the mutual gaze ratio derived from the mutual gaze detection framework with the human-coded ratio values. We analyzed the mutual gaze frequency and duration across different therapy settings, activities, and sessions. We created mutual gaze-related measures for social visual behavior score prediction using multiple machine learning-based regression models. The results show that our method provides mutual gaze measures that reliably represent (or even replace) the human coders' hand-coded social gaze measures and effectively evaluates and predicts ASD children's social visual performance during the intervention. Our findings have implications for social interaction analysis in small-group behavior assessments in numerous co-located settings in (special) education and in the workplace.
abstract_zh: 社会视觉行为作为一种非语言交流，在研究自闭症治疗干预的交互式和复杂环境中的社会认知过程中发挥着核心作用。然而，对于自闭症儿童的社交视觉行为分析，手动收集注视数据并对其进行评估具有挑战性，因为这需要人类编码人员花费大量的时间和精力。在本文中，我们引入了一种社会视觉行为分析方法，通过使用自动相互注视检测框架来量化接受基于游戏的自闭症干预措施的儿童的相互注视表现。我们的分析基于视频数据集，该数据集捕获并记录自闭症儿童与其治疗培训师之间的社交互动（N = 28 个观察结果，84 个视频剪辑，21 小时持续时间）。通过将相互注视检测框架得出的相互注视比率与人类编码的比率值进行比较来评估我们框架的有效性。我们分析了不同治疗环境、活动和疗程中的相互注视频率和持续时间。我们使用多个基于机器学习的回归模型创建了用于社会视觉行为评分预测的相互注视相关的度量。结果表明，我们的方法提供了相互注视测量，可以可靠地代表（甚至取代）人类编码员手工编码的社交注视测量，并有效评估和预测干预期间自闭症儿童的社交视觉表现。我们的研究结果对（特殊）教育和工作场所中众多同地环境中小组行为评估的社会互动分析具有影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自动互视检测的儿童自闭症治疗社会视觉行为分析方法。
AI.motivation: 手动收集和评估自闭症儿童的凝视数据耗时费力，需开发自动化方法以提高效率并替代人工编码。
AI.method: 构建自动化互视检测框架，利用21小时视频数据（含84个片段）分析不同治疗场景下的互视频率和持续时间，并采用机器学习模型预测社会视觉行为评分。
AI.result: 自动化方法得出的互视指标与人工编码结果一致，能可靠替代人工评估并有效预测自闭症儿童干预期间的社会视觉表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为特殊教育及工作场所的小群体行为评估提供了可行的技术支持。

authors_text: Alexandre Almin,Léo Lemarié,Anh Duong,B Ravi Kiran
title: Navya3DSeg -- Navya 3D Semantic Segmentation Dataset & split generation for autonomous vehicles
title_zh: Navya3DSeg——Navya 3D 语义分割数据集和自动驾驶车辆分割生成
comment: Accepted version to IEEE RA-L. Version with supplementary materials
comments: Accepted version to IEEE RA-L. Version with supplementary materials
abstract: Autonomous driving (AD) perception today relies heavily on deep learning based architectures requiring large scale annotated datasets with their associated costs for curation and annotation. The 3D semantic data are useful for core perception tasks such as obstacle detection and ego-vehicle localization. We propose a new dataset, Navya 3D Segmentation (Navya3DSeg), with a diverse label space corresponding to a large scale production grade operational domain, including rural, urban, industrial sites and universities from 13 countries. It contains 23 labeled sequences and 25 supplementary sequences without labels, designed to explore self-supervised and semi-supervised semantic segmentation benchmarks on point clouds. We also propose a novel method for sequential dataset split generation based on iterative multi-label stratification, and demonstrated to achieve a +1.2% mIoU improvement over the original split proposed by SemanticKITTI dataset. A complete benchmark for semantic segmentation task was performed, with state of the art methods. Finally, we demonstrate an Active Learning (AL) based dataset distillation framework. We introduce a novel heuristic-free sampling method called ego-pose distance based sampling in the context of AL. A detailed presentation on the dataset is available here https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5m6ALIs-s20.
summary: Autonomous driving (AD) perception today relies heavily on deep learning based architectures requiring large scale annotated datasets with their associated costs for curation and annotation. The 3D semantic data are useful for core perception tasks such as obstacle detection and ego-vehicle localization. We propose a new dataset, Navya 3D Segmentation (Navya3DSeg), with a diverse label space corresponding to a large scale production grade operational domain, including rural, urban, industrial sites and universities from 13 countries. It contains 23 labeled sequences and 25 supplementary sequences without labels, designed to explore self-supervised and semi-supervised semantic segmentation benchmarks on point clouds. We also propose a novel method for sequential dataset split generation based on iterative multi-label stratification, and demonstrated to achieve a +1.2% mIoU improvement over the original split proposed by SemanticKITTI dataset. A complete benchmark for semantic segmentation task was performed, with state of the art methods. Finally, we demonstrate an Active Learning (AL) based dataset distillation framework. We introduce a novel heuristic-free sampling method called ego-pose distance based sampling in the context of AL. A detailed presentation on the dataset is available here https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5m6ALIs-s20.
abstract_zh: 如今的自动驾驶 (AD) 感知在很大程度上依赖于基于深度学习的架构，需要大规模带注释的数据集及其相关的管理和注释成本。 3D 语义数据对于障碍物检测和自我车辆定位等核心感知任务非常有用。我们提出了一个新的数据集 Navya 3D Segmentation (Navya3DSeg)，具有与大规模生产级操作领域相对应的多样化标签空间，包括来自 13 个国家的农村、城市、工业场所和大学。它包含 23 个带标签的序列和 25 个无标签的补充序列，旨在探索点云上的自监督和半监督语义分割基准。我们还提出了一种基于迭代多标签分层的顺序数据集分割生成的新方法，并证明与 SemanticKITTI 数据集提出的原始分割相比，实现了 +1.2% mIoU 的改进。使用最先进的方法对语义分割任务进行了完整的基准测试。最后，我们演示了一个基于主动学习（AL）的数据集蒸馏框架。我们在 AL 背景下引入了一种新颖的无启发式采样方法，称为基于自我姿势距离的采样。有关数据集的详细演示请参见此处 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5m6ALIs-s20。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D语义分割数据集Navya3DSeg，并设计了一种基于迭代多标签分层的序列数据集分割生成方法，同时引入了一种基于自适应学习的无启发式采样方法。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶感知任务依赖于大规模标注数据集，但数据集的构建和标注成本高昂，现有数据集在场景多样性方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的3D语义分割数据集Navya3DSeg，并设计了一种基于迭代多标签分层的序列数据集分割生成方法，同时引入了一种基于自适应学习的无启发式采样方法。
AI.result: 该数据集包含23个标注序列和25个未标注序列，分割生成方法相比SemanticKITTI数据集的原始分割方法提升了1.2%的mIoU，同时在语义分割任务上进行了完整的基准测试。
AI.conclusion: Navya3DSeg数据集为自动驾驶领域提供了多样化的3D语义分割基准，分割生成方法和主动学习框架有助于提高语义分割模型的性能和效率。

search_text: Navya3DSeg -- Navya 3D Semantic Segmentation Dataset & split generation for autonomous vehicles Navya3DSeg——Navya 3D 语义分割数据集和自动驾驶车辆分割生成 Autonomous driving (AD) perception today relies heavily on deep learning based architectures requiring large scale annotated datasets with their associated costs for curation and annotation. The 3D semantic data are useful for core perception tasks such as obstacle detection and ego-vehicle localization. We propose a new dataset, Navya 3D Segmentation (Navya3DSeg), with a diverse label space corresponding to a large scale production grade operational domain, including rural, urban, industrial sites and universities from 13 countries. It contains 23 labeled sequences and 25 supplementary sequences without labels, designed to explore self-supervised and semi-supervised semantic segmentation benchmarks on point clouds. We also propose a novel method for sequential dataset split generation based on iterative multi-label stratification, and demonstrated to achieve a +1.2% mIoU improvement over the original split proposed by SemanticKITTI dataset. A complete benchmark for semantic segmentation task was performed, with state of the art methods. Finally, we demonstrate an Active Learning (AL) based dataset distillation framework. We introduce a novel heuristic-free sampling method called ego-pose distance based sampling in the context of AL. A detailed presentation on the dataset is available here https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5m6ALIs-s20. 如今的自动驾驶 (AD) 感知在很大程度上依赖于基于深度学习的架构，需要大规模带注释的数据集及其相关的管理和注释成本。 3D 语义数据对于障碍物检测和自我车辆定位等核心感知任务非常有用。我们提出了一个新的数据集 Navya 3D Segmentation (Navya3DSeg)，具有与大规模生产级操作领域相对应的多样化标签空间，包括来自 13 个国家的农村、城市、工业场所和大学。它包含 23 个带标签的序列和 25 个无标签的补充序列，旨在探索点云上的自监督和半监督语义分割基准。我们还提出了一种基于迭代多标签分层的顺序数据集分割生成的新方法，并证明与 SemanticKITTI 数据集提出的原始分割相比，实现了 +1.2% mIoU 的改进。使用最先进的方法对语义分割任务进行了完整的基准测试。最后，我们演示了一个基于主动学习（AL）的数据集蒸馏框架。我们在 AL 背景下引入了一种新颖的无启发式采样方法，称为基于自我姿势距离的采样。有关数据集的详细演示请参见此处 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5m6ALIs-s20。 本文提出了一种新的3D语义分割数据集Navya3DSeg，并设计了一种基于迭代多标签分层的序列数据集分割生成方法，同时引入了一种基于自适应学习的无启发式采样方法。 Alexandre Almin,Léo Lemarié,Anh Duong,B Ravi Kiran cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuhang Zhang,Weihong Deng,Liang Zheng
title: Unsupervised Evaluation of Out-of-distribution Detection: A Data-centric Perspective
title_zh: 分布外检测的无监督评估：以数据为中心的视角
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection methods assume that they have test ground truths, i.e., whether individual test samples are in-distribution (IND) or OOD. However, in the real world, we do not always have such ground truths, and thus do not know which sample is correctly detected and cannot compute the metric like AUROC to evaluate the performance of different OOD detection methods. In this paper, we are the first to introduce the unsupervised evaluation problem in OOD detection, which aims to evaluate OOD detection methods in real-world changing environments without OOD labels. We propose three methods to compute Gscore as an unsupervised indicator of OOD detection performance. We further introduce a new benchmark Gbench, which has 200 real-world OOD datasets of various label spaces to train and evaluate our method. Through experiments, we find a strong quantitative correlation betwwen Gscore and the OOD detection performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Gscore achieves state-of-the-art performance. Gscore also generalizes well with different IND/OOD datasets, OOD detection methods, backbones and dataset sizes. We further provide interesting analyses of the effects of backbones and IND/OOD datasets on OOD detection performance. The data and code will be available.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection methods assume that they have test ground truths, i.e., whether individual test samples are in-distribution (IND) or OOD. However, in the real world, we do not always have such ground truths, and thus do not know which sample is correctly detected and cannot compute the metric like AUROC to evaluate the performance of different OOD detection methods. In this paper, we are the first to introduce the unsupervised evaluation problem in OOD detection, which aims to evaluate OOD detection methods in real-world changing environments without OOD labels. We propose three methods to compute Gscore as an unsupervised indicator of OOD detection performance. We further introduce a new benchmark Gbench, which has 200 real-world OOD datasets of various label spaces to train and evaluate our method. Through experiments, we find a strong quantitative correlation betwwen Gscore and the OOD detection performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Gscore achieves state-of-the-art performance. Gscore also generalizes well with different IND/OOD datasets, OOD detection methods, backbones and dataset sizes. We further provide interesting analyses of the effects of backbones and IND/OOD datasets on OOD detection performance. The data and code will be available.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 检测方法假设它们具有测试基础事实，即各个测试样本是分布内 (IND) 还是 OOD。然而，在现实世界中，我们并不总是有这样的基本事实，因此不知道哪个样本被正确检测到，并且无法计算像 AUROC 这样的度量来评估不同 OOD 检测方法的性能。在本文中，我们首次介绍了 OOD 检测中的无监督评估问题，旨在评估真实世界变化环境中没有 OOD 标签的 OOD 检测方法。我们提出了三种方法来计算 Gscore 作为 OOD 检测性能的无监督指标。我们进一步引入了一个新的基准 Gbench，它拥有 200 个各种标签空间的真实 OOD 数据集来训练和评估我们的方法。通过实验，我们发现Gscore和OOD检测性能之间存在很强的定量相关性。大量实验证明我们的 Gscore 实现了最先进的性能。 Gscore 还可以很好地概括不同的 IND/OOD 数据集、OOD 检测方法、主干网和数据集大小。我们进一步对主干网和 IND/OOD 数据集对 OOD 检测性能的影响进行了有趣的分析。数据和代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注数据的分布外检测（OOD）方法评估框架，通过引入Gscore指标和Gbench基准数据集，解决真实场景中缺乏OOD标签的评估难题。
AI.motivation: 传统OOD检测方法依赖标注的测试集，但实际应用中常缺乏分布外样本的标签，导致无法有效评估检测性能，亟需一种无监督评估方案。
AI.method: 提出三种计算Gscore的无监督方法，构建包含200个真实场景OOD数据集的Gbench基准，通过统计模型输出分布特性量化检测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明Gscore与OOD检测性能存在强定量相关性，在不同模型架构、数据集规模和任务场景下均达到SOTA效果。
AI.conclusion: Gscore为无监督OOD评估提供了有效解决方案，揭示了模型结构和数据分布对检测性能的影响规律，推动了数据驱动的OOD研究方向。

authors_text: Esteve Valls Mascaro,Shuo Ma,Hyemin Ahn,Dongheui Lee
title: Robust Human Motion Forecasting using Transformer-based Model
title_zh: 使用基于 Transformer 的模型进行稳健的人体运动预测
abstract: Comprehending human motion is a fundamental challenge for developing Human-Robot Collaborative applications. Computer vision researchers have addressed this field by only focusing on reducing error in predictions, but not taking into account the requirements to facilitate its implementation in robots. In this paper, we propose a new model based on Transformer that simultaneously deals with the real time 3D human motion forecasting in the short and long term. Our 2-Channel Transformer (2CH-TR) is able to efficiently exploit the spatio-temporal information of a shortly observed sequence (400ms) and generates a competitive accuracy against the current state-of-the-art. 2CH-TR stands out for the efficient performance of the Transformer, being lighter and faster than its competitors. In addition, our model is tested in conditions where the human motion is severely occluded, demonstrating its robustness in reconstructing and predicting 3D human motion in a highly noisy environment. Our experiment results show that the proposed 2CH-TR outperforms the ST-Transformer, which is another state-of-the-art model based on the Transformer, in terms of reconstruction and prediction under the same conditions of input prefix. Our model reduces in 8.89% the mean squared error of ST-Transformer in short-term prediction, and 2.57% in long-term prediction in Human3.6M dataset with 400ms input prefix. Webpage: https://evm7.github.io/2CHTR-page/
summary: Comprehending human motion is a fundamental challenge for developing Human-Robot Collaborative applications. Computer vision researchers have addressed this field by only focusing on reducing error in predictions, but not taking into account the requirements to facilitate its implementation in robots. In this paper, we propose a new model based on Transformer that simultaneously deals with the real time 3D human motion forecasting in the short and long term. Our 2-Channel Transformer (2CH-TR) is able to efficiently exploit the spatio-temporal information of a shortly observed sequence (400ms) and generates a competitive accuracy against the current state-of-the-art. 2CH-TR stands out for the efficient performance of the Transformer, being lighter and faster than its competitors. In addition, our model is tested in conditions where the human motion is severely occluded, demonstrating its robustness in reconstructing and predicting 3D human motion in a highly noisy environment. Our experiment results show that the proposed 2CH-TR outperforms the ST-Transformer, which is another state-of-the-art model based on the Transformer, in terms of reconstruction and prediction under the same conditions of input prefix. Our model reduces in 8.89% the mean squared error of ST-Transformer in short-term prediction, and 2.57% in long-term prediction in Human3.6M dataset with 400ms input prefix. Webpage: https://evm7.github.io/2CHTR-page/
abstract_zh: 理解人体运动是开发人机协作应用程序的基本挑战。计算机视觉研究人员通过仅关注减少预测错误来解决这一领域，而不考虑促进其在机器人中实现的要求。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新模型，可同时处理短期和长期的实时 3D 人体运动预测。我们的 2 通道变压器 (2CH-TR) 能够有效地利用短时间观察序列 (400ms) 的时空信息，并产生与当前最先进技术相比具有竞争力的精度。 2CH-TR 因其 Transformer 的高效性能而脱颖而出，比竞争对手更轻、更快。此外，我们的模型在人体运动被严重遮挡的条件下进行了测试，证明了其在高噪声环境中重建和预测 3D 人体运动的鲁棒性。我们的实验结果表明，在相同输入前缀条件下，所提出的 2CH-TR 在重建和预测方面优于 ST-Transformer，这是另一种基于 Transformer 的最先进模型。在具有 400ms 输入前缀的 Human3.6M 数据集中，我们的模型将 ST-Transformer 在短期预测中的均方误差降低了 8.89%，在长期预测中降低了 2.57%。网页：https://evm7.github.io/2CHTR-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的2CH-TR模型，用于在短时和长时场景下实现鲁棒的3D人体运动预测，并在遮挡环境下验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注预测误差的减少，未考虑机器人应用中对实时性和鲁棒性的实际需求，尤其在遮挡等复杂环境中表现不足。
AI.method: 设计双通道Transformer架构（2CH-TR），通过高效利用短时观测序列（400ms）的时空信息，结合遮挡场景下的噪声鲁棒性测试，优化模型轻量化与预测速度。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上，2CH-TR相比ST-Transformer将短时预测均方误差降低8.89%，长时预测降低2.57%，并在遮挡环境下展现更强的重建能力。
AI.conclusion: 2CH-TR在保持模型轻量化的同时，通过双通道机制和时空信息优化，在预测精度与环境鲁棒性上优于现有Transformer模型，适用于人机协作场景。

search_text: Robust Human Motion Forecasting using Transformer-based Model 使用基于 Transformer 的模型进行稳健的人体运动预测 Comprehending human motion is a fundamental challenge for developing Human-Robot Collaborative applications. Computer vision researchers have addressed this field by only focusing on reducing error in predictions, but not taking into account the requirements to facilitate its implementation in robots. In this paper, we propose a new model based on Transformer that simultaneously deals with the real time 3D human motion forecasting in the short and long term. Our 2-Channel Transformer (2CH-TR) is able to efficiently exploit the spatio-temporal information of a shortly observed sequence (400ms) and generates a competitive accuracy against the current state-of-the-art. 2CH-TR stands out for the efficient performance of the Transformer, being lighter and faster than its competitors. In addition, our model is tested in conditions where the human motion is severely occluded, demonstrating its robustness in reconstructing and predicting 3D human motion in a highly noisy environment. Our experiment results show that the proposed 2CH-TR outperforms the ST-Transformer, which is another state-of-the-art model based on the Transformer, in terms of reconstruction and prediction under the same conditions of input prefix. Our model reduces in 8.89% the mean squared error of ST-Transformer in short-term prediction, and 2.57% in long-term prediction in Human3.6M dataset with 400ms input prefix. authors_text: Dovile Juodelyte,Amelia Jiménez-Sánchez,Veronika Cheplygina
title: Revisiting Hidden Representations in Transfer Learning for Medical Imaging
title_zh: 重新审视医学成像迁移学习中的隐藏表示
abstract: While a key component to the success of deep learning is the availability of massive amounts of training data, medical image datasets are often limited in diversity and size. Transfer learning has the potential to bridge the gap between related yet different domains. For medical applications, however, it remains unclear whether it is more beneficial to pre-train on natural or medical images. We aim to shed light on this problem by comparing initialization on ImageNet and RadImageNet on seven medical classification tasks. Our work includes a replication study, which yields results contrary to previously published findings. In our experiments, ResNet50 models pre-trained on ImageNet tend to outperform those trained on RadImageNet. To gain further insights, we investigate the learned representations using Canonical Correlation Analysis (CCA) and compare the predictions of the different models. Our results indicate that, contrary to intuition, ImageNet and RadImageNet may converge to distinct intermediate representations, which appear to diverge further during fine-tuning. Despite these distinct representations, the predictions of the models remain similar. Our findings show that the similarity between networks before and after fine-tuning does not correlate with performance gains, suggesting that the advantages of transfer learning might not solely originate from the reuse of features in the early layers of a convolutional neural network.
summary: While a key component to the success of deep learning is the availability of massive amounts of training data, medical image datasets are often limited in diversity and size. Transfer learning has the potential to bridge the gap between related yet different domains. For medical applications, however, it remains unclear whether it is more beneficial to pre-train on natural or medical images. We aim to shed light on this problem by comparing initialization on ImageNet and RadImageNet on seven medical classification tasks. Our work includes a replication study, which yields results contrary to previously published findings. In our experiments, ResNet50 models pre-trained on ImageNet tend to outperform those trained on RadImageNet. To gain further insights, we investigate the learned representations using Canonical Correlation Analysis (CCA) and compare the predictions of the different models. Our results indicate that, contrary to intuition, ImageNet and RadImageNet may converge to distinct intermediate representations, which appear to diverge further during fine-tuning. Despite these distinct representations, the predictions of the models remain similar. Our findings show that the similarity between networks before and after fine-tuning does not correlate with performance gains, suggesting that the advantages of transfer learning might not solely originate from the reuse of features in the early layers of a convolutional neural network.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度学习成功的关键因素是大量训练数据的可用性，但医学图像数据集的多样性和大小通常受到限制。迁移学习有潜力弥合相关但不同领域之间的差距。然而，对于医学应用，目前尚不清楚在自然图像或医学图像上进行预训练是否更有利。我们的目标是通过比较 ImageNet 和 RadImageNet 在七个医学分类任务上的初始化来阐明这个问题。我们的工作包括一项复制研究，其结果与之前发表的研究结果相反。在我们的实验中，在 ImageNet 上预训练的 ResNet50 模型往往优于在 RadImageNet 上训练的模型。为了获得进一步的见解，我们使用典型相关分析（CCA）研究学习到的表示，并比较不同模型的预测。我们的结果表明，与直觉相反，ImageNet 和 RadImageNet 可能会收敛到不同的中间表示，而这些中间表示在微调过程中似乎会进一步发散。尽管有这些不同的表示，模型的预测仍然相似。我们的研究结果表明，微调前后网络之间的相似性与性能增益无关，这表明迁移学习的优势可能不仅仅源于卷积神经网络早期层中特征的重用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较在ImageNet和RadImageNet上预训练的模型在七个医学分类任务中的表现，重新审视迁移学习中隐藏表示的作用。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集通常规模有限且多样性不足，而迁移学习可能通过预训练模型弥补这一缺陷。但医学领域尚不清楚预训练应使用自然图像还是医学图像更优。
AI.method: 采用Replication研究对比ImageNet与RadImageNet预训练的ResNet50模型性能，并通过典型相关分析（CCA）研究模型表示差异及预测结果对比。
AI.result: ImageNet预训练模型在多数任务中表现优于RadImageNet，且两者中间表示在微调过程中进一步分化，但预测结果相似性未随表示相似性变化。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习的优势可能不仅源于卷积神经网络早期层特征复用，预训练数据选择与表示演化关系需进一步探讨。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过比较在ImageNet和RadImageNet上预训练的模型在七个医学分类任务中的表现，重新审视迁移学习中隐藏表示的作用。

authors_text: Artur Miroszewski,Jakub Mielczarek,Grzegorz Czelusta,Filip Szczepanek,Bartosz Grabowski,Bertrand Le Saux,Jakub Nalepa
title: Detecting Clouds in Multispectral Satellite Images Using Quantum-Kernel Support Vector Machines
title_zh: 使用量子核支持向量机检测多光谱卫星图像中的云
abstract: Support vector machines (SVMs) are a well-established classifier effectively deployed in an array of classification tasks. In this work, we consider extending classical SVMs with quantum kernels and applying them to satellite data analysis. The design and implementation of SVMs with quantum kernels (hybrid SVMs) are presented. Here, the pixels are mapped to the Hilbert space using a family of parameterized quantum feature maps (related to quantum kernels). The parameters are optimized to maximize the kernel target alignment. The quantum kernels have been selected such that they enabled analysis of numerous relevant properties while being able to simulate them with classical computers on a real-life large-scale dataset. Specifically, we approach the problem of cloud detection in the multispectral satellite imagery, which is one of the pivotal steps in both on-the-ground and on-board satellite image analysis processing chains. The experiments performed over the benchmark Landsat-8 multispectral dataset revealed that the simulated hybrid SVM successfully classifies satellite images with accuracy comparable to the classical SVM with the RBF kernel for large datasets. Interestingly, for large datasets, the high accuracy was also observed for the simple quantum kernels, lacking quantum entanglement.
summary: Support vector machines (SVMs) are a well-established classifier effectively deployed in an array of classification tasks. In this work, we consider extending classical SVMs with quantum kernels and applying them to satellite data analysis. The design and implementation of SVMs with quantum kernels (hybrid SVMs) are presented. Here, the pixels are mapped to the Hilbert space using a family of parameterized quantum feature maps (related to quantum kernels). The parameters are optimized to maximize the kernel target alignment. The quantum kernels have been selected such that they enabled analysis of numerous relevant properties while being able to simulate them with classical computers on a real-life large-scale dataset. Specifically, we approach the problem of cloud detection in the multispectral satellite imagery, which is one of the pivotal steps in both on-the-ground and on-board satellite image analysis processing chains. The experiments performed over the benchmark Landsat-8 multispectral dataset revealed that the simulated hybrid SVM successfully classifies satellite images with accuracy comparable to the classical SVM with the RBF kernel for large datasets. Interestingly, for large datasets, the high accuracy was also observed for the simple quantum kernels, lacking quantum entanglement.
abstract_zh: 支持向量机 (SVM) 是一种成熟的分类器，可有效部署在一系列分类任务中。在这项工作中，我们考虑使用量子内核扩展经典支持向量机并将其应用于卫星数据分析。介绍了具有量子内核的 SVM（混合 SVM）的设计和实现。在这里，使用一系列参数化量子特征图（与量子内核相关）将像素映射到希尔伯特空间。参数经过优化以最大化内核目标对齐。选择的量子内核使得它们能够分析许多相关属性，同时能够使用经典计算机在现实生活中的大规模数据集上对其进行模拟。具体来说，我们解决了多光谱卫星图像中的云检测问题，这是地面和机载卫星图像分析处理链的关键步骤之一。在基准 Landsat-8 多光谱数据集上进行的实验表明，模拟混合 SVM 成功地对卫星图像进行了分类，其准确度与针对大型数据集的带有 RBF 核的经典 SVM 相当。有趣的是，对于大型数据集，缺乏量子纠缠的简单量子内核也观察到了高精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用量子核支持向量机（SVM）对多光谱卫星图像进行云检测，通过参数化量子特征映射优化核目标对齐，实现与经典SVM相当的分类精度。
AI.motivation: 传统SVM在处理卫星图像分类任务时存在局限性，量子计算的引入可能提升复杂模式识别能力，尤其在大规模数据集上具有潜在优势。
AI.method: 设计基于量子核的混合SVM模型，通过参数化量子特征映射将像素映射到希尔伯特空间，优化核参数以最大化核目标对齐，并在Landsat-8数据集上验证性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，模拟的混合SVM在大规模数据集上分类准确率与经典RBF核SVM相当，且简单量子核（无量子纠缠）亦表现出高精度。
AI.conclusion: 量子核SVM在云检测任务中展现潜力，即使无量子纠缠的简单核亦有效，为量子机器学习在遥感领域的应用提供了新方向。

search_text: Detecting Clouds in Multispectral Satellite Images Using Quantum-Kernel Support Vector Machines 使用量子核支持向量机检测多光谱卫星图像中的云 Support vector machines (SVMs) are a well-established classifier effectively deployed in an array of classification tasks. In this work, we consider extending classical SVMs with quantum kernels and applying them to satellite data analysis. The design and implementation of SVMs with quantum kernels (hybrid SVMs) are presented. Here, the pixels are mapped to the Hilbert space using a family of parameterized quantum feature maps (related to quantum kernels). The parameters are optimized to maximize the kernel target alignment. The quantum kernels have been selected such that they enabled analysis of numerous relevant properties while being able to simulate them with classical computers on a real-life large-scale dataset. Specifically, we approach the problem of cloud detection in the multispectral satellite imagery, which is one of the pivotal steps in both on-the-ground and on-board satellite image analysis processing chains. The experiments performed over the benchmark Landsat-8 multispectral dataset revealed that the simulated hybrid SVM successfully classifies satellite images with accuracy comparable to the classical SVM with the RBF kernel for large datasets. Interestingly, for large datasets, the high accuracy was also observed for the simple quantum kernels, lacking quantum entanglement. 支持向量机 (SVM) 是一种成熟的分类器，可有效部署在一系列分类任务中。在这项工作中，我们考虑使用量子内核扩展经典支持向量机并将其应用于卫星数据分析。介绍了具有量子内核的 SVM（混合 SVM）的设计和实现。在这里，使用一系列参数化量子特征图（与量子内核相关）将像素映射到希尔伯特空间。参数经过优化以最大化内核目标对齐。选择的量子内核使得它们能够分析许多相关属性，同时能够使用经典计算机在现实生活中的大规模数据集上对其进行模拟。具体来说，我们解决了多光谱卫星图像中的云检测问题，这是地面和机载卫星图像分析处理链的关键步骤之一。在基准 Landsat-8 多光谱数据集上进行的实验表明，模拟混合 SVM 成功地对卫星图像进行了分类，其准确度与针对大型数据集的带有 RBF 核的经典 SVM 相当。有趣的是，对于大型数据集，缺乏量子纠缠的简单量子内核也观察到了高精度。 本文提出利用量子核支持向量机（SVM）对多光谱卫星图像进行云检测，通过参数化量子特征映射优化核目标对齐，实现与经典SVM相当的分类精度。 Artur Miroszewski,Jakub Mielczarek,Grzegorz Czelusta,Filip Szczepanek,Bartosz Grabowski,Bertrand Le Saux,Jakub Nalepa cs.CV,quant-ph

authors_text: Junjie Wen,Jinqiang Cui,Zhenjun Zhao,Ruixin Yan,Zhi Gao,Lihua Dou,Ben M. Chen
title: SyreaNet: A Physically Guided Underwater Image Enhancement Framework Integrating Synthetic and Real Images
title_zh: SyreaNet：集成合成图像和真实图像的物理引导水下图像增强框架
abstract: Underwater image enhancement (UIE) is vital for high-level vision-related underwater tasks. Although learning-based UIE methods have made remarkable achievements in recent years, it's still challenging for them to consistently deal with various underwater conditions, which could be caused by: 1) the use of the simplified atmospheric image formation model in UIE may result in severe errors; 2) the network trained solely with synthetic images might have difficulty in generalizing well to real underwater images. In this work, we, for the first time, propose a framework \textit{SyreaNet} for UIE that integrates both synthetic and real data under the guidance of the revised underwater image formation model and novel domain adaptation (DA) strategies. First, an underwater image synthesis module based on the revised model is proposed. Then, a physically guided disentangled network is designed to predict the clear images by combining both synthetic and real underwater images. The intra- and inter-domain gaps are abridged by fully exchanging the domain knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our framework over other state-of-the-art (SOTA) learning-based UIE methods qualitatively and quantitatively. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/RockWenJJ/SyreaNet.git.
summary: Underwater image enhancement (UIE) is vital for high-level vision-related underwater tasks. Although learning-based UIE methods have made remarkable achievements in recent years, it's still challenging for them to consistently deal with various underwater conditions, which could be caused by: 1) the use of the simplified atmospheric image formation model in UIE may result in severe errors; 2) the network trained solely with synthetic images might have difficulty in generalizing well to real underwater images. In this work, we, for the first time, propose a framework \textit{SyreaNet} for UIE that integrates both synthetic and real data under the guidance of the revised underwater image formation model and novel domain adaptation (DA) strategies. First, an underwater image synthesis module based on the revised model is proposed. Then, a physically guided disentangled network is designed to predict the clear images by combining both synthetic and real underwater images. The intra- and inter-domain gaps are abridged by fully exchanging the domain knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our framework over other state-of-the-art (SOTA) learning-based UIE methods qualitatively and quantitatively. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/RockWenJJ/SyreaNet.git.
abstract_zh: 水下图像增强（UIE）对于高级视觉相关水下任务至关重要。尽管基于学习的UIE方法近年来取得了显着的成就，但它们要一致地处理各种水下条件仍然具有挑战性，这可能是由于：1）UIE中使用简化的大气成像模型可能会导致严重的错误； 2）仅使用合成图像训练的网络可能难以很好地推广到真实的水下图像。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了 UIE 的框架 \textit{SyreaNet}，该框架在修订后的水下图像形成模型和新颖的域适应（DA）策略的指导下集成了合成数据和真实数据。首先，提出了基于修正模型的水下图像合成模块。然后，设计一个物理引导的解纠缠网络，通过结合合成和真实的水下图像来预测清晰的图像。通过充分交换领域知识来缩小领域内和领域间的差距。大量的实验在定性和定量上证明了我们的框架相对于其他最先进的（SOTA）基于学习的 UIE 方法的优越性。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/RockWenJJ/SyreaNet.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SyreaNet的物理引导的水下图像增强框架，整合了合成图像和真实图像以提高水下图像增强的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于学习的水下图像增强方法取得了显著进展，但它们在处理各种水下条件时仍面临挑战，这主要是由于简化的大气成像模型可能导致严重误差，以及仅使用合成图像训练的网络在泛化到真实水下图像时存在困难。
AI.method: 本文首次提出了一种名为SyreaNet的框架，该框架在修订的水下图像形成模型和新颖的领域适应策略的指导下，整合了合成和真实数据。首先，提出了一种基于修订模型的水下图像合成模块。然后，设计了一种物理引导的解耦网络，通过结合合成和真实水下图像来预测清晰图像。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该框架在定性和定量方面均优于其他最先进的基于学习的水下图像增强方法。
AI.conclusion: SyreaNet框架通过整合合成和真实数据并结合物理引导的领域适应策略，有效解决了水下图像增强中的关键问题，取得了优越的性能。

authors_text: Rita Ramos,Desmond Elliott,Bruno Martins
title: Retrieval-augmented Image Captioning
title_zh: 检索增强图像描述
abstract: Inspired by retrieval-augmented language generation and pretrained Vision and Language (V&L) encoders, we present a new approach to image captioning that generates sentences given the input image and a set of captions retrieved from a datastore, as opposed to the image alone. The encoder in our model jointly processes the image and retrieved captions using a pretrained V&L BERT, while the decoder attends to the multimodal encoder representations, benefiting from the extra textual evidence from the retrieved captions. Experimental results on the COCO dataset show that image captioning can be effectively formulated from this new perspective. Our model, named EXTRA, benefits from using captions retrieved from the training dataset, and it can also benefit from using an external dataset without the need for retraining. Ablation studies show that retrieving a sufficient number of captions (e.g., k=5) can improve captioning quality. Our work contributes towards using pretrained V&L encoders for generative tasks, instead of standard classification tasks.
summary: Inspired by retrieval-augmented language generation and pretrained Vision and Language (V&L) encoders, we present a new approach to image captioning that generates sentences given the input image and a set of captions retrieved from a datastore, as opposed to the image alone. The encoder in our model jointly processes the image and retrieved captions using a pretrained V&L BERT, while the decoder attends to the multimodal encoder representations, benefiting from the extra textual evidence from the retrieved captions. Experimental results on the COCO dataset show that image captioning can be effectively formulated from this new perspective. Our model, named EXTRA, benefits from using captions retrieved from the training dataset, and it can also benefit from using an external dataset without the need for retraining. Ablation studies show that retrieving a sufficient number of captions (e.g., k=5) can improve captioning quality. Our work contributes towards using pretrained V&L encoders for generative tasks, instead of standard classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 受检索增强语言生成和预训练视觉和语言（V＆L）编码器的启发，我们提出了一种新的图像字幕方法，可以根据输入图像和从数据存储中检索到的一组字幕（而不是单独的图像）生成句子。我们模型中的编码器使用预训练的 V&L BERT 联合处理图像和检索到的字幕，而解码器则负责多模态编码器表示，从检索到的字幕中获得额外的文本证据。 COCO 数据集上的实验结果表明，可以从这个新角度有效地制定图像描述。我们的模型名为 EXTRA，受益于使用从训练数据集中检索的标题，它还可以受益于使用外部数据集而无需重新训练。消融研究表明，检索足够数量的字幕（例如，k=5）可以提高字幕质量。我们的工作致力于使用预训练的 V&L 编码器来执行生成任务，而不是标准分类任务。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合检索字幕和图像信息的图像字幕生成方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖图像信息，通过引入检索到的字幕作为额外文本证据，可以提升字幕生成质量。
AI.method: 使用预训练V&L BERT编码器联合处理图像和检索字幕，解码器基于多模态表示生成字幕。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上表现优异，且能利用外部数据集提升效果无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 展示了预训练V&L编码器在生成任务中的有效性，推动其应用。

search_text: Retrieval-augmented Image Captioning 检索增强图像描述 Inspired by retrieval-augmented language generation and pretrained Vision and Language (V&L) encoders, we present a new approach to image captioning that generates sentences given the input image and a set of captions retrieved from a datastore, as opposed to the image alone. The encoder in our model jointly processes the image and retrieved captions using a pretrained V&L BERT, while the decoder attends to the multimodal encoder representations, benefiting from the extra textual evidence from the retrieved captions. Experimental results on the COCO dataset show that image captioning can be effectively formulated from this new perspective. Our model, named EXTRA, benefits from using captions retrieved from the training dataset, and it can also benefit from using an external dataset without the need for retraining. Ablation studies show that retrieving a sufficient number of captions (e.g., k=5) can improve captioning quality. Our work contributes towards using pretrained V&L encoders for generative tasks, instead of standard classification tasks. 受检索增强语言生成和预训练视觉和语言（V＆L）编码器的启发，我们提出了一种新的图像字幕方法，可以根据输入图像和从数据存储中检索到的一组字幕（而不是单独的图像）生成句子。我们模型中的编码器使用预训练的 V&L BERT 联合处理图像和检索到的字幕，而解码器则负责多模态编码器表示，从检索到的字幕中获得额外的文本证据。 COCO 数据集上的实验结果表明，可以从这个新角度有效地制定图像描述。我们的模型名为 EXTRA，受益于使用从训练数据集中检索的标题，它还可以受益于使用外部数据集而无需重新训练。消融研究表明，检索足够数量的字幕（例如，k=5）可以提高字幕质量。我们的工作致力于使用预训练的 V&L 编码器来执行生成任务，而不是标准分类任务。 提出一种结合检索字幕和图像信息的图像字幕生成方法。 Rita Ramos,Desmond Elliott,Bruno Martins cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Timothée Schmude,Laura Koesten,Torsten Möller,Sebastian Tschiatschek
title: On the Impact of Explanations on Understanding of Algorithmic Decision-Making
title_zh: 论解释对算法决策理解的影响
comment: Main text: 16 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Accepted at ACM FAccT 2023
comments: Main text: 16 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Accepted at ACM FAccT 2023
abstract: Ethical principles for algorithms are gaining importance as more and more stakeholders are affected by "high-risk" algorithmic decision-making (ADM) systems. Understanding how these systems work enables stakeholders to make informed decisions and to assess the systems' adherence to ethical values. Explanations are a promising way to create understanding, but current explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) research does not always consider existent theories on how understanding is formed and evaluated. In this work, we aim to contribute to a better understanding of understanding by conducting a qualitative task-based study with 30 participants, including users and affected stakeholders. We use three explanation modalities (textual, dialogue, and interactive) to explain a "high-risk" ADM system to participants and analyse their responses both inductively and deductively, using the "six facets of understanding" framework by Wiggins & McTighe. Our findings indicate that the "six facets" framework is a promising approach to analyse participants' thought processes in understanding, providing categories for both rational and emotional understanding. We further introduce the "dialogue" modality as a valid explanation approach to increase participant engagement and interaction with the "explainer", allowing for more insight into their understanding in the process. Our analysis further suggests that individuality in understanding affects participants' perceptions of algorithmic fairness, demonstrating the interdependence between understanding and ADM assessment that previous studies have outlined. We posit that drawing from theories on learning and understanding like the "six facets" and leveraging explanation modalities can guide XAI research to better suit explanations to learning processes of individuals and consequently enable their assessment of ethical values of ADM systems.

Understanding how these systems work enables stakeholders to make informed decisions and to assess the systems' adherence to ethical values. Explanations are a promising way to create understanding, but current explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) research does not always consider existent theories on how understanding is formed and evaluated. We use three explanation modalities (textual, dialogue, and interactive) to explain a "high-risk" ADM system to participants and analyse their responses both inductively and deductively, using the "six facets of understanding" framework by Wiggins & McTighe. Our findings indicate that the "six facets" framework is a promising approach to analyse participants' thought processes in understanding, providing categories for both rational and emotional understanding. We further introduce the "dialogue" modality as a valid explanation approach to increase participant engagement and interaction with the "explainer", allowing for more insight into their understanding in the process. Our analysis further suggests that individuality in understanding affects participants' perceptions of algorithmic fairness, demonstrating the interdependence between understanding and ADM assessment that previous studies have outlined. abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的利益相关者受到“高风险”算法决策（ADM）系统的影响，算法的道德原则变得越来越重要。了解这些系统的工作原理使利益相关者能够做出明智的决策并评估系统对道德价值观的遵守情况。解释是创造理解的一种有前途的方式，但当前的可解释人工智能（XAI）研究并不总是考虑关于如何形成和评估理解的现有理论。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过对 30 名参与者（包括用户和受影响的利益相关者）进行基于任务的定性研究，以促进更好地理解。我们使用三种解释方式（文本、对话和交互）向参与者解释“高风险”ADM 系统，并使用 Wiggins 和 McTighe 的“理解的六个方面”框架，以归纳和演绎的方式分析他们的反应。我们的研究结果表明，“六个方面”框架是分析参与者理解思维过程的一种有前途的方法，为理性和情感理解提供了类别。我们进一步引入“对话”模式作为一种有效的解释方法，以增加参与者与“解释者”的参与和互动，从而更深入地了解他们在此过程中的理解。我们的分析进一步表明，理解的个性会影响参与者对算法公平性的看法，证明了先前研究概述的理解和 ADM 评估之间的相互依赖性。我们认为，借鉴“六个方面”等学习和理解理论并利用解释模式可以指导 XAI 研究更好地适应个人学习过程的解释，从而使他们能够评估 ADM 系统的道德价值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同解释方式对高风险算法决策系统理解的影响，通过定性实验分析参与者对算法公平性的认知差异。
AI.motivation: 随着高风险算法决策系统影响范围扩大，现有可解释AI研究缺乏对理解形成机制的理论结合，需探索有效解释方法以提升伦理评估能力。
AI.method: 采用定性任务研究法，邀请30名用户及利益相关者参与，通过文本、对话和交互三种解释方式，结合Wiggins & McTighe的‘理解六维度’框架进行归纳与演绎分析。
AI.result: ‘理解六维度’框架能有效分类理性与情感理解；对话模式提升参与度与互动性；个体理解差异显著影响算法公平性认知。
AI.conclusion: 结合学习理论与多模态解释可优化XAI研究，使算法解释更贴合个体认知过程，从而促进对算法伦理价值的评估。

authors_text: Roland Rauter,Martin Nocker,Florian Merkle,Pascal Schöttle
title: On the Effect of Adversarial Training Against Invariance-based Adversarial Examples
title_zh: 关于对抗训练对基于不变性的对抗样本的影响
abstract: Adversarial examples are carefully crafted attack points that are supposed to fool machine learning classifiers. In the last years, the field of adversarial machine learning, especially the study of perturbation-based adversarial examples, in which a perturbation that is not perceptible for humans is added to the images, has been studied extensively. Adversarial training can be used to achieve robustness against such inputs. Another type of adversarial examples are invariance-based adversarial examples, where the images are semantically modified such that the predicted class of the model does not change, but the class that is determined by humans does. How to ensure robustness against this type of adversarial examples has not been explored yet. This work addresses the impact of adversarial training with invariance-based adversarial examples on a convolutional neural network (CNN). We show that when adversarial training with invariance-based and perturbation-based adversarial examples is applied, it should be conducted simultaneously and not consecutively. This procedure can achieve relatively high robustness against both types of adversarial examples. Additionally, we find that the algorithm used for generating invariance-based adversarial examples in prior work does not correctly determine the labels and therefore we use human-determined labels.
summary: Adversarial examples are carefully crafted attack points that are supposed to fool machine learning classifiers. In the last years, the field of adversarial machine learning, especially the study of perturbation-based adversarial examples, in which a perturbation that is not perceptible for humans is added to the images, has been studied extensively. Adversarial training can be used to achieve robustness against such inputs. Another type of adversarial examples are invariance-based adversarial examples, where the images are semantically modified such that the predicted class of the model does not change, but the class that is determined by humans does. How to ensure robustness against this type of adversarial examples has not been explored yet. This work addresses the impact of adversarial training with invariance-based adversarial examples on a convolutional neural network (CNN). We show that when adversarial training with invariance-based and perturbation-based adversarial examples is applied, it should be conducted simultaneously and not consecutively. This procedure can achieve relatively high robustness against both types of adversarial examples. Additionally, we find that the algorithm used for generating invariance-based adversarial examples in prior work does not correctly determine the labels and therefore we use human-determined labels.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例是精心设计的攻击点，旨在愚弄机器学习分类器。近年来，对抗性机器学习领域，特别是基于扰动的对抗性示例的研究，其中将人类无法感知的扰动添加到图像中，已经得到了广泛的研究。对抗性训练可用于实现针对此类输入的鲁棒性。另一种类型的对抗性示例是基于不变性的对抗性示例，其中图像在语义上被修改，使得模型的预测类别不会改变，但由人类确定的类别会改变。尚未探索如何确保针对此类对抗性示例的鲁棒性。这项工作解决了使用基于不变性的对抗示例对卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行对抗训练的影响。我们表明，当应用基于不变性和基于扰动的对抗性示例的对抗性训练时，应该同时而不是连续进行。该过程可以针对两种类型的对抗性示例实现相对较高的鲁棒性。此外，我们发现之前的工作中用于生成基于不变性的对抗性示例的算法不能正确确定标签，因此我们使用人类确定的标签。

AI.tldr: 研究对抗训练对卷积神经网络（CNN）在应对不变性对抗样本影响的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练主要针对微扰对抗样本，而对语义修改导致人类判断与模型预测不一致的不变性对抗样本的鲁棒性研究尚未充分展开。
AI.method: 同时使用不变性对抗样本和微扰对抗样本进行对抗训练，并采用人类确定的标签修正先前算法的标签错误问题。
AI.result: 同时训练可显著提升对两类对抗样本的鲁棒性，而先后训练效果较差；发现先前不变性对抗样本生成算法存在标签判定错误。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练需同时针对两类对抗样本进行以提高鲁棒性，并应采用人类标注确保标签准确性。

motivation: 现有对抗训练主要针对微扰对抗样本，而对语义修改导致人类判断与模型预测不一致的不变性对抗样本的鲁棒性研究尚未充分展开。
method: 同时使用不变性对抗样本和微扰对抗样本进行对抗训练，并采用人类确定的标签修正先前算法的标签错误问题。
result: 同时训练可显著提升对两类对抗样本的鲁棒性，而先后训练效果较差；发现先前不变性对抗样本生成算法存在标签判定错误。
conclusion: 对抗训练需同时针对两类对抗样本进行以提高鲁棒性，并应采用人类标注确保标签准确性。
search_text: On the Effect of Adversarial Training Against Invariance-based Adversarial Examples 关于对抗训练对基于不变性的对抗样本的影响 Adversarial examples are carefully crafted attack points that are supposed to fool machine learning classifiers. In the last years, the field of adversarial machine learning, especially the study of perturbation-based adversarial examples, in which a perturbation that is not perceptible for humans is added to the images, has been studied extensively. Adversarial training can be used to achieve robustness against such inputs. Another type of adversarial examples are invariance-based adversarial examples, where the images are semantically modified such that the predicted class of the model does not change, but the class that is determined by humans does. How to ensure robustness against this type of adversarial examples has not been explored yet. This work addresses the impact of adversarial training with invariance-based adversarial examples on a convolutional neural network (CNN). We show that when adversarial training with invariance-based and perturbation-based adversarial examples is applied, it should be conducted simultaneously and not consecutively. This procedure can achieve relatively high robustness against both types of adversarial examples. Additionally, we find that the algorithm used for generating invariance-based adversarial examples in prior work does not correctly determine the labels and therefore we use human-determined labels. 对抗性示例是精心设计的攻击点，旨在愚弄机器学习分类器。近年来，对抗性机器学习领域，特别是基于扰动的对抗性示例的研究，其中将人类无法感知的扰动添加到图像中，已经得到了广泛的研究。对抗性训练可用于实现针对此类输入的鲁棒性。另一种类型的对抗性示例是基于不变性的对抗性示例，其中图像在语义上被修改，使得模型的预测类别不会改变，但由人类确定的类别会改变。尚未探索如何确保针对此类对抗性示例的鲁棒性。这项工作解决了使用基于不变性的对抗示例对卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行对抗训练的影响。我们表明，当应用基于不变性和基于扰动的对抗性示例的对抗性训练时，应该同时而不是连续进行。该过程可以针对两种类型的对抗性示例实现相对较高的鲁棒性。此外，我们发现之前的工作中用于生成基于不变性的对抗性示例的算法不能正确确定标签，因此我们使用人类确定的标签。 研究对抗训练对卷积神经网络（CNN）在应对不变性对抗样本影响的效果。 Roland Rauter,Martin Nocker,Florian Merkle,Pascal Schöttle cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tim Ziemer
title: Mixing Levels -- A Rock Music Spirit Level App
title_zh: Mixing Levels——摇滚音乐水平仪应用程序
abstract: To date, sonification apps are rare. Music apps on the other hand are widely used. Smartphone users like to play with music. In this manuscript, we present Mixing Levels, a spirit level sonification based on music mixing. Tilting the smartphone adjusts the volumes of 5 musical instruments in a rock music loop. Only when perfectly leveled, all instruments in the mix are well-audible. The app is supposed to be useful and fun. Since the app appears like a music mixing console, people have fun to interact with Mixing Levels, so that learning the sonification is a playful experience.
summary: To date, sonification apps are rare. Music apps on the other hand are widely used. Smartphone users like to play with music. In this manuscript, we present Mixing Levels, a spirit level sonification based on music mixing. Tilting the smartphone adjusts the volumes of 5 musical instruments in a rock music loop. Only when perfectly leveled, all instruments in the mix are well-audible. The app is supposed to be useful and fun. Since the app appears like a music mixing console, people have fun to interact with Mixing Levels, so that learning the sonification is a playful experience.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，可听化应用程序还很少见。另一方面，音乐应用程序被广泛使用。智能手机用户喜欢玩音乐。在这份手稿中，我们介绍了混合级别，这是一种基于音乐混合的水平仪声音化。倾斜智能手机可调节摇滚音乐循环中 5 种乐器的音量。只有完美调平后，混音中的所有乐器才能听得清楚。该应用程序应该有用且有趣。由于该应用程序看起来像一个音乐混合控制台，因此人们很乐意与混合级别进行交互，因此学习可听化是一种有趣的体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一款名为Mixing Levels的智能手机应用，通过倾斜手机调整摇滚音乐循环中五个乐器的音量，实现水平仪的声学可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有声学可视化应用稀缺，而音乐类应用广受欢迎。通过将水平仪功能与音乐混音结合，可提升用户互动性与学习趣味性。
AI.method: 基于智能手机传感器，通过倾斜角度动态调节音乐混音中各乐器音量，仅在设备水平时实现均衡音量输出。
AI.result: 开发出兼具实用性和娱乐性的声学可视化应用，用户可通过游戏化交互学习水平仪原理。
AI.conclusion: 该应用验证了将教育元素融入音乐交互的可行性，为声学可视化提供了创新的娱乐化解决方案。

authors_text: Guoqiang Liang,Zhaojie Chen,Zhaoqiang Chen,Shiyu Ji,Yanning Zhang
title: New Insights on Relieving Task-Recency Bias for Online Class Incremental Learning
title_zh: 缓解在线课堂增量学习任务近期偏差的新见解
abstract: To imitate the ability of keeping learning of human, continual learning which can learn from a never-ending data stream has attracted more interests recently. In all settings, the online class incremental learning (OCIL), where incoming samples from data stream can be used only once, is more challenging and can be encountered more frequently in real world. Actually, all continual learning models face a stability-plasticity dilemma, where the stability means the ability to preserve old knowledge while the plasticity denotes the ability to incorporate new knowledge. Although replay-based methods have shown exceptional promise, most of them concentrate on the strategy for updating and retrieving memory to keep stability at the expense of plasticity. To strike a preferable trade-off between stability and plasticity, we propose an Adaptive Focus Shifting algorithm (AFS), which dynamically adjusts focus to ambiguous samples and non-target logits in model learning. Through a deep analysis of the task-recency bias caused by class imbalance, we propose a revised focal loss to mainly keep stability. \Rt{By utilizing a new weight function, the revised focal loss will pay more attention to current ambiguous samples, which are the potentially valuable samples to make model progress quickly.} To promote plasticity, we introduce a virtual knowledge distillation. By designing a virtual teacher, it assigns more attention to non-target classes, which can surmount overconfidence and encourage model to focus on inter-class information. Extensive experiments on three popular datasets for OCIL have shown the effectiveness of AFS. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/czjghost/AFS}.
summary: To imitate the ability of keeping learning of human, continual learning which can learn from a never-ending data stream has attracted more interests recently. In all settings, the online class incremental learning (OCIL), where incoming samples from data stream can be used only once, is more challenging and can be encountered more frequently in real world. Actually, all continual learning models face a stability-plasticity dilemma, where the stability means the ability to preserve old knowledge while the plasticity denotes the ability to incorporate new knowledge. Although replay-based methods have shown exceptional promise, most of them concentrate on the strategy for updating and retrieving memory to keep stability at the expense of plasticity. To strike a preferable trade-off between stability and plasticity, we propose an Adaptive Focus Shifting algorithm (AFS), which dynamically adjusts focus to ambiguous samples and non-target logits in model learning. Through a deep analysis of the task-recency bias caused by class imbalance, we propose a revised focal loss to mainly keep stability. \Rt{By utilizing a new weight function, the revised focal loss will pay more attention to current ambiguous samples, which are the potentially valuable samples to make model progress quickly.} To promote plasticity, we introduce a virtual knowledge distillation. By designing a virtual teacher, it assigns more attention to non-target classes, which can surmount overconfidence and encourage model to focus on inter-class information. Extensive experiments on three popular datasets for OCIL have shown the effectiveness of AFS. The code will be available at \url{https://github.com/czjghost/AFS}.
abstract_zh: 为了模仿人类不断学习的能力，从永无休止的数据流中学习的持续学习最近引起了越来越多的兴趣。在所有设置中，在线类增量学习（OCIL）（来自数据流的传入样本只能使用一次）更具挑战性，并且在现实世界中更容易遇到。事实上，所有的持续学习模型都面临着稳定性与可塑性的困境，其中稳定性意味着保存旧知识的能力，而可塑性则意味着吸收新知识的能力。尽管基于重放的方法已经显示出非凡的前景，但它们中的大多数都集中在更新和检索记忆的策略上，以牺牲可塑性为代价来保持稳定性。为了在稳定性和可塑性之间取得更好的权衡，我们提出了一种自适应焦点转移算法（AFS），该算法可以动态地将焦点调整到模型学习中的模糊样本和非目标逻辑。通过深入分析类别不平衡导致的任务新近度偏差，我们提出了一种修正的焦点损失以主要保持稳定性。 \Rt{通过利用新的权重函数，修改后的焦点损失将更加关注当前的模糊样本，这些样本是使模型快速进步的潜在有价值的样本。}为了提高可塑性，我们引入了虚拟知识蒸馏。通过设计虚拟教师，将更多的注意力分配给非目标班级，这可以克服过度自信，鼓励模型关注班级间信息。对 OCIL 的三个流行数据集进行的广泛实验证明了 AFS 的有效性。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/czjghost/AFS} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应焦点转移算法（AFS），旨在缓解在线类别增量学习（OCIL）中的任务近期偏差问题，以实现稳定性与可塑性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 在线类别增量学习面临数据流中样本仅能使用一次的挑战，现有方法多侧重稳定性而忽视可塑性，导致模型难以有效学习新知识并克服任务近期偏差。
AI.method: 提出AFS算法，通过改进的焦点损失函数动态关注当前模糊样本以保持稳定性，并引入虚拟知识蒸馏机制，引导模型关注非目标类别以提升可塑性。
AI.result: 在三个主流OCIL数据集上的实验表明，AFS在保持旧知识和学习新知识方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AFS通过动态调整焦点和虚拟蒸馏机制有效缓解了任务近期偏差，为在线类别增量学习提供了稳定性与可塑性的平衡方案。

authors_text: André Susano Pinto,Alexander Kolesnikov,Yuge Shi,Lucas Beyer,Xiaohua Zhai
title: Tuning computer vision models with task rewards
title_zh: 通过任务奖励调整计算机视觉模型
abstract: Misalignment between model predictions and intended usage can be detrimental for the deployment of computer vision models. The issue is exacerbated when the task involves complex structured outputs, as it becomes harder to design procedures which address this misalignment. In natural language processing, this is often addressed using reinforcement learning techniques that align models with a task reward. We adopt this approach and show its surprising effectiveness across multiple computer vision tasks, such as object detection, panoptic segmentation, colorization and image captioning. We believe this approach has the potential to be widely useful for better aligning models with a diverse range of computer vision tasks.
summary: Misalignment between model predictions and intended usage can be detrimental for the deployment of computer vision models. The issue is exacerbated when the task involves complex structured outputs, as it becomes harder to design procedures which address this misalignment. In natural language processing, this is often addressed using reinforcement learning techniques that align models with a task reward. We adopt this approach and show its surprising effectiveness across multiple computer vision tasks, such as object detection, panoptic segmentation, colorization and image captioning. We believe this approach has the potential to be widely useful for better aligning models with a diverse range of computer vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 模型预测与预期用途之间的不一致可能不利于计算机视觉模型的部署。当任务涉及复杂的结构化输出时，这个问题会更加严重，因为设计解决这种不一致的程序变得更加困难。在自然语言处理中，通常使用强化学习技术来解决这个问题，该技术将模型与任务奖励结合起来。我们采用这种方法，并在多个计算机视觉任务中展示了其惊人的有效性，例如对象检测、全景分割、着色和图像字幕。我们相信这种方法有可能广泛用于更好地将模型与各种计算机视觉任务结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过任务奖励调整计算机视觉模型，以解决模型预测与实际任务目标之间的不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉模型在部署时可能因预测与任务目标不一致而失效，尤其在复杂结构化输出任务中，传统方法难以有效对齐模型与任务需求。
AI.method: 借鉴自然语言处理中的强化学习方法，利用任务奖励机制对模型进行微调，使其更贴合具体任务的预期输出。
AI.result: 该方法在目标检测、全景分割、图像着色和图像描述等任务中均表现出显著效果，验证了其广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 任务奖励驱动的模型调整方法为计算机视觉领域提供了有效工具，可提升模型与多样化任务目标的对齐能力。
