authors_text: Ahmed Alia,Mohammed Maree,Mohcine Chraibi,Anas Toma,Armin Seyfried
title: A Cloud-based Deep Learning Framework for Early Detection of Pushing at Crowded Event Entrances
title_zh: 基于云的深度学习框架，用于早期检测拥挤活动入口处的推挤行为
abstract: Crowding at the entrances of large events may lead to critical and life-threatening situations, particularly when people start pushing each other to reach the event faster. Automatic and timely identification of pushing behavior would help organizers and security forces to intervene early and mitigate dangerous situations. In this paper, we propose a cloud-based deep learning framework for automatic early detection of pushing in crowded event entrances. The proposed framework initially modifies and trains the EfficientNetV2B0 Convolutional Neural Network model. Subsequently, it integrates the adapted model with an accurate and fast pre-trained deep optical flow model with the color wheel method to analyze video streams and identify pushing patches in real-time. Moreover, the framework uses live capturing technology and a cloud-based environment to collect video streams of crowds in real-time and provide early-stage results. A novel dataset is generated based on five real-world experiments and their associated ground truth data to train the adapted EfficientNetV2B0 model. The experimental setups simulated a crowded event entrance, while the ground truths for each video experiment was generated manually by social psychologists. Several experiments on the videos and the generated dataset are carried out to evaluate the accuracy and annotation delay time of the proposed framework. The experimental results show that the proposed framework identified pushing behaviors with an accuracy rate of 87% within a reasonable delay time.

Automatic and timely identification of pushing behavior would help organizers and security forces to intervene early and mitigate dangerous situations. In this paper, we propose a cloud-based deep learning framework for automatic early detection of pushing in crowded event entrances. The proposed framework initially modifies and trains the EfficientNetV2B0 Convolutional Neural Network model. Subsequently, it integrates the adapted model with an accurate and fast pre-trained deep optical flow model with the color wheel method to analyze video streams and identify pushing patches in real-time. Moreover, the framework uses live capturing technology and a cloud-based environment to collect video streams of crowds in real-time and provide early-stage results. A novel dataset is generated based on five real-world experiments and their associated ground truth data to train the adapted EfficientNetV2B0 model. The experimental setups simulated a crowded event entrance, while the ground truths for each video experiment was generated manually by social psychologists. Several experiments on the videos and the generated dataset are carried out to evaluate the accuracy and annotation delay time of the proposed framework. The experimental results show that the proposed framework identified pushing behaviors with an accuracy rate of 87% within a reasonable delay time.
abstract_zh: 大型活动入口处的拥挤可能会导致危急和危及生命的情况，特别是当人们开始互相推动以更快地到达活动场所时。自动及时识别推动行为将有助于组织者和安全部队及早干预并减轻危险情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于云的深度学习框架，用于自动及早检测拥挤事件入口的推入情况。所提出的框架最初修改并训练了 EfficientNetV2B0 卷积神经网络模型。随后，它将适应的模型与准确、快速的预训练深度光流模型和色轮方法相结合，以分析视频流并实时识别推送补丁。此外，该框架使用实时捕捉技术和基于云的环境来实时收集人群的视频流并提供早期结果。基于五个现实世界实验及其相关的地面实况数据生成一个新颖的数据集，以训练适应的 EfficientNetV2B0 模型。实验设置模拟了拥挤的活动入口，而每个视频实验的基本事实都是由社会心理学家手动生成的。对视频和生成的数据集进行了多次实验，以评估所提出框架的准确性和注释延迟时间。实验结果表明，该框架在合理的延迟时间内识别推送行为的准确率为87%。

AI.tldr: 开发基于云的深度学习框架，用于在拥挤的活动入口实时检测推挤行为。
AI.motivation: 拥挤事件入口的推挤行为可能引发危险，需通过自动化手段实现早期识别以保障安全。
AI.method: 改进EfficientNetV2B0模型并结合预训练光流模型与颜色轮方法，利用实时视频捕获和云环境进行推挤检测，生成定制数据集训练模型。
AI.result: 框架在合理延迟时间内达到87%的推挤行为识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了拥挤场景下推挤行为的高精度实时检测，为活动安全管理提供技术支持。

authors_text: Zihao Li,Hao Wang,Zhenzhen Yan
title: Sample-Based Online Generalized Assignment Problem with Unknown Poisson Arrivals
title_zh: 泊松到达未知的基于样本的在线广义分配问题
abstract: We study an edge-weighted online stochastic \emph{Generalized Assignment Problem} with \emph{unknown} Poisson arrivals. In this model, we consider a bipartite graph that contains offline bins and online items, where each offline bin is associated with a $D$-dimensional capacity vector and each online item is with a $D$-dimensional demand vector. Online arrivals are sampled from a set of online item types which follow independent but not necessarily identical Poisson processes. The arrival rate for each Poisson process is unknown. Each online item will either be packed into an offline bin which will deduct the allocated bin's capacity vector and generate a reward, or be rejected. The decision should be made immediately and irrevocably upon its arrival. Our goal is to maximize the total reward of the allocation without violating the capacity constraints. We provide a sample-based multi-phase algorithm by utilizing both pre-existing offline data (named historical data) and sequentially revealed online data. We establish its performance guarantee measured by a competitive ratio. In a simplified setting where $D=1$ and all capacities and demands are equal to $1$, we prove that the ratio depends on the number of historical data size and the minimum number of arrivals for each online item type during the planning horizon, from which we analyze the effect of the historical data size and the Poisson arrival model on the algorithm's performance. We further generalize the algorithm to the general multidimensional and multi-demand setting, and present its parametric performance guarantee. The effect of the capacity's (demand's) dimension on the algorithm's performance is further analyzed based on the established parametric form. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithms numerically.
summary: We study an edge-weighted online stochastic \emph{Generalized Assignment Problem} with \emph{unknown} Poisson arrivals. In this model, we consider a bipartite graph that contains offline bins and online items, where each offline bin is associated with a $D$-dimensional capacity vector and each online item is with a $D$-dimensional demand vector. Online arrivals are sampled from a set of online item types which follow independent but not necessarily identical Poisson processes. The arrival rate for each Poisson process is unknown. Each online item will either be packed into an offline bin which will deduct the allocated bin's capacity vector and generate a reward, or be rejected. The decision should be made immediately and irrevocably upon its arrival. Our goal is to maximize the total reward of the allocation without violating the capacity constraints. We provide a sample-based multi-phase algorithm by utilizing both pre-existing offline data (named historical data) and sequentially revealed online data. We establish its performance guarantee measured by a competitive ratio. In a simplified setting where $D=1$ and all capacities and demands are equal to $1$, we prove that the ratio depends on the number of historical data size and the minimum number of arrivals for each online item type during the planning horizon, from which we analyze the effect of the historical data size and the Poisson arrival model on the algorithm's performance. We further generalize the algorithm to the general multidimensional and multi-demand setting, and present its parametric performance guarantee. The effect of the capacity's (demand's) dimension on the algorithm's performance is further analyzed based on the established parametric form. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithms numerically.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有 \emph{未知} 泊松到达的边缘加权在线随机 \emph{广义分配问题}。在此模型中，我们考虑一个包含离线箱和在线项目的二部图，其中每个离线箱与 $D$ 维容量向量相关联，每个在线项目与 $D$ 维需求向量相关联。在线到达是从一组在线商品类型中抽取的，这些类型遵循独立但不一定相同的泊松过程。每个泊松过程的到达率未知。每个在线项目要么被打包到离线箱中，该离线箱将扣除分配的箱的容量向量并生成奖励，要么被拒绝。该决定应在其到达后立即做出且不可撤销。我们的目标是在不违反容量限制的情况下最大化分配的总奖励。我们通过利用预先存在的离线数据（称为历史数据）和顺序显示的在线数据来提供基于样本的多阶段算法。我们通过竞争比率来衡量其绩效保证。在 $D=1$ 且所有容量和需求等于 $1$ 的简化设置中，我们证明该比率取决于历史数据大小的数量和规划范围内每种在线商品类型的最小到达数量，从中我们分析历史数据大小和泊松到达模型对算法性能的影响。我们进一步将该算法推广到一般的多维和多需求设置，并给出其参数性能保证。基于建立的参数化形式，进一步分析了容量（需求）维度对算法性能的影响。最后，我们用数值证明了我们算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有未知泊松到达的在线广义分配问题，提出了一种基于样本的多阶段算法，以最大化奖励并满足容量约束。
AI.motivation: 在线分配问题中，物品的到达率未知且动态变化，传统方法难以有效处理，需结合历史数据与实时数据提升算法性能。
AI.method: 设计了一种利用历史数据和实时数据的多阶段算法，通过竞争比衡量性能，并分析了历史数据量和泊松到达模型对算法的影响。
AI.result: 在简化和一般化场景下均证明了算法的竞争比，分析了容量/需求维度对性能的影响，并通过数值实验验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能有效处理未知泊松到达的在线分配问题，历史数据量和到达模型参数对性能有显著影响，多维场景下算法仍具鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了具有未知泊松到达的在线广义分配问题，提出了一种基于样本的多阶段算法，以最大化奖励并满足容量约束。

search_text: Sample-Based Online Generalized Assignment Problem with Unknown Poisson Arrivals 泊松到达未知的基于样本的在线广义分配问题 We study an edge-weighted online stochastic \emph{Generalized Assignment Problem} with \emph{unknown} Poisson arrivals. In this model, we consider a bipartite graph that contains offline bins and online items, where each offline bin is associated with a $D$-dimensional capacity vector and each online item is with a $D$-dimensional demand vector. Online arrivals are sampled from a set of online item types which follow independent but not necessarily identical Poisson processes. The arrival rate for each Poisson process is unknown. Each online item will either be packed into an offline bin which will deduct the allocated bin's capacity vector and generate a reward, or be rejected. The decision should be made immediately and irrevocably upon its arrival. Our goal is to maximize the total reward of the allocation without violating the capacity constraints. We provide a sample-based multi-phase algorithm by utilizing both pre-existing offline data (named historical data) and sequentially revealed online data. We establish its performance guarantee measured by a competitive ratio. In a simplified setting where $D=1$ and all capacities and demands are equal to $1$, we prove that the ratio depends on the number of historical data size and the minimum number of arrivals for each online item type during the planning horizon, from which we analyze the effect of the historical data size and the Poisson arrival model on the algorithm's performance. We further generalize the algorithm to the general multidimensional and multi-demand setting, and present its parametric performance guarantee. The effect of the capacity's (demand's) dimension on the algorithm's performance is further analyzed based on the established parametric form. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithms numerically. 我们研究了具有 \emph{未知} 泊松到达的边缘加权在线随机 \emph{广义分配问题}。在此模型中，我们考虑一个包含离线箱和在线项目的二部图，其中每个离线箱与 $D$ 维容量向量相关联，每个在线项目与 $D$ 维需求向量相关联。在线到达是从一组在线商品类型中抽取的，这些类型遵循独立但不一定相同的泊松过程。每个泊松过程的到达率未知。每个在线项目要么被打包到离线箱中，该离线箱将扣除分配的箱的容量向量并生成奖励，要么被拒绝。该决定应在其到达后立即做出且不可撤销。我们的目标是在不违反容量限制的情况下最大化分配的总奖励。我们通过利用预先存在的离线数据（称为历史数据）和顺序显示的在线数据来提供基于样本的多阶段算法。我们通过竞争比率来衡量其绩效保证。在 $D=1$ 且所有容量和需求等于 $1$ 的简化设置中，我们证明该比率取决于历史数据大小的数量和规划范围内每种在线商品类型的最小到达数量，从中我们分析历史数据大小和泊松到达模型对算法性能的影响。我们进一步将该算法推广到一般的多维和多需求设置，并给出其参数性能保证。基于建立的参数化形式，进一步分析了容量（需求）维度对算法性能的影响。最后，我们用数值证明了我们算法的有效性。 本文研究了具有未知泊松到达的在线广义分配问题，提出了一种基于样本的多阶段算法，以最大化奖励并满足容量约束。 Zihao Li,Hao Wang,Zhenzhen Yan cs.GT,cs.DS

authors_text: Jongwoo Park,Apoorv Singh,Varun Bankiti
title: 3M3D: Multi-view, Multi-path, Multi-representation for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 3M3D：用于 3D 物体检测的多视图、多路径、多表示
abstract: 3D visual perception tasks based on multi-camera images are essential for autonomous driving systems. Latest work in this field performs 3D object detection by leveraging multi-view images as an input and iteratively enhancing object queries (object proposals) by cross-attending multi-view features. However, individual backbone features are not updated with multi-view features and it stays as a mere collection of the output of the single-image backbone network. Therefore we propose 3M3D: A Multi-view, Multi-path, Multi-representation for 3D Object Detection where we update both multi-view features and query features to enhance the representation of the scene in both fine panoramic view and coarse global view. Firstly, we update multi-view features by multi-view axis self-attention. It will incorporate panoramic information in the multi-view features and enhance understanding of the global scene. Secondly, we update multi-view features by self-attention of the ROI (Region of Interest) windows which encodes local finer details in the features. It will help exchange the information not only along the multi-view axis but also along the other spatial dimension. Lastly, we leverage the fact of multi-representation of queries in different domains to further boost the performance. Here we use sparse floating queries along with dense BEV (Bird's Eye View) queries, which are later post-processed to filter duplicate detections. Moreover, we show performance improvements on nuScenes benchmark dataset on top of our baselines.
summary: 3D visual perception tasks based on multi-camera images are essential for autonomous driving systems. Latest work in this field performs 3D object detection by leveraging multi-view images as an input and iteratively enhancing object queries (object proposals) by cross-attending multi-view features. However, individual backbone features are not updated with multi-view features and it stays as a mere collection of the output of the single-image backbone network. Therefore we propose 3M3D: A Multi-view, Multi-path, Multi-representation for 3D Object Detection where we update both multi-view features and query features to enhance the representation of the scene in both fine panoramic view and coarse global view. Firstly, we update multi-view features by multi-view axis self-attention. It will incorporate panoramic information in the multi-view features and enhance understanding of the global scene. Secondly, we update multi-view features by self-attention of the ROI (Region of Interest) windows which encodes local finer details in the features. It will help exchange the information not only along the multi-view axis but also along the other spatial dimension. Lastly, we leverage the fact of multi-representation of queries in different domains to further boost the performance. Here we use sparse floating queries along with dense BEV (Bird's Eye View) queries, which are later post-processed to filter duplicate detections. Moreover, we show performance improvements on nuScenes benchmark dataset on top of our baselines.
abstract_zh: 基于多摄像头图像的 3D 视觉感知任务对于自动驾驶系统至关重要。该领域的最新工作通过利用多视图图像作为输入并通过交叉参与多视图特征迭代增强对象查询（对象建议）来执行 3D 对象检测。然而，各个主干特征不会用多视图特征进行更新，它仍然只是单图像主干网络输出的集合。因此，我们提出 3M3D：用于 3D 对象检测的多视图、多路径、多表示，其中我们更新多视图特征和查询特征，以增强精细全景视图和粗略全局视图中场景的表示。首先，我们通过多视图轴自注意力来更新多视图特征。它将在多视图特征中融入全景信息，增强对全球场景的理解。其次，我们通过 ROI（感兴趣区域）窗口的自注意力来更新多视图特征，该窗口对特征中的局部更精细的细节进行编码。它将有助于不仅沿着多视图轴而且沿着其他空间维度交换信息。最后，我们利用不同域中查询的多重表示来进一步提高性能。在这里，我们使用稀疏浮动查询和密集 BEV（鸟瞰图）查询，稍后对其进行后处理以过滤重复检测。此外，我们在基准数据集上展示了 nuScenes 基准数据集的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3M3D方法，通过多视角、多路径和多表示策略提升三维目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未有效融合多视角特征，导致场景表示不足，无法充分捕捉全局与局部信息。
AI.method: 1) 多视角轴自注意力更新全景特征；2) ROI窗口自注意力增强局部细节；3) 结合稀疏浮动查询与密集BEV查询的多表示策略，并进行后处理去重。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准数据集上，相较基线方法实现性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过多视角特征更新与多表示策略的结合，有效增强了三维场景理解能力，推动了自动驾驶系统的视觉感知发展。

search_text: 3M3D: Multi-view, Multi-path, Multi-representation for 3D Object Detection 3M3D：用于 3D 物体检测的多视图、多路径、多表示 3D visual perception tasks based on multi-camera images are essential for autonomous driving systems. Latest work in this field performs 3D object detection by leveraging multi-view images as an input and iteratively enhancing object queries (object proposals) by cross-attending multi-view features. However, individual backbone features are not updated with multi-view features and it stays as a mere collection of the output of the single-image backbone network. Therefore we propose 3M3D: A Multi-view, Multi-path, Multi-representation for 3D Object Detection where we update both multi-view features and query features to enhance the representation of the scene in both fine panoramic view and coarse global view. Firstly, we update multi-view features by multi-view axis self-attention. It will incorporate panoramic information in the multi-view features and enhance understanding of the global scene. Secondly, we update multi-view features by self-attention of the ROI (Region of Interest) windows which encodes local finer details in the features. It will help exchange the information not only along the multi-view axis but also along the other spatial dimension. Lastly, we leverage the fact of multi-representation of queries in different domains to further boost the performance. Here we use sparse floating queries along with dense BEV (Bird's Eye View) queries, which are later post-processed to filter duplicate detections. Moreover, we show performance improvements on nuScenes benchmark dataset on top of our baselines. 基于多摄像头图像的 3D 视觉感知任务对于自动驾驶系统至关重要。该领域的最新工作通过利用多视图图像作为输入并通过交叉参与多视图特征迭代增强对象查询（对象建议）来执行 3D 对象检测。然而，各个主干特征不会用多视图特征进行更新，它仍然只是单图像主干网络输出的集合。因此，我们提出 3M3D：用于 3D 对象检测的多视图、多路径、多表示，其中我们更新多视图特征和查询特征，以增强精细全景视图和粗略全局视图中场景的表示。首先，我们通过多视图轴自注意力来更新多视图特征。它将在多视图特征中融入全景信息，增强对全球场景的理解。其次，我们通过 ROI（感兴趣区域）窗口的自注意力来更新多视图特征，该窗口对特征中的局部更精细的细节进行编码。它将有助于不仅沿着多视图轴而且沿着其他空间维度交换信息。最后，我们利用不同域中查询的多重表示来进一步提高性能。在这里，我们使用稀疏浮动查询和密集 BEV（鸟瞰图）查询，稍后对其进行后处理以过滤重复检测。此外，我们在基准数据集上展示了 nuScenes 基准数据集的性能改进。 本文提出3M3D方法，通过多视角、多路径和多表示策略提升三维目标检测性能。 Jongwoo Park,Apoorv Singh,Varun Bankiti cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiguo He,Yang Yang,Pengcheng Jiao,Haipeng Wang,Guanzheng Lin,Thomas Pähtz
title: Copebot: Underwater soft robot with copepod-like locomotion
title_zh: Copebot：具有类似桡足类运动能力的水下软机器人
abstract: It has been a great challenge to develop robots that are able to perform complex movement patterns with high speed and, simultaneously, high accuracy. Copepods are animals found in freshwater and saltwater habitats that can have extremely fast escape responses when a predator is sensed by performing explosive curved jumps. Here, we present a design and build prototypes of a combustion-driven underwater soft robot, the "copebot", that, like copepods, is able to accurately reach nearby predefined locations in space within a single curved jump. Because of an improved thrust force transmission unit, causing a large initial acceleration peak (850 Bodylength*s-2), the copebot is 8 times faster than previous combustion-driven underwater soft robots, whilst able to perform a complete 360° rotation during the jump. Thrusts generated by the copebot are tested to quantitatively determine the actuation performance, and parametric studies are conducted to investigate the sensitivities of the input parameters to the kinematic performance of the copebot. We demonstrate the utility of our design by building a prototype that rapidly jumps out of the water, accurately lands on its feet on a small platform, wirelessly transmits data, and jumps back into the water. Our copebot design opens the way toward high-performance biomimetic robots for multifunctional applications.
summary: It has been a great challenge to develop robots that are able to perform complex movement patterns with high speed and, simultaneously, high accuracy. Copepods are animals found in freshwater and saltwater habitats that can have extremely fast escape responses when a predator is sensed by performing explosive curved jumps. Here, we present a design and build prototypes of a combustion-driven underwater soft robot, the "copebot", that, like copepods, is able to accurately reach nearby predefined locations in space within a single curved jump. Because of an improved thrust force transmission unit, causing a large initial acceleration peak (850 Bodylength*s-2), the copebot is 8 times faster than previous combustion-driven underwater soft robots, whilst able to perform a complete 360° rotation during the jump. Thrusts generated by the copebot are tested to quantitatively determine the actuation performance, and parametric studies are conducted to investigate the sensitivities of the input parameters to the kinematic performance of the copebot. We demonstrate the utility of our design by building a prototype that rapidly jumps out of the water, accurately lands on its feet on a small platform, wirelessly transmits data, and jumps back into the water. Our copebot design opens the way toward high-performance biomimetic robots for multifunctional applications.
abstract_zh: 开发能够高速且高精度地执行复杂运动模式的机器人一直是一项巨大的挑战。桡足类动物是生活在淡水和咸水栖息地的动物，当察觉到捕食者时，它们会通过爆发性的弧形跳跃做出极快的逃跑反应。在这里，我们展示了一种燃烧驱动的水下软机器人“copebot”的设计和原型，它像桡足类动物一样，能够在一次弯曲的跳跃内准确地到达空间中附近的预定位置。由于改进的推力传输单元，产生较大的初始加速度峰值（850体长*s-2），配合机器人的速度比以前的燃烧驱动水下软体机器人快8倍，同时能够在跳跃过程中进行完整的360°旋转。对协作机器人产生的推力进行测试，以定量确定驱动性能，并进行参数研究，以调查输入参数对协作机器人运动性能的敏感性。我们通过构建一个原型来展示我们设计的实用性，该原型可以快速跳出水面，准确地落在一个小平台上，无线传输数据，然后跳回水中。我们的协作机器人设计为多功能应用的高性能仿生机器人开辟了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仿桡足类动物运动的水下软体机器人Copebot，实现了快速且精确的曲形跳跃运动。
AI.motivation: 开发能够同时实现高速度和高精度复杂运动的水下机器人是当前技术挑战，而桡足类动物的快速逃逸反应为仿生设计提供了灵感。
AI.method: 设计并构建了基于燃烧驱动的软体机器人原型，通过改进推力传递单元实现高初始加速度，并通过参数化研究分析输入参数对运动性能的影响。
AI.result: Copebot的加速度达到850 Bodylength*s⁻²，速度为同类机器人的8倍，可完成360°旋转，并成功演示了水陆跳跃、数据传输等功能。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为多功能仿生机器人开发提供了新方向，展示了高精度、高速度水下作业的潜力。

motivation: 开发能够同时实现高速度和高精度复杂运动的水下机器人是当前技术挑战，而桡足类动物的快速逃逸反应为仿生设计提供了灵感。
method: 设计并构建了基于燃烧驱动的软体机器人原型，通过改进推力传递单元实现高初始加速度，并通过参数化研究分析输入参数对运动性能的影响。
result: Copebot的加速度达到850 Bodylength*s⁻²，速度为同类机器人的8倍，可完成360°旋转，并成功演示了水陆跳跃、数据传输等功能。
conclusion: 该设计为多功能仿生机器人开发提供了新方向，展示了高精度、高速度水下作业的潜力。
search_text: Copebot: Underwater soft robot with copepod-like locomotion Copebot：具有类似桡足类运动能力的水下软机器人 It has been a great challenge to develop robots that are able to perform complex movement patterns with high speed and, simultaneously, high accuracy. Copepods are animals found in freshwater and saltwater habitats that can have extremely fast escape responses when a predator is sensed by performing explosive curved jumps. Here, we present a design and build prototypes of a combustion-driven underwater soft robot, the "copebot", that, like copepods, is able to accurately reach nearby predefined locations in space within a single curved jump. Because of an improved thrust force transmission unit, causing a large initial acceleration peak (850 Bodylength*s-2), the copebot is 8 times faster than previous combustion-driven underwater soft robots, whilst able to perform a complete 360° rotation during the jump. Thrusts generated by the copebot are tested to quantitatively determine the actuation performance, and parametric studies are conducted to investigate the sensitivities of the input parameters to the kinematic performance of the copebot. We demonstrate the utility of our design by building a prototype that rapidly jumps out of the water, accurately lands on its feet on a small platform, wirelessly transmits data, and jumps back into the water. Our copebot design opens the way toward high-performance biomimetic robots for multifunctional applications. 开发能够高速且高精度地执行复杂运动模式的机器人一直是一项巨大的挑战。桡足类动物是生活在淡水和咸水栖息地的动物，当察觉到捕食者时，它们会通过爆发性的弧形跳跃做出极快的逃跑反应。在这里，我们展示了一种燃烧驱动的水下软机器人“copebot”的设计和原型，它像桡足类动物一样，能够在一次弯曲的跳跃内准确地到达空间中附近的预定位置。由于改进的推力传输单元，产生较大的初始加速度峰值（850体长*s-2），配合机器人的速度比以前的燃烧驱动水下软体机器人快8倍，同时能够在跳跃过程中进行完整的360°旋转。对协作机器人产生的推力进行测试，以定量确定驱动性能，并进行参数研究，以调查输入参数对协作机器人运动性能的敏感性。我们通过构建一个原型来展示我们设计的实用性，该原型可以快速跳出水面，准确地落在一个小平台上，无线传输数据，然后跳回水中。我们的协作机器人设计为多功能应用的高性能仿生机器人开辟了道路。 本文提出了一种仿桡足类动物运动的水下软体机器人Copebot，实现了快速且精确的曲形跳跃运动。 Zhiguo He,Yang Yang,Pengcheng Jiao,Haipeng Wang,Guanzheng Lin,Thomas Pähtz cs.RO

authors_text: Zhihao Qian,Yutian Lin,Bo Du
title: Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification via Patch-Mixed Cross-Modality Learning
title_zh: 通过补丁混合跨模态学习进行可见光-红外人员重新识别
abstract: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) aims to retrieve images of the same pedestrian from different modalities, where the challenges lie in the significant modality discrepancy. To alleviate the modality gap, recent methods generate intermediate images by GANs, grayscaling, or mixup strategies. However, these methods could introduce extra data distribution, and the semantic correspondence between the two modalities is not well learned. In this paper, we propose a Patch-Mixed Cross-Modality framework (PMCM), where two images of the same person from two modalities are split into patches and stitched into a new one for model learning. A part-alignment loss is introduced to regularize representation learning, and a patch-mixed modality learning loss is proposed to align between the modalities. In this way, the model learns to recognize a person through patches of different styles, thereby the modality semantic correspondence can be inferred. In addition, with the flexible image generation strategy, the patch-mixed images freely adjust the ratio of different modality patches, which could further alleviate the modality imbalance problem. On two VI-ReID datasets, we report new state-of-the-art performance with the proposed method.
summary: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) aims to retrieve images of the same pedestrian from different modalities, where the challenges lie in the significant modality discrepancy. To alleviate the modality gap, recent methods generate intermediate images by GANs, grayscaling, or mixup strategies. However, these methods could introduce extra data distribution, and the semantic correspondence between the two modalities is not well learned. In this paper, we propose a Patch-Mixed Cross-Modality framework (PMCM), where two images of the same person from two modalities are split into patches and stitched into a new one for model learning. A part-alignment loss is introduced to regularize representation learning, and a patch-mixed modality learning loss is proposed to align between the modalities. In this way, the model learns to recognize a person through patches of different styles, thereby the modality semantic correspondence can be inferred. In addition, with the flexible image generation strategy, the patch-mixed images freely adjust the ratio of different modality patches, which could further alleviate the modality imbalance problem. On two VI-ReID datasets, we report new state-of-the-art performance with the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 可见红外行人重识别（VI-ReID）旨在从不同模态检索同一行人的图像，其挑战在于显着的模态差异。为了缩小模态差距，最近的方法通过 GAN、灰度或混合策略生成中间图像。然而，这些方法可能会引入额外的数据分布，并且两种模态之间的语义对应关系尚未得到很好的学习。在本文中，我们提出了一种补丁混合跨模态框架（PMCM），其中来自两种模态的同一个人的两张图像被分割成补丁并缝合成新的补丁以进行模型学习。引入部分对齐损失来规范表示学习，并提出了补丁混合模态学习损失来在模态之间进行对齐。这样，模型就可以通过不同风格的补丁来学习识别一个人，从而推断出模态语义对应关系。此外，通过灵活的图像生成策略，补丁混合图像可以自由调整不同模态补丁的比例，这可以进一步缓解模态不平衡问题。在两个 VI-ReID 数据集上，我们报告了所提出的方法的新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 解决可见光与红外图像行人重识别中的模态差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成中间图像可能引入额外数据分布，且未充分学习跨模态语义对应关系。
AI.method: 提出块混合跨模态框架（PMCM），将双模态图像分割为块并拼接，结合部分对齐损失与块混合模态学习损失，通过灵活调整模态比例缓解不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在两个VI-ReID数据集上取得新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过块混合策略与双重损失函数，有效提升跨模态语义对齐能力，缓解模态差异与不平衡问题。

authors_text: Lang Nie,Chunyu Lin,Kang Liao,Shuaicheng Liu,Yao Zhao
title: Parallax-Tolerant Unsupervised Deep Image Stitching
title_zh: 容忍视差的无监督深度图像拼接
abstract: Traditional image stitching approaches tend to leverage increasingly complex geometric features (point, line, edge, etc.) for better performance. However, these hand-crafted features are only suitable for specific natural scenes with adequate geometric structures. In contrast, deep stitching schemes overcome the adverse conditions by adaptively learning robust semantic features, but they cannot handle large-parallax cases due to homography-based registration. To solve these issues, we propose UDIS++, a parallax-tolerant unsupervised deep image stitching technique. First, we propose a robust and flexible warp to model the image registration from global homography to local thin-plate spline motion. It provides accurate alignment for overlapping regions and shape preservation for non-overlapping regions by joint optimization concerning alignment and distortion. Subsequently, to improve the generalization capability, we design a simple but effective iterative strategy to enhance the warp adaption in cross-dataset and cross-resolution applications. Finally, to further eliminate the parallax artifacts, we propose to composite the stitched image seamlessly by unsupervised learning for seam-driven composition masks. Compared with existing methods, our solution is parallax-tolerant and free from laborious designs of complicated geometric features for specific scenes. Extensive experiments show our superiority over the SoTA methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/nie-lang/UDIS2.
summary: Traditional image stitching approaches tend to leverage increasingly complex geometric features (point, line, edge, etc.) for better performance. However, these hand-crafted features are only suitable for specific natural scenes with adequate geometric structures. In contrast, deep stitching schemes overcome the adverse conditions by adaptively learning robust semantic features, but they cannot handle large-parallax cases due to homography-based registration. To solve these issues, we propose UDIS++, a parallax-tolerant unsupervised deep image stitching technique. First, we propose a robust and flexible warp to model the image registration from global homography to local thin-plate spline motion. It provides accurate alignment for overlapping regions and shape preservation for non-overlapping regions by joint optimization concerning alignment and distortion. Subsequently, to improve the generalization capability, we design a simple but effective iterative strategy to enhance the warp adaption in cross-dataset and cross-resolution applications. Finally, to further eliminate the parallax artifacts, we propose to composite the stitched image seamlessly by unsupervised learning for seam-driven composition masks. Compared with existing methods, our solution is parallax-tolerant and free from laborious designs of complicated geometric features for specific scenes. Extensive experiments show our superiority over the SoTA methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/nie-lang/UDIS2.
abstract_zh: 传统的图像拼接方法倾向于利用日益复杂的几何特征（点、线、边缘等）来获得更好的性能。然而，这些手工制作的特征仅适用于具有足够几何结构的特定自然场景。相比之下，深度拼接方案通过自适应学习鲁棒的语义特征来克服不利条件，但由于基于单应性的配准，它们无法处理大视差情况。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 UDIS++，一种视差容忍的无监督深度图像拼接技术。首先，我们提出了一种稳健且灵活的扭曲来模拟从全局单应性到局部薄板样条运动的图像配准。它通过有关对齐和扭曲的联合优化，为重叠区域提供精确对齐，并为非重叠区域提供形状保留。随后，为了提高泛化能力，我们设计了一种简单但有效的迭代策略来增强跨数据集和跨分辨率应用中的扭曲自适应。最后，为了进一步消除视差伪影，我们建议通过缝驱动合成掩模的无监督学习来无缝合成缝合图像。与现有方法相比，我们的解决方案具有视差容错性，并且无需针对特定场景进行复杂几何特征的繁琐设计。大量的实验表明我们在定量和定性方面都优于 SoTA 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/nie-lang/UDIS2 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督的深度图像拼接技术UDIS++，旨在解决传统方法在大视差场景下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像拼接依赖人工设计的几何特征，仅适用于特定场景；深度方法虽能自适应学习特征，但基于单应性变换的注册无法处理大视差问题。
AI.method: 提出从全局单应性到局部薄板样条运动的鲁棒变形模型，结合对齐与失真联合优化；设计跨数据集/分辨率的迭代策略；通过无监督学习生成无缝拼接的缝合掩码。
AI.result: 在定量和定性实验中均优于现有SOTA方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: UDIS++通过无需复杂几何特征设计的端到端方案，实现了对大视差场景的鲁棒拼接。

Compared with existing methods, our solution is parallax-tolerant and free from laborious designs of complicated geometric features for specific scenes. Extensive experiments show our superiority over the SoTA methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/nie-lang/UDIS2. 传统的图像拼接方法倾向于利用日益复杂的几何特征（点、线、边缘等）来获得更好的性能。然而，这些手工制作的特征仅适用于具有足够几何结构的特定自然场景。相比之下，深度拼接方案通过自适应学习鲁棒的语义特征来克服不利条件，但由于基于单应性的配准，它们无法处理大视差情况。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 UDIS++，一种视差容忍的无监督深度图像拼接技术。首先，我们提出了一种稳健且灵活的扭曲来模拟从全局单应性到局部薄板样条运动的图像配准。它通过有关对齐和扭曲的联合优化，为重叠区域提供精确对齐，并为非重叠区域提供形状保留。随后，为了提高泛化能力，我们设计了一种简单但有效的迭代策略来增强跨数据集和跨分辨率应用中的扭曲自适应。最后，为了进一步消除视差伪影，我们建议通过缝驱动合成掩模的无监督学习来无缝合成缝合图像。与现有方法相比，我们的解决方案具有视差容错性，并且无需针对特定场景进行复杂几何特征的繁琐设计。大量的实验表明我们在定量和定性方面都优于 SoTA 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/nie-lang/UDIS2 获取。 本文提出了一种无需监督的深度图像拼接技术UDIS++，旨在解决传统方法在大视差场景下的局限性。 Lang Nie,Chunyu Lin,Kang Liao,Shuaicheng Liu,Yao Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Dianyue Gu,Zixu Li,Zhenhai Guan,Rui Zhang,Lan Huang
title: A method for incremental discovery of financial event types based on anomaly detection
title_zh: 一种基于异常检测的金融事件类型增量发现方法
abstract: Event datasets in the financial domain are often constructed based on actual application scenarios, and their event types are weakly reusable due to scenario constraints; at the same time, the massive and diverse new financial big data cannot be limited to the event types defined for specific scenarios. This limitation of a small number of event types does not meet our research needs for more complex tasks such as the prediction of major financial events and the analysis of the ripple effects of financial events. In this paper, a three-stage approach is proposed to accomplish incremental discovery of event types. For an existing annotated financial event dataset, the three-stage approach consists of: for a set of financial event data with a mixture of original and unknown event types, a semi-supervised deep clustering model with anomaly detection is first applied to classify the data into normal and abnormal events, where abnormal events are events that do not belong to known types; then normal events are tagged with appropriate event types and abnormal events are reasonably clustered. Finally, a cluster keyword extraction method is used to recommend the type names of events for the new event clusters, thus incrementally discovering new event types. The proposed method is effective in the incremental discovery of new event types on real data sets.
summary: Event datasets in the financial domain are often constructed based on actual application scenarios, and their event types are weakly reusable due to scenario constraints; at the same time, the massive and diverse new financial big data cannot be limited to the event types defined for specific scenarios. This limitation of a small number of event types does not meet our research needs for more complex tasks such as the prediction of major financial events and the analysis of the ripple effects of financial events. In this paper, a three-stage approach is proposed to accomplish incremental discovery of event types. For an existing annotated financial event dataset, the three-stage approach consists of: for a set of financial event data with a mixture of original and unknown event types, a semi-supervised deep clustering model with anomaly detection is first applied to classify the data into normal and abnormal events, where abnormal events are events that do not belong to known types; then normal events are tagged with appropriate event types and abnormal events are reasonably clustered. Finally, a cluster keyword extraction method is used to recommend the type names of events for the new event clusters, thus incrementally discovering new event types. The proposed method is effective in the incremental discovery of new event types on real data sets.
abstract_zh: 金融领域的事件数据集往往是根据实际应用场景构建的，其事件类型受场景限制，复用性较弱；同时，海量、多样的新金融大数据不能仅限于针对特定场景定义的事件类型。这种少数事件类型的限制不能满足我们对重大金融事件预测、金融事件连锁反应分析等更复杂任务的研究需求。在本文中，提出了一种三阶段方法来完成事件类型的增量发现。对于现有的带注释的金融事件数据集，三阶段方法包括：对于一组混合了原始事件类型和未知事件类型的金融事件数据，首先应用具有异常检测的半监督深度聚类模型将数据分类为正常事件和异常事件，其中异常事件是不属于已知类型的事件；然后，正常事件被标记为适当的事件类型，异常事件被合理地聚类。最后，采用聚类关键词提取方法为新的事件聚类推荐事件类型名称，从而增量发现新的事件类型。所提出的方法对于在真实数据集上增量发现新事件类型是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异常检测的增量发现金融事件类型的方法，以解决现有事件类型有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 金融领域事件数据的事件类型因场景限制而可复用性差，且海量新数据超出原有类型定义范围，难以满足复杂任务需求。
AI.method: 采用三阶段方法：1）用半监督深度聚类模型分类正常与异常事件；2）标注正常事件并聚类异常事件；3）通过关键词提取推荐新类型名称。
AI.result: 该方法在真实数据集上有效实现了新事件类型的增量发现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三阶段方法能有效应对金融事件类型增量发现的挑战，提升复杂任务的分析能力。

authors_text: Giandomenico Cornacchia,Vito Walter Anelli,Fedelucio Narducci,Azzurra Ragone,Eugenio Di Sciascio
title: Counterfactual Reasoning for Bias Evaluation and Detection in a Fairness under Unawareness setting
title_zh: 无意识环境下公平性偏差评估和检测的反事实推理
abstract: Current AI regulations require discarding sensitive features (e.g., gender, race, religion) in the algorithm's decision-making process to prevent unfair outcomes. However, even without sensitive features in the training set, algorithms can persist in discrimination. Indeed, when sensitive features are omitted (fairness under unawareness), they could be inferred through non-linear relations with the so called proxy features. In this work, we propose a way to reveal the potential hidden bias of a machine learning model that can persist even when sensitive features are discarded. This study shows that it is possible to unveil whether the black-box predictor is still biased by exploiting counterfactual reasoning. In detail, when the predictor provides a negative classification outcome, our approach first builds counterfactual examples for a discriminated user category to obtain a positive outcome. Then, the same counterfactual samples feed an external classifier (that targets a sensitive feature) that reveals whether the modifications to the user characteristics needed for a positive outcome moved the individual to the non-discriminated group. When this occurs, it could be a warning sign for discriminatory behavior in the decision process. Furthermore, we leverage the deviation of counterfactuals from the original sample to determine which features are proxies of specific sensitive information. Our experiments show that, even if the model is trained without sensitive features, it often suffers discriminatory biases.
summary: Current AI regulations require discarding sensitive features (e.g., gender, race, religion) in the algorithm's decision-making process to prevent unfair outcomes. However, even without sensitive features in the training set, algorithms can persist in discrimination. Indeed, when sensitive features are omitted (fairness under unawareness), they could be inferred through non-linear relations with the so called proxy features. In this work, we propose a way to reveal the potential hidden bias of a machine learning model that can persist even when sensitive features are discarded. This study shows that it is possible to unveil whether the black-box predictor is still biased by exploiting counterfactual reasoning. In detail, when the predictor provides a negative classification outcome, our approach first builds counterfactual examples for a discriminated user category to obtain a positive outcome. Then, the same counterfactual samples feed an external classifier (that targets a sensitive feature) that reveals whether the modifications to the user characteristics needed for a positive outcome moved the individual to the non-discriminated group. When this occurs, it could be a warning sign for discriminatory behavior in the decision process. Furthermore, we leverage the deviation of counterfactuals from the original sample to determine which features are proxies of specific sensitive information. Our experiments show that, even if the model is trained without sensitive features, it often suffers discriminatory biases.
abstract_zh: 当前的人工智能法规要求在算法的决策过程中丢弃敏感特征（例如性别、种族、宗教），以防止出现不公平的结果。然而，即使训练集中没有敏感特征，算法也可能持续存在歧视。事实上，当敏感特征被省略时（无意识下的公平），可以通过与所谓的代理特征的非线性关系来推断它们。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法来揭示机器学习模型潜在的隐藏偏差，即使敏感特征被丢弃，这种偏差也可能持续存在。这项研究表明，通过利用反事实推理，可以揭示黑盒预测器是否仍然存在偏见。具体来说，当预测器提供负面分类结果时，我们的方法首先为受歧视的用户类别构建反事实示例以获得正面结果。然后，相同的反事实样本提供给外部分类器（针对敏感特征），该分类器揭示了积极结果所需的对用户特征的修改是否会将个人转移到非歧视群体。当这种情况发生时，可能是决策过程中歧视行为的警告信号。此外，我们利用反事实与原始样本的偏差来确定哪些特征是特定敏感信息的代理。我们的实验表明，即使模型在没有敏感特征的情况下进行训练，它也经常会遭受歧视性偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反事实推理的方法，在无意识公平性设置下检测机器学习模型中隐藏的歧视性偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有AI法规虽要求剔除敏感特征以避免歧视，但模型仍可能通过代理特征间接推断敏感信息并产生歧视，需有效检测此类隐藏偏差。
AI.method: 构建反事实样本模拟非歧视群体特征，通过外部分类器判断特征修改是否导致群体转移，并利用反事实偏差识别代理特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使模型未使用敏感特征训练，仍普遍存在因代理特征导致的歧视性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 反事实推理可有效揭示模型隐藏歧视，提示AI开发需警惕代理特征对公平性的影响。

authors_text: Aaron Master,Lie Lu,Jonas Samuelsson,Heidi-Maria Lehtonen,Scott Norcross,Nathan Swedlow,Audrey Howard
title: DeepSpace: Dynamic Spatial and Source Cue Based Source Separation for Dialog Enhancement
title_zh: DeepSpace：基于动态空间和源提示的源分离，用于增强对话
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. To be published in ICASSP 2023
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures. To be published in ICASSP 2023
abstract: Dialog Enhancement (DE) is a feature which allows a user to increase the level of dialog in TV or movie content relative to non-dialog sounds. When only the original mix is available, DE is "unguided," and requires source separation. In this paper, we describe the DeepSpace system, which performs source separation using both dynamic spatial cues and source cues to support unguided DE. Its technologies include spatio-level filtering (SLF) and deep-learning based dialog classification and denoising. Using subjective listening tests, we show that DeepSpace demonstrates significantly improved overall performance relative to state-of-the-art systems available for testing. We explore the feasibility of using existing automated metrics to evaluate unguided DE systems.
summary: Dialog Enhancement (DE) is a feature which allows a user to increase the level of dialog in TV or movie content relative to non-dialog sounds. When only the original mix is available, DE is "unguided," and requires source separation. In this paper, we describe the DeepSpace system, which performs source separation using both dynamic spatial cues and source cues to support unguided DE. Its technologies include spatio-level filtering (SLF) and deep-learning based dialog classification and denoising. Using subjective listening tests, we show that DeepSpace demonstrates significantly improved overall performance relative to state-of-the-art systems available for testing. We explore the feasibility of using existing automated metrics to evaluate unguided DE systems.
abstract_zh: 对话增强 (DE) 是一项允许用户提高电视或电影内容中相对于非对话声音的对话级别的功能。当只有原始混合可用时，DE 是“无引导的”，并且需要源分离。在本文中，我们描述了 DeepSpace 系统，该系统使用动态空间线索和源线索来执行源分离，以支持非引导 DE。其技术包括空间级过滤（SLF）和基于深度学习的对话分类和去噪。通过主观听力测试，我们表明 DeepSpace 相对于可用于测试的最先进系统，整体性能显着提高。我们探索使用现有的自动化指标来评估非引导定向能系统的可行性。

AI.tldr: 开发基于动态空间和源线索的源分离系统，以实现无指导的对话增强。
AI.motivation: 在仅有原始混音的情况下，现有源分离方法在对话增强中存在不足，需提升分离效果。
AI.method: 结合动态空间线索与源线索，采用空间级过滤（SLF）及深度学习实现对话分类与降噪。
AI.result: 主观测试显示DeepSpace显著优于现有系统，并验证了自动化评估指标的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 结合动态空间与源线索及深度学习能有效提升无指导对话增强效果。

search_text: DeepSpace: Dynamic Spatial and Source Cue Based Source Separation for Dialog Enhancement DeepSpace：基于动态空间和源提示的源分离，用于增强对话 Dialog Enhancement (DE) is a feature which allows a user to increase the level of dialog in TV or movie content relative to non-dialog sounds. When only the original mix is available, DE is "unguided," and requires source separation. In this paper, we describe the DeepSpace system, which performs source separation using both dynamic spatial cues and source cues to support unguided DE. Its technologies include spatio-level filtering (SLF) and deep-learning based dialog classification and denoising. Using subjective listening tests, we show that DeepSpace demonstrates significantly improved overall performance relative to state-of-the-art systems available for testing. We explore the feasibility of using existing automated metrics to evaluate unguided DE systems. 对话增强 (DE) 是一项允许用户提高电视或电影内容中相对于非对话声音的对话级别的功能。当只有原始混合可用时，DE 是“无引导的”，并且需要源分离。在本文中，我们描述了 DeepSpace 系统，该系统使用动态空间线索和源线索来执行源分离，以支持非引导 DE。其技术包括空间级过滤（SLF）和基于深度学习的对话分类和去噪。通过主观听力测试，我们表明 DeepSpace 相对于可用于测试的最先进系统，整体性能显着提高。我们探索使用现有的自动化指标来评估非引导定向能系统的可行性。 开发基于动态空间和源线索的源分离系统，以实现无指导的对话增强。 Aaron Master,Lie Lu,Jonas Samuelsson,Heidi-Maria Lehtonen,Scott Norcross,Nathan Swedlow,Audrey Howard eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Patrick Séguéla,Nathalie Aussenac-Gilles
title: Un mod{è}le de base de connaissances terminologiques
title_zh: 术语基础知识模块
comment: in French language. 2{è}mes Rencontres Terminologie et Intelligence Artificielle (TIA 1997), Groupe de recherche TIA : Terminologie et intelligence artificielle, UT2 LeMirail, Toulouse, Apr 1997, Toulouse, France
comments: in French language. 2{è}mes Rencontres Terminologie et Intelligence Artificielle (TIA 1997), Groupe de recherche TIA : Terminologie et intelligence artificielle, UT2 LeMirail, Toulouse, Apr 1997, Toulouse, France
abstract: In the present paper, we argue that Terminological Knowledge Bases (TKB) are all the more useful for addressing various needs as they do not fulfill formal criteria. Moreover, they intend to clarify the terminology of a given domain by illustrating term uses in various contexts. Thus we designed a TKB structure including 3 linked features: terms, concepts and texts, that present the peculiar use of each term in the domain. Note that concepts are represented into frames whose non-formal description is standardized. Associated with this structure, we defined modeling criteria at the conceptual level. Finaly, we discuss the situation of TKB with regard to ontologies, and the use of TKB for the development of AI systems.
summary: In the present paper, we argue that Terminological Knowledge Bases (TKB) are all the more useful for addressing various needs as they do not fulfill formal criteria. Moreover, they intend to clarify the terminology of a given domain by illustrating term uses in various contexts. Thus we designed a TKB structure including 3 linked features: terms, concepts and texts, that present the peculiar use of each term in the domain. Note that concepts are represented into frames whose non-formal description is standardized. Associated with this structure, we defined modeling criteria at the conceptual level. Finaly, we discuss the situation of TKB with regard to ontologies, and the use of TKB for the development of AI systems.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们认为术语知识库（TKB）对于解决各种需求更加有用，因为它们不满足正式标准。此外，他们打算通过说明各种上下文中的术语使用来澄清给定领域的术语。因此，我们设计了一个 TKB 结构，包括 3 个相互关联的特征：术语、概念和文本，它们呈现了每个术语在该领域的特殊用法。请注意，概念被表示为框架，其非正式描述是标准化的。与此结构相关，我们在概念层面定义了建模标准。最后，我们讨论了 TKB 在本体方面的情况，以及 TKB 在人工智能系统开发中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化的术语知识库模型，通过关联术语、概念和文本三要素，旨在澄清特定领域的术语使用并支持AI系统开发。
AI.motivation: 现有术语知识库因缺乏形式化标准而难以满足实际需求，需通过非形式化但标准化的方式更灵活地描述领域术语的多场景应用。
AI.method: 设计包含术语、概念（以标准化非形式框架表示）和文本的三元结构，并制定概念层建模准则，同时探讨其与本体及AI系统的关联。
AI.result: 构建了支持术语多场景阐释的TKB框架，明确了概念描述规范，并分析了其在AI开发中的潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为非形式化领域术语管理提供了新思路，但需进一步验证其在实际AI系统中的适用性与效果。

authors_text: Jin Liu,Xi Wang,Xiaomeng Fu,Yesheng Chai,Cai Yu,Jiao Dai,Jizhong Han
title: OPT: One-shot Pose-Controllable Talking Head Generation
title_zh: OPT：一次性姿势可控头部说话生成
abstract: One-shot talking head generation produces lip-sync talking heads based on arbitrary audio and one source face. To guarantee the naturalness and realness, recent methods propose to achieve free pose control instead of simply editing mouth areas. However, existing methods do not preserve accurate identity of source face when generating head motions. To solve the identity mismatch problem and achieve high-quality free pose control, we present One-shot Pose-controllable Talking head generation network (OPT). Specifically, the Audio Feature Disentanglement Module separates content features from audios, eliminating the influence of speaker-specific information contained in arbitrary driving audios. Later, the mouth expression feature is extracted from the content feature and source face, during which the landmark loss is designed to enhance the accuracy of facial structure and identity preserving quality. Finally, to achieve free pose control, controllable head pose features from reference videos are fed into the Video Generator along with the expression feature and source face to generate new talking heads. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experimental results verify that OPT generates high-quality pose-controllable talking heads with no identity mismatch problem, outperforming previous SOTA methods.
summary: One-shot talking head generation produces lip-sync talking heads based on arbitrary audio and one source face. To guarantee the naturalness and realness, recent methods propose to achieve free pose control instead of simply editing mouth areas. However, existing methods do not preserve accurate identity of source face when generating head motions. To solve the identity mismatch problem and achieve high-quality free pose control, we present One-shot Pose-controllable Talking head generation network (OPT). Specifically, the Audio Feature Disentanglement Module separates content features from audios, eliminating the influence of speaker-specific information contained in arbitrary driving audios. Later, the mouth expression feature is extracted from the content feature and source face, during which the landmark loss is designed to enhance the accuracy of facial structure and identity preserving quality. Finally, to achieve free pose control, controllable head pose features from reference videos are fed into the Video Generator along with the expression feature and source face to generate new talking heads. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experimental results verify that OPT generates high-quality pose-controllable talking heads with no identity mismatch problem, outperforming previous SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 一次性头像生成可根据任意音频和一张源脸生成唇形同步头像。为了保证自然性和真实性，最近的方法提出实现自由姿势控制，而不是简单地编辑嘴部区域。然而，现有方法在生成头部运动时不能保留源面部的准确身份。为了解决身份不匹配问题并实现高质量的自由姿势控制，我们提出了一次性姿势可控说话头生成网络（OPT）。具体来说，音频特征解缠模块将内容特征与音频分离，消除任意驾驶音频中包含的特定于说话人的信息的影响。随后，从内容特征和源人脸中提取嘴部表情特征，在此期间设计地标损失以提高面部结构的准确性和身份保持质量。最后，为了实现自由姿势控制，参考视频中的可控头部姿势特征与表情特征和源面部一起输入视频生成器，以生成新的会说话的头部。大量的定量和定性实验结果证明，OPT 可以生成高质量的姿势可控说话头像，并且不存在身份不匹配问题，优于之前的 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张源人脸和任意音频生成具有姿态控制能力的逼真对话头的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成对话头时无法同时保持源人脸身份特征和实现自由姿态控制，导致身份不匹配问题。
AI.method: 通过音频特征解耦模块分离内容特征，提取口部表情特征并设计关键点损失函数，结合参考视频的姿态特征实现可控生成。
AI.result: 实验表明OPT在保持身份特征的同时实现了高质量姿态可控生成，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: OPT通过解耦音频特征和融合姿态控制模块，有效解决了身份不匹配问题，实现了高质量的可控对话头生成。

Later, the mouth expression feature is extracted from the content feature and source face, during which the landmark loss is designed to enhance the accuracy of facial structure and identity preserving quality. Finally, to achieve free pose control, controllable head pose features from reference videos are fed into the Video Generator along with the expression feature and source face to generate new talking heads. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experimental results verify that OPT generates high-quality pose-controllable talking heads with no identity mismatch problem, outperforming previous SOTA methods. 一次性头像生成可根据任意音频和一张源脸生成唇形同步头像。为了保证自然性和真实性，最近的方法提出实现自由姿势控制，而不是简单地编辑嘴部区域。然而，现有方法在生成头部运动时不能保留源面部的准确身份。为了解决身份不匹配问题并实现高质量的自由姿势控制，我们提出了一次性姿势可控说话头生成网络（OPT）。具体来说，音频特征解缠模块将内容特征与音频分离，消除任意驾驶音频中包含的特定于说话人的信息的影响。随后，从内容特征和源人脸中提取嘴部表情特征，在此期间设计地标损失以提高面部结构的准确性和身份保持质量。最后，为了实现自由姿势控制，参考视频中的可控头部姿势特征与表情特征和源面部一起输入视频生成器，以生成新的会说话的头部。大量的定量和定性实验结果证明，OPT 可以生成高质量的姿势可控说话头像，并且不存在身份不匹配问题，优于之前的 SOTA 方法。 本文提出了一种基于单张源人脸和任意音频生成具有姿态控制能力的逼真对话头的方法。 Jin Liu,Xi Wang,Xiaomeng Fu,Yesheng Chai,Cai Yu,Jiao Dai,Jizhong Han cs.CV

authors_text: Shaowu Chen,Weize Sun,Lei Huang
title: WHC: Weighted Hybrid Criterion for Filter Pruning on Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: WHC：卷积神经网络滤波器剪枝的加权混合准则
abstract: Filter pruning has attracted increasing attention in recent years for its capacity in compressing and accelerating convolutional neural networks. Various data-independent criteria, including norm-based and relationship-based ones, were proposed to prune the most unimportant filters. However, these state-of-the-art criteria fail to fully consider the dissimilarity of filters, and thus might lead to performance degradation. In this paper, we first analyze the limitation of relationship-based criteria with examples, and then introduce a new data-independent criterion, Weighted Hybrid Criterion (WHC), to tackle the problems of both norm-based and relationship-based criteria. By taking the magnitude of each filter and the linear dependence between filters into consideration, WHC can robustly recognize the most redundant filters, which can be safely pruned without introducing severe performance degradation to networks. Extensive pruning experiments in a simple one-shot manner demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed WHC. In particular, WHC can prune ResNet-50 on ImageNet with more than 42% of floating point operations reduced without any performance loss in top-5 accuracy.
summary: Filter pruning has attracted increasing attention in recent years for its capacity in compressing and accelerating convolutional neural networks. Various data-independent criteria, including norm-based and relationship-based ones, were proposed to prune the most unimportant filters. However, these state-of-the-art criteria fail to fully consider the dissimilarity of filters, and thus might lead to performance degradation. In this paper, we first analyze the limitation of relationship-based criteria with examples, and then introduce a new data-independent criterion, Weighted Hybrid Criterion (WHC), to tackle the problems of both norm-based and relationship-based criteria. By taking the magnitude of each filter and the linear dependence between filters into consideration, WHC can robustly recognize the most redundant filters, which can be safely pruned without introducing severe performance degradation to networks. Extensive pruning experiments in a simple one-shot manner demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed WHC. In particular, WHC can prune ResNet-50 on ImageNet with more than 42% of floating point operations reduced without any performance loss in top-5 accuracy.
abstract_zh: 近年来，滤波器剪枝因其压缩和加速卷积神经网络的能力而受到越来越多的关注。提出了各种与数据无关的标准，包括基于规范和基于关系的标准，以修剪最不重要的过滤器。然而，这些最先进的标准未能充分考虑过滤器的差异，因此可能导致性能下降。在本文中，我们首先通过示例分析基于关系的标准的局限性，然后引入一种新的与数据无关的标准——加权混合标准（WHC），以解决基于规范和基于关系的标准的问题。通过考虑每个滤波器的大小以及滤波器之间的线性相关性，WHC 可以稳健地识别最冗余的滤波器，可以安全地修剪这些滤波器，而不会导致网络性能严重下降。以简单的一次性方式进行的广泛修剪实验证明了所提出的 WHC 的有效性。特别是，WHC 可以在 ImageNet 上修剪 ResNet-50，减少超过 42% 的浮点运算，而在 top-5 精度方面没有任何性能损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WHC的加权混合标准，用于在卷积神经网络中进行滤波器剪枝，以提高模型压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 现有滤波器剪枝方法（如基于范数和关系的标准）未能充分考虑滤波器之间的差异性，可能导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过结合滤波器的幅度和滤波器间的线性相关性，提出数据无关的加权混合标准（WHC）以识别冗余滤波器。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，WHC可将ResNet-50的浮点运算量减少42%以上，且top-5准确率无损失。
AI.conclusion: WHC有效解决了传统剪枝方法的局限性，在保持模型性能的同时显著提升了压缩效率。

authors_text: Dan Meller,Nicolas Berkouk
title: Singular Value Representation: A New Graph Perspective On Neural Networks
title_zh: 奇异值表示：神经网络的新图视角
abstract: We introduce the Singular Value Representation (SVR), a new method to represent the internal state of neural networks using SVD factorization of the weights. This construction yields a new weighted graph connecting what we call spectral neurons, that correspond to specific activation patterns of classical neurons. We derive a precise statistical framework to discriminate meaningful connections between spectral neurons for fully connected and convolutional layers. To demonstrate the usefulness of our approach for machine learning research, we highlight two discoveries we made using the SVR. First, we highlight the emergence of a dominant connection in VGG networks that spans multiple deep layers. Second, we witness, without relying on any input data, that batch normalization can induce significant connections between near-kernels of deep layers, leading to a remarkable spontaneous sparsification phenomenon.
summary: We introduce the Singular Value Representation (SVR), a new method to represent the internal state of neural networks using SVD factorization of the weights. This construction yields a new weighted graph connecting what we call spectral neurons, that correspond to specific activation patterns of classical neurons. We derive a precise statistical framework to discriminate meaningful connections between spectral neurons for fully connected and convolutional layers. To demonstrate the usefulness of our approach for machine learning research, we highlight two discoveries we made using the SVR. First, we highlight the emergence of a dominant connection in VGG networks that spans multiple deep layers. Second, we witness, without relying on any input data, that batch normalization can induce significant connections between near-kernels of deep layers, leading to a remarkable spontaneous sparsification phenomenon.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了奇异值表示（SVR），这是一种使用权重的 SVD 分解来表示神经网络内部状态的新方法。这种结构产生了一个新的加权图，连接我们所说的光谱神经元，它对应于经典神经元的特定激活模式。我们推导出一个精确的统计框架来区分全连接层和卷积层的光谱神经元之间的有意义的连接。为了证明我们的机器学习研究方法的有用性，我们重点介绍了我们使用 SVR 取得的两个发现。首先，我们强调 VGG 网络中跨多个深层的主导连接的出现。其次，我们见证，在不依赖任何输入数据的情况下，批量归一化可以引起深层近内核之间的显着连接，从而导致显着的自发稀疏现象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出奇异值表示（SVR）方法，通过权重矩阵的SVD分解构建谱神经元图，揭示神经网络内部连接模式。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效解析神经网络内部状态，需新视角理解网络结构与功能关系。
AI.method: 利用SVD分解权重矩阵，构建谱神经元加权图，并建立统计框架识别有意义连接。
AI.result: 发现VGG网络跨层主导连接，及批量归一化诱导的深层近核连接与自发稀疏化现象。
AI.conclusion: SVR为分析神经网络内部结构提供新工具，揭示了关键连接模式与归一化机制的影响。

authors_text: Édouard Bonnet,Julien Duron,Colin Geniet,Stéphan Thomassé,Alexandra Wesolek
title: Maximum Independent Set when excluding an induced minor: $K_1 + tK_2$ and $tC_3 \uplus C_4$
title_zh: 排除诱发未成年人时的最大独立集：$K_1 + tK_2$ 和 $tC_3 \uplus C_4$
abstract: Dallard, Milanič, and Štorgel [arXiv '22] ask if for every class excluding a fixed planar graph $H$ as an induced minor, Maximum Independent Set can be solved in polynomial time, and show that this is indeed the case when $H$ is any planar complete bipartite graph, or the 5-vertex clique minus one edge, or minus two disjoint edges. A positive answer would constitute a far-reaching generalization of the state-of-the-art, when we currently do not know if a polynomial-time algorithm exists when $H$ is the 7-vertex path. Relaxing tractability to the existence of a quasipolynomial-time algorithm, we know substantially more. Indeed, quasipolynomial-time algorithms were recently obtained for the $t$-vertex cycle, $C_t$ [Gartland et al., STOC '21] and the disjoint union of $t$ triangles, $tC_3$ [Bonamy et al., SODA '23]. We give, for every integer $t$, a polynomial-time algorithm running in $n^{O(t^5)}$ when $H$ is the friendship graph $K_1 + tK_2$ ($t$ disjoint edges plus a vertex fully adjacent to them), and a quasipolynomial-time algorithm running in $n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$, with $f$ a single-exponential function, when $H$ is $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ (the disjoint union of $t$ triangles and a 4-vertex cycle). The former extends a classical result on graphs excluding $tK_2$ as an induced subgraph [Alekseev, DAM '07], while the latter extends Bonamy et al.'s result.
summary: Dallard, Milanič, and Štorgel [arXiv '22] ask if for every class excluding a fixed planar graph $H$ as an induced minor, Maximum Independent Set can be solved in polynomial time, and show that this is indeed the case when $H$ is any planar complete bipartite graph, or the 5-vertex clique minus one edge, or minus two disjoint edges. A positive answer would constitute a far-reaching generalization of the state-of-the-art, when we currently do not know if a polynomial-time algorithm exists when $H$ is the 7-vertex path. Relaxing tractability to the existence of a quasipolynomial-time algorithm, we know substantially more. Indeed, quasipolynomial-time algorithms were recently obtained for the $t$-vertex cycle, $C_t$ [Gartland et al., STOC '21] and the disjoint union of $t$ triangles, $tC_3$ [Bonamy et al., SODA '23]. We give, for every integer $t$, a polynomial-time algorithm running in $n^{O(t^5)}$ when $H$ is the friendship graph $K_1 + tK_2$ ($t$ disjoint edges plus a vertex fully adjacent to them), and a quasipolynomial-time algorithm running in $n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$, with $f$ a single-exponential function, when $H$ is $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ (the disjoint union of $t$ triangles and a 4-vertex cycle). The former extends a classical result on graphs excluding $tK_2$ as an induced subgraph [Alekseev, DAM '07], while the latter extends Bonamy et al.'s result.
abstract_zh: Dallard、Milanič 和 Štorgel [arXiv '22] 询问对于排除固定平面图 $H$ 作为诱导次要的每个类，最大独立集是否可以在多项式时间内求解，并表明当 $H$ 是任何平面完全二部图，或 5 顶点团减去一条边，或减去两条不相交边时，情况确实如此。当我们目前不知道 $H$ 是 7 顶点路径时是否存在多项式时间算法时，一个肯定的答案将构成对最先进技术的深远概括。放松对拟多项式时间算法存在的易处理性，我们知道的更多。事实上，最近获得了 $t$ 顶点循环 $C_t$ [Gartland 等人，STOC '21] 和 $t$ 三角形的不相交并 $tC_3$ [Bonamy 等人，SODA '23] 的拟多项式时间算法。对于每个整数 $t$，当 $H$ 是友谊图 $K_1 + tK_2$（$t$ 不相交的边加上与其完全相邻的顶点）时，我们给出在 $n^{O(t^5)}$ 中运行的多项式时间算法，以及在 $n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$ 中运行的拟多项式时间算法，其中 $f$ 是单指数函数，当$H$ 是 $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ （$t$ 三角形和 4 顶点循环的不相交并集）。前者扩展了图上的经典结果，不包括 $tK_2$ 作为诱导子图 [Alekseev, DAM '07]，而后者扩展了 Bonamy 等人的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在排除特定诱导子式（$K_1 + tK_2$ 和 $tC_3 \uplus C_4$）的图类中，最大独立集问题的算法复杂度。
AI.motivation: 受Dallard等人问题的启发，探讨对于排除固定平面图作为诱导子式的图类，最大独立集能否多项式时间求解，并推广已有结果（如排除$tK_2$作为诱导子图、排除$tC_3$的拟多项式时间算法）。
AI.method: 针对$K_1 + tK_2$设计多项式时间算法（复杂度$n^{O(t^5)}$），针对$tC_3 \uplus C_4$设计拟多项式时间算法（复杂度$n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$，$f$为单指数函数）。
AI.result: 对任意整数$t$，当$H$为友谊图$K_1 + tK_2$时给出$n^{O(t^5)}$的多项式时间算法；当$H$为$tC_3 \uplus C_4$时给出$n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$的拟多项式时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 前者扩展了Alekseev关于排除$tK_2$诱导子图的经典结果，后者扩展了Bonamy等人关于排除$tC_3$的结果，朝着回答Dallard等人的一般性问题迈进一步。

search_text: Maximum Independent Set when excluding an induced minor: $K_1 + tK_2$ and $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ 排除诱发未成年人时的最大独立集：$K_1 + tK_2$ 和 $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ Dallard, Milanič, and Štorgel [arXiv '22] ask if for every class excluding a fixed planar graph $H$ as an induced minor, Maximum Independent Set can be solved in polynomial time, and show that this is indeed the case when $H$ is any planar complete bipartite graph, or the 5-vertex clique minus one edge, or minus two disjoint edges. A positive answer would constitute a far-reaching generalization of the state-of-the-art, when we currently do not know if a polynomial-time algorithm exists when $H$ is the 7-vertex path. Relaxing tractability to the existence of a quasipolynomial-time algorithm, we know substantially more. Indeed, quasipolynomial-time algorithms were recently obtained for the $t$-vertex cycle, $C_t$ [Gartland et al., STOC '21] and the disjoint union of $t$ triangles, $tC_3$ [Bonamy et al., SODA '23]. We give, for every integer $t$, a polynomial-time algorithm running in $n^{O(t^5)}$ when $H$ is the friendship graph $K_1 + tK_2$ ($t$ disjoint edges plus a vertex fully adjacent to them), and a quasipolynomial-time algorithm running in $n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$, with $f$ a single-exponential function, when $H$ is $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ (the disjoint union of $t$ triangles and a 4-vertex cycle). The former extends a classical result on graphs excluding $tK_2$ as an induced subgraph [Alekseev, DAM '07], while the latter extends Bonamy et al.'s result. Dallard、Milanič 和 Štorgel [arXiv '22] 询问对于排除固定平面图 $H$ 作为诱导次要的每个类，最大独立集是否可以在多项式时间内求解，并表明当 $H$ 是任何平面完全二部图，或 5 顶点团减去一条边，或减去两条不相交边时，情况确实如此。当我们目前不知道 $H$ 是 7 顶点路径时是否存在多项式时间算法时，一个肯定的答案将构成对最先进技术的深远概括。放松对拟多项式时间算法存在的易处理性，我们知道的更多。事实上，最近获得了 $t$ 顶点循环 $C_t$ [Gartland 等人，STOC '21] 和 $t$ 三角形的不相交并 $tC_3$ [Bonamy 等人，SODA '23] 的拟多项式时间算法。对于每个整数 $t$，当 $H$ 是友谊图 $K_1 + tK_2$（$t$ 不相交的边加上与其完全相邻的顶点）时，我们给出在 $n^{O(t^5)}$ 中运行的多项式时间算法，以及在 $n^{O(t^2 \log n)+f(t)}$ 中运行的拟多项式时间算法，其中 $f$ 是单指数函数，当$H$ 是 $tC_3 \uplus C_4$ （$t$ 三角形和 4 顶点循环的不相交并集）。前者扩展了图上的经典结果，不包括 $tK_2$ 作为诱导子图 [Alekseev, DAM '07]，而后者扩展了 Bonamy 等人的结果。 本文研究在排除特定诱导子式（$K_1 + tK_2$ 和 $tC_3 \uplus C_4$）的图类中，最大独立集问题的算法复杂度。 Édouard Bonnet,Julien Duron,Colin Geniet,Stéphan Thomassé,Alexandra Wesolek cs.DS,cs.DM,math.CO

authors_text: Shubhika Garg,Ben Feinstein,Shahar Timnat,Vishal Batchu,Gideon Dror,Adi Gerzi Rosenthal,Varun Gulshan
title: Cross Modal Distillation for Flood Extent Mapping
title_zh: 用于洪水范围测绘的交叉模态蒸馏
abstract: The increasing intensity and frequency of floods is one of the many consequences of our changing climate. In this work, we explore ML techniques that improve the flood detection module of an operational early flood warning system. Our method exploits an unlabelled dataset of paired multi-spectral and Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery to reduce the labeling requirements of a purely supervised learning method. Prior works have used unlabelled data by creating weak labels out of them. However, from our experiments we noticed that such a model still ends up learning the label mistakes in those weak labels. Motivated by knowledge distillation and semi supervised learning, we explore the use of a teacher to train a student with the help of a small hand labelled dataset and a large unlabelled dataset. Unlike the conventional self distillation setup, we propose a cross modal distillation framework that transfers supervision from a teacher trained on richer modality (multi-spectral images) to a student model trained on SAR imagery. The trained models are then tested on the Sen1Floods11 dataset. Our model outperforms the Sen1Floods11 baseline model trained on the weak labeled SAR imagery by an absolute margin of 6.53% Intersection-over-Union (IoU) on the test split.
summary: The increasing intensity and frequency of floods is one of the many consequences of our changing climate. In this work, we explore ML techniques that improve the flood detection module of an operational early flood warning system. Our method exploits an unlabelled dataset of paired multi-spectral and Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery to reduce the labeling requirements of a purely supervised learning method. Prior works have used unlabelled data by creating weak labels out of them. However, from our experiments we noticed that such a model still ends up learning the label mistakes in those weak labels. Motivated by knowledge distillation and semi supervised learning, we explore the use of a teacher to train a student with the help of a small hand labelled dataset and a large unlabelled dataset. Unlike the conventional self distillation setup, we propose a cross modal distillation framework that transfers supervision from a teacher trained on richer modality (multi-spectral images) to a student model trained on SAR imagery. The trained models are then tested on the Sen1Floods11 dataset. Our model outperforms the Sen1Floods11 baseline model trained on the weak labeled SAR imagery by an absolute margin of 6.53% Intersection-over-Union (IoU) on the test split.
abstract_zh: 洪水强度和频率的增加是气候变化的众多后果之一。在这项工作中，我们探索了改进可操作的早期洪水预警系统的洪水检测模块的机器学习技术。我们的方法利用配对多光谱和合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像的未标记数据集来减少纯监督学习方法的标记要求。之前的工作通过创建弱标签来使用未标记的数据。然而，从我们的实验中我们注意到，这样的模型最终仍然会学习那些弱标签中的标签错误。在知识蒸馏和半监督学习的推动下，我们探索如何使用教师在小型手工标记数据集和大型未标记数据集的帮助下训练学生。与传统的自蒸馏设置不同，我们提出了一种跨模态蒸馏框架，该框架将监督从接受更丰富模态（多光谱图像）训练的教师转移到接受 SAR 图像训练的学生模型。然后在 Sen1Floods11 数据集上测试训练后的模型。我们的模型在测试分割上优于在弱标记 SAR 图像上训练的 Sen1Floods11 基线模型，绝对优势为 6.53% 的交集 (IoU)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态蒸馏方法，利用多光谱图像和合成孔径雷达（SAR）影像的未标注数据集，提升洪水范围映射的机器学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过弱标注数据训练模型时易受标签错误影响，而跨模态蒸馏可通过教师-学生框架利用多模态数据优势，减少对人工标注的依赖并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建教师模型（基于多光谱图像）与学生模型（基于SAR影像），通过跨模态知识蒸馏将教师模型的监督知识迁移至学生模型，结合少量标注数据与大量未标注数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在Sen1Floods11数据集上，该方法较弱标注SAR基线模型的测试集交并比（IoU）提升6.53%。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态蒸馏框架能有效利用多模态数据优势，避免弱标签误差，为洪水监测提供更高效且准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Gert de Cooman,Arthur Van Camp,Jasper De Bock
title: The logic behind desirable sets of things, and its filter representation
title_zh: 理想事物组背后的逻辑及其过滤器表示
abstract: We identify the (filter representation of the) logic behind the recent theory of coherent sets of desirable (sets of) things, which generalise coherent sets of desirable (sets of) gambles as well as coherent choice functions, and show that this identification allows us to establish various representation results for such coherent models in terms of simpler ones.
summary: We identify the (filter representation of the) logic behind the recent theory of coherent sets of desirable (sets of) things, which generalise coherent sets of desirable (sets of) gambles as well as coherent choice functions, and show that this identification allows us to establish various representation results for such coherent models in terms of simpler ones.
abstract_zh: 我们识别了最近的期望事物的相干集合理论背后的（过滤器表示）逻辑，该理论概括了期望的赌博的相干集合以及相干的选择函数，并表明这种识别允许我们用更简单的模型为这种相干模型建立各种表示结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了可接受事物集理论背后的逻辑结构，并通过滤波器表示法建立其数学基础。
AI.motivation: 为统一和扩展现有的可接受赌博集及一致选择函数理论，提供更一般化的数学框架。
AI.method: 通过形式化逻辑分析，结合滤波器理论，将复杂模型转化为更简单的表示形式。
AI.result: 建立了可接受事物集模型与滤波器表示之间的对应关系，证明了多种简化表示的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 滤波器表示法为处理复杂决策模型提供了统一工具，深化了相关理论的理解与应用潜力。

search_text: The logic behind desirable sets of things, and its filter representation 理想事物组背后的逻辑及其过滤器表示 We identify the (filter representation of the) logic behind the recent theory of coherent sets of desirable (sets of) things, which generalise coherent sets of desirable (sets of) gambles as well as coherent choice functions, and show that this identification allows us to establish various representation results for such coherent models in terms of simpler ones. 我们识别了最近的期望事物的相干集合理论背后的（过滤器表示）逻辑，该理论概括了期望的赌博的相干集合以及相干的选择函数，并表明这种识别允许我们用更简单的模型为这种相干模型建立各种表示结果。 本文研究了可接受事物集理论背后的逻辑结构，并通过滤波器表示法建立其数学基础。 Gert de Cooman,Arthur Van Camp,Jasper De Bock math.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Frank Nielsen
title: A numerical approximation method for the Fisher-Rao distance between multivariate normal distributions
title_zh: 多元正态分布之间Fisher-Rao距离的数值逼近方法
abstract: We present a simple method to approximate Rao's distance between multivariate normal distributions based on discretizing curves joining normal distributions and approximating Rao's distances between successive nearby normal distributions on the curves by the square root of Jeffreys divergence, the symmetrized Kullback-Leibler divergence. We consider experimentally the linear interpolation curves in the ordinary, natural and expectation parameterizations of the normal distributions, and compare these curves with a curve derived from the Calvo and Oller's isometric embedding of the Fisher-Rao $d$-variate normal manifold into the cone of $(d+1)\times (d+1)$ symmetric positive-definite matrices [Journal of multivariate analysis 35.2 (1990): 223-242]. We report on our experiments and assess the quality of our approximation technique by comparing the numerical approximations with both lower and upper bounds. Finally, we present several information-geometric properties of the Calvo and Oller's isometric embedding.
summary: We present a simple method to approximate Rao's distance between multivariate normal distributions based on discretizing curves joining normal distributions and approximating Rao's distances between successive nearby normal distributions on the curves by the square root of Jeffreys divergence, the symmetrized Kullback-Leibler divergence. We consider experimentally the linear interpolation curves in the ordinary, natural and expectation parameterizations of the normal distributions, and compare these curves with a curve derived from the Calvo and Oller's isometric embedding of the Fisher-Rao $d$-variate normal manifold into the cone of $(d+1)\times (d+1)$ symmetric positive-definite matrices [Journal of multivariate analysis 35.2 (1990): 223-242]. We report on our experiments and assess the quality of our approximation technique by comparing the numerical approximations with both lower and upper bounds. Finally, we present several information-geometric properties of the Calvo and Oller's isometric embedding.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单的方法来近似多元正态分布之间的 Rao 距离，该方法基于离散化连接正态分布的曲线，并通过 Jeffreys 散度（对称 Kullback-Leibler 散度）的平方根来近似曲线上连续相邻正态分布之间的 Rao 距离。我们通过实验考虑正态分布的普通、自然和期望参数化中的线性插值曲线，并将这些曲线与从 Fisher-Rao $d$ 变量正定流形的 Calvo 和 Oller 等距嵌入到 $(d+1)\times (d+1)$ 对称正定矩阵圆锥中导出的曲线进行比较 [Journal of Multivariate Analysis 35.2 (1990)： 223-242]。我们报告我们的实验，并通过将数值近似值与下限和上限进行比较来评估我们的近似技术的质量。最后，我们提出了 Calvo 和 Oller 等距嵌入的几个信息几何属性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种数值方法近似计算多元正态分布间的Fisher-Rao距离
AI.motivation: 精确计算Fisher-Rao距离在高维情况下计算复杂，需有效近似方法
AI.method: 离散化连接正态分布的曲线，用Jeffreys散度平方根近似相邻分布间的距离，并比较不同参数化方法与等距嵌入
AI.result: 实验显示近似方法在不同参数化下效果良好，且与理论上下界一致，验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该近似方法有效，且揭示了Calvo和Oller等距嵌入的信息几何特性

authors_text: Xuanxiang Huang,Joao Marques-Silva
title: The Inadequacy of Shapley Values for Explainability
title_zh: Shapley 值的可解释性不足
abstract: This paper develops a rigorous argument for why the use of Shapley values in explainable AI (XAI) will necessarily yield provably misleading information about the relative importance of features for predictions. Concretely, this paper demonstrates that there exist classifiers, and associated predictions, for which the relative importance of features determined by the Shapley values will incorrectly assign more importance to features that are provably irrelevant for the prediction, and less importance to features that are provably relevant for the prediction. The paper also argues that, given recent complexity results, the existence of efficient algorithms for the computation of rigorous feature attribution values in the case of some restricted classes of classifiers should be deemed unlikely at best.
summary: This paper develops a rigorous argument for why the use of Shapley values in explainable AI (XAI) will necessarily yield provably misleading information about the relative importance of features for predictions. Concretely, this paper demonstrates that there exist classifiers, and associated predictions, for which the relative importance of features determined by the Shapley values will incorrectly assign more importance to features that are provably irrelevant for the prediction, and less importance to features that are provably relevant for the prediction. The paper also argues that, given recent complexity results, the existence of efficient algorithms for the computation of rigorous feature attribution values in the case of some restricted classes of classifiers should be deemed unlikely at best.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个严格的论据，解释为什么在可解释的人工智能（XAI）中使用沙普利值必然会产生关于预测特征的相对重要性的可证明的误导性信息。具体而言，本文证明存在分类器和相关预测，其中由 Shapley 值确定的特征的相对重要性将错误地为可证明与预测无关的特征分配更高的重要性，而为可证明与预测相关的特征分配较低的重要性。该论文还认为，考虑到最近的复杂性结果，在某些受限分类器类别的情况下，存在用于计算严格特征属性值的有效算法充其量应该被认为是不可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文论证了Shapley值在可解释AI（XAI）中存在固有缺陷，可能导致对特征重要性的误导性评估。
AI.motivation: Shapley值被广泛用于解释机器学习模型，但其准确性尚未得到充分验证，需探讨其在特征归因中的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和构造反例，证明存在分类器和预测场景使得Shapley值错误分配特征重要性，并结合计算复杂性理论分析算法可行性。
AI.result: 证明了Shapley值可能高估无关特征重要性、低估相关特征重要性，并指出高效计算严格特征归因值的算法在部分分类器类别中可能不存在。
AI.conclusion: Shapley值无法保证提供准确的特征重要性解释，需重新评估其在XAI中的适用性并探索替代方法。

authors_text: Giandomenico Cornacchia,Vito Walter Anelli,Fedelucio Narducci,Azzurra Ragone,Eugenio Di Sciascio
title: Counterfactual Fair Opportunity: Measuring Decision Model Fairness with Counterfactual Reasoning
title_zh: 反事实公平机会：用反事实推理衡量决策模型的公平性
abstract: The increasing application of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning models poses potential risks of unfair behavior and, in light of recent regulations, has attracted the attention of the research community. Several researchers focused on seeking new fairness definitions or developing approaches to identify biased predictions. However, none try to exploit the counterfactual space to this aim. In that direction, the methodology proposed in this work aims to unveil unfair model behaviors using counterfactual reasoning in the case of fairness under unawareness setting. A counterfactual version of equal opportunity named counterfactual fair opportunity is defined and two novel metrics that analyze the sensitive information of counterfactual samples are introduced. Experimental results on three different datasets show the efficacy of our methodologies and our metrics, disclosing the unfair behavior of classic machine learning and debiasing models.
summary: The increasing application of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning models poses potential risks of unfair behavior and, in light of recent regulations, has attracted the attention of the research community. Several researchers focused on seeking new fairness definitions or developing approaches to identify biased predictions. However, none try to exploit the counterfactual space to this aim. In that direction, the methodology proposed in this work aims to unveil unfair model behaviors using counterfactual reasoning in the case of fairness under unawareness setting. A counterfactual version of equal opportunity named counterfactual fair opportunity is defined and two novel metrics that analyze the sensitive information of counterfactual samples are introduced. Experimental results on three different datasets show the efficacy of our methodologies and our metrics, disclosing the unfair behavior of classic machine learning and debiasing models.
abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器学习模型的日益增长的应用带来了不公平行为的潜在风险，并且根据最近的法规，引起了研究界的关注。一些研究人员专注于寻找新的公平性定义或开发方法来识别有偏见的预测。然而，没有人试图利用反事实空间来实现这一目标。在这个方向上，这项工作提出的方法旨在在无意识设置下的公平情况下使用反事实推理来揭示不公平的模型行为。定义了平等机会的反事实版本，称为反事实公平机会，并引入了两个分析反事实样本敏感信息的新颖指标。三个不同数据集的实验结果显示了我们的方法和指标的有效性，揭示了经典机器学习和去偏模型的不公平行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反事实推理的方法，用于在‘无意识’公平设定下揭示机器学习模型中的不公平行为，并定义了反事实公平机会指标。
AI.motivation: 随着AI模型应用的增加，其潜在的不公平行为引发关注，现有方法未能有效利用反事实空间检测偏差，需新方法满足法规要求。
AI.method: 提出反事实公平机会概念，设计两个新指标分析反事实样本的敏感属性，并通过实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，显示经典机器学习模型和去偏模型存在隐藏的不公平行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效揭示模型中的不公平行为，为AI公平性评估提供新视角，推动更严格的模型审查。
