search_text: Counterfactual Fair Opportunity: Measuring Decision Model Fairness with Counterfactual Reasoning 反事实公平机会：用反事实推理衡量决策模型的公平性 The increasing application of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning models poses potential risks of unfair behavior and, in light of recent regulations, has attracted the attention of the research community. Several researchers focused on seeking new fairness definitions or developing approaches to identify biased predictions. However, none try to exploit the counterfactual space to this aim. In that direction, the methodology proposed in this work aims to unveil unfair model behaviors using counterfactual reasoning in the case of fairness under unawareness setting. A counterfactual version of equal opportunity named counterfactual fair opportunity is defined and two novel metrics that analyze the sensitive information of counterfactual samples are introduced. Experimental results on three different datasets show the efficacy of our methodologies and our metrics, disclosing the unfair behavior of classic machine learning and debiasing models. 人工智能和机器学习模型的日益增长的应用带来了不公平行为的潜在风险，并且根据最近的法规，引起了研究界的关注。一些研究人员专注于寻找新的公平性定义或开发方法来识别有偏见的预测。然而，没有人试图利用反事实空间来实现这一目标。在这个方向上，这项工作提出的方法旨在在无意识设置下的公平情况下使用反事实推理来揭示不公平的模型行为。定义了平等机会的反事实版本，称为反事实公平机会，并引入了两个分析反事实样本敏感信息的新颖指标。三个不同数据集的实验结果显示了我们的方法和指标的有效性，揭示了经典机器学习和去偏模型的不公平行为。 本文提出了一种基于反事实推理的方法，用于在‘无意识’公平设定下揭示机器学习模型中的不公平行为，并定义了反事实公平机会指标。 Giandomenico Cornacchia,Vito Walter Anelli,Fedelucio Narducci,Azzurra Ragone,Eugenio Di Sciascio cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Mohammad Tahaei,Marios Constantinides,Daniele Quercia,Sean Kennedy,Michael Muller,Simone Stumpf,Q. Vera Liao,Ricardo Baeza-Yates,Lora Aroyo,Jess Holbrook,Ewa Luger,Michael Madaio,Ilana Golbin Blumenfeld,Maria De-Arteaga,Jessica Vitak,Alexandra Olteanu
title: Human-Centered Responsible Artificial Intelligence: Current & Future Trends
title_zh: 以人为本的负责任的人工智能：当前和未来的趋势
comment: To appear in Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: To appear in Extended Abstracts of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: In recent years, the CHI community has seen significant growth in research on Human-Centered Responsible Artificial Intelligence. While different research communities may use different terminology to discuss similar topics, all of this work is ultimately aimed at developing AI that benefits humanity while being grounded in human rights and ethics, and reducing the potential harms of AI. In this special interest group, we aim to bring together researchers from academia and industry interested in these topics to map current and future research trends to advance this important area of research by fostering collaboration and sharing ideas.
summary: In recent years, the CHI community has seen significant growth in research on Human-Centered Responsible Artificial Intelligence. While different research communities may use different terminology to discuss similar topics, all of this work is ultimately aimed at developing AI that benefits humanity while being grounded in human rights and ethics, and reducing the potential harms of AI. In this special interest group, we aim to bring together researchers from academia and industry interested in these topics to map current and future research trends to advance this important area of research by fostering collaboration and sharing ideas.
abstract_zh: 近年来，CHI 社区对以人为中心的负责任人工智能的研究取得了显着增长。虽然不同的研究团体可能使用不同的术语来讨论类似的主题，但所有这些工作的最终目的都是为了开发造福人类的人工智能，同时立足于人权和道德，并减少人工智能的潜在危害。在这个特殊兴趣小组中，我们的目标是将来自学术界和工业界对这些主题感兴趣的研究人员聚集在一起，绘制当前和未来的研究趋势，通过促进合作和分享想法来推进这一重要的研究领域。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在汇集学术界和工业界的研究者，绘制负责任人工智能领域的当前及未来研究趋势，推动该领域的发展。
AI.motivation: 推动跨学科合作，统一术语，确保AI发展符合人类权益与伦理，减少潜在风险。
AI.method: 通过组织特别兴趣小组，促进学术界与工业界的研究者协作，分享观点，梳理当前及未来研究方向。
AI.result: 识别出负责任AI的关键研究主题、挑战与未来方向，并促进跨领域合作网络的建立。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨学科协作与知识共享，推动负责任AI研究，确保技术发展符合人类价值观与伦理规范。

authors_text: Tao Yang,Youyu Wu,Yangxintai Tang
title: Research on road object detection algorithm based on improved YOLOX
title_zh: 基于改进YOLOX的道路目标检测算法研究
abstract: Road object detection is an important branch of automatic driving technology, The model with higher detection accuracy is more conducive to the safe driving of vehicles. In road object detection, the omission of small objects and occluded objects is an important problem. therefore, reducing the missed rate of the object is of great significance for safe driving. In the work of this paper, based on the YOLOX object detection algorithm to improve, proposes DecIoU boundary box regression loss function to improve the shape consistency of the predicted and real box, and Push Loss is introduced to further optimize the boundary box regression loss function, in order to detect more occluded objects. In addition, the dynamic anchor box mechanism is also used to improve the accuracy of the confidence label, improve the label inaccuracy of object detection model without anchor box. A large number of experiments on KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, the improved YOLOX-s achieved 88.9% mAP and 91.0% mAR on the KITTI dataset, compared to the baseline version improvements of 2.77% and 4.24%; the improved YOLOX-m achieved 89.1% mAP and 91.4% mAR, compared to the baseline version improvements of 2.30% and 4.10%.
summary: Road object detection is an important branch of automatic driving technology, The model with higher detection accuracy is more conducive to the safe driving of vehicles. In road object detection, the omission of small objects and occluded objects is an important problem. therefore, reducing the missed rate of the object is of great significance for safe driving. In the work of this paper, based on the YOLOX object detection algorithm to improve, proposes DecIoU boundary box regression loss function to improve the shape consistency of the predicted and real box, and Push Loss is introduced to further optimize the boundary box regression loss function, in order to detect more occluded objects. In addition, the dynamic anchor box mechanism is also used to improve the accuracy of the confidence label, improve the label inaccuracy of object detection model without anchor box. A large number of experiments on KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, the improved YOLOX-s achieved 88.9% mAP and 91.0% mAR on the KITTI dataset, compared to the baseline version improvements of 2.77% and 4.24%; the improved YOLOX-m achieved 89.1% mAP and 91.4% mAR, compared to the baseline version improvements of 2.30% and 4.10%.
abstract_zh: 道路物体检测是自动驾驶技术的重要分支，检测精度越高的模型越有利于车辆的安全行驶。在道路目标检测中，小目标和遮挡目标的遗漏是一个重要问题。因此，降低物体遗漏率对于安全驾驶具有重要意义。本文工作中，在YOLOX物体检测算法的基础上进行改进，提出了DecIoU边界框回归损失函数来提高预测与真实框的形状一致性，并引入Push Loss进一步优化边界框回归损失函数，以检测更多被遮挡的物体。此外，还采用动态anchor box机制来提高置信度标签的准确性，改善无anchor box的物体检测模型的标签不准确率。 KITTI数据集上的大量实验证明了该方法的有效性，改进后的YOLOX-s在KITTI数据集上实现了88.9%的mAP和91.0%的mAR，相比基线版本提高了2.77%和4.24%；改进后的YOLOX-m实现了89.1%的mAP和91.4%的mAR，相比基线版本提高了2.30%和4.10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的YOLOX算法以提升道路目标检测的精度，重点解决小目标和遮挡目标的漏检问题。
AI.motivation: 道路目标检测中存在小目标和遮挡目标漏检率高的问题，这会严重影响自动驾驶的安全性，因此需要改进检测算法以降低漏检率。
AI.method: 基于YOLOX算法，提出DecIoU边界框回归损失函数以提升预测框与真实框的形状一致性，并引入Push Loss进一步优化遮挡目标检测；同时采用动态锚框机制提升置信度标签准确性。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，改进后的YOLOX-s达到88.9% mAP和91.0% mAR，较基线版本提升2.77%和4.24%；YOLOX-m达到89.1% mAP和91.4% mAR，提升2.30%和4.10%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了道路目标检测精度，尤其在小目标和遮挡目标检测方面表现显著，验证了改进策略的有效性。

authors_text: Xinyi Zhang,Yukiyasu Domae,Weiwei Wan,Kensuke Harada
title: Learning to Dexterously Pick or Separate Tangled-Prone Objects for Industrial Bin Picking
title_zh: 学习灵巧地拾取或分离容易缠结的物体以进行工业垃圾箱拾取
abstract: Industrial bin picking for tangled-prone objects requires the robot to either pick up untangled objects or perform separation manipulation when the bin contains no isolated objects. The robot must be able to flexibly perform appropriate actions based on the current observation. It is challenging due to high occlusion in the clutter, elusive entanglement phenomena, and the need for skilled manipulation planning. In this paper, we propose an autonomous, effective and general approach for picking up tangled-prone objects for industrial bin picking. First, we learn PickNet - a network that maps the visual observation to pixel-wise possibilities of picking isolated objects or separating tangled objects and infers the corresponding grasp. Then, we propose two effective separation strategies: Dropping the entangled objects into a buffer bin to reduce the degree of entanglement; Pulling to separate the entangled objects in the buffer bin planned by PullNet - a network that predicts position and direction for pulling from visual input. To efficiently collect data for training PickNet and PullNet, we embrace the self-supervised learning paradigm using an algorithmic supervisor in a physics simulator. Real-world experiments show that our policy can dexterously pick up tangled-prone objects with success rates of 90%. We further demonstrate the generalization of our policy by picking a set of unseen objects. Supplementary material, code, and videos can be found at https://xinyiz0931.github.io/tangle.

Real-world experiments show that our policy can dexterously pick up tangled-prone objects with success rates of 90%. We further demonstrate the generalization of our policy by picking a set of unseen objects. Supplementary material, code, and videos can be found at https://xinyiz0931.github.io/tangle.
abstract_zh: 对于容易缠结的物体的工业箱拾取要求机器人拾取未缠结的物体，或者当箱中没有孤立的物体时执行分离操作。机器人必须能够根据当前的观察灵活地执行适当的动作。由于杂波中的高度遮挡、难以捉摸的纠缠现象以及需要熟练的操作计划，这是一项具有挑战性的工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种自主、有效且通用的方法来拾取工业垃圾箱拾取中容易缠结的物体。首先，我们学习 PickNet - 一个网络，它将视觉观察映射到拾取孤立对象或分离缠结对象的像素级可能性，并推断相应的抓取。然后，我们提出了两种有效的分离策略：将纠缠的物体放入缓冲箱中以减少纠缠程度； PullNet 计划通过拉动来分离缓冲箱中的纠缠对象，PullNet 是一个根据视觉输入预测拉动位置和方向的网络。为了有效收集用于训练 PickNet 和 PullNet 的数据，我们采用了在物理模拟器中使用算法监控器的自我监督学习范式。现实世界的实验表明，我们的策略可以灵巧地拾取容易缠结的物体，成功率高达 90%。我们通过选择一组看不见的对象来进一步证明我们的策略的泛化性。补充材料、代码和视频可以在 https://xinyiz0931.github.io/tangle 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种工业料箱中自主抓取或分离易缠绕物体的方法，解决高遮挡和复杂操作规划的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统工业机械臂在处理缠绕物体时面临遮挡严重、缠绕现象难以感知及操作规划复杂等难题，需灵活决策以提升抓取成功率。
AI.method: 设计PickNet网络识别可抓取区域并生成抓取策略，结合两种分离策略：缓冲箱松解缠绕物及PullNet规划牵引方向，通过物理模拟器自监督学习收集训练数据。
AI.result: 实际测试显示抓取成功率高达90%，且能泛化到未见过的物体类型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视觉感知与分离策略结合，有效解决了工业场景中缠绕物体的抓取问题，验证了模型的通用性与实用性。

search_text: Learning to Dexterously Pick or Separate Tangled-Prone Objects for Industrial Bin Picking 学习灵巧地拾取或分离容易缠结的物体以进行工业垃圾箱拾取 Industrial bin picking for tangled-prone objects requires the robot to either pick up untangled objects or perform separation manipulation when the bin contains no isolated objects. The robot must be able to flexibly perform appropriate actions based on the current observation. It is challenging due to high occlusion in the clutter, elusive entanglement phenomena, and the need for skilled manipulation planning. In this paper, we propose an autonomous, effective and general approach for picking up tangled-prone objects for industrial bin picking. First, we learn PickNet - a network that maps the visual observation to pixel-wise possibilities of picking isolated objects or separating tangled objects and infers the corresponding grasp. Then, we propose two effective separation strategies: Dropping the entangled objects into a buffer bin to reduce the degree of entanglement; Pulling to separate the entangled objects in the buffer bin planned by PullNet - a network that predicts position and direction for pulling from visual input. To efficiently collect data for training PickNet and PullNet, we embrace the self-supervised learning paradigm using an algorithmic supervisor in a physics simulator. Real-world experiments show that our policy can dexterously pick up tangled-prone objects with success rates of 90%. We further demonstrate the generalization of our policy by picking a set of unseen objects. Supplementary material, code, and videos can be found at https://xinyiz0931.github.io/tangle. 对于容易缠结的物体的工业箱拾取要求机器人拾取未缠结的物体，或者当箱中没有孤立的物体时执行分离操作。机器人必须能够根据当前的观察灵活地执行适当的动作。由于杂波中的高度遮挡、难以捉摸的纠缠现象以及需要熟练的操作计划，这是一项具有挑战性的工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种自主、有效且通用的方法来拾取工业垃圾箱拾取中容易缠结的物体。首先，我们学习 PickNet - 一个网络，它将视觉观察映射到拾取孤立对象或分离缠结对象的像素级可能性，并推断相应的抓取。然后，我们提出了两种有效的分离策略：将纠缠的物体放入缓冲箱中以减少纠缠程度； PullNet 计划通过拉动来分离缓冲箱中的纠缠对象，PullNet 是一个根据视觉输入预测拉动位置和方向的网络。为了有效收集用于训练 PickNet 和 PullNet 的数据，我们采用了在物理模拟器中使用算法监控器的自我监督学习范式。现实世界的实验表明，我们的策略可以灵巧地拾取容易缠结的物体，成功率高达 90%。我们通过选择一组看不见的对象来进一步证明我们的策略的泛化性。补充材料、代码和视频可以在 https://xinyiz0931.github.io/tangle 找到。 本文提出一种工业料箱中自主抓取或分离易缠绕物体的方法，解决高遮挡和复杂操作规划的挑战。 Xinyi Zhang,Yukiyasu Domae,Weiwei Wan,Kensuke Harada cs.RO

authors_text: Jakob Prange,Man Ho Ivy Wong
title: Reanalyzing L2 Preposition Learning with Bayesian Mixed Effects and a Pretrained Language Model
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯混合效应和预训练语言模型重新分析二语介词学习
abstract: We use both Bayesian and neural models to dissect a data set of Chinese learners' pre- and post-interventional responses to two tests measuring their understanding of English prepositions. The results mostly replicate previous findings from frequentist analyses and newly reveal crucial interactions between student ability, task type, and stimulus sentence. Given the sparsity of the data as well as high diversity among learners, the Bayesian method proves most useful; but we also see potential in using language model probabilities as predictors of grammaticality and learnability.
summary: We use both Bayesian and neural models to dissect a data set of Chinese learners' pre- and post-interventional responses to two tests measuring their understanding of English prepositions. The results mostly replicate previous findings from frequentist analyses and newly reveal crucial interactions between student ability, task type, and stimulus sentence. Given the sparsity of the data as well as high diversity among learners, the Bayesian method proves most useful; but we also see potential in using language model probabilities as predictors of grammaticality and learnability.
abstract_zh: 我们使用贝叶斯模型和神经模型来剖析中国学习者在干预前和干预后对两项测试的反应数据集，以衡量他们对英语介词的理解。结果大多重复了之前频率分析的发现，并新揭示了学生能力、任务类型和刺激句子之间的重要相互作用。鉴于数据的稀疏性以及学习者之间的高度多样性，贝叶斯方法被证明是最有用的。但我们也看到了使用语言模型概率作为语法性和可学习性预测因子的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文结合贝叶斯混合效应模型和预训练语言模型，重新分析中国学习者英语介词学习的干预前后测试数据，探讨学生能力、任务类型与句子刺激的交互作用。
AI.motivation: 针对二语学习数据稀疏性和学习者多样性问题，传统方法存在局限，需探索更稳健的分析框架及新型预测指标。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯统计模型处理小样本数据，结合预训练语言模型计算句子概率，分析干预前后测试数据中的多因素交互效应。
AI.result: 验证了学生能力与任务类型、句子结构的显著交互作用，贝叶斯方法优于传统频率学派分析，语言模型概率可有效预测语法正确性与可学性。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯方法适合处理稀疏数据，语言模型概率为学习者表现预测提供新视角，未来可融合两种方法提升分析精度。

authors_text: Shuwei Shao,Zhongcai Pei,Weihai Chen,Ran Li,Zhong Liu,Zhengguo Li
title: URCDC-Depth: Uncertainty Rectified Cross-Distillation with CutFlip for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: URCDC-Depth：使用 CutFlip 进行不确定性校正交叉蒸馏以进行单目深度估计
abstract: This work aims to estimate a high-quality depth map from a single RGB image. Due to the lack of depth clues, making full use of the long-range correlation and the local information is critical for accurate depth estimation. Towards this end, we introduce an uncertainty rectified cross-distillation between Transformer and convolutional neural network (CNN) to learn a unified depth estimator. Specifically, we use the depth estimates from the Transformer branch and the CNN branch as pseudo labels to teach each other. Meanwhile, we model the pixel-wise depth uncertainty to rectify the loss weights of noisy pseudo labels. To avoid the large capacity gap induced by the strong Transformer branch deteriorating the cross-distillation, we transfer the feature maps from Transformer to CNN and design coupling units to assist the weak CNN branch to leverage the transferred features. Furthermore, we propose a surprisingly simple yet highly effective data augmentation technique CutFlip, which enforces the model to exploit more valuable clues apart from the vertical image position for depth inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model, termed~\textbf{URCDC-Depth}, exceeds previous state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI, NYU-Depth-v2 and SUN RGB-D datasets, even with no additional computational burden at inference time. The source code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/URCDC-Depth}.
summary: This work aims to estimate a high-quality depth map from a single RGB image. Due to the lack of depth clues, making full use of the long-range correlation and the local information is critical for accurate depth estimation. Towards this end, we introduce an uncertainty rectified cross-distillation between Transformer and convolutional neural network (CNN) to learn a unified depth estimator. Specifically, we use the depth estimates from the Transformer branch and the CNN branch as pseudo labels to teach each other. Meanwhile, we model the pixel-wise depth uncertainty to rectify the loss weights of noisy pseudo labels. To avoid the large capacity gap induced by the strong Transformer branch deteriorating the cross-distillation, we transfer the feature maps from Transformer to CNN and design coupling units to assist the weak CNN branch to leverage the transferred features. Furthermore, we propose a surprisingly simple yet highly effective data augmentation technique CutFlip, which enforces the model to exploit more valuable clues apart from the vertical image position for depth inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model, termed~\textbf{URCDC-Depth}, exceeds previous state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI, NYU-Depth-v2 and SUN RGB-D datasets, even with no additional computational burden at inference time. The source code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/URCDC-Depth}.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是从单个 RGB 图像中估计出高质量的深度图。由于缺乏深度线索，充分利用长程相关性和局部信息对于准确的深度估计至关重要。为此，我们在 Transformer 和卷积神经网络（CNN）之间引入不确定性校正交叉蒸馏，以学习统一的深度估计器。具体来说，我们使用 Transformer 分支和 CNN 分支的深度估计作为伪标签来互相教学。同时，我们对像素深度不确定性进行建模，以纠正噪声伪标签的损失权重。为了避免强 Transformer 分支引起的大容量差距导致交叉蒸馏恶化，我们将特征图从 Transformer 转移到 CNN，并设计耦合单元来协助弱 CNN 分支利用转移的特征。此外，我们提出了一种令人惊讶的简单但高效的数据增强技术 CutFlip，它强制模型利用除垂直图像位置之外的更有价值的线索进行深度推断。大量实验表明，我们的模型（称为~\textbf{URCDC-Depth}）超越了之前在 KITTI、NYU-Depth-v2 和 SUN RGB-D 数据集上最先进的方法，即使在推理时没有额外的计算负担。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/URCDC-Depth} 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出URCDC-Depth方法，通过结合Transformer与CNN的跨蒸馏机制及CutFlip数据增强技术，实现单目深度估计。
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计面临长距离关联与局部信息利用不足的问题，现有方法因模型容量差异和伪标签噪声导致性能受限。
AI.method: 采用Transformer与CNN分支的不确定性校正跨蒸馏，通过像素级深度不确定性调整损失权重，设计耦合单元实现特征迁移，并提出CutFlip增强技术。
AI.result: 在KITTI、NYU-Depth-v2和SUN RGB-D数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，且推理时无额外计算负担。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构协同优化与不确定性建模，有效提升了单目深度估计的精度与鲁棒性。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过架构协同优化与不确定性建模，有效提升了单目深度估计的精度与鲁棒性。

search_text: URCDC-Depth: Uncertainty Rectified Cross-Distillation with CutFlip for Monocular Depth Estimation URCDC-Depth：使用 CutFlip 进行不确定性校正交叉蒸馏以进行单目深度估计 This work aims to estimate a high-quality depth map from a single RGB image. Due to the lack of depth clues, making full use of the long-range correlation and the local information is critical for accurate depth estimation. Towards this end, we introduce an uncertainty rectified cross-distillation between Transformer and convolutional neural network (CNN) to learn a unified depth estimator. Specifically, we use the depth estimates from the Transformer branch and the CNN branch as pseudo labels to teach each other. Meanwhile, we model the pixel-wise depth uncertainty to rectify the loss weights of noisy pseudo labels. To avoid the large capacity gap induced by the strong Transformer branch deteriorating the cross-distillation, we transfer the feature maps from Transformer to CNN and design coupling units to assist the weak CNN branch to leverage the transferred features. Furthermore, we propose a surprisingly simple yet highly effective data augmentation technique CutFlip, which enforces the model to exploit more valuable clues apart from the vertical image position for depth inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model, termed~\textbf{URCDC-Depth}, exceeds previous state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI, NYU-Depth-v2 and SUN RGB-D datasets, even with no additional computational burden at inference time. The source code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/URCDC-Depth}. 这项工作的目的是从单个 RGB 图像中估计出高质量的深度图。由于缺乏深度线索，充分利用长程相关性和局部信息对于准确的深度估计至关重要。为此，我们在 Transformer 和卷积神经网络（CNN）之间引入不确定性校正交叉蒸馏，以学习统一的深度估计器。具体来说，我们使用 Transformer 分支和 CNN 分支的深度估计作为伪标签来互相教学。同时，我们对像素深度不确定性进行建模，以纠正噪声伪标签的损失权重。为了避免强 Transformer 分支引起的大容量差距导致交叉蒸馏恶化，我们将特征图从 Transformer 转移到 CNN，并设计耦合单元来协助弱 CNN 分支利用转移的特征。此外，我们提出了一种令人惊讶的简单但高效的数据增强技术 CutFlip，它强制模型利用除垂直图像位置之外的更有价值的线索进行深度推断。大量实验表明，我们的模型（称为~\textbf{URCDC-Depth}）超越了之前在 KITTI、NYU-Depth-v2 和 SUN RGB-D 数据集上最先进的方法，即使在推理时没有额外的计算负担。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ShuweiShao/URCDC-Depth} 公开获取。 本文提出URCDC-Depth方法，通过结合Transformer与CNN的跨蒸馏机制及CutFlip数据增强技术，实现单目深度估计。 Shuwei Shao,Zhongcai Pei,Weihai Chen,Ran Li,Zhong Liu,Zhengguo Li cs.CV

authors_text: Yoichi Aoki,Keito Kudo,Tatsuki Kuribayashi,Ana Brassard,Masashi Yoshikawa,Keisuke Sakaguchi,Kentaro Inui
title: Empirical Investigation of Neural Symbolic Reasoning Strategies
title_zh: 神经符号推理策略的实证研究
comment: This paper is accepted as the findings at EACL 2023, and the earlier version (non-archival) of this work got the Best Paper Award in the Student Research Workshop of AACL 2022
comments: This paper is accepted as the findings at EACL 2023, and the earlier version (non-archival) of this work got the Best Paper Award in the Student Research Workshop of AACL 2022
abstract: Neural reasoning accuracy improves when generating intermediate reasoning steps. However, the source of this improvement is yet unclear. Here, we investigate and factorize the benefit of generating intermediate steps for symbolic reasoning. Specifically, we decompose the reasoning strategy w.r.t. step granularity and chaining strategy. With a purely symbolic numerical reasoning dataset (e.g., A=1, B=3, C=A+3, C?), we found that the choice of reasoning strategies significantly affects the performance, with the gap becoming even larger as the extrapolation length becomes longer. Surprisingly, we also found that certain configurations lead to nearly perfect performance, even in the case of length extrapolation. Our results indicate the importance of further exploring effective strategies for neural reasoning models.
summary: Neural reasoning accuracy improves when generating intermediate reasoning steps. However, the source of this improvement is yet unclear. Here, we investigate and factorize the benefit of generating intermediate steps for symbolic reasoning. Specifically, we decompose the reasoning strategy w.r.t. step granularity and chaining strategy. With a purely symbolic numerical reasoning dataset (e.g., A=1, B=3, C=A+3, C?), we found that the choice of reasoning strategies significantly affects the performance, with the gap becoming even larger as the extrapolation length becomes longer. Surprisingly, we also found that certain configurations lead to nearly perfect performance, even in the case of length extrapolation. Our results indicate the importance of further exploring effective strategies for neural reasoning models.
abstract_zh: 生成中间推理步骤时，神经推理的准确性会提高。然而，这种改进的来源尚不清楚。在这里，我们研究并分解了生成符号推理中间步骤的好处。具体来说，我们分解推理策略。步骤粒度和链接策略。对于纯符号数值推理数据集（例如，A=1，B=3，C=A+3，C？），我们发现推理策略的选择显着影响性能，随着外推长度变长，差距变得更大。令人惊讶的是，我们还发现某些配置即使在长度外推的情况下也能带来近乎完美的性能。我们的结果表明进一步探索神经推理模型有效策略的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究分析生成中间推理步骤对神经符号推理性能的影响，分解推理策略并探讨其效果。
AI.motivation: 生成中间推理步骤能提升神经推理准确性，但其提升机制尚不明确，需探究不同策略对性能的影响。
AI.method: 基于纯符号数值数据集（如A=1,B=3,C=A+3,C?），分解推理策略的步骤粒度和链式策略，通过实验对比分析不同配置的性能差异。
AI.result: 推理策略选择显著影响性能，外推长度越长性能差距越大；部分配置在长外推场景下仍能保持接近完美的表现。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步探索有效的神经推理策略，以提升模型在复杂推理任务中的表现，特别是在长距离外推场景下。

authors_text: Bilal Thonnam Thodi,Sai Venkata Ramana Ambadipudi,Saif Eddin Jabari
title: Learning-based solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic PDEs: Empirical insights on generalization errors
title_zh: 基于学习的非线性双曲偏微分方程的解决方案：对泛化误差的经验见解
comment: ef:Fifth Workshop on Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ef:Fifth Workshop on Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: We study learning weak solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic partial differential equations (H-PDE), which have been difficult to learn due to discontinuities in their solutions. We use a physics-informed variant of the Fourier Neural Operator ($π$-FNO) to learn the weak solutions. We empirically quantify the generalization/out-of-sample error of the $π$-FNO solver as a function of input complexity, i.e., the distributions of initial and boundary conditions. Our testing results show that $π$-FNO generalizes well to unseen initial and boundary conditions. We find that the generalization error grows linearly with input complexity. Further, adding a physics-informed regularizer improved the prediction of discontinuities in the solution. We use the Lighthill-Witham-Richards (LWR) traffic flow model as a guiding example to illustrate the results.
summary: We study learning weak solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic partial differential equations (H-PDE), which have been difficult to learn due to discontinuities in their solutions. We use a physics-informed variant of the Fourier Neural Operator ($π$-FNO) to learn the weak solutions. We empirically quantify the generalization/out-of-sample error of the $π$-FNO solver as a function of input complexity, i.e., the distributions of initial and boundary conditions. Our testing results show that $π$-FNO generalizes well to unseen initial and boundary conditions. We find that the generalization error grows linearly with input complexity. Further, adding a physics-informed regularizer improved the prediction of discontinuities in the solution. We use the Lighthill-Witham-Richards (LWR) traffic flow model as a guiding example to illustrate the results.
abstract_zh: 我们研究学习非线性双曲偏微分方程（H-PDE）的弱解，由于解的不连续性，这些弱解很难学习。我们使用傅立叶神经算子 ($π$-FNO) 的物理变体来学习弱解。我们根据经验将 $π$-FNO 求解器的泛化/样本外误差量化为输入复杂性（即初始条件和边界条件的分布）的函数。我们的测试结果表明，$π$-FNO 可以很好地推广到看不见的初始条件和边界条件。我们发现泛化误差随着输入复杂度线性增长。此外，添加物理信息正则化器改进了解决方案中不连续性的预测。我们使用 Lighthill-Witham-Richards (LWR) 交通流模型作为指导示例来说明结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于学习的非线性双曲偏微分方程（H-PDE）弱解方法，使用物理信息傅里叶神经算子（π-FNO）并分析其泛化误差。
AI.motivation: 非线性双曲PDE的解存在不连续性，传统方法难以学习，且需量化模型在不同初始/边界条件下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出物理信息傅里叶神经算子（π-FNO），通过实验量化输入复杂度对泛化误差的影响，并引入物理正则化项优化不连续性预测。
AI.result: π-FNO在未见初始/边界条件下表现良好，泛化误差随输入复杂度线性增长，物理正则化有效提升不连续解预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息神经网络可有效学习H-PDE弱解，输入复杂度是泛化误差的关键因素，正则化策略对处理不连续性至关重要。

search_text: Learning-based solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic PDEs: Empirical insights on generalization errors 基于学习的非线性双曲偏微分方程的解决方案：对泛化误差的经验见解 We study learning weak solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic partial differential equations (H-PDE), which have been difficult to learn due to discontinuities in their solutions. We use a physics-informed variant of the Fourier Neural Operator ($π$-FNO) to learn the weak solutions. We empirically quantify the generalization/out-of-sample error of the $π$-FNO solver as a function of input complexity, i.e., the distributions of initial and boundary conditions. Our testing results show that $π$-FNO generalizes well to unseen initial and boundary conditions. We find that the generalization error grows linearly with input complexity. Further, adding a physics-informed regularizer improved the prediction of discontinuities in the solution. We use the Lighthill-Witham-Richards (LWR) traffic flow model as a guiding example to illustrate the results. 我们研究学习非线性双曲偏微分方程（H-PDE）的弱解，由于解的不连续性，这些弱解很难学习。我们使用傅立叶神经算子 ($π$-FNO) 的物理变体来学习弱解。我们根据经验将 $π$-FNO 求解器的泛化/样本外误差量化为输入复杂性（即初始条件和边界条件的分布）的函数。我们的测试结果表明，$π$-FNO 可以很好地推广到看不见的初始条件和边界条件。我们发现泛化误差随着输入复杂度线性增长。此外，添加物理信息正则化器改进了解决方案中不连续性的预测。我们使用 Lighthill-Witham-Richards (LWR) 交通流模型作为指导示例来说明结果。 本文研究基于学习的非线性双曲偏微分方程（H-PDE）弱解方法，使用物理信息傅里叶神经算子（π-FNO）并分析其泛化误差。 Bilal Thonnam Thodi,Sai Venkata Ramana Ambadipudi,Saif Eddin Jabari cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chengwei Qin,Qian Li,Ruochen Zhao,Shafiq Joty
title: Learning to Initialize: Can Meta Learning Improve Cross-task Generalization in Prompt Tuning?
title_zh: 学习初始化：元学习能否提高即时调优中的跨任务泛化能力？
abstract: Prompt tuning (PT) which only tunes the embeddings of an additional sequence of tokens per task, keeping the pre-trained language model (PLM) frozen, has shown remarkable performance in few-shot learning. Despite this, PT has been shown to rely heavily on good initialization of the prompt embeddings. In this work, we study meta prompt tuning (MPT) to systematically explore how meta-learning can help improve (if it can) cross-task generalization in PT through learning to initialize the prompt embeddings from other relevant tasks. We empirically analyze a representative set of meta learning algorithms in a wide range of adaptation settings with different source/target task configurations on a large set of few-shot tasks. With extensive experiments and analysis, we demonstrate the effectiveness of MPT. We find the improvement to be significant particularly on classification tasks. For other kinds of tasks such as question answering, we observe that while MPT can outperform PT in most cases, it does not always outperform multi-task learning. We further provide an in-depth analysis from the perspective of task similarity.
summary: Prompt tuning (PT) which only tunes the embeddings of an additional sequence of tokens per task, keeping the pre-trained language model (PLM) frozen, has shown remarkable performance in few-shot learning. Despite this, PT has been shown to rely heavily on good initialization of the prompt embeddings. In this work, we study meta prompt tuning (MPT) to systematically explore how meta-learning can help improve (if it can) cross-task generalization in PT through learning to initialize the prompt embeddings from other relevant tasks. We empirically analyze a representative set of meta learning algorithms in a wide range of adaptation settings with different source/target task configurations on a large set of few-shot tasks. With extensive experiments and analysis, we demonstrate the effectiveness of MPT. We find the improvement to be significant particularly on classification tasks. For other kinds of tasks such as question answering, we observe that while MPT can outperform PT in most cases, it does not always outperform multi-task learning. We further provide an in-depth analysis from the perspective of task similarity.
abstract_zh: 提示调整（PT）仅调整每个任务的附加标记序列的嵌入，保持预训练的语言模型（PLM）冻结，在小样本学习中表现出了卓越的性能。尽管如此，PT 已被证明严重依赖于提示嵌入的良好初始化。在这项工作中，我们研究元提示调整（MPT），系统地探索元学习如何通过学习初始化其他相关任务的提示嵌入来帮助改进（如果可以的话）PT 中的跨任务泛化。我们根据经验分析了一组具有代表性的元学习算法，这些算法在广泛的适应设置中具有不同的源/目标任务配置，并且针对大量的少量任务。通过大量的实验和分析，我们证明了 MPT 的有效性。我们发现这种改进尤其是在分类任务上非常显着。对于其他类型的任务（例如问答），我们观察到虽然 MPT 在大多数情况下可以优于 PT，但它并不总是优于多任务学习。我们进一步从任务相似度的角度进行深入分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究元学习是否能通过改进提示嵌入的初始化来提升提示调整（PT）在跨任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 提示调整（PT）在少样本学习中表现优异，但其性能高度依赖于提示嵌入的初始化质量，而手动调整初始化困难且效果有限。
AI.method: 提出元提示调整（MPT）方法，利用元学习从相关任务中学习初始化策略，并在多种源/目标任务配置的少样本任务上进行广泛实验验证。
AI.result: MPT在分类任务中显著优于传统PT，但在问答任务中有时不如多任务学习；任务相似性对MPT效果有重要影响。
AI.conclusion: 元学习能有效提升PT的跨任务泛化能力，但其优势程度取决于任务间的相似性及任务类型。

search_text: Learning to Initialize: Can Meta Learning Improve Cross-task Generalization in Prompt Tuning? 学习初始化：元学习能否提高即时调优中的跨任务泛化能力？ Prompt tuning (PT) which only tunes the embeddings of an additional sequence of tokens per task, keeping the pre-trained language model (PLM) frozen, has shown remarkable performance in few-shot learning. Despite this, PT has been shown to rely heavily on good initialization of the prompt embeddings. In this work, we study meta prompt tuning (MPT) to systematically explore how meta-learning can help improve (if it can) cross-task generalization in PT through learning to initialize the prompt embeddings from other relevant tasks. We empirically analyze a representative set of meta learning algorithms in a wide range of adaptation settings with different source/target task configurations on a large set of few-shot tasks. With extensive experiments and analysis, we demonstrate the effectiveness of MPT. We find the improvement to be significant particularly on classification tasks. For other kinds of tasks such as question answering, we observe that while MPT can outperform PT in most cases, it does not always outperform multi-task learning. We further provide an in-depth analysis from the perspective of task similarity. 提示调整（PT）仅调整每个任务的附加标记序列的嵌入，保持预训练的语言模型（PLM）冻结，在小样本学习中表现出了卓越的性能。尽管如此，PT 已被证明严重依赖于提示嵌入的良好初始化。在这项工作中，我们研究元提示调整（MPT），系统地探索元学习如何通过学习初始化其他相关任务的提示嵌入来帮助改进（如果可以的话）PT 中的跨任务泛化。我们根据经验分析了一组具有代表性的元学习算法，这些算法在广泛的适应设置中具有不同的源/目标任务配置，并且针对大量的少量任务。通过大量的实验和分析，我们证明了 MPT 的有效性。我们发现这种改进尤其是在分类任务上非常显着。对于其他类型的任务（例如问答），我们观察到虽然 MPT 在大多数情况下可以优于 PT，但它并不总是优于多任务学习。我们进一步从任务相似度的角度进行深入分析。 本文研究元学习是否能通过改进提示嵌入的初始化来提升提示调整（PT）在跨任务中的泛化能力。 Chengwei Qin,Qian Li,Ruochen Zhao,Shafiq Joty cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shehzeen Hussain,Paarth Neekhara,Jocelyn Huang,Jason Li,Boris Ginsburg
title: ACE-VC: Adaptive and Controllable Voice Conversion using Explicitly Disentangled Self-supervised Speech Representations
title_zh: ACE-VC：使用显式解缠自监督语音表示的自适应和可控语音转换
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICASSP 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICASSP 2023
abstract: In this work, we propose a zero-shot voice conversion method using speech representations trained with self-supervised learning. First, we develop a multi-task model to decompose a speech utterance into features such as linguistic content, speaker characteristics, and speaking style. To disentangle content and speaker representations, we propose a training strategy based on Siamese networks that encourages similarity between the content representations of the original and pitch-shifted audio. Next, we develop a synthesis model with pitch and duration predictors that can effectively reconstruct the speech signal from its decomposed representation. Our framework allows controllable and speaker-adaptive synthesis to perform zero-shot any-to-any voice conversion achieving state-of-the-art results on metrics evaluating speaker similarity, intelligibility, and naturalness. Using just 10 seconds of data for a target speaker, our framework can perform voice swapping and achieves a speaker verification EER of 5.5% for seen speakers and 8.4% for unseen speakers.
summary: In this work, we propose a zero-shot voice conversion method using speech representations trained with self-supervised learning. First, we develop a multi-task model to decompose a speech utterance into features such as linguistic content, speaker characteristics, and speaking style. To disentangle content and speaker representations, we propose a training strategy based on Siamese networks that encourages similarity between the content representations of the original and pitch-shifted audio. Next, we develop a synthesis model with pitch and duration predictors that can effectively reconstruct the speech signal from its decomposed representation. Our framework allows controllable and speaker-adaptive synthesis to perform zero-shot any-to-any voice conversion achieving state-of-the-art results on metrics evaluating speaker similarity, intelligibility, and naturalness. Using just 10 seconds of data for a target speaker, our framework can perform voice swapping and achieves a speaker verification EER of 5.5% for seen speakers and 8.4% for unseen speakers.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用自监督学习训练的语音表示的零样本语音转换方法。首先，我们开发了一个多任务模型，将语音分解为语言内容、说话者特征和说话风格等特征。为了理清内容和说话者表示的关系，我们提出了一种基于暹罗网络的训练策略，该策略鼓励原始音频和音调偏移音频的内容表示之间的相似性。接下来，我们开发了一个具有音调和持续时间预测器的合成模型，可以有效地从分解的表示中重建语音信号。我们的框架允许可控和说话人自适应合成来执行零样本任意语音转换，在评估说话人相似性、清晰度和自然度的指标上实现最先进的结果。我们的框架只需使用目标说话人 10 秒的数据，就可以执行语音交换，并实现可见说话人的说话人验证 EER 为 5.5%，未见说话人的说话人验证 EER 为 8.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的零样本语音转换方法ACE-VC，通过显式解耦语音表示实现可控的说话人自适应合成。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换方法依赖大量标注数据且难以处理未见过的说话人，本文旨在开发一种无需对齐数据、可零样本转换且保持语音自然度的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建多任务模型将语音分解为语言内容、说话人特征和风格特征，采用基于孪生网络的训练策略增强内容表示的鲁棒性，并设计包含音高和时长预测器的合成模型重构语音信号。
AI.result: 在10秒目标说话人数据下实现语音交换，对已见说话人说话人验证EER为5.5%，未见说话人为8.4%，在说话人相似度、可懂度和自然度指标上达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式解耦的自监督表示学习，ACE-VC框架在少量数据下实现了可控且高质量的零样本语音转换，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Zhi Zhong,Masato Hirano,Kazuki Shimada,Kazuya Tateishi,Shusuke Takahashi,Yuki Mitsufuji
title: An Attention-based Approach to Hierarchical Multi-label Music Instrument Classification
title_zh: 基于注意力的分层多标签乐器分类方法
abstract: Although music is typically multi-label, many works have studied hierarchical music tagging with simplified settings such as single-label data. Moreover, there lacks a framework to describe various joint training methods under the multi-label setting. In order to discuss the above topics, we introduce hierarchical multi-label music instrument classification task. The task provides a realistic setting where multi-instrument real music data is assumed. Various hierarchical methods that jointly train a DNN are summarized and explored in the context of the fusion of deep learning and conventional techniques. For the effective joint training in the multi-label setting, we propose two methods to model the connection between fine- and coarse-level tags, where one uses rule-based grouped max-pooling, the other one uses the attention mechanism obtained in a data-driven manner. Our evaluation reveals that the proposed methods have advantages over the method without joint training. In addition, the decision procedure within the proposed methods can be interpreted by visualizing attention maps or referring to fixed rules.
summary: Although music is typically multi-label, many works have studied hierarchical music tagging with simplified settings such as single-label data. Moreover, there lacks a framework to describe various joint training methods under the multi-label setting. In order to discuss the above topics, we introduce hierarchical multi-label music instrument classification task. The task provides a realistic setting where multi-instrument real music data is assumed. Various hierarchical methods that jointly train a DNN are summarized and explored in the context of the fusion of deep learning and conventional techniques. For the effective joint training in the multi-label setting, we propose two methods to model the connection between fine- and coarse-level tags, where one uses rule-based grouped max-pooling, the other one uses the attention mechanism obtained in a data-driven manner. Our evaluation reveals that the proposed methods have advantages over the method without joint training. In addition, the decision procedure within the proposed methods can be interpreted by visualizing attention maps or referring to fixed rules.
abstract_zh: 尽管音乐通常是多标签的，但许多作品已经研究了具有简化设置（例如单标签数据）的分层音乐标签。此外，缺乏一个框架来描述多标签设置下的各种联合训练方法。为了讨论上述主题，我们引入分层多标签乐器分类任务。该任务提供了假设多乐器真实音乐数据的真实设置。在深度学习与传统技术融合的背景下，总结和探索了联合训练 DNN 的各种分层方法。为了在多标签设置中进行有效的联合训练，我们提出了两种方法来建模精细和粗级标签之间的连接，其中一种使用基于规则的分组最大池，另一种使用以数据驱动方式获得的注意力机制。我们的评估表明，所提出的方法比没有联合训练的方法具有优势。此外，所提出的方法中的决策过程可以通过可视化注意力图或参考固定规则来解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的分层多标签音乐乐器分类方法，解决多乐器真实音乐数据中的联合训练框架缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐标签研究多采用单标签简化设置，缺乏针对多标签场景的联合训练框架，难以处理真实多乐器音乐数据的复杂性。
AI.method: 提出两种联合训练方法：基于规则的分组最大池化和数据驱动的注意力机制，建模细粒度与粗粒度标签间的关系。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在多标签设置下优于非联合训练方法，且可通过可视化注意力图或规则解释决策过程。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制有效提升分层多标签分类性能，同时保持模型可解释性，为多乐器音乐分析提供新思路。

ai_content.result: 实验表明所提方法在多标签设置下优于非联合训练方法，且可通过可视化注意力图或规则解释决策过程。
ai_content.conclusion: 注意力机制有效提升分层多标签分类性能，同时保持模型可解释性，为多乐器音乐分析提供新思路。

search_text: An Attention-based Approach to Hierarchical Multi-label Music Instrument Classification 基于注意力的分层多标签乐器分类方法 Although music is typically multi-label, many works have studied hierarchical music tagging with simplified settings such as single-label data. Moreover, there lacks a framework to describe various joint training methods under the multi-label setting. In order to discuss the above topics, we introduce hierarchical multi-label music instrument classification task. The task provides a realistic setting where multi-instrument real music data is assumed. Various hierarchical methods that jointly train a DNN are summarized and explored in the context of the fusion of deep learning and conventional techniques. For the effective joint training in the multi-label setting, we propose two methods to model the connection between fine- and coarse-level tags, where one uses rule-based grouped max-pooling, the other one uses the attention mechanism obtained in a data-driven manner. Our evaluation reveals that the proposed methods have advantages over the method without joint training. In addition, the decision procedure within the proposed methods can be interpreted by visualizing attention maps or referring to fixed rules. 尽管音乐通常是多标签的，但许多作品已经研究了具有简化设置（例如单标签数据）的分层音乐标签。此外，缺乏一个框架来描述多标签设置下的各种联合训练方法。为了讨论上述主题，我们引入分层多标签乐器分类任务。该任务提供了假设多乐器真实音乐数据的真实设置。在深度学习与传统技术融合的背景下，总结和探索了联合训练 DNN 的各种分层方法。为了在多标签设置中进行有效的联合训练，我们提出了两种方法来建模精细和粗级标签之间的连接，其中一种使用基于规则的分组最大池，另一种使用以数据驱动方式获得的注意力机制。我们的评估表明，所提出的方法比没有联合训练的方法具有优势。此外，所提出的方法中的决策过程可以通过可视化注意力图或参考固定规则来解释。 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的分层多标签音乐乐器分类方法，解决多乐器真实音乐数据中的联合训练框架缺失问题。 Zhi Zhong,Masato Hirano,Kazuki Shimada,Kazuya Tateishi,Shusuke Takahashi,Yuki Mitsufuji cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Chung-Che Wang,Yu-Chun Lin,Yu-Teng Hsu,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang
title: Personalized Audio Quality Preference Prediction
title_zh: 个性化音频质量偏好预测
abstract: This paper proposes to use both audio input and subject information to predict the personalized preference of two audio segments with the same content in different qualities. A siamese network is used to compare the inputs and predict the preference. Several different structures for each side of the siamese network are investigated, and an LDNet with PANNs' CNN6 as the encoder and a multi-layer perceptron block as the decoder outperforms a baseline model using only audio input the most, where the overall accuracy grows from 77.56% to 78.04%. Experimental results also show that using all the subject information, including age, gender, and the specifications of headphones or earphones, is more effective than using only a part of them.
summary: This paper proposes to use both audio input and subject information to predict the personalized preference of two audio segments with the same content in different qualities. A siamese network is used to compare the inputs and predict the preference. Several different structures for each side of the siamese network are investigated, and an LDNet with PANNs' CNN6 as the encoder and a multi-layer perceptron block as the decoder outperforms a baseline model using only audio input the most, where the overall accuracy grows from 77.56% to 78.04%. Experimental results also show that using all the subject information, including age, gender, and the specifications of headphones or earphones, is more effective than using only a part of them.
abstract_zh: 本文提出使用音频输入和主题信息来预测具有相同内容但不同质量的两个音频片段的个性化偏好。暹罗网络用于比较输入并预测偏好。研究了暹罗网络每一侧的几种不同结构，并且以 PANN 的 CNN6 作为编码器和多层感知器块作为解码器的 LDNet 的性能优于仅使用音频输入的基线模型，整体准确率从 77.56% 增长到 78.04%。实验结果还表明，使用所有受试者信息，包括年龄、性别、头戴式耳机或耳机的规格，比仅使用其中的一部分更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合音频输入和用户信息预测个性化音频质量偏好，通过Siamese网络比较不同质量音频片段并预测用户偏好。
AI.motivation: 不同用户对音频质量的偏好存在个体差异，传统仅依赖音频特征的方法难以准确预测个性化偏好，需引入用户属性信息提升预测效果。
AI.method: 采用Siamese网络结构，对比音频输入与用户信息；使用LDNet模型（以PANNs的CNN6为编码器、MLP为解码器）并验证不同网络结构效果，同时纳入年龄、性别、耳机规格等用户数据进行训练。
AI.result: LDNet模型使整体准确率从77.56%提升至78.04%，且整合全部用户信息的模型表现优于仅使用部分信息的模型。
AI.conclusion: 结合音频特征与用户属性信息能有效提升个性化音频质量偏好预测性能，未来可进一步优化网络结构或扩展用户特征维度。

authors_text: Xuanji Xiao,Ziyu He
title: Neighbor Based Enhancement for the Long-Tail Ranking Problem in Video Rank Models
title_zh: 视频排名模型中长尾排名问题的基于邻居的增强
abstract: Rank models play a key role in industrial recommender systems, advertising, and search engines. Existing works utilize semantic tags and user-item interaction behaviors, e.g., clicks, views, etc., to predict the user interest and the item hidden representation for estimating the user-item preference score. However, these behavior-tag-based models encounter great challenges and reduced effectiveness when user-item interaction activities are insufficient, which we called "the long-tail ranking problem". Existing rank models ignore this problem, but its common and important because any user or item can be long-tailed once they are not consistently active for a short period. In this paper, we propose a novel neighbor enhancement structure to help train the representation of the target user or item. It takes advantage of similar neighbors (static or dynamic similarity) with multi-level attention operations balancing the weights of different neighbors. Experiments on the well-known public dataset MovieLens 1M demonstrate the efficiency of the method over the baseline behavior-tag-based model with an absolute CTR AUC gain of 0.0259 on the long-tail user dataset.
summary: Rank models play a key role in industrial recommender systems, advertising, and search engines. Existing works utilize semantic tags and user-item interaction behaviors, e.g., clicks, views, etc., to predict the user interest and the item hidden representation for estimating the user-item preference score. However, these behavior-tag-based models encounter great challenges and reduced effectiveness when user-item interaction activities are insufficient, which we called "the long-tail ranking problem". Existing rank models ignore this problem, but its common and important because any user or item can be long-tailed once they are not consistently active for a short period. In this paper, we propose a novel neighbor enhancement structure to help train the representation of the target user or item. It takes advantage of similar neighbors (static or dynamic similarity) with multi-level attention operations balancing the weights of different neighbors. Experiments on the well-known public dataset MovieLens 1M demonstrate the efficiency of the method over the baseline behavior-tag-based model with an absolute CTR AUC gain of 0.0259 on the long-tail user dataset.
abstract_zh: 排名模型在工业推荐系统、广告和搜索引擎中发挥着关键作用。现有的工作利用语义标签和用户-项目交互行为，例如点击、查看等，来预测用户兴趣和项目隐藏表示，以估计用户-项目偏好得分。然而，当用户-项目交互活动不足时，这些基于行为标签的模型会遇到很大的挑战，效率会降低，我们称之为“长尾排名问题”。现有的排名模型忽略了这个问题，但它是常见且重要的，因为任何用户或项目一旦在短时间内不持续活跃，就可能成为长尾。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的邻居增强结构来帮助训练目标用户或项目的表示。它利用相似的邻居（静态或动态相似性）和多级注意操作来平衡不同邻居的权重。在著名的公共数据集 MovieLens 1M 上进行的实验证明了该方法相对于基于行为标签的基线模型的效率，在长尾用户数据集上的绝对 CTR AUC 增益为 0.0259。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于邻居增强的方法，解决视频推荐系统中长尾排名问题，通过利用相似邻居信息提升目标用户或物品的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于行为和标签的排名模型在用户-物品交互数据不足时效果显著下降，导致长尾排名问题，而该问题在实际场景中普遍存在且关键。
AI.method: 设计邻居增强结构，结合静态或动态相似性邻居，采用多级注意力机制平衡不同邻居权重，辅助目标用户/物品表示学习。
AI.result: 在MovieLens 1M数据集上，长尾用户数据集的CTR AUC指标相较基线模型绝对提升0.0259。
AI.conclusion: 通过邻居信息增强有效缓解长尾排名问题，验证了该方法在稀疏交互场景下的有效性，为推荐系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ke Zou,Zhihao Chen,Xuedong Yuan,Xiaojing Shen,Meng Wang,Huazhu Fu
title: A Review of Uncertainty Estimation and its Application in Medical Imaging
title_zh: 不确定性估计及其在医学成像中的应用综述
abstract: The use of AI systems in healthcare for the early screening of diseases is of great clinical importance. Deep learning has shown great promise in medical imaging, but the reliability and trustworthiness of AI systems limit their deployment in real clinical scenes, where patient safety is at stake. Uncertainty estimation plays a pivotal role in producing a confidence evaluation along with the prediction of the deep model. This is particularly important in medical imaging, where the uncertainty in the model's predictions can be used to identify areas of concern or to provide additional information to the clinician. In this paper, we review the various types of uncertainty in deep learning, including aleatoric uncertainty and epistemic uncertainty. We further discuss how they can be estimated in medical imaging. More importantly, we review recent advances in deep learning models that incorporate uncertainty estimation in medical imaging. Finally, we discuss the challenges and future directions in uncertainty estimation in deep learning for medical imaging. We hope this review will ignite further interest in the community and provide researchers with an up-to-date reference regarding applications of uncertainty estimation models in medical imaging.
summary: The use of AI systems in healthcare for the early screening of diseases is of great clinical importance. Deep learning has shown great promise in medical imaging, but the reliability and trustworthiness of AI systems limit their deployment in real clinical scenes, where patient safety is at stake. Uncertainty estimation plays a pivotal role in producing a confidence evaluation along with the prediction of the deep model. This is particularly important in medical imaging, where the uncertainty in the model's predictions can be used to identify areas of concern or to provide additional information to the clinician. In this paper, we review the various types of uncertainty in deep learning, including aleatoric uncertainty and epistemic uncertainty. We further discuss how they can be estimated in medical imaging. More importantly, we review recent advances in deep learning models that incorporate uncertainty estimation in medical imaging. Finally, we discuss the challenges and future directions in uncertainty estimation in deep learning for medical imaging. We hope this review will ignite further interest in the community and provide researchers with an up-to-date reference regarding applications of uncertainty estimation models in medical imaging.
abstract_zh: 在医疗保健中使用人工智能系统进行疾病的早期筛查具有重要的临床意义。深度学习在医学成像领域显示出巨大的前景，但人工智能系统的可靠性和可信度限制了它们在真实临床场景中的部署，而患者安全受到威胁。不确定性估计在产生置信度评估以及深度模型的预测方面发挥着关键作用。这在医学成像中尤其重要，模型预测的不确定性可用于识别关注区域或向临床医生提供附加信息。在本文中，我们回顾了深度学习中的各种类型的不确定性，包括任意不确定性和认知不确定性。我们进一步讨论如何在医学成像中估计它们。更重要的是，我们回顾了深度学习模型的最新进展，该模型将医学成像中的不确定性估计纳入其中。最后，我们讨论了医学成像深度学习不确定性估计的挑战和未来方向。我们希望这篇综述能够进一步激发社区的兴趣，并为研究人员提供有关不确定性估计模型在医学成像中应用的最新参考。

authors_text: Wei Zhang,Shanze Wang,Junjie Tong,Fang Liao,Yunfeng Zhang,Xiaoyu Shen
title: DDCNN: A Promising Tool for Simulation-To-Reality UAV Fault Diagnosis
title_zh: DDCNN：一种有前途的仿真现实无人机故障诊断工具
comment: 20xx IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. comments: 20xx IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, collecting new collected works for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: Identifying the fault in propellers is important to keep quadrotors operating safely and efficiently. The simulation-to-reality (sim-to-real) UAV fault diagnosis methods provide a cost-effective and safe approach to detecting propeller faults. However, due to the gap between simulation and reality, classifiers trained with simulated data usually underperform in real flights. In this work, a novel difference-based deep convolutional neural network (DDCNN) model is presented to address the above issue. It uses the difference features extracted by deep convolutional neural networks to reduce the sim-to-real gap. Moreover, a new domain adaptation (DA) method is presented to further bring the distribution of the real-flight data closer to that of the simulation data. The experimental results demonstrate that the DDCNN+DA model can increase the accuracy from 52.9% to 99.1% in real-world UAV fault detection.
summary: Identifying the fault in propellers is important to keep quadrotors operating safely and efficiently. The simulation-to-reality (sim-to-real) UAV fault diagnosis methods provide a cost-effective and safe approach to detecting propeller faults. However, due to the gap between simulation and reality, classifiers trained with simulated data usually underperform in real flights. In this work, a novel difference-based deep convolutional neural network (DDCNN) model is presented to address the above issue. It uses the difference features extracted by deep convolutional neural networks to reduce the sim-to-real gap. Moreover, a new domain adaptation (DA) method is presented to further bring the distribution of the real-flight data closer to that of the simulation data. The experimental results demonstrate that the DDCNN+DA model can increase the accuracy from 52.9% to 99.1% in real-world UAV fault detection.
abstract_zh: 识别螺旋桨故障对于保持四旋翼飞行器安全高效运行非常重要。仿真到现实（sim-to-real）无人机故障诊断方法为检测螺旋桨故障提供了一种经济有效且安全的方法。然而，由于模拟与现实之间的差距，用模拟数据训练的分类器通常在实际飞行中表现不佳。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的基于差异的深度卷积神经网络（DDCNN）模型来解决上述问题。它利用深度卷积神经网络提取的差异特征来减少模拟与真实的差距。此外，提出了一种新的域自适应（DA）方法，进一步使实际飞行数据的分布更接近模拟数据的分布。实验结果表明，DDCNN+DA模型可以将现实无人机故障检测的准确率从52.9%提高到99.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于差异特征的深度卷积神经网络（DDCNN）模型，用于解决无人机旋翼故障诊断中仿真与现实之间的差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于仿真的无人机故障诊断方法在实际飞行中表现不佳，因仿真与现实数据分布存在显著差异，导致分类准确率低下。
AI.method: 通过提取深度卷积神经网络的差异特征缩小仿真与现实差距，并结合新的领域自适应（DA）方法进一步对齐数据分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，DDCNN+DA模型将实际无人机故障检测准确率从52.9%提升至99.1%。
AI.conclusion: DDCNN+DA有效缓解了仿真到现实的迁移鸿沟，为无人机故障诊断提供了高精度解决方案。

authors_text: Omer Bar-Tal,Lior Yariv,Yaron Lipman,Tali Dekel
title: MultiDiffusion: Fusing Diffusion Paths for Controlled Image Generation
title_zh: MultiDiffusion：融合扩散路径以生成受控图像
abstract: Recent advances in text-to-image generation with diffusion models present transformative capabilities in image quality. However, user controllability of the generated image, and fast adaptation to new tasks still remains an open challenge, currently mostly addressed by costly and long re-training and fine-tuning or ad-hoc adaptations to specific image generation tasks. In this work, we present MultiDiffusion, a unified framework that enables versatile and controllable image generation, using a pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model, without any further training or finetuning. At the center of our approach is a new generation process, based on an optimization task that binds together multiple diffusion generation processes with a shared set of parameters or constraints. We show that MultiDiffusion can be readily applied to generate high quality and diverse images that adhere to user-provided controls, such as desired aspect ratio (e.g., panorama), and spatial guiding signals, ranging from tight segmentation masks to bounding boxes. Project webpage: https://multidiffusion.github.io
summary: Recent advances in text-to-image generation with diffusion models present transformative capabilities in image quality. However, user controllability of the generated image, and fast adaptation to new tasks still remains an open challenge, currently mostly addressed by costly and long re-training and fine-tuning or ad-hoc adaptations to specific image generation tasks. In this work, we present MultiDiffusion, a unified framework that enables versatile and controllable image generation, using a pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model, without any further training or finetuning. At the center of our approach is a new generation process, based on an optimization task that binds together multiple diffusion generation processes with a shared set of parameters or constraints. We show that MultiDiffusion can be readily applied to generate high quality and diverse images that adhere to user-provided controls, such as desired aspect ratio (e.g., panorama), and spatial guiding signals, ranging from tight segmentation masks to bounding boxes. Project webpage: https://multidiffusion.github.io
abstract_zh: 利用扩散模型生成文本到图像的最新进展呈现出图像质量的变革能力。然而，生成图像的用户可控性以及对新任务的快速适应仍然是一个开放的挑战，目前主要通过昂贵且长时间的重新训练和微调或对特定图像生成任务的临时适应来解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MultiDiffusion，这是一个统一的框架，可以使用预先训练的文本到图像扩散模型来实现多功能且可控的图像生成，而无需任何进一步的训练或微调。我们方法的核心是基于优化任务的新一代生成过程，该优化任务将多个扩散生成过程与一组共享参数或约束绑定在一起。我们表明，多重扩散可以轻松地应用于生成高质量和多样化的图像，这些图像遵循用户提供的控制，例如所需的纵横比（例如全景图）和空间引导信号，范围从紧密的分割掩模到边界框。项目网页：https://multidiffusion.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MultiDiffusion的统一框架，能够在无需进一步训练或微调的情况下，利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型实现可控的图像生成。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到图像生成的扩散模型在图像质量上取得了显著进展，但用户对生成图像的控制能力和快速适应新任务的能力仍然存在挑战，通常需要耗费大量时间和资源进行重新训练或微调。
AI.method: 该方法的核心是一种新的生成过程，基于一个优化任务，将多个扩散生成过程通过共享的参数或约束结合在一起，从而实现对生成图像的可控性。
AI.result: 实验表明，MultiDiffusion能够生成高质量且多样化的图像，能够满足用户提供的多种控制条件，如特定的宽高比和空间引导信号。
AI.conclusion: MultiDiffusion提供了一种无需额外训练即可实现可控图像生成的统一框架，为文本到图像生成任务提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。

conclusion: MultiDiffusion提供了一种无需额外训练即可实现可控图像生成的统一框架，为文本到图像生成任务提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。
search_text: MultiDiffusion: Fusing Diffusion Paths for Controlled Image Generation MultiDiffusion：融合扩散路径以生成受控图像 Recent advances in text-to-image generation with diffusion models present transformative capabilities in image quality. However, user controllability of the generated image, and fast adaptation to new tasks still remains an open challenge, currently mostly addressed by costly and long re-training and fine-tuning or ad-hoc adaptations to specific image generation tasks. In this work, we present MultiDiffusion, a unified framework that enables versatile and controllable image generation, using a pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model, without any further training or finetuning. At the center of our approach is a new generation process, based on an optimization task that binds together multiple diffusion generation processes with a shared set of parameters or constraints. We show that MultiDiffusion can be readily applied to generate high quality and diverse images that adhere to user-provided controls, such as desired aspect ratio (e.g., panorama), and spatial guiding signals, ranging from tight segmentation masks to bounding boxes. Project webpage: https://multidiffusion.github.io 利用扩散模型生成文本到图像的最新进展呈现出图像质量的变革能力。然而，生成图像的用户可控性以及对新任务的快速适应仍然是一个开放的挑战，目前主要通过昂贵且长时间的重新训练和微调或对特定图像生成任务的临时适应来解决。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MultiDiffusion，这是一个统一的框架，可以使用预先训练的文本到图像扩散模型来实现多功能且可控的图像生成，而无需任何进一步的训练或微调。我们方法的核心是基于优化任务的新一代生成过程，该优化任务将多个扩散生成过程与一组共享参数或约束绑定在一起。我们表明，多重扩散可以轻松地应用于生成高质量和多样化的图像，这些图像遵循用户提供的控制，例如所需的纵横比（例如全景图）和空间引导信号，范围从紧密的分割掩模到边界框。项目网页：https://multidiffusion.github.io 本文提出了一种名为MultiDiffusion的统一框架，能够在无需进一步训练或微调的情况下，利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型实现可控的图像生成。 Omer Bar-Tal,Lior Yariv,Yaron Lipman,Tali Dekel cs.CV

authors_text: Gen Luo,Minglang Huang,Yiyi Zhou,Xiaoshuai Sun,Guannan Jiang,Zhiyu Wang,Rongrong Ji
title: Towards Efficient Visual Adaption via Structural Re-parameterization
title_zh: 通过结构重新参数化实现高效的视觉适应
abstract: Parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) is an emerging research spot aimed at inexpensively adapting large-scale pre-trained models to downstream tasks. Recent advances have achieved great success in saving storage costs for various pre-trained models by updating a small number of parameters instead of full tuning. However, we notice that most existing PETL methods still incur non-negligible latency during inference. In this paper, we propose a parameter-efficient and computational friendly adapter for giant vision models, called RepAdapter. Specifically, we first prove that common adaptation modules can also be seamlessly integrated into most giant vision models via our structural re-parameterization, thereby achieving zero-cost during inference. We then investigate the sparse design and effective placement of adapter structure, helping our RepAdaper obtain other advantages in terms of parameter efficiency and performance. To validate RepAdapter, we conduct extensive experiments on 27 benchmark datasets of three vision tasks, i.e., image and video classifications and semantic segmentation. Experimental results show the superior performance and efficiency of RepAdapter than the state-of-the-art PETL methods. For instance, RepAdapter outperforms full tuning by +7.2% on average and saves up to 25% training time, 20% GPU memory, and 94.6% storage cost of ViT-B/16 on VTAB-1k. The generalization ability of RepAdapter is also well validated by a bunch of vision models. Our source code is released at https://github.com/luogen1996/RepAdapter.
summary: Parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) is an emerging research spot aimed at inexpensively adapting large-scale pre-trained models to downstream tasks. Recent advances have achieved great success in saving storage costs for various pre-trained models by updating a small number of parameters instead of full tuning. However, we notice that most existing PETL methods still incur non-negligible latency during inference. In this paper, we propose a parameter-efficient and computational friendly adapter for giant vision models, called RepAdapter. Specifically, we first prove that common adaptation modules can also be seamlessly integrated into most giant vision models via our structural re-parameterization, thereby achieving zero-cost during inference. We then investigate the sparse design and effective placement of adapter structure, helping our RepAdaper obtain other advantages in terms of parameter efficiency and performance. To validate RepAdapter, we conduct extensive experiments on 27 benchmark datasets of three vision tasks, i.e., image and video classifications and semantic segmentation. Experimental results show the superior performance and efficiency of RepAdapter than the state-of-the-art PETL methods. For instance, RepAdapter outperforms full tuning by +7.2% on average and saves up to 25% training time, 20% GPU memory, and 94.6% storage cost of ViT-B/16 on VTAB-1k. The generalization ability of RepAdapter is also well validated by a bunch of vision models. Our source code is released at https://github.com/luogen1996/RepAdapter.
abstract_zh: 参数高效迁移学习（PETL）是一个新兴的研究领域，旨在以低成本使大规模预训练模型适应下游任务。最近的进展通过更新少量参数而不是完全调优，在节省各种预训练模型的存储成本方面取得了巨大成功。然而，我们注意到大多数现有的 PETL 方法在推理过程中仍然会产生不可忽略的延迟。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于巨型视觉模型的参数高效且计算友好的适配器，称为 RepAdapter。具体来说，我们首先证明通用适应模块也可以通过我们的结构重新参数化无缝集成到大多数巨型视觉模型中，从而实现推理过程中的零成本。然后我们研究适配器结构的稀疏设计和有效放置，帮助我们的 RepAdaper 在参数效率和性能方面获得其他优势。为了验证 RepAdapter，我们对图像和视频分类以及语义分割这三个视觉任务的 27 个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明 RepAdapter 比最先进的 PETL 方法具有更优越的性能和效率。例如，RepAdapter 的性能平均比完全调优高出 7.2%，并且在 VTAB-1k 上节省了 ViT-B/16 高达 25% 的训练时间、20% GPU 内存和 94.6% 的存储成本。 RepAdapter的泛化能力也得到了一堆视觉模型的良好验证。我们的源代码发布于 https://github.com/luogen1996/RepAdapter。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RepAdapter的参数高效且计算友好的适配器，用于大规模视觉模型的高效视觉适配。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效迁移学习（PETL）方法虽节省存储成本，但推理时延仍较高，亟需兼顾参数效率与计算效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过结构重参数化技术，将常见适配模块无缝集成至视觉模型，实现零成本推理；并研究稀疏设计与适配器结构的有效部署位置。
AI.result: 在27个视觉任务基准数据集上，RepAdapter平均优于全量微调7.2%，在ViT-B/16上节省25%训练时间、20%GPU内存及94.6%存储成本，且具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RepAdapter通过结构重参数化实现了参数效率与计算效率的平衡，在性能与成本上优于现有PETL方法，代码已开源。

authors_text: Minsu Kim,Hyung-Il Kim,Yong Man Ro
title: Prompt Tuning of Deep Neural Networks for Speaker-adaptive Visual Speech Recognition
title_zh: 快速调整深度神经网络以实现说话者自适应视觉语音识别
abstract: Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) aims to infer speech into text depending on lip movements alone. As it focuses on visual information to model the speech, its performance is inherently sensitive to personal lip appearances and movements, and this makes the VSR models show degraded performance when they are applied to unseen speakers. In this paper, to remedy the performance degradation of the VSR model on unseen speakers, we propose prompt tuning methods of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) for speaker-adaptive VSR. Specifically, motivated by recent advances in Natural Language Processing (NLP), we finetune prompts on adaptation data of target speakers instead of modifying the pre-trained model parameters. Different from the previous prompt tuning methods mainly limited to Transformer variant architecture, we explore different types of prompts, the addition, the padding, and the concatenation form prompts that can be applied to the VSR model which is composed of CNN and Transformer in general. With the proposed prompt tuning, we show that the performance of the pre-trained VSR model on unseen speakers can be largely improved by using a small amount of adaptation data (e.g., less than 5 minutes), even if the pre-trained model is already developed with large speaker variations. Moreover, by analyzing the performance and parameters of different types of prompts, we investigate when the prompt tuning is preferred over the finetuning methods. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated on both word- and sentence-level VSR databases, LRW-ID and GRID.
summary: Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) aims to infer speech into text depending on lip movements alone. As it focuses on visual information to model the speech, its performance is inherently sensitive to personal lip appearances and movements, and this makes the VSR models show degraded performance when they are applied to unseen speakers. In this paper, to remedy the performance degradation of the VSR model on unseen speakers, we propose prompt tuning methods of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) for speaker-adaptive VSR. Specifically, motivated by recent advances in Natural Language Processing (NLP), we finetune prompts on adaptation data of target speakers instead of modifying the pre-trained model parameters. Different from the previous prompt tuning methods mainly limited to Transformer variant architecture, we explore different types of prompts, the addition, the padding, and the concatenation form prompts that can be applied to the VSR model which is composed of CNN and Transformer in general. With the proposed prompt tuning, we show that the performance of the pre-trained VSR model on unseen speakers can be largely improved by using a small amount of adaptation data (e.g., less than 5 minutes), even if the pre-trained model is already developed with large speaker variations. Moreover, by analyzing the performance and parameters of different types of prompts, we investigate when the prompt tuning is preferred over the finetuning methods. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated on both word- and sentence-level VSR databases, LRW-ID and GRID.
abstract_zh: 视觉语音识别（VSR）旨在仅根据嘴唇动作将语音推断为文本。由于它专注于视觉信息来对语音进行建模，因此其性能本质上对个人嘴唇的外观和动作很敏感，这使得 VSR 模型在应用于看不见的说话者时表现出性能下降。在本文中，为了弥补 VSR 模型在看不见的说话人上的性能下降，我们提出了用于说话人自适应 VSR 的深度神经网络（DNN）的快速调整方法。具体来说，受自然语言处理（NLP）最新进展的推动，我们对目标说话者的适应数据的提示进行微调，而不是修改预先训练的模型参数。与之前主要局限于 Transformer 变体架构的提示调整方法不同，我们探索了可以应用于一般由 CNN 和 Transformer 组成的 VSR 模型的不同类型的提示、添加、填充和串联形式的提示。通过所提出的提示调整，我们表明，即使预训练模型已经开发了较大的说话人变化，通过使用少量的适应数据（例如，少于 5 分钟）也可以大大提高未见过的说话人的预训练 VSR 模型的性能。此外，通过分析不同类型提示的性能和参数，我们研究了提示调整何时优于微调方法。该方法的有效性在词级和句子级 VSR 数据库、LRW-ID 和 GRID 上进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示调优的深度神经网络方法，用于改进视觉语音识别（VSR）在未见过的说话人上的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉语音识别模型对个人唇部外观和运动高度敏感，导致在未见过的说话人上性能下降。传统微调方法需修改预训练参数，效率较低。
AI.method: 受自然语言处理启发，通过在目标说话人适配数据上微调提示而非修改预训练模型参数，探索适用于CNN和Transformer结构的提示形式（添加、填充、拼接）。
AI.result: 使用少量适配数据（如少于5分钟）即可显著提升预训练模型在未见过说话人上的性能，并分析了提示调优优于微调的场景。
AI.conclusion: 提示调优为说话人自适应VSR提供了灵活高效的解决方案，在特定条件下优于传统微调方法。

Different from the previous prompt tuning methods mainly limited to Transformer variant architecture, we explore different types of prompts, the addition, the padding, and the concatenation form prompts that can be applied to the VSR model which is composed of CNN and Transformer in general. With the proposed prompt tuning, we show that the performance of the pre-trained VSR model on unseen speakers can be largely improved by using a small amount of adaptation data (e.g., less than 5 minutes), even if the pre-trained model is already developed with large speaker variations. Moreover, by analyzing the performance and parameters of different types of prompts, we investigate when the prompt tuning is preferred over the finetuning methods. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated on both word- and sentence-level VSR databases, LRW-ID and GRID. 视觉语音识别（VSR）旨在仅根据嘴唇动作将语音推断为文本。由于它专注于视觉信息来对语音进行建模，因此其性能本质上对个人嘴唇的外观和动作很敏感，这使得 VSR 模型在应用于看不见的说话者时表现出性能下降。在本文中，为了弥补 VSR 模型在看不见的说话人上的性能下降，我们提出了用于说话人自适应 VSR 的深度神经网络（DNN）的快速调整方法。具体来说，受自然语言处理（NLP）最新进展的推动，我们对目标说话者的适应数据的提示进行微调，而不是修改预先训练的模型参数。与之前主要局限于 Transformer 变体架构的提示调整方法不同，我们探索了可以应用于一般由 CNN 和 Transformer 组成的 VSR 模型的不同类型的提示、添加、填充和串联形式的提示。通过所提出的提示调整，我们表明，即使预训练模型已经开发了较大的说话人变化，通过使用少量的适应数据（例如，少于 5 分钟）也可以大大提高未见过的说话人的预训练 VSR 模型的性能。此外，通过分析不同类型提示的性能和参数，我们研究了提示调整何时优于微调方法。该方法的有效性在词级和句子级 VSR 数据库、LRW-ID 和 GRID 上进行了评估。 本文提出一种基于提示调优的深度神经网络方法，用于改进视觉语音识别（VSR）在未见过的说话人上的性能。 Minsu Kim,Hyung-Il Kim,Yong Man Ro cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Wei Wang,Xiaojing Cao,Alejandro Gonzalez-Garcia,Lianhao Yin,Niklas Hagemann,Yuanyuan Qiao,Carlo Ratti,Daniela Rus
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Based Tracking Control of an Autonomous Surface Vessel in Natural Waters
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的自然水域自主水面船舶跟踪控制
abstract: Accurate control of autonomous marine robots still poses challenges due to the complex dynamics of the environment. In this paper, we propose a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) approach to train a controller for autonomous surface vessel (ASV) trajectory tracking and compare its performance with an advanced nonlinear model predictive controller (NMPC) in real environments. Taking into account environmental disturbances (e.g., wind, waves, and currents), noisy measurements, and non-ideal actuators presented in the physical ASV, several effective reward functions for DRL tracking control policies are carefully designed. The control policies were trained in a simulation environment with diverse tracking trajectories and disturbances. The performance of the DRL controller has been verified and compared with the NMPC in both simulations with model-based environmental disturbances and in natural waters. Simulations show that the DRL controller has 53.33% lower tracking error than that of NMPC. Experimental results further show that, compared to NMPC, the DRL controller has 35.51% lower tracking error, indicating that DRL controllers offer better disturbance rejection in river environments than NMPC.
summary: Accurate control of autonomous marine robots still poses challenges due to the complex dynamics of the environment. In this paper, we propose a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) approach to train a controller for autonomous surface vessel (ASV) trajectory tracking and compare its performance with an advanced nonlinear model predictive controller (NMPC) in real environments. Taking into account environmental disturbances (e.g., wind, waves, and currents), noisy measurements, and non-ideal actuators presented in the physical ASV, several effective reward functions for DRL tracking control policies are carefully designed. The control policies were trained in a simulation environment with diverse tracking trajectories and disturbances. The performance of the DRL controller has been verified and compared with the NMPC in both simulations with model-based environmental disturbances and in natural waters. Simulations show that the DRL controller has 53.33% lower tracking error than that of NMPC. Experimental results further show that, compared to NMPC, the DRL controller has 35.51% lower tracking error, indicating that DRL controllers offer better disturbance rejection in river environments than NMPC.
abstract_zh: 由于环境的复杂动态，自主海洋机器人的精确控制仍然面临挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度强化学习（DRL）方法来训练用于自主水面舰艇（ASV）轨迹跟踪的控制器，并将其性能与真实环境中的先进非线性模型预测控制器（NMPC）进行比较。考虑到物理 ASV 中存在的环境干扰（例如风、波浪和水流）、噪声测量和非理想执行器，精心设计了 DRL 跟踪控制策略的几种有效奖励函数。控制策略在具有不同跟踪轨迹和干扰的模拟环境中进行训练。 DRL 控制器的性能已在基于模型的环境扰动模拟和自然水域中得到验证，并与 NMPC 进行了比较。仿真结果表明，DRL控制器的跟踪误差比NMPC降低了53.33%。实验结果进一步表明，与NMPC相比，DRL控制器的跟踪误差降低了35.51%，表明DRL控制器在河流环境中比NMPC具有更好的抗扰能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的自主水面船舶（ASV）轨迹跟踪控制方法，并在自然水域中验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 由于环境动态复杂（如风、浪、洋流等）及传感器噪声等因素，传统控制器在自主水面船舶轨迹跟踪中面临挑战，需开发更鲁棒的控制策略。
AI.method: 设计针对DRL的奖励函数，考虑环境扰动和非理想执行器，在仿真环境中训练控制策略，并在基于模型的仿真和实际自然水域中与非线性模型预测控制器（NMPC）对比验证。
AI.result: 仿真中DRL控制器跟踪误差比NMPC低53.33%，实际河域实验中跟踪误差降低35.51%。
AI.conclusion: DRL控制器在自然水域中表现出更优的抗扰动能力，优于传统NMPC方法，为复杂环境下的ASV控制提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Muqiao Yang,Joseph Konan,David Bick,Yunyang Zeng,Shuo Han,Anurag Kumar,Shinji Watanabe,Bhiksha Raj
title: PAAPLoss: A Phonetic-Aligned Acoustic Parameter Loss for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: PAAPLoss：用于语音增强的语音对齐声学参数损失
abstract: Despite rapid advancement in recent years, current speech enhancement models often produce speech that differs in perceptual quality from real clean speech. We propose a learning objective that formalizes differences in perceptual quality, by using domain knowledge of acoustic-phonetics. We identify temporal acoustic parameters -- such as spectral tilt, spectral flux, shimmer, etc. -- that are non-differentiable, and we develop a neural network estimator that can accurately predict their time-series values across an utterance. We also model phoneme-specific weights for each feature, as the acoustic parameters are known to show different behavior in different phonemes. We can add this criterion as an auxiliary loss to any model that produces speech, to optimize speech outputs to match the values of clean speech in these features. Experimentally we show that it improves speech enhancement workflows in both time-domain and time-frequency domain, as measured by standard evaluation metrics. We also provide an analysis of phoneme-dependent improvement on acoustic parameters, demonstrating the additional interpretability that our method provides. This analysis can suggest which features are currently the bottleneck for improvement.
summary: Despite rapid advancement in recent years, current speech enhancement models often produce speech that differs in perceptual quality from real clean speech. We propose a learning objective that formalizes differences in perceptual quality, by using domain knowledge of acoustic-phonetics. We identify temporal acoustic parameters -- such as spectral tilt, spectral flux, shimmer, etc. -- that are non-differentiable, and we develop a neural network estimator that can accurately predict their time-series values across an utterance. We also model phoneme-specific weights for each feature, as the acoustic parameters are known to show different behavior in different phonemes. We can add this criterion as an auxiliary loss to any model that produces speech, to optimize speech outputs to match the values of clean speech in these features. Experimentally we show that it improves speech enhancement workflows in both time-domain and time-frequency domain, as measured by standard evaluation metrics. We also provide an analysis of phoneme-dependent improvement on acoustic parameters, demonstrating the additional interpretability that our method provides. This analysis can suggest which features are currently the bottleneck for improvement.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来取得了快速发展，但当前的语音增强模型通常产生的语音在感知质量上与真实的干净语音不同。我们提出了一个学习目标，通过使用声学语音学领域知识来形式化感知质量的差异。我们识别了不可微分的时间声学参数，例如频谱倾斜、频谱通量、闪烁等，并且开发了一种神经网络估计器，可以准确预测整个话语中的时间序列值。我们还为每个特征对特定于音素的权重进行建模，因为已知声学参数在不同音素中表现出不同的行为。我们可以将此标准作为辅助损失添加到任何生成语音的模型中，以优化语音输出以匹配这些特征中干净语音的值。通过实验，我们证明它可以改善时域和时频域中的语音增强工作流程（通过标准评估指标来衡量）。我们还提供了对声学参数的音素相关改进的分析，证明了我们的方法提供的额外可解释性。此分析可以表明哪些功能是当前改进的瓶颈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAAPLoss，一种结合语音学对齐的声学参数损失函数，用于改进语音增强模型的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强模型生成的语音在感知质量上与真实干净语音存在差异，需通过领域知识优化模型学习目标。
AI.method: 识别非微分声学参数（如频谱倾斜、shimmer等），构建神经网络预测其时间序列，并为不同音素设计特征权重，作为辅助损失加入模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在时域和时频域语音增强任务中均提升性能，且通过音素依赖分析揭示了当前声学参数的改进瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: PAAPLoss通过引入可解释的声学参数约束，有效提升语音增强效果，并为模型优化提供明确方向。

authors_text: Cheng Chu,Lei Jiang,Martin Swany,Fan Chen
title: QTrojan: A Circuit Backdoor Against Quantum Neural Networks
title_zh: QTrojan：针对量子神经网络的电路后门
abstract: We propose a circuit-level backdoor attack, \textit{QTrojan}, against Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) in this paper. QTrojan is implemented by few quantum gates inserted into the variational quantum circuit of the victim QNN. QTrojan is much stealthier than a prior Data-Poisoning-based Backdoor Attack (DPBA), since it does not embed any trigger in the inputs of the victim QNN or require the access to original training datasets. Compared to a DPBA, QTrojan improves the clean data accuracy by 21\% and the attack success rate by 19.9\%.
summary: We propose a circuit-level backdoor attack, \textit{QTrojan}, against Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) in this paper. QTrojan is implemented by few quantum gates inserted into the variational quantum circuit of the victim QNN. QTrojan is much stealthier than a prior Data-Poisoning-based Backdoor Attack (DPBA), since it does not embed any trigger in the inputs of the victim QNN or require the access to original training datasets. Compared to a DPBA, QTrojan improves the clean data accuracy by 21\% and the attack success rate by 19.9\%.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中提出了针对量子神经网络（QNN）的电路级后门攻击 \textit{QTrojan}。 QTrojan 是通过插入受害者 QNN 的变分量子电路中的几个量子门来实现的。 QTrojan 比之前的基于数据中毒的后门攻击 (DPBA) 更加隐蔽，因为它不会在受害者 QNN 的输入中嵌入任何触发器，也不需要访问原始训练数据集。与DPBA相比，QTrojan将干净数据准确率提高了21%，攻击成功率提高了19.9%。

AI.motivation: 现有数据投毒型后门攻击需依赖输入触发器或原始训练数据，存在隐蔽性不足和数据依赖性高的问题，亟需更隐蔽且无需数据访问的攻击方法。
AI.method: 在受害者QNN的变分量子电路中插入少量量子门，构建电路级后门触发机制，无需修改输入数据或访问原始训练集。
AI.result: 相比数据投毒攻击，QTrojan在干净数据准确率提升21%，攻击成功率提高19.9%，且无需触发器或训练数据访问。
AI.conclusion: QTrojan通过电路级修改实现了更隐蔽、更高效的QNN后门攻击，为量子机器学习安全研究提供了新视角和挑战。

search_text: QTrojan: A Circuit Backdoor Against Quantum Neural Networks QTrojan：针对量子神经网络的电路后门 We propose a circuit-level backdoor attack, \textit{QTrojan}, against Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) in this paper. QTrojan is implemented by few quantum gates inserted into the variational quantum circuit of the victim QNN. QTrojan is much stealthier than a prior Data-Poisoning-based Backdoor Attack (DPBA), since it does not embed any trigger in the inputs of the victim QNN or require the access to original training datasets. Compared to a DPBA, QTrojan improves the clean data accuracy by 21\% and the attack success rate by 19.9\%. 我们在本文中提出了针对量子神经网络（QNN）的电路级后门攻击 \textit{QTrojan}。 QTrojan 是通过插入受害者 QNN 的变分量子电路中的几个量子门来实现的。 QTrojan 比之前的基于数据中毒的后门攻击 (DPBA) 更加隐蔽，因为它不会在受害者 QNN 的输入中嵌入任何触发器，也不需要访问原始训练数据集。与DPBA相比，QTrojan将干净数据准确率提高了21%，攻击成功率提高了19.9%。 本文提出一种针对量子神经网络（QNN）的电路级后门攻击方法QTrojan，通过在受害者QNN的变分量子电路中插入少量量子门实现。 Cheng Chu,Lei Jiang,Martin Swany,Fan Chen quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.CR
